Numbers18:19 Cuna churäwinactejj israelitanacajj nayatac yakhachapcani, ucanacjja jumaruw churjjäma, uqhamarac yokall wawamataqui, imill wawamataqui jumampi chica jacasqui ucanacataquiraquïniwa. Acasti wiñayatac leyiraquïniwa. Mä jan p'aquintcaya arust'äwiraquïniwa, wiñayataqui, cuntejj nayajj lurcta jumampi, wawanacamampi.”" 
Numbers18:20 Tatitu Diosasti Aaronarojj sänwa: “Janiw jumanjja orakemasa, ni herenciamasa israelanjja utjcaniti mayni israelitanacanjamajja. Nayaw juman orakemäyäjja, herenciamäyäsa, Israel marcanjja." 
Numbers18:21 “Levitanacarojj mä herenciäcaspas uqhamawa churta, cuntejj israelitanacajj achunacapat sapa tuncat maya churañanacapäqui ucanaca, jupanacan pagopawa Jiquisiñ Carpan sirvipjjatapata." 
Numbers18:22 Mayni israelitanacajj janiw Jiquisiñ Carparojj jac'achasipcaniti, uqham lurasajj mä juchwa lurapjjaspa ucatsti jiwañaraquiw jupanacarojj jutaspa." 
Numbers18:23 Levitanacaquiw Jiquisiñ Carpan luräwinacapampejj phokhapjjani, jupanacaraquiw juchañchatäni cuna jan walinacatejj lurascani ucanacatsa. Ucasti wiñayatac uchat leyiraquïniwa, jumanacataqui uqhamarac wawanacamataqui. Levitanacasti janiw orakenïpcaniti Israelanjja." 
Numbers18:24 Jupanacarusti churtwa cuntejj israelitanacajj achunacapat sapa tuncat maya churapcani ucanaca. Ucatwa sista janiw Israelan orakenacamajj utjcaniti” sasa. 
Numbers18:25 Tatitusti Moisesarojj saraquïnwa: 
Numbers18:26 “Levitanacarojj aqham sätawa: Cunapachatejj israelitanacan achunacapat sapa tuncat maya catokapcani ucatjja sapa tuncat maya yakhachapjjpan nayaru loktañanacapataqui. 
Numbers18:27 Ucaw jupanacan ofrendapäni, cunjämtejj israelitanacajj churapqui uca quipca trigonacapatsa, uqhamaraqui vinonacapatsa." 
Numbers18:28 Uqhamaraquiw sapa tuncat maya israelitanacajj churapcani ucanacatjja levitanacajj yakhachapjjañapawa Tatitur churañataqui, ucanacsti sacerdote Aaronaruw churapjjañapa." 
Numbers18:29 Take cunanactejj catokapcani ucanacatjja, yakhachapjjañapawa nayaru ofrenda churañataquejja, cuntejj nayaru loktapquitani ucanacajj sumäñapawa." 
Numbers18:30 “Ucjjarusti saraquim: “Cunapachatejj nayataquejj sumäqui ucat yakhachjjapjjani, ucat jilt'anacjja jupanacan trigopäcaspasa, vinopäcaspasa uqhama uñt'asjjapjjani," 
Numbers18:31 ucanacatsti mank'asjjapjjasmawa jumanacasa, familianacamasa, cawqha chekansa; ucajj jumanacan Jiquisiñ Carpan irnakatanacamat pagötap laycu." 
Numbers18:32 Cunapachatejj nayatac sumäqui uca yakhachjjapjjäta ucqhajj mank'asjjapjjätawa jilt'anacatjja jan jucha lurasa, uqhamatwa Israelitanacan k'oma ofrendapjja jan k'añuchapcätati, ucatsti janiraquiw jiwapcätati.”" 
Numbers19:1 Tatitojj Moisesampiru, Aaronampirojj sänwa:" 
Numbers19:2 “Naya Tatituw acanac arsta. Parlam israelitanacarojj mä wila vaca juman ucaru irpanipjjpan, uca vacasti janiraqui usuchjatäcpansa, ni mä cutisa cuncaparojj yugojj ayjjatatäpanti." 
Numbers19:3 Jumanacasti Eleazar sacerdoteruw churapjjäta, ucatsti jupaw campamento ankäjjar irpsuwayasinjja jupan uñjcata qharinucuyani." 
Numbers19:4 Eleazar sacerdotesti luc'anapar mä juc'a wilaru aytasinjja, pakallko cutiw Jiquisiñ Carpa tokeru ch'allt'ani." 
Numbers19:5 Ucatsti uca vacjja jupan uñjcataw naqhantayapjjani lip'ichipsa, aychapsa, wilapsa, uqhamarac guanupsa." 
Numbers19:6 Ucjjarusti sacerdotejj cedro lawa aptasina, mä hisopo rama uqhamarac mä wila tela apjjarusinjja ninaruw jakontani, cawqhantejj vacajj naqhantasqui ucaru." 
Numbers19:7 Ucatsti sacerdotejj isipa t'ajjsusini, uqhamaraquiw janchipsa jarekasini, take ucanac lurasasti campamentorojj mantjjaraquiniwa, ucampisa janiw k'omachatäquiti jayp'ucamajja." 
Numbers19:8 Uqhamaraquiw cawquïri jaketejj vaca naqhantayqui ucajj isipa t'ajjsokasini, janchipsa jarekasiraquini, ucatsti janiw k'omachatäquiti jayp'ucamajja." 
Numbers19:9 Mayni k'omachat jakesti, naqhantayat vacan khellanacap apjjaruwayasinjja, mä k'oma chekaruw uchanini campamentot ankäjjaru. Uca khellatsti Israel marcajj k'omachasir umwa waquichapjjani. Take ucanacasti juchanacat sacrificiöniwa." 
Numbers19:10 Cawquïritejj khella apthapqui ucajj isip t'ajjsokasini, ucatsti janïraw k'omäquiti jayp'ucamajja. Ucasti wiñayatac leyïniwa, take jumanac israelitanacataqui, uqhamarac jumanac taypin jaquir jaya marcat jutir jaketaquisa." 
Numbers19:11 “Cawquïritejj mä jiwat jaken janchipa llamct'cani ucajj pakallko urunacaw k'añuchata uñjasini. 
Numbers19:12 Ucat quimsa ururu, jan ucqhajj pakallko ururusa k'omachasiñ umampiw k'omachasiñapa, ucatsti k'omachataw uñjasjjani. Janitejj k'omachascani quimsïri ururu jan ucajj pakallko ururusa, ucqhajj janiw k'omachat uñjascaniti." 
Numbers19:13 Cawquïritejj mä jiwat jaken janchipa llamct'cani, janiraqui k'omachascaniti, ucasti Tatitun kollan utapwa k'añuchi, ucapachasti jakonucutäñapaw Israel marcatjja, jan k'omachasir umampi ch'allt'atätapata, uqhamarac k'añuchata jicjjatasitap laycu." 
Numbers19:14 “Acaw leyinacajja cunapachatejj maynejj carpa mankhen jiwani ucanacataquejja: Take cawquïrinacatejj carpa mankhen jicjjatasipjjani, uqhamarac take cawquïrinacatejj ucaru mantapjjani, ucanacajj k'añuchataw pakallko uru uñjasipjjani." 
Numbers19:15 Take cawquïri vasijanacatejj jan khopintata jicjjatasipjjani, khopiñasa jan wali khopintata, ucanacasti k'añuchataw jicjjatasipjjani." 
Numbers19:16 “Cawquïritejj pampan mä jaken jiwayat jiwat janchipa, jan ucajj jupapachpa jiwata jaken janchipa llamct'cani, uqhamaraqui jaken ch'aqhanacapsa, sepulturanacsa llamct'cani ucasti pakallko uruw k'añuchata jicjjatasini." 
Numbers19:17 “Uqhama k'añunquirinacataquejj mä juc'a khella apthapisini, cawquïri vacatejj juchanacat sacrificiotaqui churatäqui ucata, ucsti mä vasijaruw uchani, suma k'oma jalsur umampiraquiw warjjatasini." 
Numbers19:18 Ucatsti mä k'omachat jakew mä hisopo rama aptasinjja umaru juricht'ani, ucampiw carparu ch'allaquipani, vasijanacaru uqhamarac cawquïri jakenacatejj ucan jicjjatasipqui ucanacaru, uca quipcaraqui cawquïritejj ch'aqhanacsa, jiwayat jaken janchinacapsa, jupa quipca jiwcatayna ucan janchipsa, sepulturanacsa llamct'catayna ucarusa." 
Numbers19:19 K'omachat jakewa ch'allaquipani k'añuchat jakerojja, quimsïri uruna jan ucajj pakallköri urunsa. Pakallko ururusti juchanacapatjja k'omachatäjjapjjaniwa. Ucatsti k'añu jakejj isipa t'ajjsusiñapa, jarekasiñaparaquiwa, ucampisa k'añüsquiwa, janïraw jayp'ucamajj k'omachatäquiti." 
Numbers19:20 Mä jaketejj jan k'omachatäcän ucajj apanucutaw uñjasini jakenac taypitjja, jupan Diosan santuarioparu k'añuchatap laycu. K'omachasir umampi jan ch'allaquipasitap laycusti, k'añuquïsquiwa." 
Numbers19:21 Aca leyisti wiñayataquiraquiwa, cawquïritejj mayniru k'omachasir umampi ch'allaquipcani, ucajj isipjja t'ajjsurasiraquiniwa. Cawquïritejj k'omachasir uma llamct'qui ucasti k'añuchataw jayp'ucam uñjasini." 
Numbers19:22 Take cuntejj k'añu jakejj llamct'cani ucajj k'añuchatäniwa, cawquïritejj mä k'añu jaquir llamct'cani, ucasti k'añuchataraquiw jayp'ucam uñjasini.”" 
Numbers20:1 Marat mä phajjsi sarakquipansti, israelitanacajj Zin sat wasararuw puripjjäna; take marcpachaw Cades sat chekana kamarapjjäna. Ucanwa Mariajj jiwjjäna, ucanaracwa imantatäjjäna." 
Numbers20:2 Jakenacasti jan uma utjatapatsti, takpachani tantachasisinjja, Moisés uqhamarac Aarón contra arsusiñataquiw sartasipjjäna." 
Numbers20:3 Moisesarojj sapjjänwa: —¡Walïsapanwa jiwarapjjañanacajjajja, Tatitojj mayni israelitanacar jiwarayqui ucanacampi chica!" 
Numbers20:4 ¿Cunataquis jumanacajj Tatitun marcapar aca wasarar irpanipjjta? ¿Munapjjtati nanacana, uywanacajjansa aca wasaran jiwarapjjañanacajja?" 
Numbers20:5 ¿Cunataquis Egiptot irpsunipjjesta aca ajjsarcañ wasararu puriyaniñcama? Acansti janiw cunas yapuchañjamäquiti, janiw higo kokanacasa, ni uva yapunacasa, ni granado kokanacasa utjquiti; ni umasa umt'añatac utjquiti —sasa." 
Numbers20:6 Moisesampi Aaronampisti jakenacatjja jithektapjjänwa, Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpana mantañaparuw sarjjapjjäna; ucqhansti oraker puriñcamaw p'ekenacap alt'apjjäna, ucatsti Tatitun jach'a cancañapaw uñstäna." 
Numbers20:7 Ucatsti Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers20:8 —Jach'a thujrum catum, ucatsti Aarón jilaman yanapapampejj takpach marcaru tantachthapim. Ucatsti take jakenaca nayrakatanjja karkaru parlam uma churañapataqui, ucatwa uñjäta karkat uma mistuniri, jupanacan uqhamarac uywanacapan umt'apjjañapataqui." 
Numbers20:9 Moisesasti Tatitun nayrakatapatwa thujrup aytanïna cunjämtejj jupajj siscatayna uqhama. 
Numbers20:10 Ucjjarusti Moisesampi Aaronampejj take jakenacaruw tantachthapipjjäna karka nayräjjana, Moisesasti sänwa: —Ist'apjjam Tatitu contra sayt'asir jakenaca, ¿aca karkatti uma apsuñäni umarapjjañamataqui? —sasa." 
Numbers20:11 Moisesasti uca arunac arsusinjja amparap altoruw aytäna, ucatsti pä cutiw thujrupampi karkaru jisctäna, ucatsti walja umaw jalsüna. Uqhamatwa jakenacasa, uywanacasa umarapjjäna." 
Numbers20:12 Ucampisa Tatitojj Moisesampir, Aaronampirojj sänwa: —Jumanacasti janiw nayaru ist'apquistati, ni jach'añchapcaraquistasa israelitanac nayrakatanjja, ucatwa jani mantapcätati aca jakenacampejj cawquïri oraktejj churä siscta ucarojja —sasa." 
Numbers20:13 Acawa Meriba sat uma jalsunacajja; cawqhantejj israelitanacajj Tatitu contra arsupjjäna; ucanwa Jupajj Kollan cancañapa uñacht'ayäna. 
Numbers20:14 Moisesasti Cades sat chekatwa, jakenacaru qhitäna Edom marcan reyiparu, aqham sañapataqui: —Israelita jilanacamajj aqham sañataquiw qhitanipjjetu: “Jumasti sum yattajja wali ch'ama tucutanacajj-jja." 
Numbers20:15 Nanacan awquinacajjasti Egiptoruw sarjjapjjäna, ucatsti walja maranacaraquiw ucan jacapjjaraquïna, ucampisa egipcionacajj awquinacajjarjamaraquiquiw jan wali uñjapquitänti." 
Numbers20:16 Ucatsti Tatituruw arnakasipjjta, jupasti ist'apjjetuwa mayisitanacajjarojja, angelap qhitanipjjetu, ucatwa Egiptot irpsunipjjaraquitu. Uqhamaw jichhajj Cades sat marcancapjjta, orakemampis korpasqui ucqhana." 
Numbers20:17 Achict'asipjjsmaw orakemanjam past'ayañamataqui; janiw pasapcäti yapuchat yapunacamanjama ni uva yapunacamanjamsa ni phuch'unacamatsa umt'apcaraquïti. Thaquinjamacwa sarapjjaraquï, janiraquiw ucatjja cawcsarusa sarakapcäti orakenacam pasañcamajja” sasa." 
Numbers20:18 Ucampis Edom reyejj sänwa: —Janiw orakejjanjam pasapcasmati, mantanipjjät ucqhajja ejercitojjampiw nuwantañatac mistunï —sasa." 
Numbers20:19 Israelitanacajj ucjjarojj sapjjänwa: —Reyin thaquipanjamwa sarapjjä, nanacatï, uqhamarac uywanacajjasa phuch'unacamat umt'apjjani ucqhajj pagapjjämawa, orakem cheka past'añac munapjjta —sasa." 
Numbers20:20 Ucampisa Edom reyejj: —Janiw pasapcasmati —sascaquïnwa. Ucatsti israelitanacampi nuwasiñataquejj wali ch'amani ejercitopampiw mistunïna, uqhamarac suma armanacampi," 
Numbers20:21 jan orakepanjam pasayañataqui, ucatsti israelitanacajj yakha thacwa thakhasipjjäna." 
Numbers20:22 Take Israel marcajj Cades sat chekat sartawayasajj, Hor sat kollu tokeruw sarapjjäna." 
Numbers20:23 Edom orakempi korpasqui uca chekanjja, Tatitojj Moisesampiru, Aaronampirojj aqham sänwa:" 
Numbers20:24 “Aaronasti jiwjjaniwa, janiw mantcaspati cawquïri oraktejj israelitanacaru churä siscta ucarojja, jan jumanacajj Meriba chekan arunacajjar ist'apquistati uca laycu." 
Numbers20:25 Jumasti Moisés, irpam Aaronaru, uqhamarac Eleazar, wawaparusa Hor sat kollu pataru." 
Numbers20:26 Ucanwa Aaronarojj sacerdote isipa issuyäta, ucatsti Eleazararuw isintayäta; Aaronasti ucanwa jiwaraquini” sasa." 
Numbers20:27 Moisesasti cunjämtejj Tatitojj siscatayna uqhamwa luräna. Take israelitanacan uñjcataw Hor sat kollurojj maqhatapjjäna. 
Numbers20:28 Ucqhanwa Moisesajj Aaronarojj sacerdote isipa issuyäna, ucatsti Eleazararuw isintayäna. Uca pachpa kollu patjjanwa Aaronajj jiwjjaraquïna; Moisesampi Eleazarampisti kollutjja sarakanjjapjjänwa." 
Numbers20:29 Israelitanacasti Aaronan jiwatap yatisajj quimsa tunca urunacaw jupatjja jachapjjäna. 
Numbers21:1 Cunapachatejj Néguev chekan jaquiri, Arad marcanquir cananeo reyejj israelitanacan Atarim thaquinjam jutascatapatjja ist'än ucqhajj, israelitanacampi nuwasiriw mistunïna, ucatsti yakhepanacarojj prisioneronacwa catuntanipjjäna." 
Numbers21:2 Ucatsti israelitanacajj Tatituruw arunacapampi arsupjjäna: “Jumatejj aca marcar atipjañ yanapapjjetät ucqhajj nanacajj k'alwa uca marcanac tucjapjjä” sasa. 
Numbers21:3 Tatitusti ist'änwa cuntejj israelitanacajj mayipcatayna ucarojja, ucatsti yanapt'änwa atipjañataquejja. Israelitanacajj takwa cananeonacarojj t'unjapjjäna, uca quipcaraqui marcanacapsa, ucatwa uca chekarojj Horma sas sutichapjjäna." 
Numbers21:4 Israelitanacajj Hor sat kollut mistuwayasajj, Mar Rojo thaquinjamwa sarapjjäna, muytapjjaraquïnwa jan Edom orakenjam pasañataqui. Jakenacasti karjataw thaquinjja jicjjatasipjjäna." 
Numbers21:5 Ucatsti Dios contra, uqhamarac Moisés contraw parlañ kalltapjjäna aqham sasa: —¿Cunatsa jumanacajj Egiptot irpsunipjjesta? ¿Wasaran jiwarañataquiti irpsunipjjesta? Janiw umasa, mank'as utjapquituti. Nanacasti aca mank'ampejj amjayasjjapjjaractwa —sasa." 
Numbers21:6 Ucat Tatitojj jiwayir catarinacwa apayanïna, ucanacasti jupanacarojj achjaränwa; walja israelitanacaw jiwararaquïna." 
Numbers21:7 Ucatwa jakenacajj Moisesan ucaru sarapjjäna, aqham sasa: —Jucha lurapjjta Dios contra, uqhamarac juma contra parlasajja. Tatituruy mayim aca catarinac apakjjañapataqui —sasa. Ucatwa Moisesajj Tatitur mayïna israelitanacar perdonañapataqui." 
Numbers21:8 Tatitusti sänwa: —Mä catari lurasim, ucatsti mä lawar warccatam. Cunapachatejj cawquïrisa catarin achjatäni ucqhajj uñtpan uca warccatata catariru, ucatsti janiw jiwcaniti." 
Numbers21:9 Moisesasti mä catari broncet lurassina, mä lawaruw warccatäna. Cunapachatejj cawquïrisa catarin achjatäna, ucasti broncet lurat catariruw uñtäna ucatsti janiw jiwcänti." 
Numbers21:10 Israelitanacajj sarasipcaquïnwa thaquinjamjja, ucatsti Obot sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna." 
Numbers21:11 Obot chekatjja sarasipcaquïnwa, ucatsti Ije-abarim sat wasararuw sayt'apjjaraquïna, Moab oraketa inti jalsu tokeru." 
Numbers21:12 Uca chekat sartawayasinjja, Zered sat uma jalsuruw sayt'apjjäna." 
Numbers21:13 Uca chekat sartawayasinjja Arnón sat jawir qhurcataruw sayt'apjjäna. Aca jawirasti wasarana jicjjatasiraqui, amorreonacan orakepatwa mistuniraqui, ucsti Moab orakempi, amorreonacan orakepampwa jaljaraqui." 
Numbers21:14 Ucatwa Tatitun Nuwasiña Libropanjja saraqui: “Vaheb sat chekanjam pasapjjta, Sufá sat, uma jalsunacanjama, uqhamarac Arnón jawiranjama." 
Numbers21:15 Uqhamaraqui uma jalsunacan thiyanacapanjama Ar sat chekar puriñcama, cawquïritejj Moab oraken korpanacapcam purqui ucacama” sasa." 
Numbers21:16 Arnón jawiratsti Beer sat chekaruw puripjjäna. Uca chekanwa phujojj jicjjatasi, cawqhantejj Tatitojj Moisesaru aqham siscatayna: “Marcaru tantachthapim ucatsti nayaw uma churä” sasa." 
Numbers21:17 Ucapachaw israelitanacajj aca k'ochu k'ochupjjäna: “¡Uma, jalsumay phojutjja! ¡Phujurusti k'ochupjjam!" 
Numbers21:18 ¡Jilïrinacas varanacapampiw p'iyapjje, marcan yäkat jilïrinacasa, thujrunacapampiw jist'arapjjaraqui!” sasa. Wasaratjja israelitanacajj sarasipcaquïnwa Matana chekaru puriñcama." 
Numbers21:19 Matana chekatjja, Nahaliel chekaruw puripjjäna, Nahaliel chekatsti Bamut chekaruw puripjjäna," 
Numbers21:20 Bamot chekatsti, Moab chekan vallejj utjqui ucaruw puripjjäna, Pisga sat kollu tokenjama, cawqhantejj wasarajj uñstqui ucqhana." 
Numbers21:21 Israelitanacajj jakenacwa qhitapjjäna amorreonacan Sehón sat reyiparu aqham sañapataqui: 
Numbers21:22 “Nanacasti orakemanjam pasañ munapjjta. Janiw yapunacamjja taquipcäti, ni uva yapunacamsa, ni umsa umapcaraquïti phujunacamatjja. Thaquinjam sarasaquiw orakemjja pasapjjä” sasa." 
Numbers21:23 Ucampisa Sehón reyejj janiw israelitanacarojj orakepanjam pasayañ muncänti, ucatsipansa takpach jakenacap tantacht'asajj wasararuw mistunipjjäna israelitanac contra, ucatsti Jahaza chekar purisajja jupanacarojj nuwantapjjänwa." 
Numbers21:24 Ucampisa israelitanacajj sayt'asipjjänwa, jupanacarusti atipjapjjaraquïnwa, ucatsti orakenacapwa catuntasipjjäna, Arnón jawirata Jaboc sat jawircama, uqhamarac amonitanacampi korpasqui uca chekcama, cawquïritejj wali suma sayt'ayatäna." 
Numbers21:25 Uqhamaw israelitanacajj take amorreonacan marcanacap catuntasipjjäna, uqhamarac Hesbón marca takpach marcanacapampi, ucatsti ucaruw jacañataqui kheparapjjäna." 
Numbers21:26 Hesbón marcasti Sehón sat amorreo reyin jacäwipänwa. Sehón reyejj Moab oraken nayrïri reyipampejj guerrancataynawa; takpach orakepwa aparatayna Arnón sat jawircama. 
Numbers21:27 Ucatwa kellkeri jakenacajj sapjjäna: “Hesbón marcar jutapjjam, Sehón reyin marcaparu. ¡Mayampi sayt'ayapjjam, ch'amani sayt'ayapjjaraquim!" 
Numbers21:28 Hesbonatpacha, Sehón reyin marcapata, ninajj naqhantañataqui lawrsunïna, Ar sat Moab orakeruw t'unjaraquïna, uqhamarac Arnonan kollunacapsa." 
Numbers21:29 ¡Moab, jumajj jachcañätawa, aynacht'atätaw, Quemós diosan marcapa! Juparaquiw jakenacamsa jaltayaraqui, warminacamsa Sehón reyin amparapar catuyaraqui." 
Numbers21:30 Hesbon marcan ch'amapajj t'unjatawa; Dibonat Nofacamasti lakaycamaquiwa, ucatsti ninajj Medeba chekacamaw purïna.”" 
Numbers21:31 Uqhamwa israelitanacajj amorreonacan orakenacap catuntasipjjäna. 
Numbers21:32 Uca pachparaquiw Moisesajj mä kawkha jakenacar qhitäna Jazer marca uñakeri, ucatsti israelitanacajj yakha marcanacampwa catuntapjjäna, uqhamarac uca marcanacan jaquir amorreonacarus jakonucupjjänwa," 
Numbers21:33 ucatsti cuttanipjjänwa Basán thaquinjama, ucampisa Og sat Basán marcan reyipajj take ejercitopampiw mistunïna Edrei sat chekaru jupanacampi nuwasiñataqui." 
Numbers21:34 Ucatsti Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa: “Jan ajjsaramti, nayaw amparamar catuysma, take ejercitopa, uqhamarac orakepsa, cunjämtejj Sehón reyirojj lurctajja uqhamwa luräta, cawquïri amorreo reyitejj Hesbón marcana jaccäna ucaru” sasa." 
Numbers21:35 Uqhamaw israelitanacajj Og reyiru, wawanacaparu, take ejercitopar jiwarayapjjäna, janiw maynirus antutapcänti, takpach orakenacapwa catuntasipjjäna." 
Numbers22:1 Israelitanacajj thaquinjamjja sarasipcaquïnwa, ucatsti Moab pamparuw purintapjjäna, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tokeru, Jericó marca uñcatasiru." 
Numbers22:2 Balac sat Zipor chachan wawapajj yatïnwa cunjämtejj israelitanacajj amorreonacar lurcatayna ucanacjja. 
Numbers22:3 Uqhamaraquiw Moab oraken jakenacajj wal ajjsarapjjäna, israelitanacar waljanïpjjatap uñjasajja." 
Numbers22:4 Ucatwa Moab oraken jakenacajj Madián oraken jilïrinacaparojj aqham sapjjäna: “Takpach aca jakenacaw orakesarojj tucjani, cunjämas mä vacajj orakenquir pasto tucuntejj uqhama” sasa. Ucapachasti Balac chachajj Moab marcan reyipänwa." 
Numbers22:5 Ucat Balaam sat Beor chachan yokaparuw jawsayäna, jupasti Petor chekanwa jicjjatasïna, Eufrates sat jawir jac'ana, Amav sat orakena. Balac reyejj qhitänwa jakenacarojj aqham Balaamar sañapataqui: “Egiptotwa mä marcajj juti, take orakenaca ch'ekentaraqui, jichhajj nayan nayrakatajjaruw utjantasipjje." 
Numbers22:6 Jutamay jichhpacha aca marcar ñankhachañataqui naya laycu. Jupanacasti nanacatsa juc'ampi ch'amaniwa. Inas uqhamat nayajj jupanacar atipjirista, uqhamarac aca orakenacatsa alisnucurista. Nayasti yattwa juman bendicionamasa, ñankhachañamasa phokhasirïtapapuni” sasa." 
Numbers22:7 Moab oraketa, Madián oraketjja, jilïrinacajj kollke apt'ataw sarapjjäna ñankhachäwit pagañataqui, cunapachatejj Balaam jac'aru puripjjäna ucqhajj Balac reyin ewjja arunacapwa churapjjäna." 
Numbers22:8 Balaamajj jupanacarojj sänwa: —Jichha arumajj acar kheparapjjam, ucatwa nayajj sapjjäma cuntejj Diosajj luram sisquitani ucjja. Moab oraket jutir jilïrinacajj jupampiw kheparapjjäna." 
Numbers22:9 Ucampis Diosajj Balaamaruw uñstäna; aqham sasaw jisct'äna: —¿Qhitinacasa jumampi chicäqui uca jakenacajja? —sasa. 
Numbers22:10 Balaamasti Diosarojj sänwa: —Balac sat Zipor chachan yokapa, cawquïritejj Moab marcan reyipäqui ucaw qhitanitu aqham nayar sañataqui:" 
Numbers22:11 “Mä marcaw Egiptot mistuni, ucasti takpach orakeruw ch'ekenti, Balac reyisti nayan ñankhachañajwa muni, uqhamatcha atipjaspa, orakepatsa jakonucuraquispa” sasa." 
Numbers22:12 Ucatsti Diosajj Balaamarojj sänwa: —Jan jupanacampi chica saramti ni ñankhachamsa uca marcarojja, uca marcarusti nayaw bendista —sasa." 
Numbers22:13 Balaamasti khepärmanthejj alwat sartasinjja, aqham sasaw Balac reyin qhitanacaparojj säna: —Cuttjjapjjam orakemaru. Tatituw jan jumanacampi sarañajj munquiti —sasa." 
Numbers22:14 Moab oraket jutir jilïrinacajj cuttjjapjjänwa cawqhantejj Balac reyejj jicjjatascän ucqharu, ucatsti aqham sapjjänwa: —Balaamasti janiw nanacampi chica jutañ munquiti —sasa." 
Numbers22:15 Ucampis Balac reyejj mayampwa jilïrinac qhitäna, jichhasti waljaniw sarapjjäna, uqhamarac juc'ampi jach'a munañaninacäqui ucanacaw sarapjjaraquïnjja." 
Numbers22:16 Jupanacasti Balaam thiyaru purisinjja aqham sapjjänwa: —Balac sat Zipor chachan yokapajj jumarusti aqham sistamwa: “Achict'assmawa, janiquiy ‘janiw’ sistati nayan ucar jutañjja." 
Numbers22:17 Nayaw wali jach'añchäwinac churäma, take cuntejj mayquitäta ucsa nayajj phokhäwa, ucampisa jutaquimay aca marcar ñankhacharejja” —sasa." 
Numbers22:18 Ucampis Balaamajj jupanacarojj sänwa: —Balac reyejj palaciopsa, kollkepsa, koripsa phokhantatäqui uc churquitaspa ucqhas janiw ni acch'sa nayajj Tatitu Diosajjan arsutap contrajj lurquiristti." 
Numbers22:19 Ucat sipansa jichha arumajj acar kheparapjjam, ucatwa yatjjatä cunsa Tatitu Diosajjajj luram sitani ucjja —sasa." 
Numbers22:20 Uca arumajj Diosaw Balaamarojj uñstäna; aqham saraquïnwa: —Uca jakenacatejj jumaru jawsañatac jutapjjchi ucapachajj, sartasimay jupanacampi chica sararaquim, ucampis cuntejj nayajj siscäma ucac luraraquïta —sasa." 
Numbers22:21 Balaamasti khepärmanthi alwajj kachu asnopar lat'jjatasinwa Moabita jilïrinacampi chica saräna," 
Numbers22:22 Balaamajj kachu asnopar lat'jjatataw saräna, ucatsti pani uywatanacapaw jupampi chica sararaquïna. Ucampisa Diosajj wal jupataquejj colerasïna, uqham saratapata, ucatsti Diosan angelapaw jan pasayañataqui thaquiru sayantasïna." 
Numbers22:23 Cunapachatejj asnojj Tatitun angelapa uñjcäna chica thaquir sayantata, mä espada ayt'asita, ucqhajj asnojj maysaruw thaquitjja saranucüna, yakha tokenjam sarasa, ucampis Balaamajj wal asnorojj jawk'jäna thaquiru cuttayaniñataquejja." 
Numbers22:24 Ucjjarusti Diosan angelapajj mä c'ullc'u chekaruw sayt'asïna, cawqhantejj thaquejj uva yapunacanjam pasäna ucqharu, ucasti kalampi purapat perkantataraquïnwa." 
Numbers22:25 Cunapachatejj asnojj Tatitun angelaparu uñjäna ucqhajj maysa perka tokeruw liwcattäna, Balaaman cayupa usuchjasa. Ucatsti Balaamajj mayampiw asnorojj jawk'jäna." 
Numbers22:26 Ucampisa Tatitun angelapajj jupanacat nayrt'asinjja, mä c'ullc'u chekaruw sayt'asïna, ucqhatjja janiraquiw cawcsarusa saranucuñjamäcänti." 
Numbers22:27 Cunapachatejj asnojj Tatitun angelaparu uñjcän ucqhajj orakeruw liwitattäna; ucat Balaamajj wal colerasïna, asnorojj mä lawampiw jawk'jäna." 
Numbers22:28 Ucapachaw Tatitu Diosajj kachu asnorojj parlayäna, asnosti Balaamarojj sänwa: —¿Cunsa nayajj camachsma? Acampejj quimsa cutiw nayarojj jawk'jista —sasa." 
Numbers22:29 —Jumajj nayatwa phiscasisquistajja. Mä cuchillotejj amparajjan utjitaspa ucqhajj anchhitpachaw jiwayirisma —sasaw Balaamajj saraquïna. 
Numbers22:30 Ucampis asnojj sänwa: —Take jacäwimanwa nayajj qhumnaksmajja, ucsti sum yattajja, janiw nayajj uqham lurirïcti jumampejja —sasa. —Ucasti chekaw —sasaw Balaamajj saraquïna." 
Numbers22:31 Ucatsti Tatitojj angelaparuw Balaamampi uñjayäna chica thaquin sayasquiri mä espada ayt'asita. Ucapachasti Balaamajj oraker puriñcamaw p'ekep alt'asïna. 
Numbers22:32 Ucampisa Tatitu Diosan angelapajj juparojj sänwa: —¿Cunatsa jumajj quimsa cuti kachu asnomarojj jawk'jta? Nayaw jutta jumar thaqui jist'antiri, saräwimajj nayataquejj jan walïtap laycu." 
Numbers22:33 Asnosti nayarojj uñjituwa, ucatwa quimsa cuti thaquitjja saranucojja. Janitejj uqham maysaru saranuccasapäna ucqhajj, nayasti niyaw jumarojj jiwayiriscasamäna, ucampisa asnorojj janiw jiwayquiriscäyätti." 
Numbers22:34 Balaamasti Tatitun angelaparojj sänwa: —Nayasti juch lurta, janiw yattcäyätti juman uca chekan thaqui jist'antascatama. Jumataquitejj jan walïcchi nayan saratajjajja, ucqhajj utajjaruw cuttjjä —sasa." 
Numbers22:35 Ucampisa Tatitun angelapajj sänwa: —Sarascaquim uca jakenacampi chica, ucampis cuntejj nayajj siscäma ucac parlaraquïta —sasa. Balaamasti Balac reyin qhitanit jilïrinacamp chicaw saräna." 
Numbers22:36 Cunapachatejj Balac reyejj Balaaman jutascatapa yatïna ucqhasti catokeriw mistuwayäna, Moab oraken mä marcaparu, Arnón sat jawir thiyana, marcas korpasqui uca chekaru." 
Numbers22:37 Balac reyejj Balaamarojj sänwa: —Nayasti walja cutiw jutañamatac maysma, ¿cunatsa jan jutañ munta, jan ucajj janis pagquirisma uqhamcha amuyta? —sasa." 
Numbers22:38 Ucapachasti Balaamajj sänwa: —Nayasti juma jac'ancasctwa, niyaw jumar uñjir jutta. Ucampisa nayajj janiw ch'amanïcti naya pachpa parlañataqui, cuntejj Diosajj sisquitani ucac parlaraquëjja —sasa." 
Numbers22:39 Ucatsti Balaamajj Balac reyimpi chicaw sarjjäna Quiriat-huzot tokeru," 
Numbers22:40 cawqhantejj Balac reyejj vacanaca, ovejanaca jiwarayäna, ucatsti Balaamaruw apayäna, uqhamarac cawquïri jilïrinacatejj jupamp chica jutapcäna ucanacarusa." 
Numbers22:41 Khepärmanthi alwajj Balac reyejj Balaamar irptasinjja Bamot-Baal sat kolluruw irpcatäna, uca chekatsti uñjänwa israelitanacan campamento thiyanacapa." 
Numbers23:1 Ucatsti Balaamajj sänwa: —Aca chekarojj pakallko altaranac lurapjjam; waquichapjjaraquim pakallko vaca kallunaca, pakallko orko ovejanacampi —sasa." 
Numbers23:2 Balac reyejj luränwa cuntejj Balaamajj luram siscatayna uqhama, ucatsti panpachaw mä vaca kallumpi, mä orko ovejampi sacrificiot loktapjjäna sapakat altarjjaru." 
Numbers23:3 Ucjjarusti Balaamajj Balac reyirojj sänwa: —Sacrificionac loktat thiyaru kheparam, ucañcamasti nayajj saräw inas Tatitu Diosajj nayampi jiquisir jutascchi uc uñjiri. Ucampis nayajj yatiyaraquïmaw cuntejj jupajj nayar yatiyquitani ucjja —sasa. Ucapachasti Balaamajj mä wasara kolluruw sarawayjjäna," 
Numbers23:4 ucansti Diosaw juparojj uñstäna, Balaamasti sänwa: —Pakallko altaranac waquichayta, sapakat maynirojj mä vaca kallumpi, mä orko ovejampi sacrificiot loktta —sasa." 
Numbers23:5 Ucatsti Tatituw Balaaman lacaparojj uchäna cuntejj parlañapäqui ucjja, aqham sasa: —Cutt'am cawqhancquitejj Balac reyejj ucqharu, ucatsti parlam cuntejj siscsma uca —sasa." 
Numbers23:6 Balaamasti cuttjjänwa, ucatsti Balac reyirojj uñjänwa sacrificionac thiyan sayt'ata, take moabita jilïrinacampi chica." 
Numbers23:7 Ucapachaw Balaamajj aca arunac arsüna: “Inti jalsu toke kollunacata, Aram sat chekatpachwa Balac sat Moab reyejj jutayitu. ‘Jutam, Israelar ñankhacharapita’ saraquituwa, ‘Jacobon marcapataquisti jan walinac mayiraquim’ sasa." 
Numbers23:8 Ucampisa ¿cunjämsa nayajj ñankhachäjja cawquïrirutejj Diosajj jan ñankhachiqui ucarojja? ¿Cunjämsa jan walinac mayiraquëjja, Tatitutejj jan muncchi ucarojja?" 
Numbers23:9 Aca jach'a kalanac patatwa uñjta, aca jisc'a kollunac patatwa uñtaracta; yakhachataw aca marcajj jacaraqui, janiraquiw cawquïr marcjamäquisa." 
Numbers23:10 Jupanacasti lak'jamäpjjewa, ¿qhitis jact'araquispa? ¿Qhitisa kawkhätapsa yatiraquispa? Nayasti uca asqui jakenacampi chica jiwañ munirista, tucuyajjas jupanacanjamaraquïspa” sasa." 
Numbers23:11 Ucatsti Balac reyejj Balaamarojj sänwa: —¿Cunsa lurasctajja? Nayasti uñisirinacajjar ñankhachañataquiw irpayansma, jumasti jichhajj bendiciractasä —sasa." 
Numbers23:12 Ucatsti Balaamajj sänwa: —Jumampisti parltanwa cuntejj nayar Tatitu Diosajj sisquitani ucaqui sämajj —sasa. 
Numbers23:13 Ucampis Balac reyejj sascaquïnwa: —Nayampi chica jutam yakha chekaru, ucansti campamento thiya uñjaraquïta, ucampis janiw takpach campamento uñjcätati, ucqhatpacha ñankhacharapita —sasa." 
Numbers23:14 Balac reyejj Zofim chekaruw Balaamarojj irpäna, Pisga sat kollu pataru, cawqhantejj pakallko altaranac lurcäna, ucanwa sapakat altararu mä vaca kallumpi, mä orko ovejampi sacrificion loktäna." 
Numbers23:15 Uca chekanwa Balaamajj Balac reyirojj aqham säna: —Aca sacrificionac loktat thiyaru kheparam; ucañcamasti nayajj Diosampi jiquisiriw sarä —sasa. 
Numbers23:16 Tatitusti Balaamampi jiquisiriw mistunïna; ucat lacaparojj uchänwa cuntejj parlañapäcän uca arunaca, uqhamaraquiw aqham säna: —Cutt'am cawqhancquitejj Balac reyejj ucqharu; parlam cuntejj siscsma uca arunaca —sasa." 
Numbers23:17 Balaamajj cutt'anjjasinjja uñjänwa Balac reyirojj sacrificionac loktat thiyan sayt'ata, Moabita jilïrinacamp chica. Balac reyejj Balaamarojj jisct'änwa, aqham sasa: —¿Cunsa Tatitojj sistam? —sasa." 
Numbers23:18 Ucatsti Balaamajj aca arunacwa arsüna: “Balac, Zipor chachan yokapa, suma ist'ita." 
Numbers23:19 Janiw Diosajj jiwir jakenacjamäquiti. Janiw c'arisquiti ni yakha amuyunïquisa. Cunapachatejj jupajj cunsa arsu ucqhajj lurapuniwa. Cunapachatejj cunsa arupampejj arsu ucqhajj phokhapuniwa. 
Numbers23:20 Nayasti bendiciñatac qhitatätwa. Diosatejj bendizchejja, janiw nayajj jupar jarc'quiristti." 
Numbers23:21 Janiw qhitis uñjquiti cuna jan walinacsa, ñankhanacsa Jacobon Israel marcapanjja. Dios Tatituw jupanacampi chicäsqui. Jupanacasti reyirjamaraquiw unt'asipjje." 
Numbers23:22 Diosaw jupanacarojj Egipto marcat irpsuni, búfalo sat animaljam ch'amaniw tucupjje." 
Numbers23:23 Jacob contrajj janiw yatirinacan luratanacapajj cunäquisa. Israel contrajj janiw layka jakenacan laykasitanacapajj cunäquisa. Jichhasti waquisiw sañajja: ‘Kawkha uñacht'äwinacsa Diosajj jumampi luri.’ 
Numbers23:24 Aca marcasti mä ajjsarcañ leonjamaw sartasi, janiw samarcaniti catjatap mank'antañcamajja. Uqhamarac jiwayatanacapan wilap umantañcamasa” sasa." 
Numbers23:25 Balac reyejj Balaamarojj sänwa: —Janejjay aca marcarojj ñankhachcstatejja, janiraquiy bendicimtejja —sasa." 
Numbers23:26 Ucjjarusti Balaamajj sänwa: —¿Janit nayasti siscsma, cuntejj Tatitojj nayar parlam sisquitani ucaqui säma sasinjja?" 
Numbers23:27 Ucatsti Balac reyejj sänwa: —Jutam, yakha chekaruw irpäma, inas Diosajj uca chekat Israel marcaru ñankhachañ munchispa —sasa." 
Numbers23:28 Uqhamaw Balac reyejj Balaamaru irpjjäna, Peor sat kollu pataru, cawqhantejj take wasara uñstqui ucqharu." 
Numbers23:29 Ucqhansti Balaamajj Balac reyirojj sänwa: —Acqharu pakallko altaranac lurarapita, ucatsti waquicht'arapiraquita pakallko vaca kallunaca, pakallko orko ovejanaca." 
Numbers23:30 Balac reyejj luränwa cunjämtï Balaamajj siscatayna uqhamarjama, ucatsti sapakat altararuw mä vaca kallumpi, mä orko ovejampi sacrificiot loktäna." 
Numbers24:1 Ucampisa cunjämatejj Balaamajj uñjäna Tatitutaquejj asquïtapa Israelar bendiciñajja; janiw uñacht'äwinac jupat catokerejj sarcjjänti, cunjämatejj walja cutinac lurcatayna uqhama, jan ucasti ajanupjja wasara tokeruw uñtäna." 
Numbers24:2 Balaamajj israelitanacarojj tribunacapatcama utjnokatwa uñjäna, uqhamaruw Diosan ajayupajj jupjjaru juti." 
Numbers24:3 Ucapachasti Balaamajj aca arunacwa arsüna: “Balaaman arunacapawa, Beor chachan yokapa, Dios toket yatiñan jakeraquiwa." 
Numbers24:4 Cunapachatejj ajayuncqui ucqhajj juc'amp suma uñji, suma arunacwa catokaraqui, uqhamarac ajayun uñacht'äwinacsa take ch'amani Diosatjja." 
Numbers24:5 ¡Jacob, cunja sumas carpanacamajja! ¡Israel, cunja sumas campamentomasa!" 
Numbers24:6 Walja sekentat palmeranacar uñtataraquiwa, jawir lacanacan pankaranacar uñtata. Tatitun ayrut áloes sat pankaranacjama, uqhamaraqui cedronacas uma thiyanccaspas uqhama." 
Numbers24:7 Israelasti walja umaniraquïniwa umt'añataqui, uqhamarac yapunacap carpañataquisa. Reyipasa Agag reyirojj atipjaraquiniwa. Jach'a ch'amampiw apnakaraquini." 
Numbers24:8 Egiptot irpsunqui uca Diosajj, jupanacataquejj búfalo sat animalan wajjrapan ch'amapjamäniwa. Israelajj mank'araniwa uñisiripan marcanacarojja; ch'aqhanacapsa p'aquiraraquiniwa, flechanacapampiw usuchjaraquini." 
Numbers24:9 Cunapachatejj samarañatac iquintasi ucqhajj leonar uñtataraquiwa. Janiraquiw qhitis sartaycaraquispati. ¡Bendicitäpan qhititejj bendiscätam ucajja, uqhamarac maldicitäpan qhititejj maldiscätam ucajja!”" 
Numbers24:10 Acanac ist'asajj Balac reyejj Balaamataquejj wal colerasïna; amparanacap t'ajjllirasisajj, aqham sänwa: —Nayasti jumarojj jawsaysmaw uñisirinacajjar maldiciñamataqui, ucampis jumajj niyaw quimsa cuti bendisjjta." 
Numbers24:11 Jichhasti cutt'jjam utamaru, nayasti arojjampiw arsuyäsma walja churäwinac churañataqui, ucampisa Tatituw jan uqham lurasiñap munquiti." 
Numbers24:12 Balaamajj saraquïnwa: —Nayasti juman qhitanitanacamarojj yatiyayätwa," 
Numbers24:13 palacioman korisa, kollkesa phokhantatäscpa ucqhasa janipuniw nayajj Tatitun arunacaparojj jan ist'quiristti ni ascsa ni jan walsa nayan arojjarjamajj lurquiristti, ucampis nayajj arsuristwa cuntejj Tatitojj sisquitaspa ucaqui." 
Numbers24:14 Jichhasti marcajjaruw cuttjjä, ucampis arsuwayäwa cuntejj aca marcajj khepa urunacan marcamampi lurcani ucanaca." 
Numbers24:15 Balaamajj aca arunacwa arsüna: “Balaaman arunacapawa, Beor chachan yokapa, Dios toket yatiñan jakeraquiwa." 
Numbers24:16 Cunapachatejj ajayuncqui ucqhajj juc'ampi sum uñji; yatiraquiw cuntejj alajjpachanquir Diosajj yatqui ucsa; arunacsa catokaraqui, uñacht'äwinacsa, jach'a ch'amani Dios toketjja." 
Numbers24:17 Uñjtwa cunatejj khepa urunacan utjcani ucsa, uñjaractwa cunatejj jayancqui ucsa. Mä warawaraw Jacobot mistusinqui, mä reyiraquiw israelan sartasqui. Jupaw Moab orakerojj p'eket takjjatani. Takpachaniruw Set sat chachan wawanacaparojj pampachjani." 
Numbers24:18 Edomarus catuntaraquiniwa, Seir sat uñisiriparusa catuntaraquiniwa. Israelasti jach'a luräwinacwa lurani." 
Numbers24:19 Mä atipjiriw Jacobotjja mistuni, marcan kheparirinacarojja t'unjaniwa” sasa." 
Numbers24:20 Ucatsti Balaamajj Amalec orak tokeru uñtasajj aca arunacwa arsüna: “Amalec marcajj take marcanacan p'ekepawa, ucampisa k'ala t'unjataw uñjasini” sasa." 
Numbers24:21 Uqhamaraquiw quenitas sat marca uñtasajj aca arunac arsüna: “Cainan wawanacapa, jacäwinacamajj suma chekar sayt'atäscpansa, tapanacapajj kala taypinacar uchatäscpansa, uca tapasti ninampi t'unjatäniwa, cunapachatejj Asiria marcajj catuntcani ucqhajja” sasa." 
Numbers24:22  
Numbers24:23 Ucjjarusti mayampiw aca arunaca arsüna: “¡Ay! ¿Qhitis jacani cunapachatejj Diosajj take acanac lurascani ucqhajja? 
Numbers24:24 Chipre thiyanacatwa barconacas jutapjje, ucatsti k'al tucjapjjani, Asiria, uqhamarac Heber marcanacjja, Heber marcas t'unjataraquïniwa” sasa." 
Numbers24:25 Uca khepatsti Balaamajj sarjjänwa, utaparuw cuttawayjjäna. Balac reyejj uqhamaraquiw thaquinjam sarawayjjäna." 
Numbers25:1 Cunapachatejj israelitanacajj Sitim sat chekar utjantasipjjän ucqhajj, chachanacajj moabita warminacampiw wachoka jucha lurañ kalltapjjäna." 
Numbers25:2 Uca warminacasti diosanacapar sacrificionac loktapcän ucaruw jupanacarojj jawsapjjäna, ucatsti israelitanacajj mank'anacapatwa mank'apjjäna, uqhamaraquiw moabitanacan diosanacaparusa yupaychapjjäna." 
Numbers25:3 Uqhamatwa jupanacajj Baal-peor diosar yupaychañaru uchasipjjäna. Ucatwa Tatitojj jupanacataquejj wal colerasïna. 
Numbers25:4 Tatitu Diosajj Moisesarojj sänwa: —Tantachthapim marcan take jilïrinacaparu, ucatsti urpach jiwarayam nayan nayrakatajjana; uqhamatwa colerajjajj t'acuraquini Israel marcataquejja —sasa." 
Numbers25:5 Moisesajj Israelitanacan juezanacaparojj sänwa: —Sapakat mayniw jumanacatjja tribunacaman, cawquïrinacatejj Baal-peor diosar yupaychapqui uca jakenacaru jiwarayapjjañama —sasa." 
Numbers25:6 Ucampisa mä israelita jakejj utaparuw mä madianita warmirojj irpasïna, Moisesan uñjcata uqhamarac take israelitanacan uñjcata, ucañcamasti jupanacajj jachasipcänwa Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa mantañana." 
Numbers25:7 Uc uñjasinjja Finees sat Eleazar sacerdoten yokapajj, Aarón sacerdoten allchhipa, ucasti maysaru jithektawayasinjja, mä lanza aptasïna," 
Numbers25:8 ucatsti israelit jaken utaparu khepapat arcantasinjja, uca israelit jakempiru, warmimpirojj puracat jununtasinwa jiwayäna, uqhamatwa tucusïna cawquïri usutejj Israel marcar jiwarayascäna ucajja." 
Numbers25:9 Uqhacamajj jiwaratanacajj pä tunca pusin waranka jakenacänwa. 
Numbers25:10 Ucatsti Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers25:11 —Finees sat chachaw israelitanac toke colerasitajjjja t'acurayjjetu, jupasti nayjamaraquiwa colerasïna nayan jach'a cancañajj sum uñjañataqui, ucatwa jupanacarojj colerasiñajjampi jan tucjcjjäti." 
Numbers25:12 Jichhasti samay juparojja, nayasti jupampejj sumancaña arust'äwi lurapjjä." 
Numbers25:13 Ucatwa jupampiru, wawanacapampirojj wiñayatac sacerdote sarnakañ churä, jupan nayjama coleratap laycu, uqhamata israelitanacataqui perdón jicjjatatap laycu —sasa." 
Numbers25:14 Cawquïri israelitatejj jiwayatäcäna madianita warmimpi chica ucasti Zimri satänwa, jupasti Salu chachan yokapänwa, uqhamarac mä familian jilïripa, Simeón tributa." 
Numbers25:15 Madianita warmin sutipasti Cozbi sataraquïnwa, jupasti Zur chachan phuchapänwa, mä tama madianitanacan familiapan jilïripänwa." 
Numbers25:16 Tatitu Diosajj Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers25:17 —Madianitanacarojj nuwantapjjam, ucatsti atipjapjjaraquim," 
Numbers25:18 cunjämatejj jupanacajj nuwantapctam c'arimpi Baal-peor diosar yupaychayasajja, uqhamarac Cozbi warmi toketsa madianita jilïrin phuchapa, cawquïritejj mä lanzampi jiwayatäna, cunapachatejj nayajj mä usu apayaniyäta Baal-peor diosar yupaychapjjatam laycu ucapachajja." 
Numbers26:1 Uca usun jiwarayatapat kheparusti Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna, uqhamarac Eleazar Aarón sacerdoten yokapampiru, aqham sasa:" 
Numbers26:2 “Mä censo aptapjjam sapakat familiata take cawquïri israelitanacatejj pä tunca maranit amstaru phokhapqui, guerrarus sarirjamäpcaqui take ucanacaru.”" 
Numbers26:3 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempejj israelitanacaruw wayt'apjjäna Moab oraken pampanacapana, Jordán jawir jac'ana, Jericó marca uñcatasina," 
Numbers26:4 takenin kellkayasipjjañapataqui, pä tunca maranit amstaru cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru siscatayna uqhamarjama. Take acanacänwa cawquïri israelitanacatejj Egiptot mistunipcatayna ucanacajja:" 
Numbers26:5 Rubenan familiapan wawanacapajj, cawquïritejj Israelan tayna yokapäcäna, ucanacasti Enoc, Falú," 
Numbers26:6 Hezrón, Carmi ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:7 Censo aptatarjamajj Rubenan wawanacapajj pusi tunca quimsani waranka pakallk pataca quimsa tuncani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:8 Falú chachan wawapajj Eliab satänwa," 
Numbers26:9 Eliab chachan wawanacapajj Nemuel, Datán, Abiram, ucanacaraquïnwa. Datán, Abiram ucanacasti, jilïrinacasa mä tamaru tantachascäna Coré chachampi chica ucanacänwa, jupanacasti Tatitu contraw sartapjjäna, uqhamarac Moisés, Aarón contraraqui." 
Numbers26:10 Ucampisa orakew jist'artasin jupanac paniniru, Coré chachampirojj mank'antjjäna, ucatsti takpach tamaw jiwaräna, uqhamaraquiw pä patac pheska tunca jakenacasa ninan jiwarapjjäna. Acasti mayninacataquejj mä uñacht'äwi castigönwa." 
Numbers26:11 Ucampisa Coré chachan wawanacapajj janiw jiwapcänti. 
Numbers26:12 Simeonan familianacapan wawanacapajj Nemuel, Jamín, Jaquín," 
Numbers26:13 Zera, Saúl, ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:14 Censo aptatarjamajj Simeonan wawanacapajj pä tunca payani waranka pä patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:15 Gad tribun familianacapan wawanacapajj Zefón, Hagui, Suni," 
Numbers26:16 Ozni, Eri," 
Numbers26:17 Arod, uqhamarac Areli ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:18 Jacthapitatsti pusi tunca waranka pheska patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:19 Judá tribun wawanacapatjja Er, Onán, ucanacajj Canaán orakenwa jiwarapjjäna." 
Numbers26:20 Uqhamasti Judá tribun familianacapan wawanacapajj Sela, Fares, Zara ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:21 Fares chachan jach'a familianacapan wawanacapajj Hezrón, Hamul ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:22 Censo aptatarjamajj Judá tribun wawanacapajj pakallko tunca sojjtan waranka pheska patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:23 Isacar tribun familianacapan wawanacapajj acanacänwa: Tola, Fúa," 
Numbers26:24 Jasub, Simrón ucanacänwa;" 
Numbers26:25 Censo aptatarjamajj Isacar tribun wawanacapajj sojjta tunca pusin waranka quimsa patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:26 Zabulón tribun familianacapan wawanacapajj acanacänwa: Sered, Elón, Jahleel ucanaca." 
Numbers26:27 Censo aptatarjamajj Zabulón tribun wawanacapajj sojjta tunca waranka pheska patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna. 
Numbers26:28 José tribun jach'a familianacapan wawanacapajj acanacänwa: Manasés, Efraín ucanaca." 
Numbers26:29 Manasés tribun wawanacapajj, Maquir chachan jach'a familianacapa, Maquir chachan wawanacapajj, Galaad chachan familianacapa." 
Numbers26:30 Galaad chachan wawanacapajj Jezer chachan familianacapa, Helec chachan familianacapa." 
Numbers26:31 Uqhamarac Asriel chachan familianacapa, Siquem chachan familianacapa ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:32 Uqhamarac Semida, Hefer chachanacan familianacapa." 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehad sat Hefer chachan wawapajj, janiw yokall wawanïcänti, jan ucasti imill wawanacapaquiw utjäna, ucanacan sutinacapajj acanacänwa: Maala, Noa, Hogla, Milca, uqhamarac Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Censo aptatarjamajj Manasés tribun wawanacapajj pheska tunca payan waranka pakallko patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:35 Efraín tribun jach'a familianacapajj acanacänwa: Sutela, Bequer, uqhamarac Tahán ucanaca." 
Numbers26:36 Sutela chachan wawanacapajj Erán chachan jach'a familianacapänwa. 
Numbers26:37 Censo aptatarjamajj Efraín tribun wawanacapajj quimsa tunca payani waranka pheska patacani jakenacänwa, take jupanacasti José chachan wawanacapänwa." 
Numbers26:38 Benjamín tribun familianacapajj Bela, Asbel, Ahiram," 
Numbers26:39 Sefufam, uqhamarac Hufam ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:40 Bela chachan jach'a familianacapajj Ard, uqhamarac Naamán ucanacatänwa, cawquïrinacatejj Bela chachan wawanacapäna." 
Numbers26:41 Censo aptatarjamajj Benjamín tribun wawanacapajj pusi tunca pheskan waranka sojjta patacani jakenacänwa. 
Numbers26:42 Dan tribun wawanacapajj Súham sat chachan jach'a familiatänwa. 
Numbers26:43 Censo aptatarjamajj Súham sat chachan wawanacapajj sojjta tunca pusini waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna. 
Numbers26:44 Aser tribun jach'a familianacapajj Imna, Isúi, uqhamarac Bería ucanacatänwa." 
Numbers26:45 Bería chachan jach'a familianacapajj Heber, Malquiel ucanacatänwa." 
Numbers26:46 Aser chachajj mä imill wawanïnwa, sutipasti Sera sataraquïnwa." 
Numbers26:47 Censo aptatarjamajj Aser tribun wawanacapajj pheska tunca quimsani waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna. 
Numbers26:48 Neftalí tribun jach'a familianacapajj Jahzeel, Guni," 
Numbers26:49 Jezer, Silem ucanacatänwa." 
Numbers26:50 Censo aptatarjamajj Neftalí tribun wawanacapajj pusi tunca pheskani waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna. 
Numbers26:51 Censo aptatarjamajj israelitanacajj sojjta pataca mayan waranka pakallko pataca quimsa tuncani jakenacaw jact'asïna. 
Numbers26:52 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers26:53 “Take aca jakenacaruw orakenacjja laquintapjjäta, kawkhanitejj sutinacapajj kellkantatäqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers26:54 Waljanïqui ucanacarojj juc'ampi jach'a orakenac churaraquïta; juc'anïqui ucanacarusti jisc'a orakenacaqui churaraquïta. Sapakat tamaruw mä jisc'a orak churäta, kawkhanïquitï kellkantatajj uqhamarjama." 
Numbers26:55 Orakenac laquintañasti suertetjamäniwa. Sapakat mayniw partepjja catokani cawquïri triburutejj awquip tokejj wact'qui uqhamarjama. 
Numbers26:56 Orakenac laquintañasti suertetjamäniwa take jach'a tamanacansa, uqhamarac jisc'a tamanac taypinsa.”" 
Numbers26:57 Leví tribun jach'a familianacapat censoru jacthapitajj, Gersón, Coat, Merari ucanacatänwa." 
Numbers26:58 Libnitanacana, hebronitanacana, mahlitanacana, musitanacana, coreitanacana jach'a familianacapajj levitanacan jach'a familianacapänwa. Coat chachasti Amram chachan awquipänwa." 
Numbers26:59 Amram chachasti casarasïnwa Leví chachan mä imill wawapampi, sutipasti Jocabed satänwa, jupasti Egipton nacitayna cunapachatejj Leví chachajj Egiptonccän ucqha. Amram, Jocabed ucanacasti Aaronan, Moisesana, Mariana awquipa, taycapänwa." 
Numbers26:60 Aaronan wawanacapajj Nadab chachampi, Abiú, Eleazar, Itamar ucanacänwa." 
Numbers26:61 Ucampisa Nadab chachampi, Abiú chachampejj jiwarapjjänwa Tatitun nayrakatapanjja yakha nina loktasina." 
Numbers26:62 Takpachanisti Leví chachan yokall wawanacapajj, mä phajjsinit amstarojj pä tunca quimsani waranka wawanacänwa, jupanacasti janiw mayni israelitanacjam jaqhutacänti cuna orakes janiw churatäcaraquïnti uca laycu." 
Numbers26:63 Take acanacänwa israelitanacat censoru jacthapitajja Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi lurapjjatapajja, Moab pampanacana, Jordán jawir jac'ana, Jericó marca uñcatasina." 
Numbers26:64 Ucampisa janiw take jupanac taypitjja maynisa utjcänti cunapachatejj Moisesampi, Aaronampejj Sinaí wasaran censo aptapcän ucanacajja." 
Numbers26:65 Tatituw jupanacarojj satayna, wasarana jiwarapjjäta sasinjja. Ucampisa Caleb sat Jefone chachan yokapa, uqhamarac Josué sat Nun chachan yokapa ucanacaquiw kheparapjjäna, janiw maynisa jupanacatjja kheparcänti." 
Numbers27:1 Manasés tribunjja pheska imill wawanacaw utjäna sutinacapasti Maala, Noa, Hogla, Milca, Tersa ucanacänwa. Jupanacasti Zelofehad chachan wawanacapänwa Hefer, Galaad, Maquir, Manasés, uqhamarac Josean wawanacapa." 
Numbers27:2 Aca pheska cullacanacajj Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpan mantañaparuw sarapjjäna, Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi, uqhamarac marcan jilïrinacapampi parliri, ucatsti aqham sapjjänwa:" 
Numbers27:3 “Nanacan awquinacajjajj wasaranwa jiwjjapjje, ucampisa janiw jupajj Coré chachan tamapanquirïcänti, cawquïritejj Tatitu contra sartcäna uca. Jupasti pachpa juchapatwa jiwasqui, ucampisa janiraquiw yokall wawanaca jaytawayquiti." 
Numbers27:4 Ucampisa janiw asquïquiti nanacan awquejjan sutipa chhaktayañajja, jach'a familiapatjja jan jupan yokall wawanïtap laycojja. Nanacarusti churapjjetay mä jisc'a orake, awquejjan jilanacapan taypiparu” sasa." 
Numbers27:5 Moisesajj Tatituruw yatiyäna, uca warminacan mayitanacapjja." 
Numbers27:6 Tatitusti ucjjarojj sänwa: 
Numbers27:7 “Zelofehad chachan wawanacapajj waliqui parlapjje. Churayamay orakenacjja awquipan jilanacap taypiru, ucatsti awquipan herenciapajj jupanacaru churatäpan." 
Numbers27:8 Uqhamaraqui israelitanacarojj parlam, cawquïritejj jiwjjani jan yokall wawa jaytasa, jupan herenciapasti imill wawapan amparaparuw churatäjjani." 
Numbers27:9 Ucampisa janitejj cuna imill wawapas utjcani ucqhajj herenciapjja jilanacaparuw jaytawayjjani; 
Numbers27:10 janitejj jilapajj utjcani ucqhajj herenciapjja awquipan jilanacaparuw jaytjjani. 
Numbers27:11 Ucampisa awquipantejj jan cuna jilapas utjcani ucqhajj herenciapjja jaytjjaniw jac'a familiaparu. Acanacasti mä leyipunïniw israelitanacataquejja, cunjämatejj nayajj jumaru sisma uqhama.”" 
Numbers27:12 Tatitu Diosasti Moisesarojj sänwa: —Maqhatanim aca Abarim sat kolluru, ucatsti uñatatam cawquïri oraktejj israelitanacaru churcta ucanaca." 
Numbers27:13 Take uñatatasinsti jiwjjätawa; nayra awquinacamampiw tantachasjjäta Aarón jilamjama; 
Numbers27:14 jumanac paninejj Zin sat wasaranjja, cunapachatejj marcajj naya contra sartcäna ucqhajja, jan arunacajjar ist'apjjatam laycu, janiraquiw jumanacajj jach'añchapquistati jupanac nayrakatanjja, cunapachatejj uma mayipquitän ucqhajja. (Acasti Meriba uma jalsut parlasi, Cades chekana, Zin sat wasarana)." 
Numbers27:15 Ucatsti Moisesajj Tatiturojj sänwa: 
Numbers27:16 —Dios Tatitu, jumaw take jakerus jacañ churta, utt'ayamay mä jilïriru, marcaman nayrakatap sarañapataqui, jupasti take chekanjam irparacpan, mä tamajj jan awatirini sarnakqui jan uqham sarnakapjjañapataqui." 
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: —Josué sat Nun chachan yokapajj suma amuyt'ani jakewa. Irptanim ucatsti amparamampi p'ekepat lokjjatam," 
Numbers27:19 ucat Eleazar sacerdoteru uñstayam, uqhamarac takpach marca nayrakataru, uca quipcaraqui take jupanac nayrakatana utt'ayam;" 
Numbers27:20 uca pachparaqui jupa patjjarojj ucham jilïri cancañama, uqhamata takpach Israel marcajj jupar ist'apjjañapataqui." 
Numbers27:21 Ucampisa Josué chachajj Eleazar sacerdoter uñstañapawa. Ucatsti Eleazar sacerdotew sutipampi jisct'ani, Urim sat toke. Josué chachaw israelitanacarojj apnakani take cuna lurañanacapansa." 
Numbers27:22 Moisesasti cunjämtejj Tatitojj siscatayna uqhamarjamaw luräna. Josué chacharu irptawayasinjja Eleazar sacerdoteruw uñstayäna, uqhamarac take marca nayräjjarusa." 
Numbers27:23 Moisesajj amparampi p'ekepar lokjjatasinjja, jupan lurañapwa churjjäna, cunjämtejj Tatitojj siscatayna Moisés toke uqhamarjama." 
Numbers28:1 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers28:2 “Israelitanacarojj wayt'am jan armt'asisa nayar loktapjjañapataqui, t'ant'a, uqhamarac nact'ayat ofrendanaca suma amtasqui uca fiestanacana, mä suma k'apquir ofrenda nayataqui." 
Numbers28:3 “Uqhamarac parlam, aca ofrendanacwa nayan jach'a sutejjaru nact'ayapjjäta sapüru jan jaytjasa, mä marani pä orko oveja, ucanacasti jan cuna usuchjatäñapawa." 
Numbers28:4 Mä ovejasti alwataw sacrificion loktasini, mayasti jayp'ururaqui." 
Numbers28:5 Granonacat ofrendajj pä kilo suma chaput jac'utäniwa mä litro oliva aceitempi. 
Numbers28:6 (Aca sacrificiowa sapüruna nact'ayasïna, Sinaí sat kollunjja. Tatitur mä suma k'apquir ofrendat loktasïna)." 
Numbers28:7 Vino ofrendatsti sapa ovejatjja mä litro churapjjäta. Aca vinosti santuarionwa waratatasini, Tatitu Diosan jach'a cancañaparu." 
Numbers28:8 Maynïri orko ovejasti jayp'u tokeruw sacrificiot loktatäni, ucarusti granonac ofrendampiw yapt'asini, uqhamarac vino ofrendampi, pachpa cunjämatejj alwajj ofrendajj loktascän uqhama. Ucasti mä suma k'apquir nact'ayata ofrendäniwa Tatitu Diosan jach'a cancañapar loktata." 
Numbers28:9 “Jumanacasti samarañ urunjja loktapjjañamaw pä orko ovejanaca, uca ovejanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan usuchjata; uqhamarac pusi kilo suma jac'u aceitempi chaputa, achunac ofrendjama, vino ofrendampi cuna." 
Numbers28:10 Aca naqhayat ofrendajj samarañ urunacanwa loktasini, vino ofrendampi chica, uqhamarac sapüru nact'ayañ ofrendampi." 
Numbers28:11 “Kallta uru sapa phajjsita sarakquipanwa Tatitu Diosarojj loktapjjäta mä nact'ayata ofrendjama; pä vaca kallumpi, mä orko ovejampi, uqhamarac pakallko orko ovejanacampi, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers28:12 Sapakat vaca kallutwa sojjta kilo suma jac'umpi, aceitempi chaput loktapjjäta, uqhamarac sapakat orko ovejatjja, pusi kilo jac'umpi, aceitempi chaputa;" 
Numbers28:13 uca pachparaquiw mä marani oveja kallutjja pä kilo jac'umpi, aceitempi chaputa. Ucasti mä suma k'apquiri loktäwiwa, cawquïritejj Diosan jach'a cancañaparu nact'ayata." 
Numbers28:14 Vino ofrendasti pä litröniwa sapakat vaca kallutjja, mä litro chicaniraqui sapakat orko ovejatjja, uqhamarac mä litro sapakat mä marani oveja kallutjja. Take aca nact'ayat ofrendanac loktapjjäta, sapa phajjsina, marpachanjja." 
Numbers28:15 Uqhamarus sapüru nact'ayat ofrenda loktatat sipansa, Tatitu Diosarusti mä cabritwa sacrificiot juchanacatjja loktapjjäta, vino ofrendampi chica." 
Numbers28:16 “Sapa mara kallta phajjsina, tunca pusin uru sarakatarusti, Pascua fiesta lurapjjäta, Tatitun jach'a cancañapat amtasisa." 
Numbers28:17 Ucatsti tunca pheskan uru sarakatarojj jach'a fiestäniwa, pakallko urunacaw jan levaduran t'ant'jja mank'apjjaraquïta." 
Numbers28:18 Uca pakallko urunacatjja, nayrïri urojj mä k'oma tantachäwiw utjani. Uca urusti janiw jumanacajj cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati." 
Numbers28:19 Tatiturusti mä nact'ayat ofrendjama pä vaca kallunaca, mä orko oveja, pakallko orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä marani ovejanacäñapawa jan usuchjataraqui loktapjjäta." 
Numbers28:20 Uca sacrificionacampi chicajj, jac'umpi aceitempi chapuntat ofrenda lurapjjäta, aqham lurapjjaraquïta: Sojjta kilo jac'u sapakat vaca kalluta, pusi kilo jac'u sapa orko ovejata," 
Numbers28:21 uqhamarac pä kilo jac'u sapakat maran oveja kalluta. 
Numbers28:22 Uqhamaraquiw sacrificiot mä cabrito loktapjjäta, juchanacat pampachatäña jicjjatañataqui." 
Numbers28:23 Take acanacwa loktapjjäta, cawquïri nact'ayat ofrendatejj sapa alwa loktascani ucanacat sipansa." 
Numbers28:24 Uqhama lurapjjäta sapa uca pakallko fiesta urunacanjja, suma k'apquir ofrendjama Tatitu Diosan jach'a cancañapar loktasa. Ucasti vino ofrendampi chicaw loktasini, sapa urun nact'ayat ofrenda churatat sipansa." 
Numbers28:25 Uqhamaraquiw pakallko urunjja k'oma tantachäwi utjayasipjjäta. Uca urusti janiw cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati. 
Numbers28:26 “Nayra achunacan fiestapanjja, cunapachatejj Tatitu Diosarojj machak cosechanacaman achunacap loktasipcäta, Semanas sat fiestapana, ucqhajj mä k'oma tantachäwi lurapjjaraquïta. Uca urusti janiw cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati." 
Numbers28:27 Tatiturusti loktapjjätaw mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendjama pä vaca kallunaca, mä orko oveja, uqhamarac pakallko orko ovejanaca ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa." 
Numbers28:28 Jac'umpi aceitempi chaput ofrendajj sojjta kilotäniwa sapakat vaca kalluta, pusi kilo sapakat orko ovejata;" 
Numbers28:29 uqhamarac pä kilonaca sapakat maran oveja kalluta. 
Numbers28:30 Uca quipcaraquiw mä cabrito sacrificiot loktapjjäta, juchanacamat pampachatäña jicjjatañataqui." 
Numbers28:31 Sapüru nact'ayat ofrendat sipansa, aca naqhayat ofrendampi, uqhamarac grano achunacampi, vino ofrendampi chica loktapjjäta." 
Numbers29:1 “Pakallko phajjsin kallta urupanjja, jumanacasti mä k'oma tantachasïwi lurapjjäta. Uca urusti janiraquiw cuna casta irnakañsa lurapjjätati, ucatsti uca urjja trompetanac phust'asaw yatiyapjjäta." 
Numbers29:2 Tatituru mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendjama loktapjjäta mä vaca kallu, mä orko oveja, uqhamarac pakallko orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjata." 
Numbers29:3 Jac'umpi aceitempi chaput ofrendajj sojjta kilöniwa sapa vaca kallutjja, pusi kilonaca sapa orko ovejata." 
Numbers29:4 Uqhamarac pä kilo sapakat marani oveja kalluta. 
Numbers29:5 Ucjjarojj mä cabrito sacrificiot loktapjjäta, juchanacamat pampachatäña jicjjatañataqui," 
Numbers29:6 ucjjarusti sapa phajjsi nact'ayat ofrenda, uqhamaraqui sapüru nact'ayat ofrenda loktasqui ucanacamp chicajj, grano achunacata, vinota, ofrendanaca loktapjjäta, cunjämtejj Diosajj siscatayna ucarjama. Mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendäniwa Tatitutaquejja." 
Numbers29:7 “Pakallko phajjsit tunca uru sarakquipanjja uqhamaraquiw jumanacajj k'oma tantachasïwi lurasipjjäta. Uca urusti ayuno lurapjjäta, janiraquiw cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati." 
Numbers29:8 Tatiturusti mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendjamjja mä vaca kallu loktapjjäta, mä orko ovejampi, uqhamarac pakallko orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjata." 
Numbers29:9 Jac'umpi aceitempi chaput ofrendajj sojjta kilöniw sapakata vaca kallutjja, pusi kilonaca sapakat orko ovejatjja." 
Numbers29:10 Uqhamarac pä kilonaca sapakat marani oveja kallutjja. 
Numbers29:11 Uqhamaraquiw mä cabrito sacrificiot loktapjjäta, perdonasiñ urunsa juchanacat sacrificiojj loktasqui, uqhamarac sapa urutsa nact'ayat ofrendajj loktasqui ucat sipansa, grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica." 
Numbers29:12 “Pakallko phajjsit tunca pheskan uru sarakquipanjja, jumanacasti mä k'oma tantachasïwi lurapjjäta. Uca urusti janiraquiw cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati. Pakallko urunacaw Tatitun jach'a cancañaparu fiesta amtapjjäta." 
Numbers29:13 Kallta urusti Tatitu Diosarojj loktapjjätaw, mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendjamjja, tunca quimsani vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusin mä marani orko oveja kallunaca, jan cuna usuchjata." 
Numbers29:14 Jac'umpi, aceitempi chaput ofrendajj sojjta kilöniwa sapakat vaca kallutjja, pusi kilo sapa orko ovejatjja." 
Numbers29:15 Uqhamarac pä kilo, sapa mä marani oveja kallutjja." 
Numbers29:16 Uqhamaraquiw juchanacamatjja mä cabrito sacrificiot loktapjjäta sapa nact'ayat ofrenda churatat sipansa, grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica." 
Numbers29:17 “Payïri urusti loktapjjätaw tunca payan vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusini orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:18 Ucat sipana granota, vinota, ofrendanacajj loktasiraquiquini, kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacasa, marani ovejanacasa, uqhamarjama, cunjämtejj Diosajj sisqui uqhama." 
Numbers29:19 Sapa urut nact'ayat ofrendata loktatäqui, grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, ucatsti juchanacamat mä cabrito sacrificiot loktasiraquini." 
Numbers29:20 “Quimsïri urusti loktasiraquiniwa, tunca mayan vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusin orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïniwa, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:21 Ucat sipansa granonacata, vinota, ofrendajj lurasini, kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacasa, uqhamarac mä marani ovejanacasa, uqhamarjama, cunjämatejj Diosajj sisqui uqhama." 
Numbers29:22 Ucat sipansa, sapüru naqhayat ofrendajj loktasqui, ucanacat sipansa grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, uqhamaraquiquiw juchanacat mä cabritojj sacrificiot loktasiraquini." 
Numbers29:23 “Pusïri urojj loktasiniw tunca vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusini orko ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:24 Ucat sipansa granota, vinota ofrendajj loktasini, kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacasa, uqhamarac mä marani ovejanacasa, cunjämatejj Diosajj sisqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers29:25 Ucat sipansa, sapüru nact'ayat ofrenda loktasqui, grano ofrendampi, vino ofrendampi chica, uqhamaraqui juchanacatjja mä cabritow sacrificiot loktasini." 
Numbers29:26 “Pheska urusti loktasiniw llätunca vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusini ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:27 Ucat sipansa, granota, vinota ofrendajj loktasini kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacasa, uqhamarac mä marani oveja kallunacasa, cunjämtejj Diosajj sisqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers29:28 Ucat sipansa, sapüru nact'ayat ofrendajj loktasqui grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, uqhamaraqui juchanacatjja mä cabritow sacrificiota loktasiraquini." 
Numbers29:29 “Sojjtïri urusti loktasiniw, quimsakallko vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanacampi, uqhamarac mä marani tunca pusin orko ovejanaca, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:30 Ucat sipansa grano achunacata, vinota ofrendajj loktasini, kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacasa, uqhamarac mä marani ovejanacasa, cunjämtejj Diosajj sisqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers29:31 Ucat sipansa, sapüru nact'ayat ofrendajj loktasqui, grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, uqhamaraqui mä cabritow juchanacatjja sacrificiot loktasini." 
Numbers29:32 “Pakallko urusti loktasiraquiniw pakallko vaca kallunaca, pä orko ovejanaca, uqhamarac tunca pusini ovejanaca, ucanacasti mä maranïñapawa, jan cuna usuchjataraqui." 
Numbers29:33 Ucat sipansa, granota, vinota ofrendajj loktasini kawkhäquitejj vaca kallunacajja, orko ovejanacas, mä marani ovejanacasa uqhamarjama, cunjämtejj Tatitu Diosajj sisqui uqhama." 
Numbers29:34 Ucat sipansa sapüru nact'ayat ofrendajj loktasqui grano achunaca ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, uqhamaraqui juchanacatjja mä cabritow sacrificiot loktasini." 
Numbers29:35 “Quimsakallko urusti mä jach'a fiestwa lurapjjäta; uca urojj janiraquiw cuna casta irnakañanacsa lurapjjätati. 
Numbers29:36 Tatiturusti loktapjjätaw mä suma k'apquir nact'ayat ofrendjamjja, mä orko vaca kallu, mä orko oveja, uqhamarac mä marani pakallko ovejanaca, jan cuna usuchjata." 
Numbers29:37 Ucat sipansa, granota, vinota ofrendanacaw loktasini sapa vaca kalluta, orko ovejata, uqhamarac mä marani ovejanacata, cunjämatejj Diosajj sisqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers29:38 Ucat sipansa, sapüru nact'ayat ofrendajj loktasqui, grano ofrendanacampi, vino ofrendanacampi chica, uqhamaraqui juchanacatjja mä cabritow sacrificiot loktasini." 
Numbers29:39 “Aca sacrificionacwa Tatiturojj loktapjjäta, jach'a fiestanacamanjja, arunacamampi arsusina ofrenda loktañäni sapcta ucat sipansa, naqhantayat ofrendäpansa grano achunacata, vinota ofrendäpansa, uqhamarac sumancayaña sacrificiöpansa.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ucatsti Moisesajj israelitanacarojj yatiyänwa take cunanactejj Tatitojj sawaycatayna ucanaca. 
Numbers30:1 Moisesasti israelitanacan tribunacapan jilïrinacaparojj sänwa: “Tatitusti acanacwa arsuwayi: 
Numbers30:2 Cunapachatejj mä jakejj arunacapampi mä arsüwi lurani, uqhamarac mä juramentompisa chica arsuni, ucasti arsutaparojj phokhañapawa, lurañapaw cunjämatejj arsqui uqhamarjama." 
Numbers30:3 “Cunapachatejj mä tawakojj awquipan utapanccasina Tatituru arupampi mä arsüwi lurani, jan ucajj mä cunsa phokhañataqui arsuni," 
Numbers30:4 ucatsti awquipatejj uca arsüwi luratapat yatisinjja jan cunsa juparu siscani ucqhajj, jupasti uca arsüwi lurataparojj phokhaniwa take arsutanacaparojja." 
Numbers30:5 Ucat sipansa awquipatejj yatisinjja jan muncchiniti, ucapachasti janiw jupajj arsüwi lurcatayna ucanacjja phokcaniti. Awquipan jan munatap laycusti, Tatitojj phokhañapataquejj janiw wayt'caniti." 
Numbers30:6 “Ucampisa cunapachatejj mä warmejj Tatituru mä arsüwi arunac arsuni, uqhamarac arunacapampisa jan amuyt'asisa mäqui arsuni, ucatsti casarasjjaraquini," 
Numbers30:7 chachapajj yatisinjja, jan cunsa juparojj siscani, ucapachasti jupajj phokhañapawa, cawquïri arunactejj arscäna ucanacarojja." 
Numbers30:8 Ucampisa, chachapatejj yatisinjja jan phokhañap muncani, ucapachasti janiw jupajj arunacapampi arsüwi lurcatayna ucarojj phokcaniti, ni jan suma amuyt'asisa mäqui arscatayna ucarusa. Tatitusti janiraquiw phokhañapataquejj wayt'caniti." 
Numbers30:9 “Mä ijma warmitejj, uqhamarac mä jaljtata warmisa arupampi arsüwi lurani, ucasti take arsutanacapar phokhañapawa." 
Numbers30:10 “Cunapachatejj mä casada warmejj mä arsüwi arunacapampi lurani, uqhamarac cuna lurañataquisa juramentompi lurani chachapan utapancasinjja," 
Numbers30:11 ucampisa chachapatejj yatisinjja jan cunsa siscaniti ni janisa muncchiniti, ucqhajj jupasti wayt'atäniwa, arunacapampi mä arsüwi lurataparu phokhañataquejja." 
Numbers30:12 Ucampisa chachapatejj yatisinjja ina pampar tucuyani, ucapachajj janiw phokhañapäcjjaniti, chachapan ina pampar tucuyatap laycu. Tatitojj janiraquiw phokhañapataquejj wayt'caniti." 
Numbers30:13 “Chachasti phokhayaspawa, jan ucajj ina pamparus tucuyaraquispawa, cuntejj warmipajj arupampi arsqui, juramento lurasa ucjja, ucatsti wayt'añaparaquiw ayuno lurañapataquejja." 
Numbers30:14 Chachapatejj jan cunsa sisqui, uqhamatjja mä uru jan ucajj pä urunaca pasawayjje, ucampejj uñacht'ayiw warmipan take arsüwi luratanacapajj waliquïscatapa." 
Numbers30:15 Ucampisa jupatejj yatcasina ina pampar tucuyani walja urunaca pasjjepanjja, ucapachasti jupaw warmin arsutanacapa jan phokhatapatjja wayt'atäni.”" 
Numbers30:16 Aca leyinacsti Tatituw Moisesaru churäna, chachampi, warmimpi suman jacapjjañapataqui, uqhamarac awquimpi, phuchampi, cunapachatejj acajj tawakösqui, uqhamarac awquipan utapancasqui ucapacha." 
Numbers31:1 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers31:2 “Phoksusim madianitanacatjja israelitanacan sutipjjaru, uca pasatatwa jiwjjäta” sasa." 
Numbers31:3 Ucatsti Moisesajj marcaruwa parläna aqham sasa: —Jumanacatjja mä kawkhanejj armantasipjjam, waquichrantasipjjam, ucatsti nuwantapjjam madianaru, jupanacar phoksusiñataqui, Tatitu Diosan sutipjjaru." 
Numbers31:4 Sapakat tribuw nuwasiñataquejj waranka jakenaca qhitañapa. 
Numbers31:5 Uqhamaw sapakat tributjja waranka jakenac ajllipjjäna, junturusti tunca payan waranka jakenacaw nuwasiñatac sarthapipjjäna." 
Numbers31:6 Moisesasti qhitänwa nuwasiñataquejj Finees sat Eleazar sacerdoten yokapampi chica, cawquïritejj kollana yänaca, uqhamarac trompetanaca apcäna nuwantañ kalltapjjañapataqui." 
Numbers31:7 Ucatsti madianitanacampejj nuwasipjjänwa takeniru jiwarayasa, cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru siscatayna uqhama." 
Numbers31:8 Uqhamaw jiwarayapjjäna, Evi, Requem, Zur, Hur, Reba, uca madianitanacan pheska reyinacaparojja, uqhamarac Balaam sat Beor chachan yokaparusa." 
Numbers31:9 Israelitanacajj madianita warminacaru, jisc'a wawanacaparuw catuntasin apanipjjäna, uqhamaraquiw aparanipjjäna animalanacapa, uywanacapa take jila alani yänacapsa." 
Numbers31:10 Ucat sipansa take marcanacapwa, campamentonacapa phichhantanipjjäna." 
Numbers31:11 Take cunanactejj aparanipcäna, jakenacsa, uywanacsa," 
Numbers31:12 ucanacsti Moisesan ucaruw apapjjäna, uqhamarac Eleazar sacerdoten ucaru, takpach Israel marca nayrakataru, cawquïrinacatejj Moab orake pampana sayt'asipcäna, Jordán jawira thiyana, Jericó marca uñcatasina." 
Numbers31:13 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi, uqhamarac marcan take jilïrinacapampejj campamentotjja ankaruw mistuwayapjjäna catokañataquejja." 
Numbers31:14 Ucampisa Moisesajj colerasïnwa, cawquïri jilïrinacatejj waranka, uqhamarac pataca soldadonacan nayrakatap jutapcäna nuwasïwit cuttanisa ucanacataquejja." 
Numbers31:15 Ucatsti aqham sänwa: —¿Cunatsa jumanacajj warminacarojj jan jiwarayanipjjta? 
Numbers31:16 Jupanacapï israelitanacarojj Tatitu contra sartayapjjänjja, Balaaman arunacapatjja, uqhamarac Baal-peor diosarus yupaychayapjjänjja. Ucatwa Tatitojj marcaparojj plaganacampi mutuyänjja." 
Numbers31:17 Jichhpach jiwarayapjjam take yokall wawanacaru, uqhamarac take cawquïri warminacatejj chachanïpqui ucanacarusa." 
Numbers31:18 Ucampisa jan chacha uñt'ir warminacarojj jan jiwarayapjjamti, ucatsti jupanacampi kheparapjjam." 
Numbers31:19 Cawquïritejj jake masipar jiwaychi, uqhamarac jiwat jaken janchipsa llamct'aracchi, ucanacajj campamentot ankäjjan pakallko uru kheparapjjpan. Jumanacasa prisionero catut jakenacasa, quimsïri, uqhamarac pakallköri urunacaw k'omachasipjjäta." 
Numbers31:20 Uqhamaraquiw k'omachapjjäta take isinaca, take lip'ichit lurata yänaca, cabriton t'arwapata lurat yänaca, lawat luratanaca." 
Numbers31:21 Eleazar sacerdotejj aqham sasaw parläna, cawquïri soldadonacatejj nuwasiri sarapcatayna ucanacarojja: —Cuntejj Tatitojj Moisesaru churcän uca leyirjamajja." 
Numbers31:22 Take korita, kollketa, bronceta, hierrota, estañota, plomota lurat yänaca," 
Numbers31:23 take cawquïrinacatejj ninataqui ch'ollkhëqui ucanacsti ninaru apantasinwa k'omachapjjäta, ucatsti k'omachir umampiw jarekjjapjjäta. Ucampisa cawquïrinacatejj jan ninatac ch'ollkhëqui ucanacjja k'omachir umampiw jarekapjjäta." 
Numbers31:24 Pakallko urusti isinacam t'ajjsusipjjäta, ucatsti k'omachatäjjapjjätawa. Ucat campamentorojj mantjjapjjaraquïtawa." 
Numbers31:25 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: 
Numbers31:26 “Eleazar sacerdoten yanapapampi, uqhamarac marcan jilïrinacapan yanapapampejj jacthapipjjam; jakenacsa uqhamarac uywanacsa madianitanacata aparanitäqui take ucanacsa," 
Numbers31:27 ucsti payaruw jaljäta. Mä chicatjja nuwasir saririnacaruw laquintäta, chicatsti marcan kheparir jakenacaruraqui." 
Numbers31:28 Uqhamaraquiw nayataquejj jilt'ayaraquïta, cawquïri soldadonacarutejj wact'qui ucanacata, jakenacatsa vacanacatsa, asnonacatsa, ovejanacatsa maya jilt'ayäta sapa pheska patacata." 
Numbers31:29 Ucatsti Eleazar sacerdoteruw churäta, nayarus churquitasma uqhama." 
Numbers31:30 Israelitanacarusa churañäqui uca chicatatjja, jakenacata, vacanacata, asnonacata, uqhamarac ovejanacatjja take uywanacatjja levitanacaruw churäta, sapa pheska tuncatjja, kollana chekan servitanacapata” sasa." 
Numbers31:31 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempejj cunjämatejj Tatitojj siscatayna Moisesarojj uqhamarjamawa lurapjjäna." 
Numbers31:32 Take cunanactejj uñisirinacapat aparanipcäna, jan soldadonacas aparanipcatayna ucanacasa jact'ata takpachasti sojjta pataca pakallko tunca pheskan waranka ovejanacänwa," 
Numbers31:33 pakallko tunca payani waranka vacanaca," 
Numbers31:34 sojjta tunca mayan waranka asnonaca," 
Numbers31:35 uqhamarac quimsa tunca payan waranka jan chacha uñt'iri tawakonaca. 
Numbers31:36 Ucat sipansa, soldadonacarusa chicatajj wact'qui ucanacajj quimsa patac quimsa tunca pakallkoni waranka pheska patacani ovejanacänwa," 
Numbers31:37 ucatsti sojjta pataca pakallko tunca pheskani ovejanacaw Tatitutaquejj jilt'ayatäna. 
Numbers31:38 Quimsa tunca sojjtani waranka vacanacatjja, pakallko tunca payani vacanacaw Tatiturojj churatäjjäna," 
Numbers31:39 quimsa tunca waranka pheska patacani asnonacatjja, sojjta tunca mayani asnonacaw Tatiturojj churatäjjäna." 
Numbers31:40 Ucatsti tunca sojjtan waranka tawakonacatjja, quimsa tunca payani tawakonacaw Tatiturojj churatäjjäna." 
Numbers31:41 Moisesasti Eleazar sacerdoteruw churjjäna cawquïrinacatejj Tatitu Diosaru churatäcän ucanacjja, cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru siscatayna uqhamarjama." 
Numbers31:42 Ucatsti cawquïri chicatatejj israelitanacaru wact'cäna, uqhamarac Moisesas jilt'aycatayna soldadonacar churatatjja," 
Numbers31:43 ucanacajj maya partjam uqhamaraquiquïnwa: Quimsa pataca quimsa tunca pakallkoni waranka ovejanaca," 
Numbers31:44 quimsa tunca sojjtan waranka vacanaca," 
Numbers31:45 quimsa tunca waranka pheska patacani asnonaca," 
Numbers31:46 uqhamarac tunca sojjtan waranka tawakonaca. 
Numbers31:47 Acnïri chicatatjja, Moisesajj maya apsüna sapakat pheska tuncatjja, uca quipcaraquiw, jakenacatsa, uywanacatsa lurasïna, ucatsti ucanacajj levitanacaru churatänwa, Tatitun Kollan Carpapan sirvitanacap laycu, cunjämatejj Tatitojj siscatayna uqhama." 
Numbers31:48 Ucatsti cawquïri jilïrinacatejj waranka, uqhamarac pataca soldadonacan nayrakatapa sarapcäna ucanacajj Moisesar jicjjatiriw sarapjjäna," 
Numbers31:49 Moisesarojj sapjjänwa: “Nanacasti, juman sirvirinacamajj jacthapipjjtwa cawquïri soldadonacatejj nanacan amparanacajjar catuyatäna ucanacatjja, janiraquiw maynis faltquiti." 
Numbers31:50 Acajjay nanacajj apanipjjtwa cawquïri kori yänactejj sapa maynisa jicjjatanipcta ucanacjja: brazaletenaca, pulseranaca, sortijanaca, aretenaca, yakha c'achachasiñanac cuna Tatituru mä ofrendjama loktañataqui, uqhamat khespiyasiñataqui” sasa." 
Numbers31:51 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempejj catokapjjänwa jupanacatjja take korit lurat yänaca." 
Numbers31:52 Cawquïri jilïrinacatejj waranka, uqhamarac pataca soldadonacan nayrakatapa sarapcäna ucanacasti Tatiturojj pataca quimsakallko tunca pusini kilot sipansa juc'ampi jilwa korjja churapjjäna." 
Numbers31:53 Sapa mayni soldadow mä juc'a kori apanïna enemigot aparanitapatjja. 
Numbers31:54 Uqhamaw Moisesampi Eleazar sacerdotempejj jilïrinacat kori catokapjjäna, ucatsti Jiquisiñ Carparuw apapjjäna uqhamat Tatitojj israelitanacat amtasiñapataqui." 
Numbers32:1 Rubén, uqhamarac Gad tribunacajj walja uywanacanïpjjänwa. Cunapachatejj jupanacajj uñjapjjäna Jazer, uqhamarac Galaad orakenacan sumätapjja uywanac uywañataquejja," 
Numbers32:2 Moisesampiru, Eleazar sacerdotempiru marcan jilïrinacapampiruw jicjjatir sarapjjäna, ucatsti aqham sasaw sapjjäna:" 
Numbers32:3 —Uñjapjjam: Atarot, Dibón, Jazer, Nimra, Hesbón, Eleale, Sebam, Nebo, uqhamarac Beón orakenacajj," 
Numbers32:4 cawquïri orakenacatejj Tatitojj Israel marcatac catuntawayqui, ucanacasti suma paston orakenacawa uywataquejja, chekpachansa nanaca juman sirvirinacamanjja uywaw utjapjjetu." 
Numbers32:5 Jumataquejj waliquïchi ucqhajj nanacar churapjjeta uca orakenaca, ucatsti Jordán jawirjja jan maqhatayapjjestati —sasa." 
Numbers32:6 Ucampisa Moisesajj jupanacarojj sänwa: —¿Jilanacaman nuwasiri sarañcamajj acaruti jumanacajj kheparañ munapjjta? 
Numbers32:7 ¿Cunatsa jumanacajj israelitanacar mayjt'ayañ munapjjta, cawquïri oraktejj Tatitojj churapctam ucar jan maqhatayañataqui?" 
Numbers32:8 Uca quipcaracwa awquinacamajj lurapjjäna cunapachatejj Cades-barnea chekat uca orakenac uñatatir qhitapjjayät ucqhajja. 
Numbers32:9 Escol sat uma jalsucamawa puripjjäna, ucatsti orake uñatatapjjäna, ucapachasti israelitanacaruw ajjsarañ churapjjäna, cawquïri oraktejj Tatitojj churapcäyätam ucar jan mantayañataqui." 
Numbers32:10 Ucatwa Tatitojj uca urojj colerasïna, ucatsti mä juramento luräna," 
Numbers32:11 cawquïri jakenacatejj Egiptot mistunipqui pä tunca maranit amstaru, ucanacajj janiw uñjapcaniti, cawquïri oraktejj arupampi arsusin Abraham, Isaac, uqhamarac Jacob ucanacaru sisqui ucanacjja, jan jupanacan take iyawsañampi arcapjjatap laycu." 
Numbers32:12 Ucampisa Caleb sat Jefone chachan yokapa cenezeo jakequiw, Josué sat Nun chachan yokapampi, Tatiturojj take iyawsañampi arcapjjäna." 
Numbers32:13 Tatitusti israelitanacataquejj colerasïnwa, ucatsti pusi tunca maranacaw wasaran sarnakayäna, uqhamarac janiw maynisa kheparcjjänti, cawquïrinacatejj Tatiturojj jan wali luräwinacapampi ñankhachapcatayna ucanacatjja." 
Numbers32:14 Jichhasti jumanacajj jucha lurir awquinacan wawanacapjamajj, awquinacamjamaraquiquiw sarañ munapjjtajja, uqhamat Tatituru Israel marca contra, juc'ampi colerayañataqui." 
Numbers32:15 Jumanacatejj jan Tatitur arcañ munapcsta ucqhajj, jupasti walja maranacampiw israelitanacarojj wasaran sarnakayani, ucatsti jumanacaw juchanïpjjäta Israelan t'unjasiñapataquejja —sasa." 
Numbers32:16 Ucatsti jupanacajj Moisesaru jac'achasisajj aqham sapjjänwa: —Nanacajj aca chekan ovejanacataqui, vacanacataqui uyunaca lurañ munapjjta, familianacajjataquis mä marca lurañ munapjjta." 
Numbers32:17 Ucampisa nanacajj janc'aquiw armanacampi sarapjjä, mayni israelitanacan nayrakatapa, orakenacapar puriyañcama. Ucchcañcamasti familianacajjajj marcanacanwa kheparapjjani, suma sayt'at marcanacana; janiw jupanacarojj cunas camachcaniti uca chekanacan jaquir jakenacajja." 
Numbers32:18 Janiw nanacajj utanacajjar utt'apquiristti, janitejj israelitanacajj orakenacaparu mantapcani ucqhacamajja." 
Numbers32:19 Cunjämatejj nanacan orakenacajjajj Jordán jawir inti jalsu tokencqui, janiw nanacajj mayipcti orakenacjja Jordán jawirat maysa thiyarojja ni qhaysa chekanacarusa." 
Numbers32:20 Ucatsti Moisesajj sänwa: —Uqhamajj jumanacatejj arunacama phokhapjjäta ucqhajj, ucatsti waquichrantasisin nuwasiri sarapjjäta Diosan arsutaparjama." 
Numbers32:21 Take jumanacatejj Jordán jawira qhurcatar armantata maqhatapjjäta, Tatitun wayt'ataparjama, ucatsti kheparapjjaraquïta ucansa Tatitun take uñisirinacapar jakonucuñcama," 
Numbers32:22 uqhamarac uca orakesa catuntatäcani ucapachasti jumanacajj cuttanjjapjjätaw, arsüwinacamatsa librequiw uñjasipjjaraquïta Tatitun nayräjjapana, uqhamarac israelitanacan nayräjjapansa. Aca orakesti jumanacataquiw kheparani Tatitun aruparjama." 
Numbers32:23 Ucampisa janitejj uqham lurapcäta ucqhajj Tatitu contraw jucha lurasipcta, ucatsti mä uruw uca juchanacatjja mutuyäwejj purinini." 
Numbers32:24 Lurasipjjamay marcanaca familianacamataqui, uqhamarac uyunaca ovejanacamataquisa, ucampisa phokhapjjam arsutanacamarojja." 
Numbers32:25 Gad, uqhamarac Rubén uca tribunacan wawanacapajj ucjjarojj sapjjänwa: —Aca juman sirvirinacamajj lurapjjäwa, cuntejj nanacaru sapquista ucanacjja." 
Numbers32:26 Nanacan warminacajja, uqhamarac jisc'a wawanacajjampi, uqhamarac uywanacajjampi take animalanacajjampi chicaw aca chekan kheparapjjani, Galaad marcanacana," 
Numbers32:27 ucampis nanaca juman sirvirinacamajj armanacajj apjjarusisinjja nuwasiriw sarapjjä, Tatitun arsutaparjama, cunjämtejj jumajj siscta uqhamarjama." 
Numbers32:28 Ucatsti Moisesajj aca yatichäwinacwa churäna, Eleazar sacerdoteru, Josué chacharu, uqhamarac take familianacan jilïrinacaparu, take Israelan tribunacaparu:" 
Numbers32:29 —Gad, uqhamarac Rubén tribunacan take jakenacapatejj jumanacampi chica Jordán jawira waquichrantata nuwasiñatac maqhatapjjani, Tatitu Diosan arsutaparjama, uca orak jumanacan catuntañamcama, ucapachasti jumanacajj Galaad orakenacwa jupanacar churapjjäta." 
Numbers32:30 Ucampisa jupanacatejj jan armantat maqhatapcani, ucapachasti mä orakew jupanacarojj jumanac taypit wact'ani, Canaán orakena —sasa." 
Numbers32:31 Ucatsti Gad, uqhamarac Rubén tribunacan wawanacapajj aqham sapjjänwa: —Nanacasti lurapjjäwa cuntejj Tatitojj sirvirinacaparu sisqui ucanaca." 
Numbers32:32 Armantataw Canaán orakerojj maqhatapjjä Tatitu Diosaru ist'asina, ucampisa Jordán jawira inti jalsu toke orakenwa kheparapjjä, nanacan orakejjarjama —sasa." 
Numbers32:33 Uqhamaw Moisesajj churäna Gad, uqhamarac Rubén tribunacaru, chicat Manasés triburusa Sehón sat amorreo reyin orakenacapa, uqhamarac Og sat Basán reyin orakepa, take cawquïri marcanacatejj jupanccäna, take yapunacasa muyuntcäna ucanacampi chica." 
Numbers32:34 Gad tribun jakenacapajj Dibón, Atarot, Aroer marcanacwa wastata lurapjjäna," 
Numbers32:35 uqhamarac Atarot-sofán, Jazer, Jogbeha," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimra, Bet-harán, ucatsti suma thuru sayt'ayapjjäna, uqhamaraquiw uyunac ovejanacataqui lurasipjjäna." 
Numbers32:37 Rubén tribun jakenacapajj aca marcanacwa wasitat lurapjjäna Hesbón, Eleale, Quiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal-meón, Sibma, yakha marcanacan sutinacapsa trocapjjänwa, ucatsti quipca sutinacapampiw uchapjjäna wasitat lurat marcanacarojja." 
Numbers32:39 Maquir chachan wawanacapajja, cawquïritejj Manasés chachan yokapäcaraquïna, ucanacajj Galaad orakeruw mantapjjäna, ucatsti catuntapjjänwa, uqhamaraquiw uca chekan jaquir amorreonacarojj jakonucupjjäna." 
Numbers32:40 Ucatsti Moisesajj Maquir chachan wawanacaparojj Galaad orakwa churäna, ucatsti uca chekanwa utjantasipjjäna." 
Numbers32:41 Uqhamaraquiw Jair sat Manasés chachan yokapajj catuntasïna amorreonacan mä kawkha campamentopata, ucatsti Havot-jair sasaw sutichapjjäna." 
Numbers32:42 Noba chachan wawanacapajj Kenat orakenacwa catuntasipjjäna, uqhamaraqui cawquïri marcanacatejj jupanccäna ucanacamppacha, ucatsti quipca Noba sutimpiw uchapjjäna." 
Numbers33:1 Aca chekanacanwa israelitanacajj saräwipan sayt'apjjäna, cunapachatejj Egiptot mistunipcäna ejercitopampi formt'ata ucqhajja, Moisesampi, Aaronampi irpata." 
Numbers33:2 Moisesasti kellkänwa take cawqha chekanacarutejj puripjjäna ucanacan sutinacapjja, cunjämatejj Tatitojj siscatayna uqhamarjama. Take aca chekanacanwa kheparapjjäna mistunipcataynas ucanacampi chica." 
Numbers33:3 Israelitanacajj Ramsesat mistunipjjäna, tunca pheskani urunaca nayrïri phajjsit sarakquis uca marana, Pascua fiestajj amtascäna uca khepa uru. Jupanacasti wali jach'a ch'amampiw mistunipjjäna, take egipcionacan uñjcata." 
Numbers33:4 Ucañcamasti egipcionacajj jilïri wawanacapwa oraker imasipcäna, Tatitojj jupanacar jiwarayatap laycu, ucampisa Tatitu Diosaw diosanacaparu mutuyascatayna." 
Numbers33:5 Israelitanacajj Ramsés chekat mistuwayasajj Sucot sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:6 Sucot chekat mistuwayasajj Etam sat chekaruw puripjjäna, cawqharutejj wasarajj tucusqui ucqharu." 
Numbers33:7 Etam chekat mistuwayasajj Pi-hahirot tokeruw cuttapjjäna, Baal-zefón inti jalsu tokeru, ucatsti Migdol sat uñcatas tokeruw sayt'apjjäna." 
Numbers33:8 Pi-hahirot chekat mistuwayasajj jach'a kota maqhatapjjäna, ucatsti wasararuw puripjjäna. Quimsa uruw Etam chekanjam sarapjjäna ucatsti Mara sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna." 
Numbers33:9 Mara chekat mistusajj Elim chekaruw puripjjäna, cawqhantejj tunca payan uma jalsunacajj utjäna, uqhamarac pakallko tunca palmeranacasa, ucatsti uca chekaruw sayt'apjjäna." 
Numbers33:10 Elim chekat mistuwayasajj Mar Rojo sat kota thiyaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:11 Mar Rojo kotat mistuwayasajj Sin sat wasararuw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:12 Sin sat wasarat mistuwayasajj Dofca sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:13 Dofca chekat mistuwayasajj Alús sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:14 Alús sat chekat mistuwayasajj Refidim sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna, cawqhantejj marcajj umt'añataqui jan umani uñjasïna ucqharu." 
Numbers33:15 Refidim sat chekat mistuwayasajj Sinaí sat wasaranwa kheparapjjäna. 
Numbers33:16 Sinaí wasarat mistuwayasajj Kibrot-hataava sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:17 Kibrot-hataava chekat mistuwayasajj Hazerot sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:18 Hazerot sat chekat mistuwayasajj Ritma sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:19 Ritma sat chekat mistuwayasajj Rimún-peres sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:20 Rimún-peres sat chekat mistuwayasajj Libna sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:21 Libna sat chekat mistuwayasajj Rissa sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:22 Rissa sat chekat mistuwayasajj Ceelata sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:23 Ceelata sat chekat mistuwayasajj Sefer sat kolluruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:24 Sefer kollut mistuwayasajj Harada sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:25 Harada sat chekat mistuwayasajj Macelot sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:26 Macelot sat chekat mistuwayasajj Tahat sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna. 
Numbers33:27 Tahat sat chekat mistuwayasajj Tara sat chekaruw sayt'apjjäna.
