Job14:10 Ucampisa jakejj jiwjjasinjja jan mayampitaquiw chhaktawayjje, ¿jiwjjasinsti cawquiruraqui sarjjpachasti?" 
Job14:11 Jach'a kotan umapasa wañsuwayjjaquispawa, jawiranacas wañantawayjjaquispawa," 
Job14:12 ucampisa alajjpachanacan utjañapcamasti, jakejj janiw imäwipatjja sartcaniti; janiw samcapatjja uñatatcaniti." 
Job14:13 Walïspawa nayaru jiwañan munañaparu imantjjañamajja colerasiñaman pasañapcama, ¡ucatsti nayat amtasiñamataquejja mä uru amtasiraquisma!" 
Job14:14 ¿Mä jakesti jiwjjasinjja wasitat jactanjjaspati? Nayasti kawkhaya waquischispa uqhacamaw suyt'irista, t'akhesiñajjan tucusiña puriniñapcama." 
Job14:15 Jumatejj jawsitasmajja, nayajj jaysaraquirismawa; munasiñampiw uñtanitasmajja, jumajjay nayaru uscuschistajja uca laycu." 
Job14:16 Jichhajj sapa chellktäwejjwa uñch'uquistajja, ucapachasti janiw juchanacajj-jja amuycasmati;" 
Job14:17 pantjasitanacajjsa armanucjjasmawa, ñankha luratanacajjatsa k'omachjjaraquitasmawa." 
Job14:18 “Jach'a kollunacas allthaptasin tucusiriquiwa, karkanacas yakha chekaru jittayataraquiwa." 
Job14:19 Cunjämatejj umajj kalarojj merk'sojja, jallusa oraken lak'anacapjja apasjjaraquejja, uqhamaw jumajj nayan suyt'añajj-jja apasjjtajja." 
Job14:20 Jan mayampitaquiw tucjtajja, orakepatsa apanuctawa, ucatsti jupajj k'ala tucjataw uñjasjjaraqui." 
Job14:21 Wawanacapatejj sumancaña jicjjatapjjchi ucapachajj janiw jupajj ucanacjja yatquiti; jan walt'añanacaru puripjjchi ucapachasti jupajj janiw ucanacjja yatquiti; 
Job14:22 pachpa janchipan t'akhesitanacapacwa yatejja, jupa quipcan t'akhesitapaqui yatejja.”" 
Job15:1 “Qhititejj yatiñanïqui ucajj janiw ina ch'usa arunacampi arsusquiti, janiraquiw aleka arunacampiquis arsusquiti, cunanactejj thayajj apascjje ucanacampi." 
Job15:2  
Job15:3 Janiw inamayaqui cunsa parlquiti, janiraquiw ina ch'usa arsüwinacsa parlquiti." 
Job15:4 Ucampis jumajj Diosar ajjsartañjja apanucjjtawa. ¡Take chuyma Diosaru jac'achasiñsa apanucjjaractawa! 
Job15:5 Jan wali amtäwinacamaw uqham parlaytamjja, c'ari arunacaw parlayaractamjja." 
Job15:6 “Janiraquiw nayan jumar juchañchañajjasa waquisquiti, jan ucasti juma pachpaw arunacamampi juchañchasisctajja." 
Job15:7 ¿Jumasti amuytati jumat nayra jaken jan utjatapa, uqhamaraqui kollunacansa jan utjatapa?" 
Job15:8 ¿Jumasti Diosan amuyt'ayiripäcasmasa uqhamti amuyasta? ¿Jan ucajj jumaquisa acapachanjja yatiñanïcasma uqhamcha amuyasta? 
Job15:9 ¿Cunasa juman nanacat sipansa juc'ampi yatitamajja? ¿Cunracsa jumajj yatiracta cuntejj nanacajj jan yatipcta ucanacata juc'ampjja? 
Job15:10 ¡Nanacajj jilïri jakenacäjjapjjtwa, awquimat sipansa juc'ampi yatiñanïpjjaractwa!" 
Job15:11 “¿Janit jumataquisti waliquïqui pachpa Diosan jumar chuymachatapasti, jan ucajj nanacan jumaru c'achata parljjayatanacajjasa?" 
Job15:12 ¿Cunatsa colerasiñamampi atipjayasta, colerasiñamsa ninjama chhuqhutatayta?" 
Job15:13 ¿Cunatsa ucatake Dios contra colerasta, ucatsti jan wali arunacampi jupa contra arsusiracta?" 
Job15:14 Janiw mayni asqui jakes utjquiti, jan juchani jakesa janiw utjcaraquiti." 
Job15:15 Pachpa angelanacas Diosataquejj jan asquïcchi ucajja, janirac pachpa alajjpachasa k'omäcaracchi ucapachajja," 
Job15:16 ¡jakejj ucanacat sipansa juc'ampi ñusantatawa, jisc'achcañaraquiwa, ucatsti jan umaña k'añu umar uñtatawa!" 
Job15:17 “Jichhajj ist'itaya, cuntejj siscäma uca, cuntejj nayajj yatekta uca," 
Job15:18 cuntejj amuyt'ani jakenacajj yatichapquistu uca. Jupanacasti nayra awquinacapatwa yatekapjjäna," 
Job15:19 qhitinacarutejj orakejj churatäcan ucanacata, jupanac taypinsti janiw yakha jakenacajj utjcänti." 
Job15:20 “Mä khoru jaken jacañapajj juc'ataquiquiwa, t'akhesiñanacampi phokhantataquiraquiwa." 
Job15:21 Sustjiri ch'ajjwanacwa ist'i, cunapachatejj sumaqui samart'asisqui ucapachaw lunthatanacas jaljjatapjjaraqui." 
Job15:22 Janiw jupanacataquejj ch'amacat jaltañajj utjcjjeti. ¡Mä puñalaraquiw jupanacar jiwayañataqui suyasqui! 
Job15:23 Jiwat cuerpopan janchipasti siwek'aranacan mank'apaquëjjaniwa; jupasti yatiraquiwa ñankt'añajj jupataquejj jutascatapapuni. 
Job15:24 Ch'amacanacaw juparojj ajjsarayani, llaquisiñampi jan walt'añanacampiw catuntaraquini, cunjämtejj mä reyejj guerran nuwantejja uqhama." 
Job15:25 “Ucanacaw lurasi qhititejj Dios contra sayt'asqui ucarojja, qhititejj take ch'amani Diosar saycatqui ucarojja," 
Job15:26 qhititejj escudopampi jarc'akasisa jan wali arunacampi Dios contra sayt'qui ucarojja. 
Job15:27 Ajanupasa, uqhamaraqui cuerpopasa wali pokontatawa." 
Job15:28 Cawqui marcanacantejj jacapqui ucanacasti k'ala t'unjataw uñjasipjjani, utanacas apanucutaw uñjasipjjani. Mä lak'a montonar tucuyataw uñjasipjjani." 
Job15:29 Janiw walja maranaca kamirïcjjapjjaniti, janiraquiw acapachansa suma utjantapcaniti." 
Job15:30 Janiw ch'amacanacat jaltañataqui ch'amanïpcaniti. Cunjämatejj ninajj mä alirojj ch'ich'ekatanacapa nacsojja uqhamaraquïnïwa, cunjämatejj thayajj waña laphinac willirtayejja uqhama." 
Job15:31 Jan juc'ampi sallkjayasiñanacaru alcataspati, sallkjataw uñjasiraquini uca laycu." 
Job15:32 Janïra horasäquipanwa layminacapajj wañantjjani, janiw mayampisa ch'ojjñtancjjapjjaraquiniti." 
Job15:33 Jan pokoriri uva alir uñtatäniwa, cunjämtejj olivos alin pankaranacapajj willirtejja uqhamäniwa." 
Job15:34 ñankha jakenacajj jan wawanacanïpjjaniwa, kollke chilltañanacampi kamirquiptata utanacapsti ninaw naqharaquini." 
Job15:35 Jupanacajj ñankha lurañampi wallk'eptatäpjjewa, ucatsti aynacht'añanacwa wawachapjjaraquini; cuntejj jupanacajj achupqui ucanacasti c'arinacaquiwa.”" 
Job16:1 Job chachasti saraquiwa: “Walja cutiw uca parlatanacamjja ist'tjja, jumanacasti nayaru chuymachcamayajja, t'akhesiyjjapjjaquistawa." 
Job16:2  
Job16:3 Uqhama ina ch'usa parlanacasti ¿janit tucusïwinïqui? ¿Cunas jumanacan uqham naya contra arsupjjatamajja? 
Job16:4 Jumanacatejj nayjamäpjjaraquismajja, nayajj jumanacjamaw parlaraquirista; p'eksa ucsaru acsaruw qhiwirista, walja arunacwa sapjjaraquirisma," 
Job16:5 suma chuymachasiña arunacwa sapjjaraquirisma, uqhamat jumanacaru ch'amacht'añataqui." 
Job16:6 “Ucampisa janiw parlañajj t'akhesitajj samarayquiti, janiraquiw amuquïñas samarayquituti." 
Job16:7 Diosajj ch'amsa pist'ayjjetuwa; take amigonacajjwa apakjjaraquitu," 
Job16:8 catuntatwa utjayitu. Naya contrasti khanañchäwi arunacwa sartayi, c'ari juchañchäwi arunacwa naya contrajj sartayaraqui." 
Job16:9 Tatitojj arcnaketuwa antutjaraquituwa, mä khoru animaljamaw ajjsarayitu. Uñisirejjäcaspasa uqhamaw uñcatitu." 
Job16:10 Jakenacas naya contraw aywthapipjje, cunaymanwa senkch'uquipjjetu, jisc'achjasaw t'ajjllipjjaraquitu." 
Job16:11 Tatitusti khoru jakenacan, jake jiwayirinacan amparaparuw catuyitu." 
Job16:12 Nayajj sumaquïscayätwa, uqhamaruw jupajj cuncat catuntitu; ucatsti jisc'a jisc'wa tucjaraquitu. Flechanacapampiw antutjaniraquitu." 
Job16:13 Take toketwa antutjanitu, jan qhuyapt'ayasisaw janchejjarojj chhokhonoke, jiphillanacajjas orakenwa jisqhasjjaraqui." 
Job16:14 Mayampi mayampwa janchejjarojj chhojjriñchjasa jist'jaraqui, mä nuwasiri jakjamaw nayar jaljjataraquitu." 
Job16:15 “Llaquin phokhantataw chhanqha isinacampi isthapista, p'ekejjsa lak'aruw mokentaracta." 
Job16:16 Ajanojjasti jachcäwisa p'usuntjjaraquituwa; nayrasa juyct'jjaraquituwa," 
Job16:17 ucampisa janiw qhitiru ñankha luratajjas utjquiti, mayisitajjas k'omäscaraquiwa." 
Job16:18 “Aqhama naya contra jan wali luräwisti uñjatäñapawa; ¡orake janirac nayan mayisitajj-jja imantamti! 
Job16:19 Alajjpachanjja maynis nayataqui arsurejj utjapunpachawa. 
Job16:20 Ucasti Dios nayrakatanjja amtatanacajj-jja khanañcharacpan, uqhamat jupajj jachatanacajj uñjañapataqui;" 
Job16:21 qhitisaya arspan nayat arjjatasisa Dios nayrakatanjja, cunjämtejj mayni jaken nayrakatapanjja arsutajja maynit arjjatasisajja uqhama." 
Job16:22 Juc'a maranacaquiw jacañajjataquejj utj-jje, ucanacasti janc'aquiw pasawayjjaraqui, ucatsti janc'aquiraquiw jan mayampi cuttaniñataqui sarawayjjäjja." 
Job17:1 Jan ch'amaniw uñjasjjta, jiwañajjasti niya jac'achasinjjaraquiwa, sepulturaquiw nayarojj suyt'jjetu." 
Job17:2 Naya jac'ansti sawcasiri jakenacaquiw ucancasqui, jupanacasti jan qhuyapt'ayasisaw t'akhesiyapjjaraquitu." 
Job17:3 “Ucampisa jumajj Tata, nayatjja arjjatasitasmawa. ¿Qhitirac nayatsti jan jumäquipan arjjatitaspasti?" 
Job17:4 Jumajj jupanacan jacañanacapjja mayjt'aytawa, janiy jichhajj munamti jupanacan nayaru atipjañapjja." 
Job17:5 Qhitinacatejj cunsa catokt'asiñ laycuqui amigopa contra sayt'apqui ucanacan wawanacapajj mank'atwa t'akhesipjjani. 
Job17:6 Jumaw takenirusa naya contra parlaytajja, ajanutsa thusayaraquistajja." 
Job17:7 T'akhescäwejja nayranacajjas chhurct'jjetuwa; janchejjasa juc'ataquiquëjjaraquiwa. 
Job17:8 Ucanac uñjasinsti asqui jakenacajj mayjt'asipjjewa, colerasipjjaraquiwa, ucatsti mä jucharara jakëquiristsa uqhamwa uñjapjjaraquitu." 
Job17:9 Jupanacajj asquitwa uñt'asipjje, jan cuna jucha luririw tucupjjaraqui." 
Job17:10 Ucampisa take jumanacajj jutapjjam, ucatsti jumanac taypinjja janiw mayni yatiñan jaksa jicjjatcäti." 
Job17:11 “Urunacajjajj pasacwa pasawayjje, amtatanacajjasa, munatanacajjasa ina ch'usaruw tucusiwayjjaraqui." 
Job17:12 Ucampisa jumanacajj arumjja ururuw tucuyapjjtajja. ¡Ch'amacansa “Khanäjjewa” sasipcactawa! 
Job17:13 Jichhasti jiwañacwa suyt'jjeristjja, ucatsti ch'amacanacan liwitattasina ict'awayjjaña." 
Job17:14 ¡Awquejjasa, taycajjasa, jilanacajjasa, lak'onacampi sepulturampiquëjjewa!" 
Job17:15 ¿Cawquincaraqui suyt'añajjasti? ¿Cawquincaraqui nayataquisti suma jacañasti? 
Job17:16 ¿Take ucanacasti nayampi chicati jiwañaru sarakapjjani, uqhamata mayaqui lak'ana samarapjjañajjataqui?”" 
Job18:1 Ucjjarusti Bildad sata suhita jakeraquiw arsu: “¿Cunapachcamas jumanacajj parlasipcaquïta? Uca arunacatejj asquïspa ucapachajj parlascacsnawa. 
Job18:2  
Job18:3 ¿Cunatraqui nanacarusti animalanacarjama uñjapjjesta, jan ucajj wali pisi amuyu jakenacäpquirista uqhama uñjapjjestasti?" 
Job18:4 ¿Jumasti amuytati uqhama janchima jurkhenokasisasti aca oraken ch'usa wasararu tucuñapjja? ¿Jan ucajj karkanacansa cawqhancapquitejj ucqhata yakha chekaru sartapjjañapsa? 
Job18:5 “Khoru jaketaquejj khanapas jiwt'aniwa, ninapasti janiraquiw juc'ampi aktcjjaniti." 
Job18:6 Lamparan khanapas jiwaraniwa, utapansti janiw cuna khanas utjcaniti." 
Job18:7 Cayunacapas qhatatjjaquiniwa, pachpa sipitaparuw jalt'araquini." 
Job18:8 Sarnakäwiparusti mä känaw tincuñapataqui uscutaraquïni, uca känaru catuntataw uñjasiraquini." 
Job18:9 Cayunacaparusti mä lazompiw chint'asini, cayu mokonacapasti ñach'antataraquïniwa." 
Job18:10 Sipitasti thaquin imantatäscaraquiniwa, pasañap horasan catjañataqui." 
Job18:11 Take toketwa ajjsarañajj jutaraqui; sarnakäwipansti take chekansa juparus arcnakapcaspa uqhamwa amuyasiraqui. 
Job18:12 Mank'atjamasti ch'amanacapas tucusiwayjjaquiwa, jan walt'añasti janc'aquiraquiwa juparu puriñataquejja." 
Job18:13 Usuñasti jiwañan munat phuchapawa, janchsti juc'at juc'atwa mank'suscaraqui." 
Job18:14 Utapansti janiraquiw sumancañasa utjcjjeti, ajjsarcaña reyin nayrakataparu katatitaraquiwa." 
Job18:15 Utaparusti ninampiw wiyantasi, yänacapasti azufrempi ch'ajjchsutaraquiwa." 
Job18:16 Waña saphini kokampi sasiwa, wañantata layminacampi sasiraquiwa." 
Job18:17 Jan mayampi amtascañataquiw aca oraketjja chhaktjjani, sutipasti janiraquiw mayampisa aytatäcjjaniti." 
Job18:18 Khanatsti ch'amacaru apanucutäjjaraquiniwa; acapachatsti apanucjjapjjaraquiniwa. 
Job18:19 Jakenacapa taypinsti janiw wawanacapajj utjcjjaniti, janiw maynisa utapanjja kheparcjjaniti." 
Job18:20 Cunapachatejj uqhama pasatapatjja inti jalsu tokensa, inti jalanta tokensa yatipjjani ucapachasti, ajjsarañat qhathatisaw uñjasipjjaraquini." 
Job18:21 Uqhamaw mä ñankha jaken jacañapajj tucusini, cawquïri jaketejj Diosaru jisc'achqui ucan jacañapajja.”" 
Job19:1 Job chachasti ucjjarojj saraquiwa: “¿Cunapachcamas jumanacajj t'akhesiyapjjetäta, uqham parlatanacamampejja?" 
Job19:2  
Job19:3 Mayampi mayampwa nayarojj jisc'achjapjjestajja. ¿Janit uqham nayaru lurapjjatamatsti p'enkasipcta? 
Job19:4 Juchanïquirista ucasa, juchajjajj nayataquiquïspawa." 
Job19:5 Jumanacajj nayat sipansa juc'ampi sumäpcasmasa uqhamwa amuyasipjjtajja, ucatsti nayarojj aynacht'atajjsa ajanojjaruw khant'apjjestajja." 
Job19:6 Jichhasti yatipjjam, pachpa Diosaw nayarojj aynacht'ayitu, jupaw nayarojj sipitaru jalt'ayaraquitu." 
Job19:7 Nayasti “Jiwayapjjetaniwa” sasaw art'asta, ucatsti janiw qhitis yäkquituti; yanapa mayta, ucatsti janiw qhitis nayarojj ist'quituti." 
Job19:8 Diosajj sarañajjsa jist'antjjewa, thaquejjsa ch'amact'ayjjaraquiwa." 
Job19:9 Yänacajjsa k'alwa aparasjjaraquitu, jach'añchäwinacajjsa aparjjaraquituwa." 
Job19:10 K'ala aynacht'atpunwa apanucutojja. ¡Suyt'äwinacajjsa jan saphinwa lurjawayjjaraqui! 
Job19:11 Colerasiñapsti nayjjaruw wartani, uñisirirjamaw uñjaraquitu." 
Job19:12 Take soldadonacapasti nayaruw chhucjjatapjjetu, utajja jac'aruw utjantasipjje, ucanwa nayaru nuwantañataqui waquichasipjjaraqui." 
Job19:13 “Diosasti jilanacajjsa, jake masinacajjsa jayaruw nayat apakjjetu, ucatsti ucanacampejj jan uñt'ata jakerjamaw uñjayaraquitu." 
Job19:14 Familianacajjasa, masinacajjasa apanucjjapjjetuwa; utajjan jacasirinacasa armjjapjjetuwa. Nayaru sirvirinacasti jan uñt'iriw tucjjapjje, janiw uñt'jjapjjetuti." 
Job19:15  
Job19:16 Mayni uywataru jawsta ucapachasti janiw ist'cjjetuti, wali achict'asquipansa janiw ist'cjjetuti." 
Job19:17 Warmejjasa janiw jac'ayascjjetuti, jan ucasti jarc'akasjjetuwa, nayajj jupar achict'asquipansa. Pachpa wawanacajjataquis ajjtascañäjjaractwa." 
Job19:18 Jisc'a wawanacas jisc'achapjjetuwa, sartasiscta ucapachasti jan walinacacwa nayjjatjja parlapjje." 
Job19:19 Wali munata amigonacajjas apanucjjapjjetuwa, cawquïrinacarutejj nayajj wali muncta ucanacas uñisjjapjjetuwa." 
Job19:20 Janchejjajj ch'aqhanacajjaruw lip'catjjetu. Jan ch'amani jiwirjamäjjaractwa. 
Job19:21 Juma amigonacajjasti nayatjja qhuyapt'ayasipjjeta, Diosasti colerasiñapwa nayjjaru puriyani ucata." 
Job19:22 ¿Cunatsa jumanacajj Diosäpcasmas uqhama arcnakapjjesta? ¿Janiti sinti chhojjriñchjapquista? 
Job19:23 “¡Walïspawa maynina nayan arunacajja kellkañapajja, ucatsti ucanacjja mä metalaru kellksuta jaytaspa!" 
Job19:24 ¡Walïspawa maynin uca arunaca cincelampi mä fierroru jan ucajj mä kalarusa kellksuñapajja, jan mayampitaqui kellksuñapajja!" 
Job19:25 Nayasti yatiractwa arjjatirejjan jacascatapa, jupaw nayaru aca oraken arjjataraquitani." 
Job19:26 Janchejjasa jisc'a jisc'a willisisquitanejja, nayasti Diosarojj uñcatapunïwa." 
Job19:27 Pachpa nayranacajjampiw uñcatä, naya quipcaw uñjä, janiw yakhati uñjcanejja." 
Job19:28 “Cuna arunactejj parlapcta ucanac ist'asajja, ch'amajjajj pist'jjetuwa. Jumanacasti sapjjaractawa: “¿Cunjämaraqui arcnakascaquiñänisti? Jupan pachpa jan wali luratanacapaw juparojj apt'asqui” sasa." 
Job19:29 Ucampisa jumanacajj espadar ajjsartapjjam, cuna espadampitejj Diosajj mutuyqui ucaru. Yatipjjaraquim mayniw chekaparu uñjirejj utji." 
Job20:1 Ucjjarusti Zofar chachaw aqham sasa arsuraqui: “Jumajj nayarojj colerayistawa, ucatpï jichhajj cuna arunactejj saña muncsma ucanaca janc'aqui sämajja." 
Job20:2  
Job20:3 Jumajj arsusitanacamampejj ñankhachistawa, ucampis nayajj yatiractwa cuna arunactejj jumaru sañajjäqui ucjja." 
Job20:4 “Jumajj yattawa uqhampunïtapjja, cunapachattejj jakejj aca oraken utjcän ucqhatpacha," 
Job20:5 ñankha jaken cusisiñapajj juc'ataquiquiwa, uca cusist'añapasti mä juc'ataquiquiraquiwa." 
Job20:6 Uca cusisiñapajj alajjpachjama jach'äscpasa, p'ekepasa kenayanaccamasa puriscpan," 
Job20:7 ucampis tucuyarojj wanur uñtataquiw tucusjjani. Masinacapasti janiw yatipcaraquiniti cawqhancatapsa. 
Job20:8 Samcjamaquiw chhaktawayjjani, aruma samcar uñtata, janipuniw qhitis jicjjatirjamäcaniti." 
Job20:9 Qhitinacatejj jupampi jacapcäna, uñjapcaraquïna ucanacasti janiw mayampisa uñjcjjapjjaniti." 
Job20:10 Wawanacapasti cuntejj jupajj lunthatcatayna ucanacjja pobrenacaruw cuttayjjapjjani. 
Job20:11 Ch'amani waynpachracwa jiwatapatsa amay imäwiru sarakani. 
Job20:12 Ñankhajj jupataquejj wali sumjamaquiwa, sumjamwa mallt'araqui;" 
Job20:13 uqhama sumätapsti lacaparuw apjjäsi, sumwa mallirt'araqui." 
Job20:14 Ucampisa cunapachatejj puracancjje ucapachasti mä catarin venenopäcaspasa uqhamaw tucjjaraqui. 
Job20:15 Cuna kamir cancañanactejj mank'antcäna ucanacsti cutsuyanjjewa; Diosaw ucanacjja puracapat apsunjjaraqui. 
Job20:16 Catarin venenopwa ch'amuscänjja, uca venenow jiwayaraquinejja." 
Job20:17 Lechena, misq'impina umjam jalascatapatsti janiw cusist'caniti." 
Job20:18 Täke cuntejj jicjjatcatayna ucanacsti cuttayjjaniwa, janiw ucanacampejj cusiscaniti, uca kamiri cancañapampejja." 
Job20:19 Pobrenacan ch'amapampi kamiriptasajj jupanacarojj apanucuwayjjewa, jan jupanacan utachat utanacsa catuntasipjjaraquiwa." 
Job20:20 Janipuniw take cunampis sisthapcänti, janiraquiw juc'ampi munatapampis sisthapcänti;" 
Job20:21 juc'ampsa munascaquïnwa, ucatpï jichhajj jan cusisiñjja jicjjatcanitejja." 
Job20:22 Take cunsa juc'ampi jicjjatascaniwa, ucampisa juc'ampi ñankt'ataquïscapuniniwa; jupjjaruw ñankha jakenacan amparapas puriraquini." 
Job20:23 Cunapachatejj puracapa phokt'asiñ munani ucapachasti, Diosajj colerasiñapwa jupjjaru puriyanini." 
Job20:24 Mä hierrot lurat armata jaltascani ucapachasti broncet lurata armaruw jalt'ani. 
Job20:25 Mä flechaw cuerpopjja maysat maysa chhoksuni, uca flechan puntapasti q'iwchapa chekwa misturaquini. Ajjsarañampiw phokhantasini;" 
Job20:26 mä jach'a ch'amacaw juparojj muyuntani. Ninaw juparojj utpacha naqhantaraquini. 
Job20:27 Alajjpachasti jupan juchapjja khanaruw uñstayani, aca orakesti juchañchañataquiw sartasiraquini." 
Job20:28 Cunapachatejj jupan colerasiñapajj jupjjaru purinini ucapachasti take yänacapaw tucusiraquini. 
Job20:29 Ucanacwa Diosajj ñankha jaketaquejj waquichi, ucanacaw ñankha jakerojj suyt'ascaraqui.”" 
Job21:1 Ucjjarusti Job chachajj aqham sasaw arsu: “Nayataquejj cusisiñäspawa jumanacatejj nayaru ist'apjjetasma ucapachajja. 
Job21:2  
Job21:3 Jichhajj llamp'u chuymampi ist'apjjeta, uca khepatsti larusiñ munapjjäta ucapachajj, larusisipcätawa." 
Job21:4 “Nayajj janiw qhiti jakempis ch'ajjwcti, ucatpï wali jisc'a chuymätjja." 
Job21:5 Jumanacatejj ist'apjjetätajja, ajjsarañatsa amutt'ataw uñjasipjjätajja." 
Job21:6 Nayasti ucanaca amtasajj sustjastwa, janchejjas qhathatiraquiwa." 
Job21:7 ¿Cunatraqui ñankha jakenacasti jacasipcaquisti, ucasti chuymani tokerojja wali ch'amaniquïsipcaraquisti?" 
Job21:8 Jupanacajj wawanacaparusa, allchhinacaparusa jilarirjja uñjasipcaraquiwa; uca wawanacapasa, allchhinacapasa jupa jac'anjja janiw cunatsa llaquisipquiti." 
Job21:9 Janiw cunas jupanacarojj ñankt'ayirjamäquiti, Diosasti jupanacarojj janiw mutuycaraquiti." 
Job21:10 Uywanacapasti jupanacataquejj walwa miri; kallunacas janiw jiwarapcaraquiti. 
Job21:11 Wawanacapasti oveja kallunacjamaw ucsa acsa chhuqhunakasa sinc'usipjjaraqui. 
Job21:12 Cusisitaw thokhonacapjje, arpanacampi, tamboranacampi, pinquillonacampi phust'asisaw cusisipjjaraqui." 
Job21:13 Wali kamiriw sarnakawayapjje, kamiriw jiwawayjjapjjaraqui." 
Job21:14 Diosarusti sapjjaraquiwa: “Jan parlapjjestati, janiw nanacajj leyinacamjja yatiñ munapcti." 
Job21:15 ¿Qhitirac take ch'amani Diosasti juparu sirviñasataquisti? ¿Cuna asquirac jicjjattansti jupa nayrakatan quillisisasti?” sasaw parlapjjaraquejja. 
Job21:16 (Ucampisa ñankha lurir jakenacataquejj cusisiñanacapajj janiw jupanacancquiti. ¡Nayatsti jayancpan jupanacjama amtañajja!) 
Job21:17 “¿Cunapachas ñankha jakenacan khanapajj jiwt'ejja? ¿Cunapachas jupanacajj jan walt'añanacaru puripjjaraquejja? ¿Cunapachas Diosajj jupanacataqui colerasejja, ucat jupanacaru t'akhesiyaraquejja?" 
Job21:18 ¿Cunapachas jupanacajj t'unar uñtata willinucutäpjjänjja? ¿Cunapachas jupanacarojj thayas aparaquejja? 
Job21:19 Sataraquiwa: “Diosajj awquinacapan juchanacapatjja wawanacaruw t'akhesiyi” sasa. Ucampisa pachpa ñankha jakew t'akhesiscañapajja, juchapatsa phokhascañaparaquejja." 
Job21:20 Take ch'amani Diosatsti jupaw mutuyäwi catokascañapajja. 
Job21:21 Janiw jupajj familiaparu cunatejj pascaspa ucanacatjja llaquisquiti, jupajj jiwjjani ucapachasti janiw familiapajj jupataquejj cuna llaquïcjjesa." 
Job21:22 (Ucampisa ¿qhitis Diosarojj yatichaspajja? Jupajj alajjpachan utjirinacarusa juchañchiwa). 
Job21:23 “Yakhepanacasti c'uchiquiw jiwawayjjapjje, ch'amani, cusisita, jan cuna llaquini," 
Job21:24 q'umara, kamiri uqhamaw jiwawayjjapjje." 
Job21:25 Ucampisa yakhepanacajj aynacht'ataquiw jacasipjje, jan cusisiña mallt'asaquiraquiw jiwawayjjapjje." 
Job21:26 Ucampisa sepulturanjja mayaquëjjapjjewa; maynirusa, maynirusa lak'onacaquiw mank'antjjejja." 
Job21:27 “Nayasti yatiractwa cuntejj jumanacajj nayat amuyapctas ucjja, ñankha amtanacamsa yatiractwa." 
Job21:28 Jisct'apjjaractwa: “¿Cawquincaraqui uca ñankha jaken utapasti?” sasa. 
Job21:29 ¿Janit jumanacasti viajerinacampi parlapcta? ¿Janit ist'apcta cuntejj jupanacajj parlapqui ucanacsti? 
Job21:30 Jupanacasti sapjjewa: “Cunapachatejj Diosajj colerasi ucapachajj mutuyäwi apayani, ucampisa ñankha jakerojj janiw cunas pasquiti” sasa." 
Job21:31 “Janiw qhitis ajanuparu sisquiti ñankha luratanacapjja, janiw qhitis juchapatjamajja mutuycaraquiti." 
Job21:32 Cunapachatejj jiwjje ucapachasti jakenacajj waljaniw sarapjjaraqui, mayninacajj khepa, mayninacasti nayra, sepultura jac'ansti uñjirinacajj uñch'uquipjjaraquiwa, orake allsuñasa jupataquejj jasaquiraquiwa." 
Job21:33  
Job21:34 “¡Jumanacajj inamayaw nayarojj chuymachaña amtasipctajja! ¡Jumanacan parlatanacamasti c'aricamaquiwa!” 
Job22:1 Ucjjarusti temanita Elifaz chacharaquiw arsu: “¿Jumasti amuytati jakesti, wali yatiñanïscpasa ucasti asquïspati Tatitutaquisti cuna lurañansa?" 
Job22:2  
Job22:3 ¿Cuna asquiraqui take ch'amani Diosataquisti jumana ch'iqhi, uqhamaraqui jan juchani asquïtamasti?" 
Job22:4 Jupatejj jumaru chekachstamjja, uqhamaraqui jan wali luratanacamatsa cuenta wayt'aracstamjja, ucajja janiw juman asquïtam laycüquiti," 
Job22:5 jan ucasti jach'a juchanïtam laycuwa, juchanacamasti jan korpani jach'araquiwa." 
Job22:6 Jumajj jan muncasaquiwa jilanacamatsa yänacapa apakäyätajja, uqhamaraqui isinacapsa, ucatsti jan isini k'alalpachracwa apanucüyätajja." 
Job22:7 Umat pharjatarusti janiw umt'aycäyätati, mank'at awtjatarus janiw mank'aycäyätati." 
Job22:8 Cunjämtejj ch'amani, ajjsarataraquïyätajja, orakejja jumanccaspasa uqhamwa amuyasïyätajja." 
Job22:9 Ijma warminacjja ucsacwa qhitanucüyätajja, wajcha wawanacarusti t'akhesiyaraquïyätawa." 
Job22:10 Ucatpï jichhajj jan walt'añajj jumarojj muyunttamjja, ucatsti janc'aquiw qhathatiractajja." 
Job22:11 Take cunas jumataquejj ch'amacawa, janiw cunsa uñjcasmati; walja umanacaw muyuntaractamjja." 
Job22:12 “Diosasti alajjpachanquiwa, juc'ampi alayana; jayanquiri warawaranacasa cayu tact'äwipancaraquiwa;" 
Job22:13 ¿Cunjämaraqui jumasti sasma: “Diosajj janiw amuyasquiti, jach'a kenayanacaw juparojj jan uñjaycaraquiti” sasa? ¿Cunjämraqui sasma: “Diosajj janiw uñjquiti” sasa? Jupajj alajjpachanjja mä thiyat mä thiywa sari." 
Job22:14  
Job22:15 ¿Cawquïri ch'amaca thaquinjamtejj ñankha jakenacajj sarapcäna ucanjamti sarañ munaracta? 
Job22:16 Jupanacajj janc'aquiw jiwarjjapjje, mä jach'a jawiran apatjama." 
Job22:17 Diosarusti sapjjaraquïnwa: “Jan arjjayapjjestati, ¿cunraqui take ch'amani Diosasti jiwasatac luraspa?” sasa." 
Job22:18 (Ucampisa uca Diosaw jupanacan utapjja take suma yänacampi phokhanti. ¡Nayatjja jayancpan jupanacjama amtañajja!) 
Job22:19 Asqui jakenacajj ucanacjja uñjapjjewa, ucatsti cusisipjjewa, jan juchaninacasti larusipjjaraquiwa," 
Job22:20 ñankha jakenacan yänacapajj ninampi naqhantatätapa uñjasajja. 
Job22:21 “Diosampejj wasitat sumaru mantjjam, ucapachaw kamiri tucjjaraquïta." 
Job22:22 Jupampi yatichayasim, arunacapsti p'ekemaru catokaraquim." 
Job22:23 Jumatejj alt'at chuymani tucjjasma, ucatsti take ch'amani Diosaru cuttjjaraquisma, utamatsa take uca ñankhanacjja apanucjjaraquisma," 
Job22:24 uqhamarus uñjaraquisma wali suma kori, lakäcaspas uqhama, jawiran kalanacäcaspas uqhama," 
Job22:25 take ch'amani Diosaw juman korimasa, kollkemasa tucunejja." 
Job22:26 Jupaw juman cusisiñamänejja, ucatsti take iyawsañampiw uñtaraquïta." 
Job22:27 Cuntejj mayïta ucarusti ist'ätamwa, ucatsti cuntejj jumajj juparu phokhañataqui arscäta ucanacsa phokharaquïtawa." 
Job22:28 Take luräwinacamansti walt'ascaquipunïtawa; khanasti thaquimanwa khanaraquini. 
Job22:29 Diosajj jach'a jach'a tucurirojj jisc'achiwa, alt'at chuymanirusti khespiyaraquiwa." 
Job22:30 Jupaw khespiyascätam jan juchanïcsta ucajja, juchamatsa k'omachatästa ucajja.”" 
Job23:1 Ucjjarusti Job chachaw arsuraqui: “Mä cutimpiw nayan arsusitanacajjajja chuyma ust'ayitu, Diosaw nayjjarojj mutuyañapa apayaniraquitu." 
Job23:2  
Job23:3 ¡Nayajj yatiquirista cunjämat jupar jicjjatañsa, uqhamaraqui cunjämat cawqhantejj utjqui ucaru puriñsa!" 
Job23:4 Jupa nayrakatanwa arsusiristjja, arsusiñanacajjasti walipuniw utjaraqui." 
Job23:5 Nayasti yatiristwa cunjämatsa jupan arsutaparu arsuñjja. 
Job23:6 Jupasti janiw ch'amapampiqui atipjquitaspati, jan ucasti ist'itaspawa;" 
Job23:7 ucatsti yatiraquispawa arsusitajjan chekapätapapuni; nayarusti chekaparuw uñjitaspa, ¡ucatsti jan mayampitaqui wiñayataquiw qhitanucjjaraquitaspa!" 
Job23:8 “Ucampisa nayajj inti jalsu tokenwa Diosarojj thakta, ucatsti janiw jupajj ucancquiti; inti jalanta token thakta, ucatsti janiw jicjjatcti." 
Job23:9 Amstaruw sarta, ucansti janiw uñjcaractti; aynacha tokeruw cuttanta, ucampis janiw uñjcaractti." 
Job23:10 Jupaw sarnakäwejja yati; yant'atsti suma k'omachata korjamaw misturaquëjja. 
Job23:11 Cuna thactejj jupajj uñacht'ayquitu ucsti jan maysar saranucusaw arcaracta. 
Job23:12 Leyinacapsa, camachi arunacapsa phokhapuntwa, janiw nayan munañajjac lurascti." 
Job23:13 “Cunapachatejj jupajj cuna lurañsa amtasi ucapachasti uca amtatapjja phokhapuniwa; janiw cunasa juparojj yakha amtayquiti. 
Job23:14 Cuntejj jupajj nayampi lurañ amtqui ucsti lurapuniniwa, yakha ucar uñtasita yänacampi chica." 
Job23:15 Ucatpï juparojj ajjsartjja; ucanaca amtta ucapachasti ajjsarañat qhathatiractwa. 
Job23:16 Take ch'amani Diosajj ajjsarayituwa. 
Job23:17 ¡Walïspawa nayaru arum ch'amacana chhaktayjjañapajja, lajja ch'amacasa muyuntjjetaspa!" 
Job24:1 “¿Cunatsa take ch'amani Diosajj mä urunaca juchañchañataqui jan amtejja, uqhamat qhitinacatejj juparu munqui ucanacan uñjapjjañapataquejja?" 
Job24:2 Khoru jakenacajj korpanacapjja jithiyapjjewa, tamanacaparu yapt'asiñataquisti ovejanacsa lunthatapjjewa." 
Job24:3 Wajchanacatsa, ijma warminacatsa uywanacapjja aparapjjaraquiwa." 
Job24:4 Pobrenacarojj thaquitsa maysaruw saranucuyapjje, pobre jakenacasti imantasjjapjjaraquiwa." 
Job24:5 Pobrenacajj monte asnonacjama wali ch'ama tucusaw mank'añap thakerejj mistupjje, wasaratwa wawanacapataquejj mank'aña apsupjjaraqui." 
Job24:6 Yakha jakenacan yapunacapatacwa cebada puyanacsa apthapisipjje, khoru jakenacan yapunacapatwa uva achunacsa pallasipjje," 
Job24:7 Arumanacasti jan cunampi janjjatasiñaniw khantatipjje, janiw cunampisa thayatjja jarc'akasirjamäpquiti." 
Job24:8 Jalluw juparojj kollunacan ch'aranji, karkanacaruquiw imantasiñ munasa khomantasjjapjje." 
Job24:9 “Ijma warminacatsti asu wawanacapsa aparapjjewa, pobrenacatsa isinacap lluch'supjjaraqui." 
Job24:10 Pobrenacajj k'alalaquiw sarnakjjapjje, trigo k'epcäwisti mank'at jiwarasipcaraqui." 
Job24:11 Molino kalanacwa onjjtayasipqui, ucat aceite apsuñataqui, uvanacwa taquipjje vino apsuñataquejja, ucampisa umatjamawa jiwarasipcaraqui." 
Job24:12 Marcat jayanwa qhitinacatejj t'akhesisipqui, uqhamaraqui jachasipqui, aykosipcaraqui ucanacajj t'akhesisipqui, wararisipcaraqui; ucampisa Diosajj janiw jupanacarojj mayisitapjja ist'quiti." 
Job24:13 “Yakhepanacajj khanarojj uñisipjjewa, take sarnakäwipansti uca khanatjja jithektapjjaraquiwa." 
Job24:14 Jake jiwayirejj, pobreru jiwayañataquejj sinti alwatwa sartasi, arumthapirusti lunthatasjjaraquiwa." 
Job24:15 Jaken warmipampi sarnaker jakejj ch'amacthapiñapwa suyasqui, ajanupsti sumwa imantasiraqui, uqhamat jan qhitimpisa uñjayasiñataqui." 
Job24:16 Lunthatajj arumaw utanacaru manti. Urusti jupanacajj jist'antasjjapjjewa; khanarusti uñisipjjewa. 
Job24:17 Uru khanasti jupanacataquejj aruma ch'amacjamawa; ch'amacan jan walinaca lurañacwa munasipquejja. 
Job24:18 “Ñankha jakejj umampi apatawa. Orakenacapas ñankhachataraquiwa, janiraquiw qhitis uva yapupan irnakcjjeti." 
Job24:19 Waña lupimpi chicasti qhunusa chullurjjewa, juchani jakesa sepulturaruw chhaktawayjjaraqui." 
Job24:20 Pachpa taycapawa jupatjja armasini; lak'onacaw mank'antjjaraquini, janiw qhitisa jupatjja mayampi amtascjjaniti. Ñankha jakesti qhuchhunucuta kokjamawa liwinuctjjaraquini." 
Job24:21 “Jan wawani warminacatsti, uqhamaraqui ijma warminacatsa, janipuniw qhuyapt'ayascänti, janipuniw cunapachasa yanapt'caraquïnti." 
Job24:22 Ucampisa Diosajj ch'amapampiwa munañaninacarojj jakonucuraqui; cunapachatejj jupajj sartasi ucapachasti, janiw qhitisa jacañapjja suma imascaspati." 
Job24:23 “Diosawa jupanacarojj sumaqui jacayasqui, ucampisa sapa chellktäwipwa uñjascaraqui." 
Job24:24 Ñankha jakejj juc'ataquiquiw sarti, ucatsti janc'aquiw jiwawayjjaraqui; jiq'inucuta alir uñtataw ancuntawayjjaraqui, p'act'ata trigo puyar uñtata." 
Job24:25 Ucatejj jan uqhamäcchi ucasti, ¿qhitiraqui sitaspa: “Janiw uqhamäquiti” sasasti? ¿Qhitisa khanañcharaquitaspa nayan pantjatätajja?”" 
Job25:1 Ucjjarusti Bildad sata suhita chachaw arsuraqui: “Diosajj ch'amaniwa, ajjsarcañaraquiwa; jupaw alajjpachanjja sumancaña utjayi." 
Job25:2  
Job25:3 Alajjpachan arquirinacapajj jan jact'cayawa, khanapasti takenjjaruwa khant'araqui." 
Job25:4 ¿Mä jakesti asquïspati, uqhamaraqui k'omäspati Diosan nayrakatapanjja?" 
Job25:5 Diosan nayrakatapanjja janiw phajjsisa khantquiti, warawaranacasa janiw k'omäcaraquiti;" 
Job25:6 ¡jakejj ucat sipansa juc'ampi ñankhawa, mä jan qhuyapt'ayascaña lak'ompi sasiquiraquiwa!”" 
Job26:1 Ucjjarusti Job chachaw arsuraqui: “¡Jumajj wali sumsa jan ch'amanirojj yanapt'irïtätajjä, pisi ch'amanirusa khespiyaraquirïtätasä!" 
Job26:2  
Job26:3 ¡Wali suma arunacsa churirïtätajjä, pisi amuyunirusa amuyt'ayirïtätasä!" 
Job26:4 ¿Qhitin yanapapampisa jumajj uca arunaca arstajja? ¿Qhitiraqui uqham parlañataqui amuyt'aytamsti? 
Job26:5 “Jach'a kota mankhana utjiri jiwatanacajj uca jach'a kota mankhanjja qhathatipjjewa," 
Job26:6 Jiwañjjaru munañani sepulturasti janiw Diosataquejj cunsa imantquiti. 
Job26:7 Diosajj alajjpachjja jan cunjjaruquiwa janatatänjja, acapachsa jan cunjjaruquiwa warct'araquejja." 
Job26:8 Jupaw umanacjja kenayaru apjjäsiraqui, kenayanacasa janiraquiw uca jathi umampejja phallapquiti;" 
Job26:9 phajjsina ajanupsa ch'amact'ayiwa, mä kenayampiw imantaraqui." 
Job26:10 Khanampina, ch'amacampina korpapsti jach'a kota tucuyaruwa uscuraqui." 
Job26:11 Cunapachatejj Diosajj ajjsarcaña arunaca arsuni ucapachasti alajjpacha apjjäsir kollunacasa qhathatipjjewa. 
Job26:12 Ch'amapampiwa jach'a kotjja apnake, Rahab sat jach'a animalarusa ch'amapampiwa atipji." 
Job26:13 Samanapampi phust'asaquiw kenayanacsa chhaktayi, amparapampiwa jaltiri catarirusa jiwjayaraqui." 
Job26:14 Ucasti jach'a luräwipatjja mä juc'aquiwa, cuntejj ist'ctan ucasti jisc'a arunacaquiwa, ucampisa ¿qhitisa jach'a ch'amampi arsutapjja amuyt'aspa?”" 
Job27:1 Ucjjarusti Job chachaw wasitata arsuraqui: “¡Take ch'amani Diosan sutipjjaruwa arsta, uca Diosasti janiw chekaparu uñjañ munquituti, jan walt'añanacampiwa phokhantaraquitu." 
Job27:2  
Job27:3 Jupana nayaru jacaña churañapcamasti," 
Job27:4 janipuniw c'ari arunacjja arscäti, janiraquiw jan cheka arunacjja arscäti!" 
Job27:5 Jacañajjcamajj, jan juchanïtajjatjja arsusiscaquipunïwa. ¡Janiw jumanacan juchañchatanacamarojja jayscaraquïti!" 
Job27:6 Nayan chekapätajjsti arsusiscaquipunïwa, janiw cunata ajjsarañajjas utjquituti." 
Job27:7 “¡Take qhititejj nayan uñisirejja sayt'cani ucajj, ñankha jakenacan puriñaparuw puriraquini!" 
Job27:8 ¿Cuna suyt'äwiraqui juchani jaketaquisti utjaspa, cunapachatejj Diosajj jacañapa apakjjani ucapachasti?" 
Job27:9 Cunapachatejj jupajj jan walt'añanacan jicjjatasini ucapachajj, Diosajj janiw mayisitanacapjja ist'caniti." 
Job27:10 Jupajj janiw take ch'amani Diosan cusisiñjja jicjjatquiti, janiw cunapachasa art'ascaraquiti." 
Job27:11 “Nayajj take ch'amani Diosan ch'amapwa uñacht'ayapjjäma, Diosana amtatanacapwa yatiyapjjäma." 
Job27:12 ¿Jumanacatejj ucanaca uñjapjjsta ucapachasti, cunatsa uca lokhe arunaca parlapjjta?" 
Job27:13 “Acapï cuntejj take ch'amani Diosajj khoru, ñankha jakenacaru churcani ucajja." 
Job27:14 Wawanacapajj waljanïcchinisa, guerranwa jiwarjjapjjani, jan ucajj mank'atjamasa." 
Job27:15 Kheparirinacarusti usunacaw jiwarayjjani, ijma warminacapasti janiw jachapcaraquiniti." 
Job27:16 Ñankha lurir jakejja kollkepjja lak'aru uñtatsa montonascpan, isipasa walja montonäscaracpan;" 
Job27:17 uca isinacsti mä asqui jakew isisjjani, mä asqui jakew uca kollksa catuntasjjaraquini." 
Job27:18 Ñankha jaken utapajj mä jamach'i taparu uñtata t'unjtiriquiwa, pampan uñjirin chhujllapar uñtataquiwa." 
Job27:19 Kamiriwa iquintascani, ucampisa sartjjasinjja jan cunaniw sartjjani." 
Job27:20 Ajjsarañajj urpachaw purinini, jach'a thayaw arumarojj apasjjaraquini." 
Job27:21 Inti jalsu toket jutiri jach'a thayaw utapatjja jiq'inucuni; 
Job27:22 jan qhuyapt'ayasisaw jupataquejj phust'anini, jaltaña munascani ucasa." 
Job27:23 Thayajj qhuyt'asisa ch'amampiw arcnakaraquini. 
Job28:1 “Minanacaw utji, cawquittejj kollkejj apsusqui, uqhamaraqui cawqhantejj korisa k'omachascaraqui ucqha." 
Job28:2 Hierrojj oraketwa apsusi, cobresti kalanaca umatatayasinwa apsutaraqui." 
Job28:3 Jakejj ch'amacarojj tucuyäwi uscu, orake mankharuw manti, uca ch'amaca mankhan kalanaca thakaraqui." 
Job28:4 Mä wisqhat warcoktasinwa minanacjja jaya chekanacan jist'arapjje, cawqui chekantejj jakesa jan sarnakqui uca chekana, marcata jayana." 
Job28:5 Orakejj, patanjja, trigo achusqui, mankhatsti ninampi muyuntatäcaspasa uqhamaraquiwa." 
Job28:6 Ucanwa zafiro sat suma metalanacajj utji, koris lak'ampi quittataraqui." 
Job28:7 Janipuniw pacalinacasa, aycha mank'ani jamach'inacasa ucjja uñjapquiti." 
Job28:8 Montenquiri animalanacasti janiw uca chekajj pasapquiti, janiraquiw leonanacas ucarojj aywipquiti." 
Job28:9 Jakejj cuarzo sat suma kalanacatwa waythapisi, kollunacsti saphitpachwa jiq'inucuraqui." 
Job28:10 Karkanacansti p'iyanacwa jist'ji. ucansti wali suma yänacwa jicjjataraqui. 
Job28:11 Jawiranacajj cawquittejj sartanqui ucanacwa uñji, jan yatita yänacsti khanaruw apsuraqui." 
Job28:12 “Ucampisa ¿cawquitsa juti suma amuyt'anïñajja? ¿Cawqhanquisa ch'iqhi chuymanïñasa? 
Job28:13 Jakejj janiw yatquiti ucanacan wali jila alanïtapjja, janiraquiw acapachansa jicjjatquiti." 
Job28:14 Jach'a lamarajj siwa: “Janiw acancquiti” sasa. Kotasti saraquiwa: “Janiw nayajj uñjcti” sasa. 
Job28:15 Janiw korimpisa alatäcaspati, janiraquiw kollkempisa alascaspati." 
Job28:16 Ucasti janiw pagatäcaspati wali suma korimpisa, Cornalina, uqhamaraqui zafiro sata suma yänacampisa janiw pagatäcaraquispati." 
Job28:17 Cristalat sipansa, korit sipansa juc'ampi jila alaniwa, janiw suma korimpisa trocatäcaspati." 
Job28:18 Yatiña cancañajj coral sisqui ucatsa juc'ampi jach'awa, karkanacanquiri cristalat sipansa, perlanacat sipansa juc'ampi jila alaniraquiwa." 
Job28:19 Etiopianquiri crisólitosa janiw yatiñampejj chicachascaspati, janiraquiw suma fino korimpisa alatäcaspati." 
Job28:20 “¿Cawquitaraqui yatiñ cancañasti juti? ¿Cawquincaraqui ch'iqhi cancañasti? 
Job28:21 Takenin uñjañatjja imantatawa, alajjpacha jamach'inacatsa imantataraquiwa." 
Job28:22 Jiwañampi, t'unjatäñampejja sasipquiwa: “Nanacajj jupatjja parliricwa ist'apjjta” sasa." 
Job28:23 “Ucampisa Diosajj uñjiwa yatiñ cancañan thaquipjja; jupa sapaquiw yati cawqhana jicjjatañsa. 
Job28:24 Jupajj acapachjja mä thiyata mä thiycama uñji, uqhamaraqui alajjpachat aynacharu utjqui ucanacsa." 
Job28:25 Cunapachatejj Diosajj thayarojj ch'amapjja tuputaqui churcän ucqhajja, uqhamaraqui umanacan korpapsa uscüna ucqhajja," 
Job28:26 jallurusa horasaparu puriñapataqui uscuraquïna, jach'a thayarusa thaquipjja uñacht'ayaraquïna;" 
Job28:27 ucapachajja yatiñ cancañarojj uñjaraquïnwa, asquïtapsa yatiraquïnwa, sumwa uñaquipänjja, ucatsti waliquiw saraquïnwa." 
Job28:28 Diosasti jakenacarojj sänwa: “Take chuymampi Tatitu Diosar sirviñanquiwa yatiñ cancañajja; ñankhanacat jithektañanquiwa amuyt'asirïñajja” sasa. 
Job29:1 Ucjjarusti Job chachajj wasitata arsusi: “¡Walïspawa nayan nayra pachanacaru cuttjjañajjajja, cunapachatejj Diosajj nayarojj arjjatquitäna uca pachanacaru cuttjjañajjajja!" 
Job29:2  
Job29:3 Cunapachatejj jupajj khanapampi khant'ayanquitäna, nayan jan ch'amacana sarnakascañajjataqui;" 
Job29:4 cunapachatejj nayajj chacha wact'anccäyäta, Diosasti utajj-jja uñjaraquïna;" 
Job29:5 cunapachatejj take ch'amani Diosajj nayan jac'ajjanccäna, wawanacajjas nayampi chicäsipcaraquïna;" 
Job29:6 lechesa umjama oraken jalascaraquïna, aceitesa karkata mistuscaraquïna;" 
Job29:7 cunapachatejj nayajj marcan tantachasïwipan kont'ascäyäta. 
Job29:8 Waynanacasa nayar uñjasajj maysaruw jittapjjäna, chuymaninacasa nayar uñtasajja sayt'apjjaraquïnwa." 
Job29:9 Ucapachan wali jach'a jilïri jakenacasa amuct'apjjänwa, ucatsti amuct'añataquiw señalt'apjjaraquïnjja." 
Job29:10 Marca apnakerinacasti jisc'atacwa parlapjjänjja; lajjranacapas pachpa lacanacaparuw lip'cattaraquïnjja. 
Job29:11 “Jakesti nayar uñjasajja, nayar ist'asasa, suma arunacampiw aruntt'apjjetänjja, nayjjatsti wali sumwa parlapjjaraquïnjja." 
Job29:12 Nayasti ucapachajj wajcharusa, pobrerusa yanapt'araquïyätwa, cawquïrinacarutejj jakejj jan yanapcäna ucanacaru." 
Job29:13 Qhititejj aynacht'atäcän ucasti nayarojj yuspagaritänwa; yanapatajjasti ijma warminacarojj cusisiyänwa. 
Job29:14 Cheka cancañampi jan lunthatasiñampisti nayan pachpa jacañajjänwa; ucanacasti nayataquejj mä isjamänwa. 
Job29:15 ¡Juyqhutaquisti nayaw nayräyätjja, cojotaquisa nayaw cayüscaraquïyätjja," 
Job29:16 pist'ata sarnakerinacan awquipäyätwa, yakha marcat jutirinacan arjjatiripäyätwa!" 
Job29:17 Khoru jakenacarojj nayajj ajanu ch'aqhapwa t'unantirïyätjja, pachpa lacanacapatwa cuntejj aparapcatayna ucsa apararaquirïyätjja." 
Job29:18 Nayasti uca urunacajj saraquïyätwa: “Walja maranacaw jacäjja, wali chuymaniwa pachpa utajjan jiwjjaraquëjja” sasa." 
Job29:19 Jaliri uma thiyanquir kokjamätwa, cawquïrirutejj aruma sullanacajj sullantqui uqhama." 
Job29:20 Nayan c'ajquiri cancañajjasti nayampi chicaw machakquipstaraquini, janiw ch'amajjas tucuscaraquiti." 
Job29:21 “Takeniw nayaru ist'apjjetänjja, amuquiw ewjja arunacajjsa ist'apjjänjja." 
Job29:22 Nayan parlatajjatsti janiw qhitisa arsuncänti. Arunacajjasti mayata mayatwa jupanacjjaru puriraquïnjja," 
Job29:23 jupanacasti uca arunacajj-jja walwa suyt'apjjaraquïnjja, cunjämtejj wali lupi urunacan jallojj suyt'atäquejj uqhama." 
Job29:24 Cunapachatejj nayajj lart'asïyäta ucqhasti, janiw jupanacajj iyawsañjja munapcänti, janiraquiw cusisita ajanojjsa uñjañatjja karjasipcänti." 
Job29:25 Nayasti jupanacarojj ch'amampiw apnakäyätjja, cunatejj jupanacan lurañanacapäcän ucanacsa nayaw amtaraquïyätjja, cunjämtejj mä reyejj jakenacapataqui amtquejj uqhama; llaquisiñ horasanacapansti nayaw chuymacharaquïyätjja." 
Job30:1 “Ucampis jichhajj nayat sullca waynanacas, larusipjjetuwa nayasti uca waynanacan awquinacaparojj janiw ovejanacajja uñjiri anunacampi chicas uñjquirïscäyätti." 
Job30:2 ¿Cunataquis nayajj ch'amapjja munirïscäyätjja? Jupanacajj jan ch'amani jakenacäpjjänwa. 
Job30:3 Jupanacasti mank'atjamajja uqhamaraqui pist'atäjjasinsa, arumanacajj ch'usa wasaranjja waña saphinacacwa t'urusipcänjja;" 
Job30:4 c'allc'u alinacan laphinacapacwa mank'apjjänjja, retama saphinacamppach mank'apjjänjja." 
Job30:5 Take jakenacansa jupanacajj uñisitaw sarnakapjjänjja; lunthatanacarjama arnakt'asisa arcnakatäpjjaraquïnwa; 
Job30:6 karka p'iyanacanwa utjapjjänjja, jach'a karka mankhanacana;" 
Job30:7 koranac taypinwa wararipjjaraquïnjja, alinac taypiruw tantacht'asipjjaraquïnjja." 
Job30:8 Jan cunatac sirviri jakenaca, jan awquini, jan taycani jakenaca, janiraquiw aca marcan jacapjjañapas waquisquiti." 
Job30:9 “Ucampisa jichhajj jupanacaw nayatjja sawcasipjje, nayjjatsti cunaymanwa sawcasisa larusipjjaraqui." 
Job30:10 Nayatsti ajjtasisaw jithektjjapjjetu, ajanutsa thuscatawayapjjaraquituwa." 
Job30:11 Nayasti jan armani, jisc'achataw uñjasta, uqham uñjasasti janiw yäkcjjapjjaraquituti." 
Job30:12 Jac'ajjaruw tantacht'asipjje, liwisiyapjjetuwa, nuwantapjjaraquituwa, jiwayañwa munapjjaraquitu." 
Job30:13 Thaquejjsa nayar t'unjañataquiw jist'antapjje, janiw qhitis jupanacarojj jarct'caraquiti." 
Job30:14 Mä perka p'iyjatanjamwa nayjjarojj chhucjjatanipjjetu, jach'ata warart'asisaraquiw nayarojj liwjjattapjjetu." 
Job30:15 Nayjjarusti ajjsarañaw liwjjattitu, nayan jake cancañajjasti mä thayjamaquiw sarawayjje, kamir cancañajjasa, kenayjamaquiw chhaktawayjje." 
Job30:16 “Janiw nayajj jacañ muncjjti; llaquisiñaquiw nayarojj catuntjjetu. 
Job30:17 Usuñas ch'aqhacamaw puritu; arumanacasa jan inact'asaw t'akhesiyaraquitu. 
Job30:18 Diosasti nayarojj cuncatwa catuntitu, ch'amampiw isjja thalsuraqui." 
Job30:19 Ñek'eruw liwintitu, nayajj lak'äquiristsa jan ucajj khelläquiristsa uqhama." 
Job30:20 “Nayajj, Dios Tata, jumatjja yanapwa maysma, ucampis janiw jumajj ist'quistati, art'asinsmawa, ucampisa janiw ist'quistati." 
Job30:21 Nayataquisti wali khoruw tucjjtajja, jan qhuyapt'ayasisaw arcnakaraquistajja." 
Job30:22 Thayampiw apayistajja, jach'a thayampiw k'ala thalsuyaraquistajja." 
Job30:23 Yatiractwa jumajj nayarojj jiwañaru apañ munatama, cawqharutejj take jakejj puriñapäqui ucaru." 
Job30:24 ¿Janit nayasti pobreru yanapt'ctsti? ¿Janiraquiti aynacht'ata jakerus khespiyctjja? 
Job30:25 ¿Janiti qhititejj t'akhesqui ucatsti jachctsti? ¿Janiti pist'ayasiri jaketsa qhuyapt'ayasctjja? 
Job30:26 Nayajj cusisiñwa suyt'ascäyätjja, ucampisa t'akhesiñaquiw jutjje; khanan puriniñapwa suyascäyätjja, ucampisa ch'amacaquiw purinjje." 
Job30:27 Chuymajjajj walpunwa usutu; jan samart'asaraquiw putuquitu, llaquisiñ urunacaquiw nayarojj suyt'itu." 
Job30:28 Sarnakäwejjasti llaquisiñaquiwa, janiw intin khanapsa uñjctti. Takenin nayrakatapanwa yanapa mayiracta." 
Job30:29 Kamakenacan jilapäquiristsa uqhamätwa, avestruz sat jach'a jamach'in masipäquiristsa uqhamätwa." 
Job30:30 Janchejjas ch'iyäraw naqhantawayjje, cuerpojjasti ninjamaw naqhascaraqui." 
Job30:31 Arpanacana, pinquillonacana phust'asitapasti, nayataquejj jachañaru, t'akhesiñaruquiw tucuwayjje." 
Job31:1 Nayajj maya amtasta, ucasti acawa: Janipuni soltera tawakonacarusa munapayañajja." 
Job31:2 ¿Cunsa take ch'amani Diosajj jakerojj alajjpachatpacha churanejja? 
Job31:3 ¿T'akhesiñasti janit ñankha jucharar jakeru wact'qui? 
Job31:4 ¿Diosajj janicha luräwinacajj uñjqui? ¿Janicha take sarnakäwejjsa uñtanqui? 
Job31:5 “Nayajj juramentompiw arsta, janiw qhitirus ñankha amtañampi cuns lurcti, janiraquiw qhitirus sallkjañ amtctti." 
Job31:6 ¡Diosasti chekpacha balanzapampi pest'araquitpan, uqhamatwa nayan chekapätajja yatiraquini!" 
Job31:7 Nayatejj cheka thaquit saranucstjja, inas inampst'añanacampi atipjayasiracstjja, inas jaken cuna yänacapsa catuntasiracsta," 
Job31:8 ucapachasti yakhanaca yapojjatjja mank'pan, cuntejj ayruscta ucanacsa saphitpacha jiq'inucuracpan." 
Job31:9 “Mä warmimpitejj sallkjayastjja, jan ucajj jake masejjan warmipsa uñch'uquiscaracsta," 
Job31:10 ucapachasti warmejjajj yakhan sirviripa tucpan, jan uñt'ata jakenacaraqui warmejjampisa iquintpan." 
Job31:11 Luräwinacajjajj jach'a p'enkäspawa; mutuña catokañas waquisiraquispawa. 
Job31:12 Cunjämtejj ninajj take cuna tucjejja, uqhamaraquiw take cunajjsa tucjaspan." 
Job31:13 “Cunapachatejj uywatanacajjajj cunsa mayipjjetän ucapachajja, jupanacarojj ist'apunïyätwa." 
Job31:14 ¿Cunjämampitcha nayajj Diosan nayrakatapar uñstiristjja? ¿Cunapachatejj jupajj nayaru luratajjat wayt'itaspa ucapachasti cun sasas arsusiristjja? 
Job31:15 Mä sapa pachpa Diosaquiw taycasan puracapan sartayistu, jupanacarusa, nayarusa jupaquiw jacañ churaraquistu." 
Job31:16 “Pobrenacarusti pist'ayasiñapanjja yanapt'apunïyätwa, janiraquiw ijma warminacan pist'ayasiñan sarnakañapsa muncäyätti." 
Job31:17 Janipuniw naya sapaqui mank'ajj-jja mank'caraquïyätti, janipuniw wajchanacarusa mank'aquipcaraquïyätti." 
Job31:18 Wajcharusti awquipäquiristsa uqhamaw uñjäyätjja, ijma warminacatsa arjjatasipuniraquïyätwa." 
Job31:19 Cunapachatejj maynejj jan isini uñjasïnjja, jan ucajj mä pobrejj jan isini uñjasïn ucapachasti," 
Job31:20 nayaw ovejanacajjan t'awrapat isi lurasa churaraquïyätjja, ucatsti wali yuspagararaquitänjja." 
Job31:21 Janipuniw cunapachas wajcharojj ajjsarayirïcti, juezanacampi sumancatajjatjja." 
Job31:22 Uca arunacatejj jan chekäcchejja, amparanacajjajj t'unartitpan, callachitsa jalartaraquitpan." 
Job31:23 Nayajj Diosan mutuyäwipjja ajjsaräyätwa. ¡Janiw jupan jach'a cancañapjja amuyt'irjamäcäyätti! 
Job31:24 “Janipuniw cunapachas koriru alcatasisajj sarnakcäyätti. 
Job31:25 Janipuniw cunapachas kamir cancañaru alcatasisa sarnakcäyätti, jan ucajj walja kollke jicjjatañcamasa." 
Job31:26 Intin khanatapsa uñjtwa, phajjsina suma c'ajatapsa uñjaractwa," 
Job31:27 ucampisa janipuniw ucanacarojj jamasan quillt'ascäyätti, janiraquiw ucanacarus munart'cäyätti." 
Job31:28 Uqhama lurañajj mutuña catokañjamäsapänwa, ¡alajjpacha Diosar jan uñt'iri tucuñäsapänwa!" 
Job31:29 “Janipuniw uñisirejjan aynacht'atapatjja cusiscäyätti, mä jan walt'añan juparu puritapatsa cusiscäyätti." 
Job31:30 Janipuniw uñisirejjarojj ñankhachcäyätti, janiw jiwañapsa muncaraquïyätti." 
Job31:31 Nayampi chica utjirinacatejj jaya marcat jutirinacaru jan walinac lurañ munapjjchïna ucapachasti," 
Job31:32 nayajj janipuniw uca jaya marcat jutirinacarojj calleru apanucurïcäyätti, ucan iquiñapataquejja, jaya marcat jutirinacarusti utajjarupuniw catokäyätjja." 
Job31:33 Janipuniw mayninacjama juchanacajj-jja imantasirïcäyätti, janipuniw uca juchanacjja jan arsusiña munirïcäyätti," 
Job31:34 jakenacaru ajjsarasajja. Janipuniw cunapachasa ucanacjja jamasar imantcäyätti familianacajjampi jan jisc'achayasiñ laycujja. 
Job31:35 Walïspawa nayaru qhitin ist'añapasa, arsutajjsti, firmajjampiw “Uqhamaw” saractjja. ¡Jichhasti take ch'amani Diosajj arsunpan! Nayaru juchañchañanacsti kellkasina arsunipjjaracpan," 
Job31:36 take ucanacsti take chuymawa aparaquëjja, mä coronäcaspasa uqhamwa aparaquëjja." 
Job31:37 Nayajj take luratanacajjatwa Diosaru arsusiraquëjja, jan cuna ajjsarasaraquiw jupa nayrakataru uñstäjja." 
Job31:38 Orakenacajjajj janiw naya toke arsusa alajjpacharu mayipquiti yapunacajjas janiw jachapcaraquiti. 
Job31:39 ¡Ucampisa maynirutejj achunacapa lunthatsta ucapachasti, jan ucajj pampanquirinacaru t'akhesiysta ucapachasa," 
Job31:40 orakenacajjanjj ch'aphinac trigot sipansa achpan, koranacaraqui cebada lantisa jilantpan!” Job chachasti uqhamwa arsusiñapjja tucuyi." 
Job32:1 Uca quimsa jakenacasti Job chacharu asquïtapa uqhamaraqui chekapätapa arsusiri ist'asinjja, janiw jupampejj parlañ muncjjapjjänti." 
Job32:2 Ucatwa mayni jakejj Eliú sat sutini, buzita sata Baraquel jaken yokapa, Ram sata familiat jutiriraqui, ucajj janiw juc'ampi Job chacha contra colerasitapjja catjjäsirjamäcänti, Job chachan uqham jan juchanïtapa, uqhamaraqui Diosaru juchañchatap ist'asinjja." 
Job32:3 Arsuraquïnwa, Job chachan quimsa amigonacapa contrasa, jupanacasti Job chacharu jan suma arusjjatasinjja Diosaruwa aynacht'ayapjjänjja." 
Job32:4 Cunjämtejj Eliú chachajj takenit sipansa juc'ampi waynaquïnjja ucatwa suyt'äna Job chachampi parlañ tucuyañapcama. 
Job32:5 Ucampisa jupanacan Job chacharu jan suma arunacampi arusjjatapjjatapa uñjasasti colerasïnwa, janiw juc'ampi chuymapanjja amuquïñ muncänti." 
Job32:6 Ucatwa parlañ kalltaraqui: “Cunjämtejj nayajj sullcäsctjja, jumanacasti chuymani jakenacäpjjaracta, ucatwa nayajj jan cunsa arscäyätti." 
Job32:7 Nayasti saraquïyätwa: “Aca jakenacajj wali amuyt'anïpjjewa jilïrïpjjatap laycojja, walja maranaca jacapjjatapampisti wali yatiñanïpjjaraquiwa” sasa." 
Job32:8 Mä toketsti take jakew amuyt'anejja, take ch'amani Diosasti takeniruw amuyt'a churaraquejja." 
Job32:9 Walja maranaca jacañajj janiw qhitirusa wali amuyt'a churquiti, jakejj kawkhas sunqhanïscpan, ucampisa janiw ucajj suma amuyt'a churcapuniraquispati." 
Job32:10 Ucatpï saractjja: “Jichhajj nayaru ist'apjjaraquitpan, nayanjja cuna arst'añajjas utjaraquituwa” sasa." 
Job32:11 “Cuna arunactejj jumanacajj sapcta ucanacsti amuquiw ist'asctjja, cuntejj arsupcta take ucanacjja. Wali suma amuyt'a arunaca thakersa uñjapjjaracsmawa." 
Job32:12 Uñjaractwa, janiw jumanacajj maynisa Job chacharojj wali suma arunaca churañataqui ch'amanïpctati." 
Job32:13 Ucampisa jumanacan jan jach'a jach'a tucusipcañamataquisti janiw mä jaketi, jan ucasti Diosaw juparojj suma arunaca churani." 
Job32:14 Ucampisa janiw Job chachati nayarojj mayquitojja, janiraquiw nayajj juparojj jumanacjama parlcäti." 
Job32:15 “Job, aca quimsa jakenacajj pantjasipjjewa, janiraquiw jupanacan cuna arunacas arusjjatañataquejj utjquiti." 
Job32:16 Ucampisa jan jumajj amuyamti nayan amuct'añajj-jja, jupanacan amuct'apjjatap laycu, jan cuna jumar arusjjatañani." 
Job32:17 Nayajj arsüwa, ucatsti cunatejj sañajjäqui ucwa saraquëjja." 
Job32:18 Parlañajjajj waliw utji, janiw amuct'irjamäcaractti." 
Job32:19 Cunjämatejj mä machaka wayakanacaru imat vinojj phallañ munejja, uqhama phallirjamaraquïtwa." 
Job32:20 Cuna arunactejj imjjäscta ucanacjja arsusipunïwa, jumarusti cunatejj sañajjäqui uc arsupuniraquïma." 
Job32:21 Janiw qhitirusa sumachcaraquïti; takenirus mayacwa uñjaraquëjja. 
Job32:22 Nayajj janiw qhitirusa sumachañ yatcti; ¡alajjpacha Diosasti nayarojj mutuyaraquitaspawa, qhitiru sumachquiristsa ucapachajja!" 
Job33:1 “Uca laycu, Job, arunacajj ist'ita, cuntejj siscäma ucsti suma ist'araquim." 
Job33:2 Nayanjja lacajjancjjewa jumar sañajja. 
Job33:3 Take chuymaw jumaru saraquïmajja, cuntejj amtcta ucsti khanwa saraquïmajja." 
Job33:4 Take ch'amani Tatitu Diosaw nayarojj uscusitu, ucatsti nayarojj ch'amapwa churaraquitu." 
Job33:5 “Waquischi ucapachajj arsusinim, nayan nayrakatajjan sayt'asiñataquisti waquichasiraquim." 
Job33:6 Jumampi, nayampejj Diosan nayrakatapanjja mayaquïtanwa; nayasa ñek'eta lurataraquiquïtwa." 
Job33:7 Uqhamajj janiw cunata ajjsarañamas utjañapäquiti, janiw jumarojj ch'amampi wayt'caraquïmati." 
Job33:8 “Jumarojj ist'asamachaquïyäsmawa, (aqham parlasquiri):" 
Job33:9 “Nayajj k'omätwa, janiw juchanïcti, janiw pantjasitajjasa, juchajjasa utjcaraquiti." 
Job33:10 Ucampisa Diosajj cunat juchanchañsa thakapuniwa, mä uñisirirjamaw uñjaraquitojja;" 
Job33:11 cayunacajjarusti cadenampiw ñach'antitu, sapa chellktäwejjwa uñjaraqui” sasa." 
Job33:12 Ucampisa uca arsutamajj janiw chekäquiti, Diosajj jakenacat sipansa juc'ampi jach'awa." 
Job33:13 ¿Cunataraqui Diosampi colerastasti? ¿Arsusitanacamaru jan jaysatapatti uqham parlta? 
Job33:14 Diosajj cunaymanitwa jiwasarojj parlistu, ucampisa janiw amuyasctanti." 
Job33:15 Horasajj arumanacaw parlistu, mä samca toke jan ucajj mä uñjäwi toksa, cunapachatejj jakenacajj iquirasipqui ucapacha, cunapachatejj iquimpi atipjayasjjapjje ucapachaw parlistu." 
Job33:16 Diosajj jakenacarojj jinchu jac'atacwa parli; jupanacarojj tokentiwa, ajjsarayaraquiwa," 
Job33:17 uqhamat ñankha luräwinacapat jithektayañataqui, jach'a jach'a tucuñatsa jithektayañataqui." 
Job33:18 Uqhamatwa jupajj sepulturatjja khespiyi, uqhamatwa jiwañatsa khespiyaraqui." 
Job33:19 Yakhepa horasanacajj Diosajj jakerojj usuñanacampiw chekachi, wali usuyasiñanacwa cuerpoparojj churaraqui." 
Job33:20 Take mank'äwinacapasti, kawkhasa sumäscpan, ucanacajj jan mank'cañaw tucurapjje." 
Job33:21 Janchipasa k'alaw tucusiwayjje, ch'aqhanacapasa uñstjjaraquiwa." 
Job33:22 Jacañapasa sepultura puncunquiwa, jiwañana puncupancaraquiwa." 
Job33:23 “Ucampisa mä angelatejj jupan jac'apancchejja, ucanacatjja mayniquisaya warankatjja jupatjja arspan, chekätapatsa arsuracpan." 
Job33:24 Jupatjja qhuyapt'ayaspan, Diosarusti saracpan: “Jiwañatjja khespiyam, khespiyasiñapsti jicjjataractwa” sasa." 
Job33:25 Ucapachaw cuerpopajja wasitata c'umara uñjasjjani, ucasti wayna tiempo sarnakäwiparuw cuttjjaraquini." 
Job33:26 Diosarusti mayisiraquiniwa, jupasti ist'araquiniwa; Diosarusti cusisitaw ajanuy ajanu uñcatani, jakenacataquisti Diosan qhuyapayasiñapatwa k'ochuraquini." 
Job33:27 Saraquiniwa: “Nayajj juchwa lurta, cunatejj jan chekapäqui ucwa luraractjja, ucampisa Diosajj janiw mutuyañ muncaraquitänti;" 
Job33:28 ucampisa nayarojj jiwañatwa khespiyitu, jichhasti khanjja uñjascaractwa” sasa." 
Job33:29 “Uqhamwa Diosajj jakerojj uñji, mayampi, mayampwa uqham uñji," 
Job33:30 jiwañatsa khespiyiwa, khansa uñjayascaraquiwa." 
Job33:31 Job, jichhajj suma ist'ita, nayan parlañajjcamasti amuct'araquim." 
Job33:32 Cuna arsusiñama utjipansa, arsusiraquim; arsusitamajj chekapäni ucapachajj take chuymampiw ist'araquïma." 
Job33:33 Ucampisa janitejj chekapäcchi ucapachasti amuqui ist'ita, nayaw jumarojj wali yatiñani tucuyaraquïma.”" 
Job34:1 Ucjjarusti Eliú chachajj juc'ampi sascaquiwa: “Jumanaca, yatiñani jakenaca, arunacajj ist'apjjeta." 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 Jinchojj yatiw aru catjañjja, cunjämtejj lacajj mank'jja mallt'ejj uqhama." 
Job34:4 Uqhamarac jiwasajj aca luräwi uñjañäni, ucatsti cunjämarus sumäspa uqhamaru amtaraquiñäni." 
Job34:5 Job chachajj siwa: “Nayajj janiw juchanïcti, ucampisa Diosajj janiw chekaparu uñjañ munquituti;" 
Job34:6 nayaru juchanïtajjata arsuñajj jach'a c'arïspawa; chhojjrejjajj janiw jacthapquiti, cuna juchsa jan lurquipana” sasa." 
Job34:7 ¡Janiw qhitis Job chachjamajj utjquiti! Diosatsti jupajj sawcasiwa, umsa umt'caspa uqhama." 
Job34:8 Jupataquejj ñankha jakenacampi chicachasiñasa, uqhamaraqui jan wali jakenacampi chica sarnakañasa sumawa." 
Job34:9 Jupajj siwa: “Jakejj janiw cuna ascsa jicjjatquiti, Diosaru ajjsartasa sarnakasajja” sasa." 
Job34:10 Ucampisa jumanacajja, amuyt'ani jakenacäpjjtawa, uca laycu jichhajj ist'apjjeta. ¡Take ch'amani Diosajj janiw cuna jan walsa lurcaspati, janiraquiw cunatejj jan chekapäqui ucsa lurcaspati!" 
Job34:11 Jupajj sapakatarusa luräwipatjamwa pago churi; sapakata jakerusa cunatejj waquisqui ucwa churaraqui. 
Job34:12 Chekpachansa take ch'amani Diosajja, janiw cuna ñankhsa, cunatejj jan chekapäqui ucsa lurquiti," 
Job34:13 janiw qhititsa ch'ama catokcaraquiti take aca orakpacha apnakañataquejja. 
Job34:14 Jakenacata jacañ samana apakjjchi ucapachasti takeniw jiwarjjapjje, ucatsti takeniwa lak'aru cuttjjapjjaraqui." 
Job34:15  
Job34:16 “Jumatejj amuyt'asirïstajja, ist'ita; cuntejj siscäma uca arunacarusti ist'araquim." 
Job34:17 Diosatejj cheka cancañaru jan muncaspa ucqhajj janiw acapachjja apnakcaspati. ¿Cunjämaraqui juchañchasmasti qhititejj k'omansa k'omapäqui ucarusti? 
Job34:18 Reyinacampi jilïrinacampitejj khorüpjjchejja, Diosajj janiw jupanacaru juchañchañjja ajjsarquiti." 
Job34:19 Jupajj janiw marca apnakerinacata arjjatasquiti, janiraquiw kamirinacarusa juc'ampi pobrenacat sipansa munasquiti, jupajjaya take jakerusa uscusiracchejja." 
Job34:20 Jakenacajj acatjamatacwa mä aruma jiwt'awayjjapjje; jakesti walwa ch'ajjwi, ucatsti chhaktawayjjapjjaraquiwa; ch'amani jakesti jan cunaqui jakonucutaraquiwa." 
Job34:21 Diosaw jaken sarnakäwipjja uñji, take sarnakäwipwa yatiraqui." 
Job34:22 Janiwa juc'ampi ch'iyara ch'amacajj ñankha jaker imantañataquejj utjquiti. 
Job34:23 Diosajj janiw jakerojj urunacapjja jaqhutaqui jaytquiti jupan nayrakatapar uñstañapataquejja. 
Job34:24 Ch'amani jakenacaru jakokañataquisa, ucat mayninacaru lurañanacap churañataquisa janiw jupajj cuna yatjjatañanacarusa uchasquiti." 
Job34:25 Diosajj yatiw jupanacan cuna lurapjjatapsa, ucatsti cunapachatejj arumt'jje ucqhaw jupanacarojj t'unjaraqui." 
Job34:26 Jupanacarusti jake jiwayir jakenacarjamaw mutuyaraquejja, takenin uñjcataw mutuyaraquejja," 
Job34:27 jupanacajj janiw jaysañjja munapcänti, janiraquiw arunacaparjam sarnakañsa munapcänti." 
Job34:28 Jupanacajj pobrenacan, uqhamaraqui t'akhesiyatanacan wararitanacapsa Diosan ist'añapcamawa lurapjjaraquïnjja, Diosasti ucanacjja ist'araquïnwa." 
Job34:29 Ucampisa Diosatejj amuct'aspa ucapachasti ¿qhitiraqui juchañchaspa? Diosatejj maysa uñtaspa ucapachasti ¿qhitirac uñjaspa? Jupajj marcanacarusa, jakenacarusa uñjascapuniwa," 
Job34:30 uqhamat mä ñankha lurir jaken marca jan apnakañapataqui, take jakenacaru sallkjasa." 
Job34:31 “¿Jumasti Diosarusti saractati: “Nayajj sallkjayastwa, janiw jichhajj juc'ampi jucha lurcjjäti," 
Job34:32 juchanacajj uñacht'ayita, janiw nayajj ucanac uñjirjamäcti, jan wali lursta ucapachasti janiw juc'ampi uca jan walinacjja lurcjjäti” sasasti?" 
Job34:33 ¿Jumasti muntati Diosajj jumaru suma uñjañapa, cunjämarutejj jumajj muncta uqhamarjama, jumajj juparu apanucsta ucapachasa? Jumajjay amtasstajja, janiw nayatejja, uca laycu, cuntejj yatcta ucjja sapjjeta." 
Job34:34 Cawquïri yatiñani jakenacatejj ist'apquitu, suma amuyt'ani jakenacasa sapjjaraquitaniwa:" 
Job34:35 “Job chachajj jan amuyt'asisaquiw parlasqui; arunacapajj jan amuyt'añjamawa.” 
Job34:36 ¡Job chachat suma yatjjataspan, arsusitanacapasti mä khoru jaken arsusitapjamawa!" 
Job34:37 Job chachajj janiw juchacti lurquejja, jan ucasti Dios contraw sayt'asi; jiwasan nayrakatasanpachwa Diosat sawcasiraqui, Diosampisa jaychasiraquiwa” sasa." 
Job35:1 Eliú chachasti parlascaquïnwa: “Job, ¿jumasti amuytati Diosajj jumat arjjatasiñapjja?" 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 Jumajj Diosarojj saractawa: “¿Cunas jumar waquistam jucha luratajjajja, cunansa jan walt'aytam jucha luratajjajja?” sasa." 
Job35:4 Jichhasti nayaw jumarojj saraquïmajja, jumarusa, jumampi chica sarnakeri jakenacarusa." 
Job35:5 Alajjpach uñtam ucatsti amuyaraquim, cunja altoncquitejj quinayanacajj ucsa." 
Job35:6 Jumatejj jucha lursta ucajja, janiw Diosarojj cuna ñankhsa lurquiti, kawkhasa jach'a juchanac lurascam, ucanacajj janiw juparojj cunsa camächquiti." 
Job35:7 Jumatejj asquinaca lursta ucasti, janiw juparojj cunsa camächcaraquiti." 
Job35:8 Juman jucha luratamajj jake masimaruw ñankhachejja, asqui luratanacamasa jake masimataquiw asquiraquejja." 
Job35:9 “T'akhesiyatasti jakenacajj wararipjjewa, ucatsti ch'amaninacat khespitäñwa thakapjjaraqui;" 
Job35:10 Ucampisa janiw jupanacar irnokeri Diosarojj thaktapquiti. Qhititejj t'akhesiña horasan ch'ama churqui uca Diosarojja; 
Job35:11 qhititejj yatichquistu, amuyt'aycaraquistu animalanac toksa, jan ucajj jamach'inac toksa uca Diosarojja." 
Job35:12 Wararisipquiwa, ucampisa Diosajj janiw jupanacar ist'quiti, jupanacajj khoru uqhamaraqui jach'a jach'a tucuri jakenacäpjjatap laycu." 
Job35:13 Take ch'amani Diosajj janiw c'ari arunacarojj ist'quiti. 
Job35:14 Jumajj “Janiw Diosarojj uñjcti” sistawa, ucampisa ist'am, jupaw jumarojj uñjätam." 
Job35:15 “Jupajj janiw colerasquiti, janiw mutuycaraquisa, janiw ucacama jucharusa uñjquiti' saractawa." 
Job35:16 ¡Ucampisa Job, jumajj jan parlañwa parltajja, sintwa parltajja jan amuyt'asisawa take arunacsa parlaractajja!”" 
Job36:1 Eliú chachasti juc'ampi arsuscaquïnwa: “Llamp'u chuymamp suyt'aquim, nayasti jumarojj yaticharaquïmawa, Dios toketa arsuñanacajja utjascaquipuniwa." 
Job36:2  
Job36:3 Nayasti take yatiñanacajjwa uñacht'ayäma, uqhamat jumaru uñacht'ayañataqui, alajjpacha, acapacha lurir Diosajj suma amuyunïtapa." 
Job36:4 Nayasti saracsmawa jan cuna c'ari arunaca jumaru parljjayascañajjataqui, juma nayrakatansti mä jach'a yatiñani jakew sayt'atäscaraqui." 
Job36:5 “Diosajj ch'amaniwa, jach'a yatiñaniraquiwa, jan juchanirusti janiw jisc'achquiti." 
Job36:6 Ñankha jakerojj janiw perdonquiti, ucampisa pobrenacarojj chekaparuw uñji." 
Job36:7 Asqui jakenacarojj arjjatapuniwa, reyinacarusti konuñaparuwa utt'ayi, jach'achatäñaruw aptaraqui." 
Job36:8 Ucampisa uca reyinacatejj cadenanacampi ñach'antata uñjasipjjchejja, usutanacapas uqhamaraqui jupanacarojj t'akhesiychejja," 
Job36:9 Diosaw jupanacarojj jan wali luräwinacapa uñacht'ayasqui, jach'a jach'a tucuñampi apayasipjjatapsa." 
Job36:10 Jupanacan chicachasipjjañapataquiw parlejja, ñankha luräwinacapa apanucupjjañapataqui." 
Job36:11 Jupanacatejj Diosaru ist'apjjanejja, jaysapjjaraquinejja, cusisiñata, sumancañampita cusisisaw sapüru sarnakapjjani." 
Job36:12 Ucampisa janitejj Diosaru jaysapcanejja, jiwasin imantataquëjjapjjaniwa, janïra jupanacan amuyasipcatawa imantatäjjapjjani." 
Job36:13 “Jucharara jakenacajj juc'ampiw colerasipjje, catuntatäcasas janiw yanapa mayipcaraquiti." 
Job36:14 Waynpachawa jiwarapjje; mä p'enkawa tucusiwayjjapjjaraqui. 
Job36:15 Diosasti t'akhesirirojj t'akhesiñ tokwa khespiyi; t'akhesiñ tokwa jakerojj amuyt'ayaraqui. 
Job36:16 Uqhamaraquiw jumarojj jan walt'añanacat khespiytam, walja yänaca, libre sarnakasiñwa churaractam; mank'añamsa jilarquirwa churaractamjja." 
Job36:17 Jumanwa ñankha jaken t'akhesiñapajj phokhasi, jichhasti juchañchatäñampita, uñjatäñampitjja janiw khespcasmati." 
Job36:18 Amuyasim, kamir cancañampejj jan kollke chilltayasimti, janiraqui jamasat kollksa chilltayasimti." 
Job36:19 T'akhesiñanjja ucanacajj inamayaquïniwa, wararitamasa, ch'amamasa." 
Job36:20 Ch'amaca aruma purinitapat jan aykomti, cunapachatejj marcanacajj chhaktawayjjani ucapachajja." 
Job36:21 Ñankha lurañanacaru cuttañatsti wali amuyasim, t'akhesiñampi yant'atätam laycu." 
Job36:22 “Diosan jach'a ch'amapat amuyasim. Janiw qhiti yatichirisa jupjamajj utjquiti; 
Job36:23 janiw juparojj qhitis cunatejj lurañapäqui ucanacjja yatichcaspati, janiraquiw qhitisa ajanuparu khant'caspati cuna ñankha luratapsa." 
Job36:24 Take jakew jupan luräwinacapatjja jach'añchi; jumasa jupar jach'añchañatjja amtasiraquim. 
Job36:25 Take jakenacaw uca luräwinacapjja uñjaspa, jayatpachwa uñjaraquispa." 
Job36:26 Diosajj jach'awa, janiw amuyt'añjamäquiti, janiraquiw kawkha maranïquitejj ucsa jact'csnati." 
Job36:27 “Jupajj mä chekaruw uma ch'akanacjja apthapi, ucatsti jalluyanjjaraquiwa." 
Job36:28 Jallusti kenayanacatwa ch'akani, ucatsti wal acapacharu purintaraqui." 
Job36:29 ¿Qhitisa amuyt'aspa quinayanacan onjjtatapjja? ¿Uqhamaraqui khejjokhejjonacan art'asitapsa? 
Job36:30 Diosaw llijullijunacjja jach'a kotjjaru saratatayi, ucatsti uca pachpa jach'a kota mankharuw chhakayaraqui." 
Job36:31 Uqhamaw marcanacarojj mank'ayi, mank'añsa jilarquirwa churaraqui." 
Job36:32 Rayonacsa amparaparuw catjjäsi, ucatsti cunjämtejj jupajj munqui uqhamwa cawqharutejj wact'añapäqui ucaru wact'ayaraqui." 
Job36:33 Khejjokhejjonacajj Diosan utjatapwa yatiyasipqui, jach'a thayasa jupan colerasiñapatwa khanañchascaraqui." 
Job37:1 “Uca jach'a thaya uñjasasti chuymajjajj putokewa, chuymajj mistuñwa munjjaraquitu." 
Job37:2 Diosan jach'a ch'amampi arsutap ist'apjjam, cuna jach'a arutejj lacapat mistqui uca." 
Job37:3 Jupaw llijullijunacjja alajjpachan uñstayi, aca orakensti mä thiyat mä thiycamaw ucanacjja puriyaraqui." 
Job37:4 Mä jach'a khejjokhejjow ist'asi, cunapachatejj jupajj jach'a arupa arsqui ucqhajja, uca khejjokhejjonacan ist'asiñapcamasti llijullijunacajj janiw sayt'quiti." 
Job37:5 Cunapachatejj Diosajj arunacapa ist'asiyi ucapachasti, jach'a muspharcañanacaw lurasi; jan amuyt'caya jach'a luräwinacaw utjaraqui, take ucanacsti janiw qhitis amuyt'añataquejj ch'amanïquiti." 
Job37:6 Qhunurojj orakjjaru puriniñapataquiw arsu, jallurusti ch'amampiw puriyaniraqui." 
Job37:7 Jakenacarusti utanacaparuw kheparayi, uqhamat takenisa amuyapjjañapataqui, jupan take ucanac lurascatapa." 
Job37:8 Animalanacajj putunacaparuw mantjje, ucaruw imantasjjapjjaraqui." 
Job37:9 Aynach toketwa mä jach'a thayajj juti, amstatsti wali thayaw jutaraqui." 
Job37:10 “Diosan phust'atapampiwa umajj chhullunct'i, walja jach'a umanacasti lojjontaraqui." 
Job37:11 Jupaw kenayanacarojj umampi phokhanti, uca kenayanacatwa rayonacjja mistuyaniraqui;" 
Job37:12 uca rayonacasti take alajjpachwa pasi, uqhamat Diosan arsutanacapar phokhasa, take aca orakpachana." 
Job37:13 Diosajj take ucanacjja acapachar t'akhesiyañataquiw utjayi, qhuyapayasiñapa uñacht'ayañataqui." 
Job37:14 “Job, jumajj paciencia uscum, ucatsti ist'araquim. Diosan muspharcaña luräwinacap amuyt'araquim." 
Job37:15 Jumajj yattati ¿cunjämsa Diosajj take ucanacjja luri, cunjämsa llijullijunacas kenayan khantaraqui ucjja?" 
Job37:16 ¿Yattati jumajj cunjämsa kenayanacajj alajjpachan sarnakapjje, ucatsti Diosan asqui luräwipätapjja?" 
Job37:17 Jumasti pachpa isima taypinwa junt'jata, samanama llupjjäsisctajja, cunapachatejj aynacha thayajj orakjja k'ala kalarayi ucapachajja." 
Job37:18 ¿Jumajj Diosar yanapt'asmati alajjpacha janatatañanjja, ucatsti mä hierrot lurat espejöcaspas uqhama jaytañsa?" 
Job37:19 Yatichapjjetaya cunsa Diosarojj sapjjäjja take ucana, janiw cuna arunacsa arsurjämäpctti." 
Job37:20 Nayajj janiw cuna arsuñsa munquiristti, ucasti t'unjayasiñsa munquiristsa uqhamäspawa." 
Job37:21 “Janiw intin khanapajj uñjañjamäquiti, cunapachatejj kenayajj imanti ucapachajja, ucampisa cunapachatejj thayt'ani ucapachasti alajjpachajj k'aljtawayjjewa." 
Job37:22 Amsta toketsti c'ajquiri koriw uñstani, cunapachatejj Diosajj jach'a cancañapampi muyuntayasqui ucapachajja." 
Job37:23 Take ch'amani Diosajja janiw amuyt'añjamäquiti, jupajj jach'awa, ch'amani chekaparaquiwa; jupajj chekapawa, janiw qhitirus t'akhesiycaraquiti." 
Job37:24 Ucatpï jakenacajj ajjsartapjjejja; yatiñani tucuri jakenacasti janiw jupataquejj cunäpcaraquisa.” 
Job38:1 Uqhamasti Tatitojj Job chacharojj mä jach'a thaya taypitwa parläna: 
Job38:2 “¿Qhitïtas jumajj nayan apnakatajjat pächasiñataquejja, uqhamaraqui pachpa arunacamampi jan yatitamsa uñacht'ayañataquejja?" 
Job38:3 Jichhajj jan ajjsarirïtam uñacht'ayita, ucatsti aca jisct'anacaru arusjjataraquita." 
Job38:4 ¿Cawquincäyätas jumajja cunapachatejj nayajj aca orake utt'aycäyät ucapachajja? ¡Jumatejj chekpacha suma yatsta ucapachajj uca jisct'aru arusjjatita! 
Job38:5 ¿Yattati aca oraken kawkch'äñapäcäntejj ucjja? ¿Qhitisa aca orakjja uqhama lurejja? 
Job38:6 ¿Cunjjaru utt'ayatas cimientonacapajja? ¿Qhitisa jach'a kala uscuraquejja ucjjaru utt'añapataqui," 
Job38:7 uccañcamasti khanjtaniri warawaranacan k'ochupjjañapcama, uqhamaraqui alajjpacha sirvirinacan cusisiñapcamajja?" 
Job38:8 “Cunapachatejj jach'a kotajj orake mankhata mistuncän ucapachajja, ¿qhitis uca umanacjja jist'antejja?" 
Job38:9 Nayaw juparojj mä kenaya isita churta, urpwa llawusiñapataqui churaracta." 
Job38:10 Nayaw jach'a kotarojj korpa uscta, puncunacapsa llavempiw jist'antaracta." 
Job38:11 Ucatsti kotarojj saractwa: “Acacamaquiw purinïta, ucat juc'ampsti janiw pascätati; acaruw jach'a mathapinacamas t'unasiraquini” sasa." 
Job38:12 Jan ucajj ¿cunapachacha jumajj c'ajquiri warawaranacarusa, ururusa khanjtaniñapataqui arsuraquïyätajja?" 
Job38:13 ¿Uqhamaraqui khananjja take aca orakpacharu saratatañapa, uqhamat ñankha lurir jakenacajj imantasiñapataqui?" 
Job38:14 Uqhamasti kollunacaw uñsti, ucatsti mä isïcaspasa uqhamaw coloraru tiñisiwayaraqui;" 
Job38:15 ñankha jakenacatjja khanajj jarc'atawa; ajjsarañ churiri arunacaparusa amuct'ayataraquiwa. 
Job38:16 “¿Jumajj jach'a kota mankhanacjja uñjtati, cawqhattejj jach'a kotanacajj sartanqui ucjja?" 
Job38:17 ¿Yattati cawqhanquisa ajjsarcaña jiwañan puncupajja? 
Job38:18 ¿Amuytati kawkch'äquitejj aca orakejj ucjja? ¡Yatsta ucapachajj arsumaya! 
Job38:19 “¿Cawquina imatäsquisa khanasa, ch'amacanacasa?" 
Job38:20 ¿Jumajj ucanacjja khepa c'uchcamati puriyirïtajja, ucatsti utaparuti cuttayaniraquirïtajja?" 
Job38:21 ¡Jumanjja take ucanacajj yatiñamawa, walja maranacaniraquëjjtawa, yatsta ucasti, uqhamajj ucat nayra nacitamasä!" 
Job38:22 “¿Jumajj uñjtati cawqharutejj qhunsa, chholloksa imcta ucanacjja," 
Job38:23 take ucanacjja jan walt'añ urunacana nuwasiña guerra tiemponacana apayaniñataqui? 
Job38:24 ¿Cunjämsa khanajj take aca orakpacharu saratatejja? ¿Cunjämsa inti jalsu toket jutir thayajj take acapacharu puriraquejja? 
Job38:25 ¿Qhitis jallurojj mistuñapa jist'arejja, jach'a thayarusa sarañap uñacht'ayejja?" 
Job38:26 ¿Uqhamat wasarana puriñapataqui, cawqhatejj jan qhitisa jacqui ucana," 
Job38:27 uqhamat uca waña wasararu purintañapataqui, ucatsti koranaca sartayaniñapataqui?" 
Job38:28 “¿Qhitis jallumpina, sullampina awquipajja?" 
Job38:29 ¿Qhitis chhullunqhayampina, kakawarampina taycapajja?" 
Job38:30 ¿Qhitis umjja kaljama kholu tucuyejja, jach'a kotanacsa lojjt'ayaraquejja?" 
Job38:31 “¿Jumati Pléyades sata warawaranacarojj tantachta, ucatsti Orión sata warawaranacsa willitatata utjayaracta?" 
Job38:32 ¿Jumati khantati Ururirojj horasaparu mistuyanta? ¿Jumati Osa Mayor, Osa Menor sata warawaranacarojj irpascaracta?" 
Job38:33 ¿Yattati jumajj cuna leyinacatejj alajjpacha apnakqui take ucanacjja? ¿Jumati uca leyinacjja acapachan apnakaracta? 
Job38:34 ¿Jumajj kenayanacarojj saraquismati jumaru walja umanacampi chhaktayañapjja? 
Job38:35 ¿Jumatejj rayorojj cawquiru sarañapataquisa arsuracsta ucapachasti “Iyaw” sasati jaysaractamjja? 
Job38:36 ¿Qhitis ch'iqhi cancaña ibis sat jamach'iru, uqhamaraqui gallorusa churaraquejja?" 
Job38:37 ¿Qhitisa wali yatiñanejja kawkhäquitejj kenayanacajj uca yatiñataquejja? ¿Qhitis uca kenayanacat jalluyaniraquispajja? 
Job38:38 ¿Uqhamat lak'ajj ñek'eru tucjjañapataqui, jach'a qhulanacasa jupanaccam lip'thapiñapataqui?" 
Job38:39 “¿Jumati leonanacan catuntatäñataquejj cuna animalanacsa thaktajja, uqhamat uca leonanacan wawanacapajj sist'asiñcama mank'apjjañapataquejja," 
Job38:40 cunapachatejj putunacaparu imantasipjje, jan ucajj kora taypinacarusa imantasipjje mä cunaru catuntañataquisa, ucapachajja?" 
Job38:41 ¿Qhitis cuervo sat jamach'inacan wawanacaparojj mank'ayejja, cunapachatejj mank'a thakasa aywinakapjje, uqhamaraqui jach'at warart'asisa nayat mank'aña mayipjjaraquitu ucapachajja?" 
Job39:1 ¿Yattati jumajja cunapachasa montenquiri cabritonacajj kalluchapqui ucjja? ¿Jan ucajj kachu tarujanacaru wawachasquirjja uñjaractacha? 
Job39:2 ¿Yattati kawkha phajjsittejj ucanacajj kalluchapjjañapäqui ucjja? 
Job39:3 Wawachañataquejj jupanacajj c'umthapipjjewa, ucatwa kallunacapajj mistunipjjaraqui." 
Job39:4 Ucatsti uca kallunacajj wali ch'amaniw jilarawayjjapjje, pampanwa jilapjjaraqui, ucatsti jan mayampi cuttaniñataquiw sarjjapjjaraqui." 
Job39:5 “¿Qhitis montenquir asnorojj sarnakasiñ churejja? ¿Qhitisa uqham antutnucuta sarnakayejja? 
Job39:6 Nayaw ucarojj cawqhantejj jacañapäqui uca uñacht'ayta, wasara, uqhamaraqui kollpa pampanaca uñacht'ayta." 
Job39:7 Janiw ucanacarojj marcan ch'ajjwanacapas munasquiti, janiraquiw anaquirinacan jariyataparusa ist'quiti." 
Job39:8 Kollunacanwa sarnake mank'añ thakasa, cuna casta ch'ojjña koracsa mank'añataqui jicjjatañcama." 
Job39:9 “¿Jumajj amuytati montenquir vacan jumaru sirviñapjja? ¿Amuyaractati juman vaca uyuman aruma iquiñapsa? 
Job39:10 ¿Jumasti uca orko vacarojj yapt'asina yapu lurayasmati, jan ucajj juman khepäjjam jutasincha orake onjjtayaspa?" 
Job39:11 ¿Jumasti uca orko vacarojj alcatasismati, ch'amanïtap laycu ucatsti juman lurañanacapa juparu lurayaraquismati?" 
Job39:12 ¿Jumasti amuytati uca vacan jumataqui yapuma apthapiñapa, uqhamaraqui granonacamsa pirwamarcama apthapiñapa?" 
Job39:13 “Ucajjay jumataquejj avestruz sata jach'a jamach'ejja, chhekhanacapjja cusisitaw jawk'asi, cigüeña sat jach'a jamach'in chhekhapat chhekhanïcaspasa uqhama," 
Job39:14 c'awnapsa ch'alla pataruquiw apanucuwayjje, ucana lupin junt'upampi chhiwchhi kallunacapa ansuñataqui." 
Job39:15 Jupasti janiw amuyquiti mä qhitinsa ucanacaru takjjatañapjja, uqhamaraqui mä animalan taquisiñapsa." 
Job39:16 Wawanacapataquejj wali khoruw tucu, janis wawanacapäcaspa uqhamwa uñjaraqui, janiw jupataquejj cunäcaraquisa inamaya ch'ama tucutapajja." 
Job39:17 Nayaw juparojj jan amuyt'a churcti, suma amuyt'asiñsa janiw churcaractti." 
Job39:18 Ucampisa cunapachatejj sarti ucatsti jaltawayaraqui ucapachajj, caballonacatsa, uqhamaraqui uca caballor lat'jjatata sarir jakenacatsa larusiwa." 
Job39:19 “¿Jumati caballonacarojj ch'am churta? ¿Qhitis uca caballonacarojj cuncanacapjja uqham suma ñic'utanacampi c'achacht'ejja? 
Job39:20 ¿Jumati uca caballonacarusti t'ijut'ijunacjam uca take thoknakayta, uqhamata ajjsarcaña jejjesiñapataquisti?" 
Job39:21 Pampanjja jan cuna ajjsarasaw orake jat'ipjje, guerran nuwasiñarusa jan ajjsarasaw jalapjjaraqui." 
Job39:22 Ajjsarañatsa larusiwa, janiw ajjsarquiti, janiw espadataquis ajjsarayascaraquiti," 
Job39:23 Caballot sarir jakenacan flechanacapa apasiñanjja kawkhasa flechanacajj sojjokescpan, ninsa, uqhamaraqui flechanacsa jutayascpan, janiw ucanacjja ajjsarquiti." 
Job39:24 Wali jaya thaquinacjja janis cunäcaspa uqhamacwa jalawayi, trompeta toct'asipansti janiw inact'añ munquiti." 
Job39:25 Trompeta phust'asipansti warariwa, jayatpachwa guerran nuwasiñsa munt'araqui, jilïrinacana arunacapsa, arnakasitanacsa ist'araquiwa." 
Job39:26 “¿Jumasti wali yatiñanipunïtati pacalirusa jalnakaña yatichañamataquisti, uqhamaraqui aynacha tokeru jalañapataquisa?" 
Job39:27 ¿Jumasti pacali sat jach'a jamach'irusa, jach'a kollu patanacaru tapachasiyaracta?" 
Job39:28 Jupajj uruy arumawa uca jach'a karka kollunacan jaqui, ch'amapsti uca jach'a karka patanacanwa uñacht'ayaraqui." 
Job39:29 Uca patatpachwa cunürutejj catuntcani ucarusa uñch'uquiniraqui. 
Job39:30 Wawanacapasa wila mank'apjje cawqhantejj mä jiwata cuerpojj utjqui ucanwa tantachasipjjaraqui.” 
Job40:1 “Jumajj nayarojj juicio kalltañwa munäyätajja, naya take ch'amani Diosaru juchañchaña, ¿jichhajj arsusiscaquismati?" 
Job40:2  
Job40:3 “¿Cunaraqui naya pisi ch'aman jakesti arsusirista? Nayajj amuct'jjaquïwa. 
Job40:4  
Job40:5 Mayampi, mayampwa arsustjja, janiw cuna arsusiñajjas utjcjjaraquituti.”" 
Job40:6 Tatitojj Job chacharojj mä jach'a thaya taypitpachwa wasitat parljjayani: 
Job40:7 “Jichhajj jan ajjsarirïtama uñacht'ayita, ucatsti cuna jisct'anactejj jisct'cäma ucanacaru arsuniraquim." 
Job40:8 ¿Jumajj nayarojj jan chekapätajjatti juchañchañ munista, uqhamat jumajj jan juchani mistuñamataqui?" 
Job40:9 ¿Jumasti nayjama ch'amanïtati? ¿Cuncamasa nayan cuncajj-jjama jach'ata arsuriraquiti? 
Job40:10 Uqhamajj jach'a cancañampi isthapisim, c'ajquir cancañampi khanampiraqui isthapisiraquim." 
Job40:11 Take jach'a jach'a tucuri jakenacaru uñtam: cunjämtejj munta uqhamaru colerasiraquim, ucatsti ucanacarojj jisc'achjaraquim." 
Job40:12 Jïsa, maya uñtasaqui ucanacarojj jakorpayam, cawqhana khoru jakenacaru jicjjatasasa takjjatam." 
Job40:13 Orakercama take ucanacarojj imantam, cawqhancquitejj jiwatanacajj ucar jist'antaraquim." 
Job40:14 Ucapachaw naya quipca yatiraquëjja jumajj ch'amamampi atipjascatama.” 
Job40:15 Behemot sata jach'a ajjsarcañ animalaru uñtam, ucajj jumjama nayan lurataraquiquiwa, orko vacanacjama koranacaracwa mank'araqui;" 
Job40:16 uñtam cunja ch'amanisa jiqhanipajja, janchinacapasa cunja ch'amaniraquisa." 
Job40:17 Wich'inqhapajj cedro maderjama ch'ollkhewa, cayu ancunacapasa mokonacaruw tucuwayjjaraqui." 
Job40:18 Ch'aqhanacapajj broncet luratjamawa, hierrot luratäcaspasa uqhamaraquiwa." 
Job40:19 Nayan ucajj wali suma luratajjawa, naya sapa, juparu uscusiriquiwa juparojj t'unjaraquiristjja." 
Job40:20 Kollunacatsti, cawqhantejj monte animalanacajj anatasipqui ucatjja, koranacwa mank'añapataqui apanirapipjjejja." 
Job40:21 Kokanac c'uchuruw jipt'araquejja, jokhona sokosanac taypiruw imantasiraquejja." 
Job40:22 Kokanacaw ch'iwiñcht'i, jawira thiyanquir saucenacaw muyuntaraqui." 
Job40:23 Jawira uman jiljjatanitapatsa janiw sustjascaraquiti; umajj nasacamasa maqhatascchi ucasa, janiw sustjasquiti." 
Job40:24 ¿Qhitis ch'amanïspa catuntasin nayra q'ilarañapataquejja, jan ucajj nasapatsa mä lazompi chinuntañapataquejja?" 
Job41:1 ¿Jumasti Leviatán sata jach'a ajjsarcañ animalarojj anzuelompi catjasmati? ¿Mä ñach'añampi lajjrapjja ñach'antasmati? 
Job41:2 ¿Mä ñach'añampi ch'amanïsmati nasapat ñach'antañataqui, uqhamaraqui laca anqha ch'aqhapata mä ganchompi chhokontañjja?" 
Job41:3 ¿Jupasti jumarojj qhuyapt'ayasiñamataquiti achict'asiristamsti, uqhamaraqui suma arunacampiti achict'asiristamsti?" 
Job41:4 ¿Jumasti juparojj juman wiñayataqui esclavomäñapataquiti arsuyaraquisma? 
Job41:5 ¿Jumajj jupampejj mä jisc'a jamach'impjamati anatasma? ¿Wawanacaman anatasiñanacapjamcha chinurt'asisma? 
Job41:6 ¿Alaquipa jakenacajj jupatjja negocio lurapjjaspati? ¿Jisc'a jisc'a jalanokasina aljapjjaspati? 
Job41:7 ¿Cuerpopsti flechanacampiti chhoksusma, uqhamaraqui p'ekepsa majjañampiti chhoksusma?" 
Job41:8 Jumatejj juparu lokjjatasmajja, jan mayampisa armascañamataquiw nuwjiristamjja, ucatsti juparojj janiw mayampsa nuwcjjaraquismati." 
Job41:9 “Leviatán animalar uñjasaquiw qhitisa ajjsarañata jiwt'añ munaraquispajja. 
Job41:10 Maynitejj juparu coleraychejja, ucapachajj walwa colerasejja, janiw qhitisa jupampi nuwasiñjja muncaraquispati." 
Job41:11 ¿Maynitejj jupampi nuwasiña munaspa ucasti, jan cuna camacht'ataquiti mistunispa? ¡Janiw maynisa aca orakenjja jupampi nuwasirejj utjquiti!" 
Job41:12 Cayunacapat parlañsa, uqhamaraqui jach'a ch'amapat parlañsa janiw amuct'cäti." 
Job41:13 ¿Qhitis cunatejj juparu imqui uca lip'ichipjja apakaspa, jan ucajj qhiticha juparu imjjatqui uca imañapjja maysat maysaru junsuspa?" 
Job41:14 ¿Qhitisa uca ajjsarcañ nasa puntapjja, uqhama jach'a laca ch'aqhanacanïquipansa jist'araspa?" 
Job41:15 Jiqhaninacapasti jach'a ch'aqhanacampi sekentatawa, uqhamaraqui kaljama ch'ollkheraquiwa." 
Job41:16 Sinti jac'apuraru sekentatawa, janiw uca chekjja thayas pascaraquispati," 
Job41:17 wali jac'aru c'anantatawa, janiw qhitisa jaljtaycaraquispati." 
Job41:18 Ujurt'asitanacapasa llijullijur uñtatawa, nayranacapasti cunjämatejj intejj jalsunisajj c'ajtejja uqhamaw khani." 
Job41:19 Nasa p'iyanacapatsti ninaw mistuni nina sanc'anacaw willisiniraqui. 
Job41:20 Nasapatsti jewk'ew mistuni, cunjämatejj mä wallakeri phuqhut mistojja uqhama." 
Job41:21 Samanapajja sanc'anacwa sartayi, nasa p'iyapatsti ninaw mistuniraqui." 
Job41:22 Cuncapajj wali ch'amaniwa, jupa nayrakatansti takeniw ajjsarayasipjjaraqui." 
Job41:23 Janchipasa cuerpopanjja wali kholuwa, umatatayasin thayt'ayata hierröcaspas uqhama jan pascaya ch'ollkheraquiwa." 
Job41:24 Chuymapasti kalar uñtata ch'ollkheraquiwa, q'iyañ kalaru uñtata ch'ollkheraquiwa." 
Job41:25 Cunapachatejj jupajj sartasi ucapachasti, diosanacasa chhuctawayjjapjjaquiwa, ajjsarañatwa qhathatipjjaraqui." 
Job41:26 Janiw espadasa, lanzasa, flechanacasa, nina mich'inacasa juparu nuwjañataquejj ch'amanïquiti." 
Job41:27 Jupataquejj hierrojj mä ch'illiwäcaspasa uqhamaquiwa, broncesa ñusantata maderäcaspas uqhamaquiwa," 
Job41:28 Flechanacasti janiw juparojj jaltayquiti, kalampi jakt'añasti jupataquejj mä jisc'a t'unampisa jakt'csna uqhamaquiwa." 
Job41:29 Mä hierrot lurat c'uphañampi c'uphantañas, jupataquejj mä sokosampi jawc'añjamaquiwa, flechanacan qhuyusisa saratap ist'asasti larusiwa." 
Job41:30 Katatnaktqui ucapachasti ñek'enjja sucanacwa jist'arawayaraqui, wali ari rejanacampisa jist'arcaspa uqhama." 
Job41:31 Jach'a kotsti mä phucjamacwa walljjtayi; kollanaca wallaquiyañ calderäcaspa uqhama. 
Job41:32 Umansti jank'o jopoko jist'arawayaraqui, c'ajquiri jank'o, kaka ñic'utanïcaspasa uqhama." 
Job41:33 Janiw jupjamajj aca orakenjja utjquiti; jan cunsa ajjsarañataqui lurataw jupajja. 
Job41:34 Jupat juc'ampi ch'amaninacarusa saycatascaquiwa. Take jach'a ajjsarcaña animalanacan jilïriparaquiw jupajja.” 
Job42:1 Job chachajj Diosaruw take jan walt'añañacapa arsusiraquïna: “Nayajj yattwa jumajj take cunataquisa ch'amanïtama, janiw jumataquejj cunas jan lurañjamajj utjquiti." 
Job42:2  
Job42:3 ¿Qhitïtsa nayajj juman jach'a cancañamata pächasiñataquejja, uqhamat pisi amuyt'a jakëtajja uñacht'ayañataquejja? Nayasti cuntejj jan amuyt'cäyäta ucanacatwa parlascäyätjja, muspharcaña yänacata, cunanacatejj jan amuyt'añjamäqui take ucanacatwa parlascäyätjja." 
Job42:4 Jumasti saraquistawa: “Ist'ita, nayasti parlañwa munsma; aca jisct'anacaru arsuniraquim” sasa." 
Job42:5 Jichhacamasti nayajj jumatjja mayninacan parlatap tokecwa uñt'ayäsmajja, ucampis jichhajj naya quipcaw jumarojj uñcatsma." 
Job42:6 Ucatpï jichhajj chuymas usuta parlatanacajjatsa jumat jayana pisayastjja, lak'a khellaru kont'ata.”" 
Job42:7 Uca arunaca Job chacharu sasinsti, Tatitojj Elifaz chacharuw parlaraquïna, ucatsti saraquïnwa: “Jumataquejj wali coleratätwa, uqhamaraqui uca pani amigomataquisa; jumanacajj janiw nayjjatjja cunatejj chekapäqui uca parlapctati, cunjämtejj Job sirvirejjajj parlqui uqhama."
