Job42:8 Jichhajj pakallko orko vacanacampi, pakallko orko ovejanacampi catupjjam, ucatsti Job sirvirejjaru uñjiri sarapjjam, ucatsti jumanacajj mä nact'ata sacrificio loktapjjaraquim pachpa jumanacataqui. Job sirvirejjaw jumanacataqui mayiraquini, nayasti jupan mayitapjja ist'araquïwa, jumanacarusti janiw ucatjja cuna ñankhanacsa lurapcaraquïmati, jumanacarojj mutuyañas waquiscchi ucasa, nayjjat jan chekaparu khanañchapjjatamata, cunjämatejj Job sirvirejjajj khanañchänjja uqhama.”" 
Job42:9 Ucatsti Elifazampi, Bildadampi, Zofar chachampejj cunjämarutejj Tatitojj siscatayna uqhamarjamaw phokhapjjäna, Tatitusti Job chachan mayitapjja ist'araquïnwa." 
Job42:10 Job chachan amigonacapataqui mayitapatsti, Diosajj Job chacharojj nayra kamir cancañapwa wasitat cuttayjjäna, ucat juc'ampisa nayra kamir cancañapat sipanjja pä uqhampwa cuttayjjäna." 
Job42:11 Ucatsti take jilanacapawa jupar uñjirejj sarapjjäna, uqhamaraqui cullacanacapasa, amigonacapasa, nayra tiempo uñt'ata jakenacasa, ucatsti utapanjja mä jach'a mank'äwi lurapjjaraquïna. Job chachan take t'akhesitanacapatsti chuymachapjjänwa, cuna t'akhesiñanactejj Tatitojj jupjjaru apayancatayna take ucanacata; jupanacatsti sapa mayniraquiwa mä kawkha kollke churapjjäna, uqhamaraqui mä kori anillompi cuna." 
Job42:12 Diosasti Job chacharojj juc'ampwa bendisjjaraquïna nayra maranacat sipansa. Ovejanacapasti tunca pusini warankäjjänwa, camellonacapasti sojjta warankaraqui, waranka yuntanacani, uqhamaraqui waranka kachu asnonacani cunäjjaraquïnwa." 
Job42:13 Ucjjarusti tunca pusini yokanacanëjjaraquïnwa, quimsa phuchanacani cuna." 
Job42:14 Jilïri phuchaparusti Jemima sasaw sutichäna, ucjjaru phuchaparusti Cesia sasaraqui, quimsïri phucharusti Keren-hapuc sasaw suticharaquïna." 
Job42:15 Aca orakpachansti janipuniw Job chachan phuchanacapjama wali suma uñnakt'ani warminacajj utjcänti. Awquipasti uca phuchanacaparojj jilanacapampi chicwa take yänaca churjjaraquïna. 
Job42:16 Uca khepatsti Job chachajj pataca pusi tuncani marampwa jacascäna, wawanacaparusa uñjasiwaycaraquïnwa, allchhinacan allchhinacapcama. Ucatsti Job chachajj wali chuymaniwa jiwjjäna, walja maranaca jacasaraqui." 
Job42:17  
Psalms1:1 Qhititejj ñankha lurir jakenacan amtayataparjam jan sarnakqui ucajj cusisiñan jakewa. Jupajj janiw jucharar jakenacan thaquipan sarnakquiti, janiraquiw Diosamp sawcasirinacampis chicachasquiti," 
Psalms1:2 jan ucasti, jupan cusisiñapajj Tatitun arupawa, uca arupatsti arumay uruw lup'i." 
Psalms1:3 Jupajj, jawir thiyan ayruntat kokar uñtatawa: waquisitarjamaw achunac churi, laphinacapajj janiw wañsquiti; ¡take luräwinacapasti walt'ascaquipuniwa!" 
Psalms1:4 Jan wali jakenacampisti janiw uqhamäquiti: jupanacajj thayan apat jipir uñtatäpjjewa. 
Psalms1:5 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj janiw taripäwit jaltapcaniti; janiraquiw jucharar jakenacas asqui jakenac taypincapcaniti; 
Psalms1:6 Tatituw asqui jakenacan sarnakäwip yati, ñankha lurir jakenacan thaquipasti aynacht'añaruw puriyi." 
Psalms2:1 ¿Cunatarac Diosar jan iyawsir marcanacast ch'ajjwapjjesti? ¿Cunatarac jakenacast inamayatac ñankha amtasipquisti? 
Psalms2:2 Acapach reyinacajj mayachthapisipjjewa, jilïr jakenacajj mä amtañaruquiw puripjje: Tatitumpiru, ajllit reyipampir kallcatañataqui." 
Psalms2:3 Jupanacajj wararipjjewa: “¡Chinuñanacapat t'akanucusipjjañäni! ¡ñach'añanacapat jararasipjjañäni!” sasa. 
Psalms2:4 Ucampis alajjpachan jaquir Tatitojj larusiwa, jupanacat sawcasiwa," 
Psalms2:5 k'apisiñampiw mulljanti, tipusiñampiw saraqui:" 
Psalms2:6 “Naya pachpaw reyijjarojj ajllista, Sión, kollan kollojj patjjaruw utt'ayta” sasa." 
Psalms2:7 Tatitun arsutap yatiyä: Jupajj situwa: “Jumaw nayan wawajjätajja: jichhüruw jumarojj jacañ chursma; 
Psalms2:8 jumajj nayat mayiscaquita: marcanacjja, catokäwimjam catuyjjäma, orak tucuscam apnakasiñamataquiw churjjaraquïma." 
Psalms2:9 Hierro thujrumpiw jupanacarojj apnakäta, ¡ñek'e phuqhunacarjamaw t'unjaraquïta!” sasa." 
Psalms2:10 Jichhasti reyinaca, amuyt'asipjjamaya, acapach apnakerinaca, wanipjjamaya:" 
Psalms2:11 Tatiturojj ajjsart'añamp loktapjjam, qhathatiñamp jupan nayrakatapan alt'apjjam, jupan jan k'apisiñapataqui, thaquin jan aynacht'apjjañamataqui, Tatitun k'apisiñapan mäc ch'alljjtirïtap laycu. ¡Jupamp arjjatayasirinacajj cusisiñanïpjjewa!" 
Psalms2:12  
Psalms3:1 Tatay, waljaniw nayamp timasirinacajja, waljaniw nayataquejj sayt'apjje;" 
Psalms3:2 waljaniw nayat sapjje: “Janiw Diosajj jupar khespiycaniti” sasa. 
Psalms3:3 Ucampis Tatay, jumaw nayan arjjatirejjätajja, jumaw jach'ar aptirejjätajja, jumaraquiw ch'amañchirejjätasa." 
Psalms3:4 Jach'at art'asisaw Tatitut mayista, jupasti kollan kollupatpach ist'itu." 
Psalms3:5 Iquintcäsa, iccäsa, uñatatcä ucapachasa: Tatituw nayarojj yanapasquitu." 
Psalms3:6 Nayar catuntañatac muyuntir jakenacajj janiw ajjsarayquituti. 
Psalms3:7 ¡Tatay, sartasiquimaya! ¡Dios Tatitojjay, khespiyasiquitaya! Jumaw timanacajjan ajanupat t'ajjllinokäta, ¡ñankha lurir jakenacan laca ch'aqhanacap t'unsuraquïta!" 
Psalms3:8 Tatay, jumaw khespiyirïtajja; ¡marcamarojj asquinacampiy phokhantam!" 
Psalms4:1 Arjjatir Diosajjay, mayisinsma ucapachajj ist'aquitaya, jumaw llaquisiñajjan chuymajj khanartayista, ¡nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya!" 
Psalms4:2 Jach'a jach'a tucur jakenaca, ¿cunapachcamarac jisc'achapjjetätasti?, ¿cunapachcamarac c'arir munasipcaquïta, sallkarus thakasipcaquïtasti?" 
Psalms4:3 Yatipjjam: Tatitojj jupar iyawsirirojj munasiwa; jupar art'ascta ucapachasti Tatitojj ist'ituwa. 
Psalms4:4 Ajjsarthapipjjam, jan juc'amp juch lurapjjamti, iquiñamansti takpach chuymamp amuythapisipjjam;" 
Psalms4:5 chekpach loktäwinac jupar catuyapjjam, Tatiturusti take chuymamp iyawsapjjam." 
Psalms4:6 Waljaniw sapjje: “¿Qhitirac cusisiñ churistanisti?” sasa. ¡Tatay, qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipjjeta!" 
Psalms4:7 Jumaw chuymajjarojj juc'amp cusisiñ uchtajja jilarquir trigoninacat sipansa, vinoninacat sipansa." 
Psalms4:8 Nayajj jan cuna llaquiniw iquintta, mäquiw icjaracta, Tatay, jumaquiw iyawsañ chuymamp jacayistajja." 
Psalms5:1 Tatay, Reyejjay, Diosajjay, arunacajjarojj ist'aquimaya, aykotanacajjarojj jaysaquimaya, arnakasitanacajjarojj iyawsaquimaya. Jumaruw mayisitajj loktansma," 
Psalms5:2  
Psalms5:3 khantatiw arojjarojj ist'tajja, willjtaw llaquejj yatiyasinsma, nayasti ist'añam suyascta." 
Psalms5:4 Jumajj janiw ñankhamp cusisir Diosäctati, ñankha lurir jakenacajj janiw jac'aman jacapcaspati," 
Psalms5:5 jach'a jach'a tucur jakenacasa, janiraquiw nayrakataman utjapcaspati. Jumajj ñankha lurir jakenacarojj uñistawa," 
Psalms5:6 c'arinacarojj t'unjtawa; ch'ojjña chuyman jakenacampiru, jake jiwayirinacampirojj uñisnuctawa." 
Psalms5:7 Ucampis nayajj jach'a munasiñam laycuw kollan utamarojj mantä, kollan utam mankhansti alt'at chuymampiw yupaychäma." 
Psalms5:8 Tatay, nayamp timasirinacan utjatap laycojj asqui cancañamampiy irpita, nayrakatajjansti thaquimay qhusqhacharapita." 
Psalms5:9 Jupanacajj janipuniw khana chuymamp arsupquiti, ¡chuymanacapajj ñankhamp phokhantatawa! Mallk'apajj jist'arat amay imañawa, ¡lajjrapasti c'ari lajjrawa!" 
Psalms5:10 ¡Diosajjay, jupanacarojj! mutuyamaya, amtatanacaparojj aynacht'ayamaya; jumar kallcatapjjatap laycusti, ñankha luratanacapat jakonucum." 
Psalms5:11 Jumamp arjjatayasiñ thakerinacajj cusisipjjpanaya, jupanacar imascatam laycojj, cusisiñat wiñayapun k'ochupjjpan. Jumar munasirinacajj jumïpan cusisipjji:" 
Psalms5:12 Tatay, jumaw iyawsir jakerojj asquinac churtajja, qhuyapayasiñamajj jarc'akasiñar uñtataw muyuntasqui." 
Psalms6:1 Tatay, janiquiy k'apisiñamamp tokentistati; janirac tipusiñamampis mutuyistati." 
Psalms6:2 Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, ch'ama pisiw uñjasta, Tatay, wasitat c'umaraptayjjeta, takpach ch'aqhanacajjaw qhathatisqui." 
Psalms6:3 Ajayojjajj ajjsarañat qhathatisqui, jumasti, Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac jan ist'quitätasti?" 
Psalms6:4 Tatay, jutamaya, ajayojjarojj khespiyamaya, qhuyapayasiñam laycuy khespiyita:" 
Psalms6:5 janiw qhitis jiwatanac taypin art'asquiristamti, ¿qhitirac mankhapachan jach'añchiristamsti?" 
Psalms6:6 Jachcäwejj karitäjjtwa, sapa arumaw iquiñajjan jachta, jachampiw iquiñ ch'ijmajjarojj juriptayta." 
Psalms6:7 Jachcäwejj nayrajjajj ch'amact'atäjjewa, ucatak jan walt'añanacamp juyqhuptatawa." 
Psalms6:8 ¡Ñankha lurir jakenaca, nayat jithektasipjjeta, Tatitojj jachatajjarojj ist'iwa!" 
Psalms6:9 Tatitojj achict'asitajjarojj jaysiwa, Tatitojj mayisitajjarojj catokewa." 
Psalms6:10 Nayamp timasirinacajj ajjsarañat aynacht'apjjani, mä ch'ipjjtanac p'enkapat jaltjjapjjani." 
Psalms7:1 Tatit Diosajjay, take chuymampiw jumar alcatsma, nayar arcnakerinacat khespiyasiquitaya; janiquiy leonanacar uñtat catuntapjjetpati, janirac jan arjjatirinjam tucjapjjetpati." 
Psalms7:2  
Psalms7:3 Tatit Diosajjay, nayatejj juchanïsta, amparanacajjatejj jaker jiwayirïchi," 
Psalms7:4 uñt'at jake masejjarutejj ñankha luratajjajj utjchi, t'akhesiyir jaker arjjatatajjatejj utjchi ucajja," 
Psalms7:5 timasirejjajj arctasin catjitpan, jicjjatasinsti jacasquirpach orakenjam katatitpan, jake cancañajjsti oraker taquisiracpan." 
Psalms7:6 Tatay, k'apisiñampiy sartasim, timanacajjan k'apisiñaparojj jumay saycatam, chekapar uñjañatac arsurjamajj nayar arjjatirejj jutaquimaya." 
Psalms7:7 Marcanacampiy muyuntayasim, khapak konuñam jach'ar aptam, marcanac apnakañatac kont'asiraquim." 
Psalms7:8 Tatay, jumaw marcanacar tariptajja: asqui cancañajjarjamay uñjita, jan juchanirjamay taripita." 
Psalms7:9 Chekapar uñjir Diosay, jumaw chuyma mankha amtäwinac uñanttajja; juchararanacan ñankha lurañanacap tucusiyam, asqui jakerusti thuruñchat sayt'ayam." 
Psalms7:10 Alajjpachanquir Diosaw imantasiñajjajja, jupaw k'oma chuymaninacarojj khespiyi." 
Psalms7:11 Diosajj chekapar uñjañamp taripiriwa, take pachan ñankharojj juchañchasqui." 
Psalms7:12 Janitejj jakejj Diosar cutiquipstcanejja, jupajj espadap waquicht'asini; mich'ipasti niy jiyintatpachawa." 
Psalms7:13 Jiwayir mich'inacapajj niy waquichrantatawa, nina nactayir mich'inacap antutnucurpacharaquiwa." 
Psalms7:14 Ñankha lurir jaker uñtapjjam: wawachasir warmjamaw t'akhesisqui, ñankhamp wallk'eptatawa, c'ariruw wawacharaquini." 
Psalms7:15 Wali mankha p'iypun allisi, pachpa allisitaparuw jalantani." 
Psalms7:16 ¡Ñankha luratanacapajj p'ekepjjaruw cutjjatani, khoru cancañapajj p'eke ch'aqhapjjaruw jaljjattani!" 
Psalms7:17 Nayasti, Tatituruw chekapar uñjatapat jach'añchä, alajjpachanquir Tatitun sutiparuw k'ochunac k'ochü." 
Psalms8:1 ¡Tatay, uywirejjay, sutimajj takpach oraken muspharcayawa! ¡Khapak cancañamajj alajjpachat juc'amp qhuricamawa!" 
Psalms8:2 Timasirinacaman utjatap laycojj ñuñusquir wawanacan jach'añchatapampiw ch'amam uñacht'aytajja, timasirinacampir kallasirinacampir t'unjañataqui." 
Psalms8:3 Cunapachatejj juman lurat alajjpach uñatatcta, juman uchat phajjsimpiru, warawaranacampir uñtcta ucapachajj sistwa:" 
Psalms8:4 “¿Cunarac jakesti, jupat amtasiñamataquisti? ¿cunarac jiwir jakesti ch'am churañamataquisti?”" 
Psalms8:5 Jakerojj angelanacat mä juc'a sullcac lurtajja, aytat cancañampi, jake cancañampiw juparojj pillunttajja;" 
Psalms8:6 take luratanacam apnakañapataquiw catuytajja, take cun uñjañapataquiw catjjaruyaractajja:" 
Psalms8:7 ovej tamanaca, vacanaca, ch'uminquir animalanaca," 
Psalms8:8 alajj chek thoknaker jamach'inaca, lamar kotanquir chawllanaca, lamar kotan take utjirinaca." 
Psalms8:9 ¡Tatay, uywirejjay, sutimajj takpach oraken muspharcayawa!" 
Psalms9:1 Tatay, takpach chuymajjampiw yuspagarsma muspharcañ luratanacamat yatiyasa." 
Psalms9:2 Alajjpachanquir Diosay, jumïpan jach'a cusisiñajj utjitu; sutim aytasaw k'ochuracsma." 
Psalms9:3 Nayamp timasirinacajj nayrakatamat cuttawayjjapjje, tincurapjjewa, jiwarapjjaraquiwa." 
Psalms9:4 Jumätaw chekap taripirejja: nayar chekapar uñjañataquejj reyi konuñamaruw kont'astajja, llaquejjampir arsusiñajjampiruw arjjattajja." 
Psalms9:5 Ñankha lurir marcanacarojj tokenoktawa, ñankha lurir jakenacarojj t'unjtawa, sutiparusti jan mayampitaquiw chhaktaytajja." 
Psalms9:6 Timasirejj wiñay t'unjäwimpiw tucusjje, marcanacap tincuytajja, sutipasti wiñayatac chhaktayatawa." 
Psalms9:7 Ucampis Tatitojj wiñayataquiw reyit kont'asi; taripañataquiw reyi konuñap thuruñchi. 
Psalms9:8 Asqui cancañampiw acapacharojj taripani, marcanacarusti chekaparuw uñjani." 
Psalms9:9 Tatituw t'akhesiyat jakenacarojj arjjatasqui, jupaw llaquisiñ pachanacan imasqui." 
Psalms9:10 Tatay, sutim yatirinacajj jumaruw iyawsapjjtam, jumar thakerinacarojj janipuniw apanucctati." 
Psalms9:11 Sión kollun jaquir Tatitur k'ochupjjam, muspharcañ luratanacap marcanacar yatiyapjjam;" 
Psalms9:12 Diosajj t'akhesirinacat amtasipuniwa, janiw jachatanacapat armasquiti, jupanacar t'akhesiyirinacarojj mutuyiwa." 
Psalms9:13 Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, uñisirinacajjan nayar t'akhesiyatap uñtanim, jiwañ puncut wayst'asita." 
Psalms9:14 Uqhamat jumar jach'añchäma, khespiyatamatsti Sión puncunacan cusisï." 
Psalms9:15 Jumar jan uñt'ir marcanacajj jupanacan waquichat sipitaruw jalantapjje, cayunacapajj sipitrantataw uñjasi, jupanacan imantat pachpa sipitaparu." 
Psalms9:16 Tatitojj chekapar uñjañataquiw uñachayasi: ñankha lurir jakesti pachpa luräwinacapampiw pejjtuntayasi. 
Psalms9:17 Ñankha lurir jakenacampi, Diosar jan uñt'irinacampejj jiwañ mic'ayaruw chhaktapjjani, Diosat armt'asir jakenacajj wiñay jiwampiw tucusipjjani." 
Psalms9:18 Jan cunan jakenacajj janipuniw armatäpcaniti, janiraquiw suyt'añapas wiñayatac tucuscaniti." 
Psalms9:19 Tatay, sartasiquimaya, janiquiy jaken jach'a jach'a tucuñap alekac uñch'uquimti, Tatitur jan uñt'irinacarojj nayrakataman taripam." 
Psalms9:20 Tatay, ajjsarañ chuymay jupanacar ucham; marcanacajj jakequïpjjatap yatekapjjpan." 
Psalms10:1 Tatay, ¿cunatarac nayat jayanctasti? ¿Cunatarac t'akhesiñajjan nayat imantastasti?" 
Psalms10:2 Khoru jaken jach'a jach'a tucuñapajj k'apisiñampiw llaquit jakerojj t'akhesiyi, ucampis jupan waquichat pachpa sipitaruw jalt'ascani." 
Psalms10:3 Ñankha lurir jakejj, munapayañ cancañapat jach'achasi, munapayir jakejj, Tatituruw ñankhachi, jisc'acharaqui." 
Psalms10:4 Ñankha lurir jakejj, jan p'enkanpachaw arsu: “Janiw Diosajj utjquiti, janiw qhitis luratajjat camsquitaniti” sasa. Uqhamac jupajj amuyi." 
Psalms10:5 Sarnakäwipajj ñankha amtañamp jichuntatawa, juman amuyunacamajj jupataquejj jayanquiwa, timanacapatsti sawcasiwa." 
Psalms10:6 Janis qhitis tincuycaspajj uqham amuyasi, janis cunapachas jan walt'añanacar purcaspajj uqham amuyasiraqui." 
Psalms10:7 Lacapajj ñankhachañanacamp phokhantatawa, c'arintañanacampi, sallkantañanacampi; arunacapasti ñankha lurañanacampi, t'akhesiyañanacamp imanti." 
Psalms10:8 Jamas chekanacar kont'asaw suyanti, jamasat jan juchan jakerojj jiwayi. Jan arjjatirin jakerojj jan phisayaw uñch'uqui:" 
Psalms10:9 putunquir leonar uñtataw jan cunan jakerojj suyanti, jaljjatqui ucapachasti, sipitapar jalt'ayasaw katati." 
Psalms10:10 Jupajj alt'arac lip't'araquiwa, jan arjjatirin jakenacasti jach'a sillunacaparuw jalt'i." 
Psalms10:11 Ñankha chuyman jakejj lup'isiwa: “Diosajj aca jaket armasiwa, jupar jan uñjañataquejj ajanupsa imantasiwa” sasa." 
Psalms10:12 ¡Tatay, sartasiquimaya, amparam lokatatasim! ¡T'akhesir jakenacat janiquiy armasimti!" 
Psalms10:13 Diosajjay, ¿cunatarac ñankha lurir jakenacast sawcasipjjätamsti, janis cun camscasmajj uqham amuyasisasti?" 
Psalms10:14 Juma pachpaw ñankha k'apisiyir luratanacap uñjtajja, jumaw uñjasctajja, jupanacarusti juchap uñt'ayätawa. Jumaruw jan arjjatirin jakenacajj maqhatjjapjjtam, jumaw wajchanacan yanapiripätajja." 
Psalms10:15 ¡Ñankha lurir jakenacan amparap t'unaram! ¡ñankha luratanacapat mutuyaraquim, take cunat phokhañapcama!" 
Psalms10:16 Tatitojj wiñayapuniw reyit kont'asi, ¡Diosar jan uñt'irinacasti orakepat jakonucutäniwa!" 
Psalms10:17 Tatay, jumaw jan yäkat jakenacan mayisitap ist'asctajja, jumaw chuymachasctajja, ch'amañchascaractajja." 
Psalms10:18 Wajcharus t'akhesiyatarus chekaparuy uñjam: ¡lak'at lurat jiwir jakejj jan wasitat ajjsarayañ utjaypati! 
Psalms11:1 Nayajj Tatituruw imantasiñajjatac thakta, inamayaw sasipquitu: “Jamach'ir uñtat kollur jaltjjam," 
Psalms11:2 ñankha lurir jakenacar uñtam: mich'i flecht'añataquiw waquichrantapjje, flecha sum jiyintapjje, jamasawjat asqui jakenacar wact'ayañataquejj flecht'apjje." 
Psalms11:3 Cunapachatejj utt'ayatajj llojjesispajja, ¿camächaraquisp asqui jakesti?” sasa." 
Psalms11:4 Ucampis Tatitojj kollan templopanquiwa, khapak konuñapajj alajjpachanquiwa: nayranacapajj uñch'uquisquiwa, jakenacan luratanacap wali amuyump uñjasqui." 
Psalms11:5 Tatitojj juchanirus, jan juchanirus uñch'uquisquiwa, ñankha lurañ munirinacarusti walpun uñisi." 
Psalms11:6 Tatitojj ñankha lurir jakenacjjarojj nina sanc'ampi, asufremp jalluyanini; ch'aman thayampiw jupanacarojj naqhantayani. ¡Tatitojj lurataparjamaw mutuyani!" 
Psalms11:7 Tatitojj chekapar uñjiriwa, asqui cancañarusti munasiwa, ucat asqui jakenacajj ajanup uñcatapjjani." 
Psalms12:1 Tatay, khespiyapjjetaya, asqui jakenacajj tucusisquiwa, chekap sarnaker jakenacajj chhaktasquiwa." 
Psalms12:2 Maynit maynicamaw c'arintasipjje, sallka chuymampiw parlapjje, ch'ojjña chuymampiw arsupjjaraqui." 
Psalms12:3 Tatitojjay, c'ari parlir lajjranac saphitpach jiq'inucum, jach'achasir jakenacarus, ch'ojjña jakenacarus jiq'inucum," 
Psalms12:4 aqham sir jakenacarus tucusiyaraquim: “Lajjraw jiwasan ch'amasajja, lajjrasaw jiwasanacarojj arjjatistu, ¿qhitirac cun sistanisti?” sasa." 
Psalms12:5 Tatitojj jupanacarojj siwa: “Jan cunan jakenacampi, jan yäkat jakenacampejj mutuyataw uñjasipjje, t'akhesiyataw uñjasipjjaraqui, ucat jupanacar yanapt'añatac sartasï, yanapt'ayasiñ munataparjamaw yanapt'ä” sasa." 
Psalms12:6 Tatitun arsutanacapajj chekpachawa, ninamp pakallk cuti k'omachat kollker uñtatawa." 
Psalms12:7 Tatay, jumaw nanacarojj imasipquitäta, wiñayaw uca jakenacat jarc'akapjjetäta." 
Psalms12:8 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj take chekan muyupayapjje, take jakew ñankharojj jach'ar apti." 
Psalms13:1 Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac nayat armasitätasti? ¿Wiñayapunit armasitäta? ¿Cunapachcamarac ajanum nayatac imantasïtasti?" 
Psalms13:2 ¿Cunapachcamarac llact'at sarnakästi? ¿Cunapachcamarac ajayojjast t'akhesini, sapürus llaquitac sarnakanisti? ¿Cunapachcamarac nayamp timasirist apnaketanisti?" 
Psalms13:3 Tatit Diosajjay, uñtaniquitaya, ist'aquitaya, suma khanam uñjayita, janiquiy wiñay jiwañar puriyistati." 
Psalms13:4 Janiquiy timasirejjajj sispati: “Nayaw atipjta” sasa. Janirac timasirejjajj aynacht'atajjat cusispati. 
Psalms13:5 Nayajj qhuyapayasiñamaruw take chuymamp iyawsta: chuymajjajj nayar khespiyatamat cusisi. 
Psalms13:6 ¡Tatituruw nayar asqui luratapat k'ochü! 
Psalms14:1 Ñankha amuyun jakenacajj sapjjewa: “Janiw Diosajj utjquiti” sasa. Takeniw ñankha lurir tucupjje; cunayman ñankhanac lurapjje; janiw qhitis asqui lurirejj utjquiti. 
Psalms14:2 Tatitojj alajjpachatpach jakenacarojj uñtani, inach qhitis amuyt'asirejj utjaspa, inach qhitis Diosar thaktirejj utjaspa." 
Psalms14:3 Jakenacasti takeniw jan wali thaquir saranucupjje, takpachaniw ñankha lurir tucupjje, ¡janiw qhitis asqui lurirejj utjquiti! ¡janiw maynis utjquiti!" 
Psalms14:4 Ñankha luririnacajj jan amuyunïpjjewa, marcajjarojj t'ant'jam mank'antapjje, janiw Tatitun sutip art'asipquiti." 
Psalms14:5 Jupanacajj ajjsarañat qhathatipjjani, Diosajj, jupar jaysirinacamp chicäscatap laycu." 
Psalms14:6 Jan yäkat jaken amtäwinacapat larusipjje, ucampis Tatituw jupanacarojj imasqui." 
Psalms14:7 ¡Israel marcan khespiyasiñapajj Sión marcatpach jutaquispa! Tatitojj t'akhesiyat marcapar cusisiycan ucapachajja, Jacobon wawanacapajj cusisiniwa, Israel marcasti cusisiraquiniwa." 
Psalms15:1 Tatay, ¿qhitirac kollan utaman jacaspasti? ¿Qhitirac kollan kolluman utjasispasti?" 
Psalms15:2 Qhititejj juch jan luras jacqui uca, ascpun lurqui uca; qhititejj take chuymamp chekap arsqui uca;" 
Psalms15:3 qhititejj jake masipar jan c'arintqui uca, jilaparus ñankha jan lurqui uca, uta jac'a masiparus jan jisc'achqui uca," 
Psalms15:4 qhititejj ñankha lurañarojj jisc'achqui uca, Tatitur ajjsartirirus jach'añchqui uca, qhititejj jan walir purcasas arsutap phokqui uca;" 
Psalms15:5 qhititejj kollke mayt'asin jalaktap jan apsqui uca, jan juchanir aynacht'ayañatac kollk jan catokasqui uca. Qhititejj uqham lurasapun sarnakqui ucajja, janipuniw aynacht'caniti." 
Psalms16:1 Diosajjay, imasiquitaya; jumaruw take chuymamp alcatsma." 
Psalms16:2 Nayajj jumar sismawa: “Jumaw nayan Tatitojjätajja, asquejjätasa, janiw cunas jumjamajj utjquiti” sasa." 
Psalms16:3 Acapach aytat jakenacan cusisiñ jicjjatirinacajj sapjjewa: aca orakenquir diosanacajj ch'amanïpjjewa, sasa." 
Psalms16:4 Jupanacajj cunayman diosanac uñstayapjje, ucanacarusti alt'at chuymampiw loktapjje. Ucampis nayajj janipuniw wilañcha loktäwinacapamp chicachascäti, janiraquiw sutinacaps aytascäti." 
Psalms16:5 Tatay, jumaw nayan take cunajjätajja; jumaw asquinacamamp phokhantista; jacañajjajj amparamar catuyatawa." 
Psalms16:6 Mä suma chekawjaw nayarojj wact'itu, catokäwejjajj walpun cusisiyitu." 
Psalms16:7 Tatiturojj nayar irpatapat jach'añchä, arumanacamppachaw chuymajj mankhan chekachitu." 
Psalms16:8 Nayajj Tatitump chicapuniw sarnakascta, jupaw cupëjjajjanqui, janiw cunas tincuyquitaniti." 
Psalms16:9 Ucat chuymajjajj walpun cusisi, ajayojjas cusisi, janchejjas samararaqui." 
Psalms16:10 Jumajj janiw jiwar catjjaruyquitätati janiraquiw arquiriman janchip ñusantañaps muncätati. 
Psalms16:11 Jumaw jacañ thac uñacht'ayitäta, nayrakataman jach'a cusisiñaw utji; jac'amansti wiñay cusisiñaw utjaraqui." 
Psalms17:1 Tatay, chekapat mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, arnakasitajjarojj jaysaquimaya, mayisitajjarus iyawsaquimaya, janiw c'ari arunacamp mayiscsmati." 
Psalms17:2 Nayar juchañchañajj jumat jutpan, jumaw chekapäc uc yattajja." 
Psalms17:3 Jumaw takpach amuyunacajj yattajja, arumanacaw chuymajj uñaker jutista; ninampjamaw yant'ista, janiraquiw cuna ñankhsa jicjjatquistati." 
Psalms17:4 Lacajjajj janiw c'arinac arsquiti, cunjämtejj jakenacajj parlapqui uqhama; ch'ajjwañ thaquinacat jithektasta, juman arsutamarjamaw phokta." 
Psalms17:5 Cayunacajjajj thaquiman thurt'ataw sarnake, chellktanacajjasti janiw thaquimat jithektquiti." 
Psalms17:6 Diosajjay, ist'asirïtam laycuw mayisinsma, naya tokeruy jinchum alcatanim, arunacajjar ist'araquim." 
Psalms17:7 Qhuyapayasiñaman muspharcañanacap uñacht'ayita, ch'amamar take chuymamp iyawsirirojj jumaw timanacapat arjjattajja." 
Psalms17:8 Nayarusti, nayranacaman kalaparjamay imita, chhekhanacaman ch'iwipar imantita," 
Psalms17:9 nayar chhucjjatir khoru jakenacata, jiwayañatac muyuntir timanacajjata." 
Psalms17:10 Jupanacajj kala chuymanacap jist'antasipjje, jach'a jach'a tucuñampiw arsupjje," 
Psalms17:11 chellktanacapajj niyaw jac'ancasajj muyuntasquitu, nayar jakonucuñataquejj niyaw nayranacapamp ch'irmt'asipjje," 
Psalms17:12 catuntañatac jaljjatir leonanacar uñtatäpjjewa, imantasiñapan jaljjatañatac suyantir leonanacar uñtatäpjjaraquiwa." 
Psalms17:13 Tatay, sartasiquimaya, saycatasin quillt'ayam, ñankha lurir jaket espadamamp khespiyita." 
Psalms17:14 Tatay, ch'amamampiy jupanacat khespiyita; acapachat jupanacar jakonucum, acapachan jacañapajj tucuspan; yänacampejj kamirquipstasipcacpan, wawanacapajj phallañcam mank'apjjpan, allchhinacapataquis jilt'ascacpan." 
Psalms17:15 Nayasti cusisitaw jicjjatasï; ajanuy ajanu jumar uñcatasina, uñatatcä ucapach nayrakataman jicjjatasisina." 
Psalms18:1 Tatay, jumaw ch'amañchirejjätajja, jumaruw take chuymamp munassma." 
Psalms18:2 Jumaw arjjatirejjätajja, imantasiñajjätasa, jumaw khespiyirejjätasa, Diosajjätasa, nayar imantir karkajjätasa, imir jarc'akasiñajjätasa, khespiyir ch'amajjätasa, wali amstanquir imantasiñajjätasa." 
Psalms18:3 Tatay, jumaw jach'añchatäñatac asquïtajja: art'asinsma ucapachajj uñisirinacajjat khespiyista." 
Psalms18:4 Jiwajj sipitanacapampiw simpantitu, ajjsarcay t'unjirin nayrakatapan ajjsarta." 
Psalms18:5 Jiwajj chinuñanacapampiw muyuntayitu, ¡jiwañ sipitanacan jicjjatasta!" 
Psalms18:6 Llaquisiñajjan Tatitur art'asta, Diosajjat yanap mayista: jupasti templopatpach ist'anitu, arnakasitajjajj jinchupcamaw puri." 
Psalms18:7 Ucapachaw orakejj ch'amamp qhathatïna, kollunacajj saphitpach onjjtäna, Tatitun k'apisiñapamp qhathatiyatäpjjänwa;" 
Psalms18:8 nasapat jiwk'ew mistüna, lacapatsti naqhantir ninaw lawrsüna, lacapat q'illim sanc'anac thusanïna." 
Psalms18:9 Alajjpach jist'arasin sarakanïna, cayunacap mankhäjjansti, ch'iyär juri kenayanacaw utjäna:" 
Psalms18:10 mä angelan chhekhapjjaruw konjjatäna, thayan chhekhanacap patanjam jaltäna," 
Psalms18:11 utjäwiparojj kenayampiw muyuntayasïna; ch'iyär ch'amac jallur kenayampi, uman phokhantat qhusu kenayampi;" 
Psalms18:12 nayrakatapatsti llijtir khejjokhejjow mistüna, kenayanacatsti chhijchhimpi, naqhasquir sanc'anacampiw jallüna." 
Psalms18:13 Alajjpachanquir Tatitojj alajjpachatpach ajjsarcañ jach'a arup ist'asiyäna. 
Psalms18:14 Mich'inacap flecht'asaw jakenacarojj tutuquiyäna, jan amuct'ir khejjokhejjonacapasti jupanacarojj lokheptayänwa." 
Psalms18:15 Lamar kota mankhajj uñstjjänwa, aca oraken saphipas uñstjjaraquïnwa, Tatitun ajjsarcañ arup ist'asitap laycu, k'apisiñ samanap ch'amamp phust'atap laycuraqui." 
Psalms18:16 Diosajj alajjpachatpach amparap loktanitu, amparapampiw jach'a lamar kotat waysutu," 
Psalms18:17 wali ch'aman uñisirinacajjat khespiyitu, nayat juc'amp ch'aman timanacat antutnucuyitu." 
Psalms18:18 Llaquinquipan nayarojj chhucjjatapjjetu, Tatitusti yanapt'apampiw arjjatitu:" 
Psalms18:19 khespiñ thaquiruw irpsutu, nayar munatap laycuw khespiyitu." 
Psalms18:20 Tatitojj k'oma sarnakatajjatjam churäwip wajjt'itu. 
Psalms18:21 Nayajj Tatitun thaquipan sarnakta, janipuniw Diosajjarojj armanuccti;" 
Psalms18:22 takpach arsutanacapajj chuymajjancasquiwa, janipuniw arsutanacapat jithektascti;" 
Psalms18:23 janiw nayrakatapan juchachascti, ñankha lurañat jithektasta;" 
Psalms18:24 Tatituw churäwip wajjt'itu, nayrakatapan k'oma chuyman sarnakatajjata." 
Psalms18:25 Tatay, asqui jaketaquejj asquiraquïtawa, jan camscayäqui uca jaketaquis jan camscayaraquïtawa," 
Psalms18:26 khana chuymanitaquejj khana chuymaniraquïtawa, sallka chuymanitaquisti ch'iqhi chuymanïtawa." 
Psalms18:27 Jumaw t'akhesiyat jakenacarojj khespiytajja, jach'a jach'a tucurinacarusti jisc'achtawa." 
Psalms18:28 Tatay, jumaw nayarojj khan churista, Diosajjay, jumaw arum ch'amacajjar khantaytajja." 
Psalms18:29 Juman yanapamampiw timanacajjarojj jaljjatä, yanapamampiw uyuchrantat marcanacar chhuct'ä." 
Psalms18:30 Diosan thaquipajj chekapawa, Tatitun arsutanacapajj take chuymamp iyawscayawa, Diosajj jupar take chuymamp alcatirinacarojj imascapuniwa." 
Psalms18:31 ¿Qhitirac Tatitut sipan yakha diosast utjisti? ¿Qhiti diosarac jiwasanacar arjjatirist utjisti? 
Psalms18:32 Diosaw nayarojj ch'am churitu, juparaquiw sarnakäwejjar k'om tucuyi," 
Psalms18:33 jupaw tarujan cayupjam jaltir cayunac churitu, alajj chekawjanacan cayunacajjar sum thuruñcharaqui," 
Psalms18:34 jupaw nuwasiñataquejj amparanacajjar waquichi, broncet lurat flechanac jiyintañataquiw ch'am churaraquitu." 
Psalms18:35 Jumaw arjjatista, khespiyaraquista, cupi amparamampiw catjjarusista, qhuyapayasiñamaw aytat jaker tucuyitu." 
Psalms18:36 Jumaw thaquejjarojj jasaptaytajja, cayunacajjasti janiw llust'quiti." 
Psalms18:37 Timanacajjarojj arctasin jicjjatta, jupanacar tucjanisaw cutinjjta:" 
Psalms18:38 jisc'a jisc'a tucjanta, jan mayamp sartquir lurjanta, cayunacajjamp tacjjatataw uñjasipjje." 
Psalms18:39 Jumaw nuwasïwin ch'am churista, kallasirinacarojj nayrakatajjaruw alt'aytajja," 
Psalms18:40 nayrakatajjatsti timanacajjarojj chhuqhutataytawa, uqhamat nayar uñisirinacarojj tucusiytajja." 
Psalms18:41 Jupanacajj yanap mayisipjjäna, jupanacarusti janiw qhitis yanapcänti, Tatituruw art'asipjjäna jupasti janiw ist'cänti." 
Psalms18:42 Thayan apat lak'arjamaw jupanacarojj tucusiyta, thaquinquir ñek'erjamaw tacsuracta." 
Psalms18:43 Kallcatasir marcat khespiyista, marcanacan jilïripat utt'ayista, jan uñt'at jakenacampiw loktayista." 
Psalms18:44 Arojj ist'asajj mäquiw jaysapjjetu; yakha marcanquir jakenacajj k'ayachapjjetuwa," 
Psalms18:45 yakha marcanquirinacajj llajllasipjjewa, qhathatisaw imantasïwinacapat mistunipjje." 
Psalms18:46 ¡Tatitojj jallallatäpan! ¡Arjjatirejjajj kollanäpan! ¡Khespiyir Diosajjajj jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms18:47 Jupaw naya lanti phoksur Diosajja, jupaw amparajjarojj marcanac catuyitu;" 
Psalms18:48 jupaw timanacajjan k'apisiñapat khespiyitu, nayar kallcatir jakenacat antutayitu. Tatay, jumaw khoru jakenacat khespiyistajja." 
Psalms18:49 Ucatpï marcanac taypin yuspagarsmajja, sutimarus k'ochunac k'ochuractjja." 
Psalms18:50 Jumaw ajllit reyimarojj atipaytajja, Davidampir allchhinacapampirojj munasiñampipuniw uñjtajja." 
Psalms19:1 Alajjpachajj Diosan khapak cancañap yatiyi, alajjpachajj amparanacapan luratap khanañchi." 
Psalms19:2 Urunacajj jupanaccamaw yatiyasipjje, arumanacasti arum masinacaparuw ist'ayapjjaraqui." 
Psalms19:3 Janis arsupcchejja, janis arupajj ist'ascchejja," 
Psalms19:4 orakpacharuw yatiyatapajj ist'asi, orak tucuscamaw arupajj puri, cawqharutejj intejj jalantqui ucacamaw puriraqui." 
Psalms19:5 Intisti jakechasir waynjamaw utapat mistuni: jaläwin atipt'asir jakjamaw thaquip jali. 
Psalms19:6 Intejj maysa thiyat uñstani, maysa thiyar puriñcamaw muyti: janiw cunas lupi junt'upat imantascaspati." 
Psalms19:7 Tatitun arsutanacapajj chekapawa, jaken chuymapar machakaptayiriwa; Tatitun arunacapajj asquiwa, jan yatiñan jaker yatiñan tucuyiriwa;" 
Psalms19:8 Tatitun camächit arunacapajj chekapawa, chuymar cusisiyiriwa; Tatitun arsutanacapajj k'omawa, nayranacar khan chuririwa." 
Psalms19:9 Tatitur ajjsartañajj k'omawa, wiñayatac utt'atawa; Tatitun arsutanacapajj chekawa, takpach ucanacajj asquiraquiwa;" 
Psalms19:10 korit sipan juc'amp muncayawa, suma korit sipan juc'ampiwa; chhuyu misq'it sipan juc'amp mojjsawa." 
Psalms19:11 Ucatpï uywatamajj arunacam sum yatjjatejja, arunacam imañajj asquinac jicjjatañawa." 
Psalms19:12 ¿Qhitirac pantasitanacap yatisti? Tatay, imantat juchanacajjat k'omachjjeta," 
Psalms19:13 jach'a jach'a tucuñ chuym apakt'asita, janiquiy jach'a jach'a tucuñampejj atipjayistati. Uqhamat jan juchan jakerojj tucü; jach'a juchat khespiraquï." 
Psalms19:14 Tatay, arsutajjajj jumar cusisiyquirïpan, chuymajjan lup'itapajj nayrakatamcam purinpan, jumaw imantasiñ karkajjätajja, khespiyirejjätasa." 
Psalms20:1 Tatitojj llaquisiñaman jumarojj ist'pan, Jacobon pachpa Diosapajj jumar arjjatpan;" 
Psalms20:2 kollan chekawjatpach yanap apayanpan, Sión kollutpach jumarojj yanappan;" 
Psalms20:3 takpach loktäwinacamat jupajj amtaspan, wilañcha loktatanacamajj jupar cusisiypan;" 
Psalms20:4 chuymaman munataparjam phokpan, take amtäwinacam phokhasiypan." 
Psalms20:5 Atipjatamat takpachaniw cusisipjjä, Diosasan sutiparusti wiphalanac qhiwtapjjä, ¡Tatitojj takpach mayisitanacamar jaysacpanaya!" 
Psalms20:6 Jichhacuchaw yattjja: Tatitojj ajllit reyiparuw atipjayi, kollan alajjpachatpach juparojj ist'i, atipir amparapamp muspharcañanac luri." 
Psalms20:7 Yakhepanacajj nuwasiñ carronacaruw alcatapjje, yakhanacasti walja caballonacaruw chuym uchapjje; jiwasanacasti Tatit Diosasaruw art'asipjjtan." 
Psalms20:8 Jupanacajj tincurayataw uñjasipjje, jiwasanacasti ch'amaniw sayt'asisipctan." 
Psalms20:9 Tatay, ¡reyirojj atipjañ ch'am churaquimaya! ¡Mayisipcäm ucapachasti, ist'apjjaquitaya!" 
Psalms21:1 ¡Tatay, reyejj ch'am churatamat walpun cusisi, atipjayatamat wali cusisitawa!" 
Psalms21:2 Munataparjamaw phoktajja; mayisitanacaparuw ist'aractajja. 
Psalms21:3 Jach'a asquinac churasaw jupar catoktajja, p'ekeparusti suma kori pillumpiw asjjattajja." 
Psalms21:4 Jupajj jacañ mayisïyätam, jumasti jacañ churtajja, walja maranac jacañampi, jan tucusir jacañamp catuytajja." 
Psalms21:5 Yanapt'am laycuw jupajj ch'aman uñjasi, aytat jakeruw tucuytajja, asqui jakeruw tucuyaractajja." 
Psalms21:6 Jan tucusquir asquinac jupar churtajja, jupamp chic sarnakatam laycuw cusisiñamp phokhanttajja." 
Psalms21:7 Jumasti reyejjay, janipuniw tinccätati, Tatitur takpach chuymamp iyawsatam laycu; ¡Alajjpachanquirin munasiñaparojj jan payachasisaw iyawstajja!" 
Psalms21:8 Ch'eka amparamajj takpach timanacamaruw catuntani, cupi amparamasti uñisirinacamaruw catjaraquini:" 
Psalms21:9 taripañatac uñstcät ucapachajj, parintat hornorjamaw jakontäta. Tatitojj k'apisiñapampiw ninamp naqhantayani." 
Psalms21:10 Jumaw acapachat chhaktayäta, jakenac taypitsti, allchhinacaparuw chhaktayaraquïta." 
Psalms21:11 Ñankha lurañs munapkchïtamjja, jan walinac lurañs amtapcchïtamjja, janiw camachapcätamsa;" 
Psalms21:12 jumaw chhuqhutatayañcamajj arctäta, arcomampiw jupanacarojj wact'ayañ munäta." 
Psalms21:13 ¡Tatay, ch'amamampiy sayt'asim! ¡nanacasti k'ochunacampiw atipjäwimat cusisipjjä!" 
Psalms22:1 Diosajjay, Diosajjay, ¿cunatarac jaytanucustasti?, ¿cunatarac khespiyirist jan jutistasti?, ¿cunatarac arnakasitajjar jan ist'tasti?" 
Psalms22:2 Diosajjay, uruw arnakasinsma, jumasti janiw ist'quistati; arumaw art'asinsma, jumasti janiw yäkquistati. ¡Janiw nayataquejj samart'añajj utjquiti!" 
Psalms22:3 Jumasti kollanätawa; jumaw Israel marcan jach'añchatätajja. 
Psalms22:4 Nayra awquinacajjajj jumaruw iyawsapjjäyätam, jupanacarusti khespiytawa;" 
Psalms22:5 jumaruw arnakasipjjäyätam, jupanacasti khespiyataw uñjasipjjäna, jumaruw take chuymamp arnakasipjjäyätam, jumasti janiw inamay suyayctati." 
Psalms22:6 Nayasti janiw jakëcti, lak'oquïtwa, jaken p'enkachañaquïtwa, jakenacan jisc'achañaquïtwa;" 
Psalms22:7 nayar uñjirinacajj larusipjjetuwa, cunayman nayataquejj uñanakapjje, p'ekep qhiwisipjje," 
Psalms22:8 jupanacasti sapjjaraquiwa: “Aca jakejj Tatiturojjay alcatchïnjja; Tatituy jichhajj khespiypan; juparojjay munchïnjja, khespiypanaya” sasa." 
Psalms22:9 Jumaw taycajjan puracapat yuriyista; ñuñupar samart'ayasaw uywasista; 
Psalms22:10 janïr yurquirpachat uñjasista, taycajjan puracapatpach nayan Diosajjätajja." 
Psalms22:11 Janiquiy nayat jayarst'istati, t'akhesiñar jalantirpachätwa, janiw qhiti yanapt'iris utjquituti." 
Psalms22:12 Uñisirinacajjajj toronacjamaw muyuntitu, Basán oraken wajjrasir toronacjamaw chhucjjatitu," 
Psalms22:13 leonanacar uñtataw wararipjje, lacanacap jist'arataw chhuct'anipjjetu." 
Psalms22:14 Nayasti waranucut umjamätwa, ch'aqhanacajjajj khakhanucutcamaquiwa; chuymajjasti liq'ir uñtataw naya mankhan umatati;" 
Psalms22:15 mallk'ajjajj tejar uñtat wañcatatawa, lajjrajjas laca mankhan lip'catatawa; ¡jiwañ lak'ar puriyañcamaw jakontistajja!" 
Psalms22:16 Jan wali jakenacajj anunacjamaw muyuntitu, ñankha lurir tama jakew uyuchrantitu: amparanacajjamp cayunacajjamp chhojjriñchapjjetu," 
Psalms22:17 ch'aqhanacajjas jaqhuñjamäjjewa. Timanacajjasti atipjasajj jan phisayaw uñch'uquipjjetu," 
Psalms22:18 jupanaccamaw isinacajj jalanokasipjje, patjja isejj catusiñataquisti suerte jaktapjje." 
Psalms22:19 Jumasti, Tatay, nayar ch'amañchirïtam laycojj, janiquiy nayat jayancamti; janc'aquiy nayar yanapt'irejj jutam." 
Psalms22:20 Espadamp jiwañat khespiyita, anunacan amparapat jacañajjar khespiyam;" 
Psalms22:21 leonanacan lacapat jarc'aketa, toronacan wajjranacapat tuwaketa." 
Psalms22:22 Nayasti jilanacajjaruw jumat yatiyä, tantachasïwinacapan jach'ar aptäma." 
Psalms22:23 Tatitur alcatirinaca, Diosaruy jach'ar aptapjjam. ¡Jacobon wawanacapa, juparuy jach'añchapjjam! ¡Israelan wawanacapa, juparuy yupaychapjjam!" 
Psalms22:24 Jupajj janiw jan utjirin jakenacarojj jisc'achquiti, janiw jupanacat ajjtasquiti; janiraquiw jupanacataquejj ajanup imantasquiti: yanap mayipqui ucapachajj, jupajj ist'iwa." 
Psalms22:25 Arsutam phokherïtamat marcam taypin jach'añchäma, arsutanacajjsti iyawsirinacam nayrakatan phokharaquï." 
Psalms22:26 T'akhesiyat jakenaca, sist'asiñcam mank'apjjam, Tatitur thakerinaca, jupar jach'añchapjjam: walja maranac jacapjjaraquim." 
Psalms22:27 Takpach jakenaca, takpach marcanaca, acapach tucuscam jaquir jakenaca: Tatitut amtasipjjam, jupar maqhatjjapjjam; nayrakatapar konkort'asipjjam." 
Psalms22:28 Tatituw marcanac apnaker reyejja, jupaw take marcanacarojj apnake." 
Psalms22:29 Nayrakatapan alt'apjjam, juparuc yupaychapjjam, jilarquir utjirin jakenaca, lak'ar tucur jakenaca, jumanac pachpajj janiw jacañanïpctati." 
Psalms22:30 Wawanacajjajj Tatituruw yupaychapjjani, jupjjatsti wiñayaw parlapjjani;" 
Psalms22:31 jupanac khepat yuririnacarusti, Tatitun chekapar uñjirïtapat yatiyapjjani, asqui luratanacapat yatiyapjjaraquini." 
Psalms23:1 Tatituw awatirejjajja, janiw cunats t'akhescäti:" 
Psalms23:2 suma ch'ojjña pastonacaruw samart'ayitu; k'oma uma thiyanacaruw awatitu," 
Psalms23:3 jupaw machak ch'am churitu, cheka thaquinjam irpitu, sutipar jach'añchañ laycu." 
Psalms23:4 Ajjsarcay lajja ch'amac chekawja sarcasasa, janiw cunarus ajjsarcäti, nayamp chic saratam laycu: lawamasa, thujrumasa, ch'am churitani." 
Psalms23:5 Uñisirinacajjan uñjcañaw mank'añ waquicharapista, k'apquir kollampiw p'ekejjat jawintista, vasojjasti phokharasquiwa." 
Psalms23:6 Munasiñamamp qhuyapayasiñamampejj sapürupuniw nayamp chicäsqui, Tatay, utamansti wiñayapuniw jacä." 
Psalms24:1 Takpach orakejj Tatitunquiwa, ucan utjirinacas jupanquiwa, takpach jaquirinacas jupancaraquiwa." 
Psalms24:2 Jupaw aca orakerojj lamar kotjjar utt'ayi, jupaw jawiranacjjarojj utt'ayaraqui." 
Psalms24:3 ¿Qhitirac Tatitun kollupar maqhataspasti? ¿Qhitirac kollan templopancaspasti? 
Psalms24:4 Juch jan lurir amparanacan jakew ucancaspa, k'oma chuyman jakew ucancaspa, yakha diosanacar jan yupaychir jakew ucancaspa, c'ari juramento jan lurir jakew ucancaraquispa." 
Psalms24:5 Jupaw Tatitun asquinacap catokani, Khespiyir Diosajj chekaparuw uñjaraquini." 
Psalms24:6 Uqhamäñapaw Tatitur thakerinacajja, Jacobon Diosapamp utjasiñatac thakerinacajja." 
Psalms24:7 ¡Wiñay puncunaca!, jist'artapjjam, nayrapach jist'añanacajj jist'araspan: khapak marcanquir Reyisti mantaniwa." 
Psalms24:8 ¿Qhitirac khapak marcanquir Reyisti? Take ch'aman atipir Tatituwa, nuwasïwin jan ajjsarir Tatituwa." 
Psalms24:9 ¡Wiñay puncunaca, jist'artapjjam!, nayrapach jist'añanacajj jist'araspan: khapak marcanquir Reyisti mantaniwa." 
Psalms24:10 ¿Qhitirac khapak marcanquir Reyisti? ¡Take atipir Tatituwa! ¡Jupaw khapak marcanquir Reyejja! 
Psalms25:1 Tatay, jumaruw mayisinsma;" 
Psalms25:2 Diosajjay, jumaruw take chuymamp alcatsma: janiquiy p'enk tucuñar jalantañajj munamti, janirac timanacajjas nayat larusipjjetpati;" 
Psalms25:3 jumar take chuymamp alcatirinacajj janipuniw p'enk tucupcaniti, ina ch'usat jumar kallasir jakenacasti, p'enka tucuñaruw puripjjani." 
Psalms25:4 Tatay, thaquim uñacht'ayita, thaquiman irpnakasita," 
Psalms25:5 jumat jan jithektas sarnakayita; jumaw Diosajjätajja, Khespiyirejjätasa, jumaruw take chuymamp sapür suyt'ascsma." 
Psalms25:6 Tatay, amtasiquimaya, munasiñamampi, qhuyapayasiñamampejj wiñayapuniwa;" 
Psalms25:7 janiquiy jucha luratanacajjat amtasimti, janirac wayna cancañajjan ñankha luratanacajjat amtasimti; Tatay, qhuyapayasiñam laycuy nayat amtasita, munasiñam laycurac amtasita." 
Psalms25:8 Tatitojj asquiwa, chekaparaquiwa, jupaw jucharar jakenacarojj asqui thac uñachayi;" 
Psalms25:9 jupaw llamp'u chuymaninacarojj cheka thaquin irpi, jan yäkat jakenacaruw asqui cancañap uñachayaraqui." 
Psalms25:10 Tatitojj qhuyapayasiñamp asqui cancañampipuniw irpi, arusjäwipamp arsutanacapamp imir jakenacarojja." 
Psalms25:11 Tatay, juchanacajjajj waljapuniwa, sutiman jach'ätap laycuy takpach juchanacajjat pampachita." 
Psalms25:12 Tatitur wakaychir jakerojj, arcañ thaqui uñacht'ayi:" 
Psalms25:13 asquinacampiw juparojj muyuntayi, wawanacaparusti orak catokasjjañapataquiw churjje." 
Psalms25:14 Tatitojj arquirinacapampejj sum parlasi; jupanacarusti arusjäwir mantatap uñt'ayi. 
Psalms25:15 Nayajj Tatituruquipuniw uñtta, jupaw take jan walt'añanacat khespiyitu." 
Psalms25:16 Tatay, uñtaniquitaya, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, sapaquiw uñjasta, llact'ataraquïtwa;" 
Psalms25:17 chuymajjajj juc'ampipuniw llaquisi, take llaquinacajjat irpst'asita." 
Psalms25:18 Llaquinacajjaru, ch'ama tucutanacajjar uñtanim, take juchanacajjat pampacharaquita;" 
Psalms25:19 timanacajjan waljanïtap uñtanim, jiwayañ chuymampiw uñisipjjetu." 
Psalms25:20 Arjjatasiquitaya, jiwañat khespiyaquitaya, janiquiy p'enk tucuñar jalantañajj munamti nayajj jumamp arjjatayasiñataquiw thaksma." 
Psalms25:21 Asqui cancañajjampi, cheka cancañajjampejj arjjatapjjetpan, jumar take chuymamp iyawsatajj laycu." 
Psalms25:22 Diosajjay, Israel marcarojj take t'akhesiñanacapat khespiyaquimaya." 
Psalms26:1 Tatay, chekaparuy uñjita, jacañajjajj jan camscayawa. Tatay, jumaruw takpach chuymamp iyawssma," 
Psalms26:2 chuymajjaruy uñantam, take lup'itanacajjar yant'am, chuymajj mankhan amtatanacajjarus uñantaraquim;" 
Psalms26:3 qhuyapayasiñamajj nayampïsquiwa, nayasti arunacamat jan jithektasaw sarnakta." 
Psalms26:4 Janiw c'ari jakenacampejj kont'ascti, janiraquiw ch'ojjña chuyman jakenacampis chicachascti;" 
Psalms26:5 ñankha lurir jakenacan tantachasïwinacaparojj uñistwa, janipuniw ñankha luririnacampejj utjascti." 
Psalms26:6 Tatay, amparanacajjas k'omachataw maqhatansma, juchajjats pampachataw altaramar jac'achasinsma," 
Psalms26:7 jach'añchañ k'ochunac k'ocht'asisa, muspharcañ luräwinacam yatiyasa." 
Psalms26:8 Tatay, kollan utamarojj munastwa, khapak cancañamajj ucanquiwa." 
Psalms26:9 Janiquiy jucharar jakenacarjamajj jacañajj apakestati, janirac jake jiwayirinacarjamas puriyistati," 
Psalms26:10 jupanacan ch'eka amparapajj ñankha lurañanac apt'atawa, cupi amparapasti kollke chilltañanac catt'atawa." 
Psalms26:11 Sarnakäwejjasti jan cun camscayawa; nayar khespiyt'asita, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita." 
Psalms26:12 Cayojjajj ch'ollkhe orakjjar suma tact'atawa, ¡Tatiturojj kollan marcap taypin jach'añchä!" 
Psalms27:1 Tatituw khanajjasa, khespiyasiñajjasa, ¿qhitirurac ajjsarästi? Tatituw jacañajjar arjjati, ¿cunarurac ajjsarästi?" 
Psalms27:2 Ñankha lurir jakenacasa, timanacajjas mayachthapisipjjewa, nayar chhucjjatasin jiwayañataqui; ucampis jupanacaquiw lanctasjjapjje, tincjjapjjaraqui." 
Psalms27:3 Nuwasir tamas nayatac tantachasiscpan, chuymajjajj janiw qhathatcaniti; nayar jaljjatañataquis waquichasisipcpan, janiw nayajj llaquiscäti." 
Psalms27:4 Tatitut mä mayisiñajjaquiw utji, ucaquirac thakä: jacañ urunacajjan utapan utjasiña; utapan jupar yupaychañataqui, khapak cancañap uñjasin cusisiñataqui." 
Psalms27:5 Jan walt'añ urunac purincan ucapachajj, Tatituw utapan imantitani; ch'iwipampiw imjjäsitani; mä karka patjjaruw sayt'ayitani," 
Psalms27:6 ucapachaw p'ekejj waytä, muyuntir timanacajjar aynacht'ayasa. Ucapachaw utapan loktäwinac churä, cusisiñat wararï, Tatituruw cusisiñamp k'ochuraquï." 
Psalms27:7 Tatay, jumaruw arnakasinsma, ist'aquitaya, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, jaysaquitaya." 
Psalms27:8 Chuymajjajj situwa: “Tatitun ajanup thakam.” Nayasti, Tatay, ajanum thakta." 
Psalms27:9 Janiquiy ajanum nayatac imantasimti, janiquiy k'apisiñamp jakonucustati, jumaquiw nayan arjjatirejjätajja; janiquiy sapac jaytanucustati, janirac jan arjjatirin antutistati, jumätaw Diosajjajja, khespiyirejjasa." 
Psalms27:10 Awquejjas, taycajjas apanucchitanejja, Tatituw nayarojj uywasquitani." 
Psalms27:11 Tatay, thaquim uñacht'ayita, cheka thaquiman irpita, timanacan nayatac utjatap laycu." 
Psalms27:12 Janiquiy timajjan amparaparojj catuyistati, nayataquejj c'ari ircatirinacaw sarti, khoru jakenacaw sartaraqui." 
Psalms27:13 Nayasti jacañ oraken Tatitump cusisiñataquiw suyt'ascta. 
Psalms27:14 Tatitur takpach chuymamp iyawsam, ch'amañchasim, jan ajjsaramti, ¡Tatitur takpach chuymamp iyawsam!" 
Psalms28:1 Arjjatir Tatitojjay, jumaruw art'asinsma, janiquiy mayisitajjar jan ist'irejj tucumti; janitejj ist'quitasmajja, jiwatanacamp chicäjjeristwa." 
Psalms28:2 Yanap mayiscsma ucapachajj arnakasitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, amparanacajj kollan utam uñcatat aytancta ucapachajj jaysaquitaya." 
Psalms28:3 Janiquiy khoru jakenacamp chicajj apistati, janirac ñankha luririnacampis chicachasiyistati, laka chuymaquiw jake masipamp sumanquirejj tucupjje, chuymapasti ñankhan phokhantatawa." 
Psalms28:4 Luratanacaparjam jupanacarojj uñjam, jan wali sarnakäwiparjam uñjaraquim; jan wali luratanacaparjam mutuyam, ñankha lurataparjam juchañcham." 
Psalms28:5 Jupanacajj janiw Diosan luräwinacapat amtasipquiti, janiw luratanacapat yatiñ munapquiti, jupay jan mayampitac jupanacar tucjpan." 
Psalms28:6 ¡Tatitojj kollanäpan, jupaw mayisitajjarojj ist'i!" 
Psalms28:7 Tatituw ch'amajjajja, arjjatirejjasa: juparuw takpach chuymamp iyawsta, jupasti yanapt'ituwa. Chuymajjajj cusisitawa, Tatituruw k'ochü, yuspagararaquï." 
Psalms28:8 Tatituw marcapar ch'amañchirejja, juparaquiw ajllit reyipar yanapirisa, arjjatirisa." 
Psalms28:9 Tatay, marcamarojj khespiyaquimaya, jumar iyawsirinacar asquinac churam; awatirir uñtat jupanacar uñjam, ¡wiñayapun amparamampejj irpam!" 
Psalms29:1 Diosan wawanacapa, Tatitur yupaychapjjam, khapak cancañaparusa, ch'amaparus jach'añchapjjam," 
Psalms29:2 Tatitun khapak sutip jach'ar aptapjjam, kollan utapan Tatitur yupaychapjjam." 
Psalms29:3 Tatitun arupajj lamar kotan ist'asi, khapak cancañan Diosajj khojjokeyiwa; Tatitojj jach'a lamar kotjjan ist'asiyi." 
Psalms29:4 Tatitun arupajj wali ch'amaniwa, Tatitun arupajj muspharcayawa." 
Psalms29:5 Tatitun arupajj cedro kokanac tincsuyi, Tatitojj Líbano orakenquir cedro kokanac jiq'inucu." 
Psalms29:6 Líbano kollunacarojj toronacarjamaw t'isctayi, Sirión kollunacarusti vaca kallurjamaw thoktayaraqui." 
Psalms29:7 Tatitun arupajj take tokeruw nina lawrayi; 
Psalms29:8 Tatitun arupajj wasararuw qhathatiyi, Tatituw Cades wasararojj qhathatiyaraqui." 
Psalms29:9 Tatitun arupajj encina kokanac qhiwiliyi, ch'uminacsti jan kokan tucusiyaraqui. Kollan utapan takeniw jupar jach'añchapjje." 
Psalms29:10 Tatituw jallurojj apnake, jupaw wiñay reyjamajj kont'asi." 
Psalms29:11 Tatituw marcaparojj ch'am churi, jupaw marcaparojj sumancañ churi." 
Psalms30:1 Tatay, jumaruw jach'añchsma, nayar khespiyatamata, timanacajjan nayat larusiñapjja, janiw munctati." 
Psalms30:2 Dios Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumasti waliptayistawa." 
Psalms30:3 Tatay, jumaw wiñay jiwañat irpsustajja, wiñay jiwañar mantquirit jactayistajja." 
Psalms30:4 Tatitun arquirinacapa, jupar k'ochupjjam, kollan sutipar yuspagarapjjam;" 
Psalms30:5 k'apisiñapajj mä juc'ataquiquiwa, munasiñapasti wiñayataquiwa; jayp'u tokerutejj jachañajj puristanejja, willjta tokerojj cusisiñaw utj- jjestani." 
Psalms30:6 Nayajj walin jicjjatasisajj säyätwa: “Janipuniw cunas tincuyquitaniti” sasa. 
Psalms30:7 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamaw nayarojj thuruñchitäna, aytat cancañamampi, ch'amamampi; ucampis ajanum nayatac imantasitam laycuw pächasiñar purta." 
Psalms30:8 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumaruw achict'asinsma:" 
Psalms30:9 ¿Cunarac jiwatajjamp jicjjatasmasti?, ¿cunarac sepulturar mantatajjampist apsusmasti? Lak'ajj janiw yuspagarquiristamti, janiraquiw asqui cancañamats parlcaspati." 
Psalms30:10 Tatay, ist'aquitaya, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, Tatay, nayar arjjatirejj jutaquimaya." 
Psalms30:11 Jachañajjarojj cusisiñaruw quipstaytajja, llaqui is apakasinjja, cusisiñ isimpiw isthapiyistajja;" 
Psalms30:12 Dios Tatay, ucat ajayojjajj jan amuct'as jach'añchañ k'ochunac k'ochuni, jumarusti wiñayaw yuspagaräma." 
Psalms31:1 Tatay, jumaruw maqhatansma: janiquiy chuyma mayjt'at uñjasiyistati; jumajj chekapar uñjirïstajjaya, khespiyasiquitaya," 
Psalms31:2 naya tokeruy jinchum alcatanita, janc'aquiy nayar khespiyirejj jutita, nayan imantasiñ karkajjaruy tucum, khespiyasiñ utajjaruy tucuraquim," 
Psalms31:3 jumaw arjjatir karkajjätajja imantasiñ utajjätasa. Sutim laycuy irpita, imaraquita." 
Psalms31:4 Sipit uchatanacat waysuta, jumaquïtaw nayan arjjatirejjajja." 
Psalms31:5 Amparamaruw ajayojj catuysma: Tatay, cheka Diosay, khespiyasiquitaya." 
Psalms31:6 Jumajj acapach diosanacar yupaychirinacarojj uñistawa, nayasti Tatituruw take chuymamp iyawsta;" 
Psalms31:7 qhuyapayasiñam laycuw cusista, c'uchirasiracta. Jumaw llaquinacajj amuyistajja, jacañajjan chijinacap uñjaractajja;" 
Psalms31:8 janiw uñisirejjan amparapar catuyquistati, suma thaquiruw cayunacajj tact'ayistajja." 
Psalms31:9 Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, jan walt'añar jalantirjamätwa: nayranacajjajj llaquimp ch'amact'atawa, takpach janchejjasa, chuymajjas tucusisquiwa." 
Psalms31:10 Jacañajjajj llaquimpiw aynacht'asqui, sarnakañ urunacajjajj aykoñampiw tucusisqui; ch'amajjajj llaquinacampiw t'uqhasisqui, janchejjas tucusiscaraquiwa." 
Psalms31:11 Takpach timajjataquejj larusiñaquëjjtwa, uta jac'a masejjataquis sawcasiñaquëjjtwa, nayar uñt'irinacataquis ajjsarcañätwa, nayar uñjasajj cawqhans jaltjjapjjaquiwa." 
Psalms31:12 Jiwatarjamaw armanucjjapjjetu, jiq'illitar uñtataquëjjtwa." 
Psalms31:13 Jakenacan c'achhat parlasitanacap ist'twa, take cunaw ajjsarayitu; mayar tuct'asaquiw nayar aynacht'ayañataquejj amuyt'apjje, ¡nayar jiwayañataquiw amtapjjaraqui!" 
Psalms31:14 Nayasti, Tatay, jumaruw take chuymamp alcatsma: “Jumaw nayan Diosajjätajja” saracsmawa." 
Psalms31:15 Jacañajjajj amparamanquiwa: nayar arcnaker timanacajjat khespiyita; 
Psalms31:16 uywatamarojj qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim, munasiñam laycuy khespiyita." 
Psalms31:17 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, janiquiy p'enka tucuñar nuct'istati; ñankha lurir jakenacar p'enk tucuyam, ch'usa mankhapachar mantapjjañapatac aynacht'ayam." 
Psalms31:18 C'arisir lajjranacajj amutur tucupjjpan, asqui jakenacar chuym usuyapjjatapata, jach'achasiñampi, jisc'achasiñamp uñjapjjatapata." 
Psalms31:19 Tatay, jumar wakaychirinacataquejj jach'a munasiñ imaraptajja, jumar maqhatirinacarusti taken uñjcañaw qhuyapayasiñam uñachaytajja;" 
Psalms31:20 jupanacamp chic utjatam laycuw ñankha luririnacan jan wali amtäwinacapat khespiytajja; timanacapamp jan tokeyañataquisti utamaruw jupanac imanttajja. 
Psalms31:21 Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan, jupajj llaquisiñ urunacajjanjja, munasiñapampiw muspharcañanac lurarapitu." 
Psalms31:22 Llaquimp atipjatajj säyätwa: “Tatitojj nayrakatapat jakonucjjetuwa” sasa; jumar arnakasinsma ucapachasti, art'asitajjarojj ist'istawa." 
Psalms31:23 Tatitur iyawsirinaca, jupar munasipjjam: Tatitojj asqui arquirinacaparojj imiwa, jach'a jach'a tucurinacarusti lurataparjamaruw juchañchi." 
Psalms31:24 Tatitur suyt'irinaca, ch'amañchasipjjam, jan ajjsarir chuymanïpjjaraquim." 
Psalms32:1 Juchapat k'omachayasir jakejj cusisiñaniwa, ñankha luratanacapat pampachayasitap laycu." 
Psalms32:2 Ñankha jan amtir jakejj cusisiñaniwa, juchapat Tatitump jan ircatayasiñ utjatap laycu." 
Psalms32:3 Juchanacajj janïr arsusiñcamajj, janchejjajj c'achhat c'achhat aynacht'ascäna, jayp'untañcam aykotajj laycu." 
Psalms32:4 Amparamajj uruy arumaw t'akhesiyitu; lupin suwantir pankarjamaw wañsuracta. 
Psalms32:5 Ucampis jucha luratajjaw utjäna, uc amuyasta, ucat jucha luratanacajj jan imt'csmati; juchanacajj jumar arsusiñataquiw amtta, Tatay, jumasti juchanacajjat pampachista." 
Psalms32:6 Ucatpï jumar art'asir iyawsirinacamarojj jithir umanacas llumintcanejja, janiw camächcaniti." 
Psalms32:7 Jumaw imantasiñajjätajja: jan walt'añanacat khespiyista, atipjäwi k'ochunacampiw muyuntayaraquista." 
Psalms32:8 Tatitojj situwa: “Nayranacajjajj jumaruw uñch'uquisctam, nayaw yatichascäma, nayaw amuyt'ayascäma, nayaw sarañamäqui uca thac uñachayascäma." 
Psalms32:9 Jumajj jan caballor uñtatämti, janirac mular uñtatämsa: ucanacajj janiw amuyapcaspati, ajjaptayañataquejj jaquimump jiyiñampiw uchasi, jan uqham uchatajja, janiw jac'achasipquiristamti” sasa." 
Psalms32:10 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj llaquinacampiw t'akhesipjjani; Tatitur iyawsir jakenacarusti qhuyapayasiñapaw muyunti. 
Psalms32:11 Asqui jakenaca, Tatitump cusisipjjam, khana chuymaninaca, Tatitur cusisiñat jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms33:1 Asqui jakenaca: Tatitur art'asipjjam, asqui jakenacan yupaychäwipajj asquipuniwa;" 
Psalms33:2 Tatiturojj arpamp chic yuspagarapjjam, sutipar k'ochupjjaraquim;" 
Psalms33:3 machak k'ochump yupaychapjjam, juparojj wali sumpun jallallt'apjjam." 
Psalms33:4 Tatitun arunacapajj chekapawa, take luratanacapajj arsutap phokherïtap uñachayi;" 
Psalms33:5 Tatitojj asquimpir chekapampiruw munasi, qhuyapayasiñapajj orakpacharuw phokhanti." 
Psalms33:6 Tatitojj arupampiquiw alajjpach acapach luri; lacapan samanapaquiw take cun utjayi. 
Psalms33:7 Jupaw lamar kot umanac mayawjaruc tantachi, mayawjaruquiw lamar kotarojj jarc'jjäsi." 
Psalms33:8 Takpach orakejj Tatitur ajjsartpan, acapachan jaquirinacajj jupar wakaychapjjpan." 
Psalms33:9 Jupajj arupampiquiw take cun utjayi; arsutapampiquiw take cun luraraqui. 
Psalms33:10 Tatitojj ñankha lurir marcanacan amtatanacap t'unji, Tatitur jan iyawsir jakenacan amtatanacap aynacht'ayaraqui." 
Psalms33:11 Tatitun amtäwinacapasti wiñayataquiwa, amtatanacapajj take pachanacan sayt'i." 
Psalms33:12 Tatitut Diosanïqui uca marcajj cusisiñaniwa, jupatac ajllitäqui uca marcajj cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms33:13 Tatitojj alajjpachatpach uñtani, take jakenacaruw uñjaraqui;" 
Psalms33:14 acapachan takpach jaquir jakenacarojj utjäwipatpach uñch'uquisinqui," 
Psalms33:15 jupaw takenir amuy churi, juparaquiw take luräwinacap uñch'uquisqui." 
Psalms33:16 Janiw cawquïr reyis jach'a nuwasir tamanïtap laycu atipquiti, janiraquiw nuwasir jakes wali ch'amanïtap laycu khespquiti," 
Psalms33:17 janiw caballonacapajj atipañatac cunäquisa, janiraquiw walja tamanïtap laycus khespiyasquiti." 
Psalms33:18 Tatitusti iyawsirinacaparojj sum uñjasqui, qhuyapayasiñap suyt'irinacarojj imasquiwa," 
Psalms33:19 jiwan amparapat jupanacar khespiyañataqui, mach'a pachanacan chuymachañataqui." 
Psalms33:20 Jiwasanacajj Tatituruw take chuymamp iyawsapjjtan: jupaw arjjatirisajja, jarc'akerisasa." 
Psalms33:21 Jupampiw chuymanacasajj cusisi, kollan sutiparuw take chuymamp iyawsapjjtan." 
Psalms33:22 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamajj nanacjjar purinpan, camisatejj jumat suyapcsma uqhämarjama." 
Psalms34:1 Jan karjasisaw Tatiturojj jach'añchä, lacajjajj jupar jach'añchapuniniwa." 
Psalms34:2 Ajayojjajj Tatituncasaw cusisi: llamp'u chuymaninacajj ist'apjjpan, cusisipjjaracpan;" 
Psalms34:3 Tatitun jach'a cancañap takpachan jach'añchapjjañäni, sutip jach'ar aptapjjañäni." 
Psalms34:4 Tatituruw nayajj art'asta, jupasti take llaquinacat irpsutu;" 
Psalms34:5 jupar uñtapjjam, jumanacasti cusisipjjätawa, ajanunacamajj janiw p'enk tucupcaniti." 
Psalms34:6 Tatitur art'asir llaquit jakerojj, jupajj ist'iwa, take llaquinacapat waysuraqui." 
Psalms34:7 Tatitun angelapaw iyawsirinacarojj uñjasqui, Tatitur wakaychirinacarusti imascaraqui." 
Psalms34:8 Yant'apjjam, uñjapjjaraquim, Tatitun munasir cancañapa, jupar take chuymamp maqhatirejj cusisiñan jakewa." 
Psalms34:9 Jupan kollanañchat jakenacapa, Tatitur ajjsartapjjam, jupar ajjsartirinacarojj janiw cunas pist'caniti." 
Psalms34:10 Kamirinacajj jan cunaniruw tucupjje, mank'at t'akhesipjjaraqui, Tatitur thakerinacasti janiw cunats t'akhesipcaniti." 
Psalms34:11 Wawanacajjay, jutapjjam, ist'apjjeta: Tatitur ajjsartañ yatichapjjäma;" 
Psalms34:12 ¿walja maranac jacañ munasmati?, ¿take cunan phokt'at jacañ munasmati?" 
Psalms34:13 Ñankha arsuñat lajjram jarc'akam, c'ari arsuñat lacam jithektayam;" 
Psalms34:14 ñankha lurañat jithektasim, asquïc ucpun luram, sumancañ thakam, khepap arcaraquim." 
Psalms34:15 Tatitojj asqui jakenacaruw imasqui, arnakasitanacaparusti ist'araquiwa." 
Psalms34:16 Tatitojj ñankha luririnacataquiw sayt'i, aca oraket jupanacar chhaktayañataqui." 
Psalms34:17 Tatitojj asqui jaken arnakasitaparojj ist'iwa, take llaquinacapat waysuraqui." 
Psalms34:18 Tatitojj llaquimp aynacht'atanacan jac'apancasquiwa, jupanacar khespiyañataqui, aynacht'at chuymanacap waytañataqui." 
Psalms34:19 Asqui jakejj jan walinacamp t'akhescchi ucasa, Tatituw take ucanacat waysu;" 
Psalms34:20 jupaw takpach ch'aqhanacap imasqui, janiw mä ch'aqhapas p'acjatäcaniti." 
Psalms34:21 Ñankha lurir jakerojj pachpa ñankha luratapaw jiwayi, asqui jaker uñisirinacasti mutuyatäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms34:22 Tatitojj uywatanacaparojj khespiyiwa, jupar iyawsirinacajj janiw juchañchatäpcaniti." 
Psalms35:1 Tatay, nayar nuwañatac jaljjatirinacampejj jumay nuwasim, nayamp ch'ajjwirinacampejj jumay ch'ajjwam." 
Psalms35:2 Jarc'akasiñam catjjarusim, yanapt'iriy jutita;" 
Psalms35:3 lanzam qhiwirasim, nayar nuwañatac jaljjatirinacar jarc'antam; “Nayaw atipjayirimätjja” sitaya." 
Psalms35:4 Nayar jiwayañ munirinacajj, mä p'enkay atipjayasipjjpan, nayatac ñankha amtirinacasa, p'enkachat jaltjjapjjaracpan;" 
Psalms35:5 thayan apat jipir uñtatäpjjpan; Tatitun angelapan jakonucut uñjasipjjpan; 
Psalms35:6 thaquipajj ch'amacäpan, llust'araquïpan, Tatitun angelapamp arctat uñjasipjjpan." 
Psalms35:7 Ina ch'usat nayataquejj sipit waquichapjje, jiwañ p'iyanac jalantañajjatac jist'japjje:" 
Psalms35:8 chijejj acatjamat jupanacar catuntpan, pachpa sipitanacapamp simpantat uñjasipjjpan, pachpa chijir jalantapjjaracpan." 
Psalms35:9 Nayasti Tatitumpiw cusisï, nayar khespiyatapat cusisï." 
Psalms35:10 Takpach chuymajjampiw arsü: “Tatay, ¿qhitirac jumjam utjisti?, munañan jaket jan yäkat jaker arjjattajja, ch'am apjir jaket jan cunan jakeruw khespiytajja.”" 
Psalms35:11 C'ari ircatirinacaw nayataquejj uñsti: ina ch'usatpun juchañchapjjetu," 
Psalms35:12 asqui luratajjatjja, jan walimpiw cutiyapjjetu, walpun llaquisiyaraquitu." 
Psalms35:13 Nayajj jupanacar usuntir uñjasajja, walpun llaquisïyäta, qhanqha isimpiw isthapisïyäta, janiw mank'cäyätsa, chuyma mankhejjansti, janiw Diosat mayirapiñ karjascäyätti." 
Psalms35:14 Uñt'at masitjama, jilajjatjam llaquit sarnakäyäta; taycajjas jiwcaspajj uqhamaw chuyma cawcst'at jacäyäta." 
Psalms35:15 Nayar lanctasir uñjasasti cusisipjjewa, janis uñt'atäquirist uqham uñjapjjetu, jan karjasisaw nuwjapjjetu." 
Psalms35:16 Khoru cancañampiw nayat sawcasipjjetu, uñisiñat laca ch'aqhanacap t'urusirapipjjetu." 
Psalms35:17 Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac uqhamac uñch'uquïtasti? Jacañajjarojj khespiyaquimaya, wararisquir leonanacat jacañajj antutnucuyam," 
Psalms35:18 nayasti kollan tantachasïwin yuspagaräma, warank warank jakenac taypin jach'ar aptäma." 
Psalms35:19 Timanacajjajj janiquiy nayat larusipjjitpati, uñisirinacajjajj janiquiy nayranacap nayatac ch'irmisipjjpati," 
Psalms35:20 janiw jupanacajj suman jacasiñ thakapquiti, jupanacajj sallkantañanac amtasipqui; suman jacasir jakenac contraw sayt'apjje," 
Psalms35:21 wali jach'at nayat larusisajj arsupjje: “Uñtapjjam, nayrasampiw uñjtanjja” sasa." 
Psalms35:22 Tatay, jumaw take cun uñjtajja, janiquiy amuquïmti, janiquiy nayat jayancamti." 
Psalms35:23 Dios Tatay, p'arjjtasiquimaya, sartasiraquim, Tatay, chekaparuy uñjita." 
Psalms35:24 Dios Tatay, chekapar uñjañamampiy taripita, janiquiy nayat larusipjjetpati." 
Psalms35:25 Janiquiy jupanacajj amuyapjjpati, janirac sapjjpasa: “¡Waliquipuniwa! ¡Ucpï uñjañ munäyätanjja! Jichhajj jan mayampitaquiw aynacht'aytanjja” sasa." 
Psalms35:26 Llaquir puritajjat cusisirinacajj llaquiscay atipjayasipjjpan. Nayatac achusirinacajj p'enkachat sarnakapjjpan. 
Psalms35:27 Nayan atipañajj munirinacasti k'ochupjjpan, cusisipjjaracpan, jan karjasis arsupjjpan: “Tatitojj jach'a ch'amaniwa, uywatapar sum jacasir uñjasajj cusisiwa”, sasa." 
Psalms35:28 Lajjrajjampiw asqui cancañamat yatiyä, ¡sapüruw jach'ar aptaraquïma!" 
Psalms36:1 Ñankha lurir jakerojj ñankhaw chuymaparojj parli: Diosar ajjsartañatsti janipuniw amuyquiti. 
Psalms36:2 Jupajj aytat jakëcaspas uqhamaw amuyasi, janiw ñankha luratapan uñiscayätap amuyquiti." 
Psalms36:3 K'añu arunac parliriwa, c'ariraquiwa, suma amuy chhakayasjje, asqui lurañ apanucjje;" 
Psalms36:4 iquiñapan iquintataw jan wali lurañanac amti, ñankha lurañ thaquir chincatatawa, janiw ñankha lurañ apanucuñ munquiti." 
Psalms36:5 Tatay, munasiñamajj alajjpachcamaw puri, asqui cancañamasti alajjpachcamaw jict'asi," 
Psalms36:6 chekapar uñjañ cancañamajj jach'a kollunacjamawa, arsutanacamasti jach'a lamar umanacjamawa. Tatay, jumaw jakenacarusa, animalanacarus uñjasctajja." 
Psalms36:7 ¡Diosay, munasiñamajj muspharcayawa! Chhekhanacamamp imantayasiñataquiw jakenacajj jumar thakapjjtam," 
Psalms36:8 utaman utjir mank'ampejj sist'atäpjjewa, mojjsa uman jawirat umayaractajja:" 
Psalms36:9 juman jacquir umajj utji, khanamasti khan uñjayapjjetu." 
Psalms36:10 Jumar uñt'irinacarojj qhuyapt'ayascaquim, k'oma chuymaninacarusti chekapar uñjascaquim;" 
Psalms36:11 jach'a jach'a tucurin cayupajj jan taquisitpati, ñankha lurir jaken amparapas janirac jakonucutpati." 
Psalms36:12 Ñankha luririnacan aynacht'añap uñjapjjpan, jan mayampitac tincur uñjapjjaracpan." 
Psalms37:1 Ñankha lurir jakenacar uñjasajj jan k'apisimti, janirac ñankha luririnacarus yatjjäsimti," 
Psalms37:2 janc'aquiw jupanacajj alinacjam pharsupjjani, ch'ojjña korjamaw wañsupjjaraquini." 
Psalms37:3 Tatiturojj take chuymamp alcatam, asc luraraquim, oraken jacasim, chekaparac jacam;" 
Psalms37:4 Tatiturojj suma chuymamp munasim, jupasti chuyma mankheman mayisitamarjamaw churätam." 
Psalms37:5 Tatitun amparapar sarnakäwim catuyasim, jupar take chuymamp alcatam, jupasti yanapätamwa." 
Psalms37:6 Asqui cancañamarojj willjtar uñtat khantayani, asqui sarnakatamsti chicürjam khanayani." 
Psalms37:7 Tatitun nayrakatapan amuct'am; jupan yanapap llamp'u chuymamp suyam, ñankha lurir jaken atipjatapat jan k'apisimti; ñankhanac amtir jakets janirac mayjt'asimti." 
Psalms37:8 K'apisiñ apanucum, chuym ch'amact'ayasiñ jaytanucum, ñankha jan lurascañamataquejj jan k'apisimti," 
Psalms37:9 ñankha luririnacajj oraket jakonucutäpjjaniwa, Tatitur suyt'irinacasti oraken jacasipjjani." 
Psalms37:10 Acat mä juc'a urunacarojj ñankha lurir jakenacajj chhaktjjaniwa; jupanacar thakcätasa, janiw jicjjatcätati;" 
Psalms37:11 llamp'u chuymaninacasti orak catokapjjani, jilarquir sumancañampiw cusisipjjaraquini." 
Psalms37:12 Ñankha lurir jakejj, ñankha lurañ asqui jakerojj amti, jupataquejj uñisiñat laca ch'aqhap t'urusi;" 
Psalms37:13 Tatitusti jupat larusiwa, tucusiñ urup purinitap yati." 
Psalms37:14 Ñankha luririnacajj espadanacap apsusipjje, arconacap waquichrantasipjje, jan cunan jakenacar aynacht'ayañataqui, llamp'u chuymaninacar tincuyañataqui, chekap sarnaker jakenacar jiwayañataqui;" 
Psalms37:15 ucampis pachpa espadapaw chuymanacap chhokhontani, arconacapasti p'aquirasiniwa." 
Psalms37:16 Juc'a yänacan asqui jakejj juc'amp asquiwa, kamirïsin ñankha lurir jakenacat sipansa;" 
Psalms37:17 ñankha lurir jakenacarojj Tatituw tucusiyani, asqui jakenacarusti Tatituw uywasiraquini." 
Psalms37:18 Tatituw asqui jaken jacañ urunacap imasqui, catokäwipasti wiñayataquïniwa;" 
Psalms37:19 pisi maranacan janiw pist'ayasipcaniti, mach'a pachansti jilarquir mank'añanïpjjaniwa." 
Psalms37:20 Ñankha lurir jakenacasti tucusipjjaniwa, Tatitur uñisirinacajj alinacar uñtataw wañsupjjani, jiwk'er uñtataw chhaktapjjaraquini." 
Psalms37:21 Ñankha lurir jakejj mayt'asiñac yati, janiw cutiyañ yatquiti, asqui jakesti qhuyapt'ayasiriwa, suma chuymaniraquiwa." 
Psalms37:22 Tatitun kollanaptayat jakenacajj orak catokasipjjani, jupan ñankhachatanacasti jakonucutäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms37:23 Tatitojj jaken sarnakäwinacap sarayasqui, jupar cusisiyir thaquiruw ucharaqui," 
Psalms37:24 lanctasin ucasa, janiw tinccaniti, Tatituw amparapat wayjjäsisqui." 
Psalms37:25 Nayajj waynäyätwa, jichhasti niyaw ch'ama karitäjjta: janipuniw asqui jaker apanucut uñjcti, janiraquiw wawanacapar mayjasirs uñjcti." 
Psalms37:26 Asqui jakejj sapüruw qhuyapayasi, mayt'araqui, allchhinacapasti asqui catokäwïcaspas uqhamawa." 
Psalms37:27 Ñankha lurañat jithektasim, asc luraraquim, jacañamataquisti utajj utjapunïtamwa." 
Psalms37:28 Tatitojj asqui cancañar muniriwa, arquirinacaparojj janiw jaytanucquiti. Jucharar jakenacarusti tucjiwa, allchhinacaparus tucusiyaraquiwa." 
Psalms37:29 Asqui jakenacajj orak catokapjjani, wiñayataquiw ucan jacapjjaraquini." 
Psalms37:30 Asqui jakejj yatiñ cancañampiw parli, lajjrapajj chekap sarnakañ khanañchi." 
Psalms37:31 Diosapan leyinacap chuymapar catjjäsi, cayunacapasti janipuniw llust'caniti." 
Psalms37:32 Ñankha lurir jakejj asqui jakeruw uñch'uqui, jupar jiwayañ amtaraqui;" 
Psalms37:33 Tatitusti janiw amparapar jalt'ayquiti, janiraquiw taripäwin juchañchat uñjasiñap munquiti." 
Psalms37:34 Tatitur takpach chuymamp suyt'am, jupar jaysaraquim, jupaw orak catokañamataquejj ch'amañchätam, ñankha luririnacan t'unjasïwip uñjaraquïta." 
Psalms37:35 Ñankha lurir jakeruw jach'achasir uñjta, ch'ojjña kokjam jilantasquir uñjaracta;" 
Psalms37:36 uca khepat wasitat uñjir sarta, jupasti tucusjjataynawa, jupar thakasasti janiw jicjjatcti." 
Psalms37:37 Asqui jaker uñtam, suma jaker uñjam: jutir jacañapajj sumancañ jacañäniwa;" 
Psalms37:38 ñankha luririnacasti tucjatäpjjaniwa, jutir pachpa jacañapaw t'unjascani." 
Psalms37:39 Asqui jakenacajj Tatitut yanap catokapjje, juparaquiw jan walt'añ urunacan arjjatiripajja." 
Psalms37:40 Tatituw jupanacar khespiñ yanapi, khoru jakenacan amparapat jaltayi, khespiyaraqui, jupar takpach chuymamp thakapjjatap laycu." 
Psalms38:1 Tatay, janiquiy k'apisiñamp tokenokestati, janiquiy tipusiñamp mutuyistati;" 
Psalms38:2 mich'inacamajj nayaruw chhokhontitu, amparamajj walpun t'akhesiyitu;" 
Psalms38:3 janchejjajj takpach usuchjatawa, nayatac k'apisitam laycu; ch'aqhanacajjajj usuchjatawa, juchanac luratajj laycu." 
Psalms38:4 Juchanacajjajj sintipuniw jatjjattitu, ch'amajjajj janiw ucanacamp k'ewtasirjamäquiti;" 
Psalms38:5 jan amuyt'asirïtajj laycojj chhojjrinacajjajj ñusantasquiwa, thujsantascaraquiwa," 
Psalms38:6 sapürus llaquitaquiw sarnakta, p'ekejjas alt'atawa, jan amuyuniw uñjasta." 
Psalms38:7 Jiqhanejjajj ninjamaw naqhitu, janchejjajj janiw acch'as c'umaräquiti;" 
Psalms38:8 jan acch'a ch'amanïtwa, k'ala tucjataraquïtwa, chuymajjan aynacht'atap laycuw aykoracta." 
Psalms38:9 Tatitojjay, jumaw takpach amtatanacajjar uñt'tajja, janiw aykotanacajjajj jumatac imantasquiti;" 
Psalms38:10 chuymajjajj janc'aquipuniw putuke, janiw ch'amas utjquituti, janiraquiw nayrajjas uñjirjamäcjjeti." 
Psalms38:11 Uñt'at masinacajjasa, nayar uñt'irinacas jithektjjapjjetuwa, wila masinacajjas jayatac uñch'uquipjjetu;" 
Psalms38:12 nayar jiwayañ munirinacajj sipitanac ucharapipjjetu; aynacht'añajj munirinacasti jiwayañ munapjjetu, sapüruw nayataquejj achusipjje." 
Psalms38:13 Nayasti okaraw tucta, amutur uñtataw lacajj jan jist'arcti;" 
Psalms38:14 jan ist'ir jaker uñtatätwa, jan arsusir jakjamaraquïtwa." 
Psalms38:15 Dios Tatay, jumaruquiw nayajj suyt'sma, jumaquiy nayarojj ist'ita;" 
Psalms38:16 nayat jan larusipjjañapataquiw maysma, liwiscä ucapach jan cusisipjjañapataquiw achict'assma." 
Psalms38:17 Nayajj niy tincurjamätwa, llaquejjasti janipuniw apaktquituti." 
Psalms38:18 Take juchanacajj arsusta, ucanacaw walpun t'akhesiyitu." 
Psalms38:19 Timasirinacajjajj waljaniptiwa, ina ch'usat uñisirinacajjajj waljaniwa," 
Psalms38:20 asqui luratatjja jan walimpiw cutiyapjjetu, asqui lurañ munatajjatjja nayataquiw thoktasipjje." 
Psalms38:21 Tatay, janiquiy antutasistati, Diosajjay, janiquiy nayat jayancamti;" 
Psalms38:22 khispiyir Diosajjay, janc'aquiy yanapt'ir jutita." 
Psalms39:1 Nayajj sum sarnakañataquiw arsta, lajjrajjamp cuna juchsa jan arsuñataqui; lacajjar mä jarc'a uchantañataqui, uñisirejjan nayrakatapana." 
Psalms39:2 Nayasti amutuw tucüyäta; janiw cuns arscäyätti. ¡Janiw asquit cuna parlatajjas utjcänti! T'akhesiñajjasti juc'ampiw jiljjatäna," 
Psalms39:3 chuymajjajj ninjamaw naqhäna, ucjjat lup'isasti juc'amp naqhantitu, uqhäm uñjasisaw jach'at jupar art'asta:" 
Psalms39:4 “Tatay, cunjämatejj tucuscä ucay yatiyita, kawkhatejj jacañajjajj waquisqui ucay yatiyita, ¡kawkha juc'aquitejj jacañajjäqui uc yatisiñ munta!" 
Psalms39:5 Juc'a urunacac jacañajjatac churistajja, jacañ urunacajjajj janiw nayrakataman cunäquisa; jaken jacañapajj samanamp sasiquiwa," 
Psalms39:6 jaken jacañapajj ch'iwjamaquiwa; inamayaw yänacs arcuntasqui, janiw ucanac qhitin catuntasiñaps yatquiti." 
Psalms39:7 Jichhasti, Tatay, ¿cuna suyt'añajjarac utjisti? Jumaquiw nayan suyt'añajjätajja." 
Psalms39:8 Take juchanacajjat khespiyita, t'ajjmar jakenacan nayat larusiñap jan munamti." 
Psalms39:9 “Nayasti amutuw tucta, janiw lacajj jist'arcti, juman take cun sarayascatam yatta." 
Psalms39:10 Janiquiy nayarojj juc'amp t'akhesiyistati, amparaman ch'amapajj tucjasquituwa." 
Psalms39:11 Jumaw jakerojj juchapat mutuyasajj chekachtajja; thuthar uñtataw yänacap thuthanoktajja: jakejj mä samsump sasiquiwa. 
Psalms39:12 “Tatay, mayisitajjar ist'am, arnakasitajjar yäkam, janiquiy jachatajjataquejj okarar tucumti: nayajj juman jawst'ataquïtwa, nayrapach awquinacajj-jam sarir jakequïtwa." 
Psalms39:13 Mä juc'acamay samart'ayita, janïr nay sarquipana, janïr nay jiwquipana.”" 
Psalms40:1 Nayajj Tatituruw takpach chuymajjamp suyt'äyäta: jupasti naya toker alt'anisin arnakasitajjar ist'i; 
Psalms40:2 jiwañ p'iyat waysusitu, mic'ayar jalantquiriruw khespiyitu; karka patjjaruw cayunac tact'ayitu, tact'añajjaruw ch'amañchi." 
Psalms40:3 Machak k'ochu lacajjar uchitu, Diosajjar yupaychañ k'ochu. Uc uñjasajj waljaniw chuym ch'alljjtayasipjje, Tatiturusti take chuymampiw iyawsapjje." 
Psalms40:4 Takpach chuymamp Tatitur alcatirejj, cusisiñan jakewa, jupajj janiw kallasirinacar thakquiti, janiraquiw c'ari diosanacar yupaychirinacarus thakquiti." 
Psalms40:5 Dios Tatay, muspharcañ luratanacamajj waljawa, nanacat qhuyapayasitamas waljaraquiwa: janiw qhitis jumjamajj utjquiti. Ucanacjjat yatiyañ yant'ta, arsuñ yant'aracta, nayataquisti janiw jact'añjamäquiti." 
Psalms40:6 Janiw jumajj wilañchanacampejj cusisctati, janiraquiw loktanacas cusisiyctamti, janiw juch pampachañataquejj wilañchanac mayctati, ucatsipan nayarojj jinchunacajj jist'arista;" 
Psalms40:7 ucat nayajj sista: “Acancasctwa, munañam lurañataqui. Camisatejj kellkatajj nayjjat parlqui ucarjama." 
Psalms40:8 Dios Tatitojjay, munañam lurañaw cusisiyitu; yatichäwinacamajj chuymajjanquiwa.”" 
Psalms40:9 Marcam taypin khespiyäwimat yatiyta; Tatay, jumaquiw yattajja, janiw amuct'atajjajj utjquiti." 
Psalms40:10 Asqui cancañamat arsuñjja, janiw chuymajjar imantcti, arsutam phokherïtamampita, khespiyäwimampit yatiyta, jach'a tantachasïw taypinsti, janipuniw qhuyapayasiñamampita, asqui cancañamampit amuct'cti." 
Psalms40:11 Tatay, janiquiy chuymam nayatac jist'antasimti, qhuyapayasiñamamp asqui cancañamampejj imapunitpan," 
Psalms40:12 jan jact'cay llaquinacaw muyuntitu, juchanacajjaw jatjjattitu, janiw ucanac jact'irjamäcti; pachpa juchanacajjaw catuntitu, juyqhur uñtataw jicjjatasta. P'eke ñic'utajjat sipan juc'amp jilawa, ch'amasti pist'araquituwa." 
Psalms40:13 Tatay, nayar waytir jutaquimaya, Tatay, janc'aquiy nayar yanapt'irejj jutam;" 
Psalms40:14 nayar jiwayañatac thakerinacajj, p'enkpun atipjayasipjjpan; nayar ñankha lurañ amtirinacajj, mä p'enk jaltapjjpan;" 
Psalms40:15 nayat larusir jakenacajj, p'enkapat jaltjjapjjpan." 
Psalms40:16 Jumar thakerinacasti cusisipjjpan, jumamp chic larusipjjpan; khespiyäwimar munirinacajj arsupjjapunpan: “Tatitojj jach'a ch'amanipuniwa” sasa." 
Psalms40:17 Tatay, nayajj jan cunanïtwa, llaquitaraquïtwa, janiquiy nayat armasistati; jumaw nayan arjjatirejjätajja, khespiyasiñajjätasa: ¡Diosajjay, janc'aquiy jutam!" 
Psalms41:1 Jan cunan jakempiru, pisi ch'aman jakempir uñjirejj cusisiñan jakewa, Tatituw jan walt'añ urunacan juparojj khespiyani." 
Psalms41:2 Tatituw juparojj imasqui, jupaw acapachan jacayani, cusisiñ churaraquini, janiw timanacapan munañapar catuycaniti." 
Psalms41:3 Tatituw usuntäwipan ch'am churani, aykoñapsti juyartayaraquiniwa." 
Psalms41:4 Nayajj jupar sistwa: “Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, juch lurcta ucasa, q'umaracht'asita” sasa." 
Psalms41:5 Timasirinacajjajj juc'amp aynacht'añajj muni: “Jiwjjpan, sutipasti chhaktpan” sapjjewa." 
Psalms41:6 Nayar tumpir jutirejj laka chuymaquiw parlitu, jan wali amtäwip imanti, ankar mistusinsti ucjjat arsu." 
Psalms41:7 Uñisirinacajj tantachasisin mayar tuct'asaquiw achusipjje, juchajjats t'akhesquirist uqham amuyapjje." 
Psalms41:8 Ucat sapjje: “Jan kollkay ñankha usuniwa, jan mayamp sartañataquiw iquinti” sasa." 
Psalms41:9 Alcatañ uñt'at masejjamppacha, mank'añajjat mank'er jakemppachaw nayarojj ch'ojjñ luritu." 
Psalms41:10 Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, sartasiñajjatac yanapt'ita, amtäwinacaparjam nayan phoksuñajjataqui." 
Psalms41:11 Timasirejjajj jan atipjquitan ucapachaw yatï, juman nayar munasiscatamjja." 
Psalms41:12 Nayarusti chekap sarnakatajjatjja, amparamar catoketa, nayrakataman wiñay jacayaraquita." 
Psalms41:13 ¡Israelan Tatit Diosapajj jach'añchatäpan, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapansa! ¡Uqhamäpan!" 
Psalms42:1 Diosajjay, cunjämatejj tarujajj umat pharjatajj jalquir um thakquejja, uqhamaw almajjajj jumar thaktam." 
Psalms42:2 Nayajj jacquir Diosat pharjatätwa: ¿Cunapacharac Diosan ajanup uñjir mantästi? 
Psalms42:3 Urus arumas jachaquiw mank'añajjajja, ucchañcamasti urpachaw jisqhipjjetu: “¿Cawquincarac Diosamasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:4 Ucanacjjat amthapisisasti, jan chuymachcayaw wararta: Diosan utapar jakenacar irpatajjat amtasta, k'ochunacampi, yuspagarañanacampi. ¡Qhä urunacajj cusiscañ urunacänwa!" 
Psalms42:5 Almajjay, ¿cunatarac llacthapistasti?, ¿cunatarac ajjsarthaptasti? Diosaruc suyt'am, wasitat jach'añchjjäta: ¡Jupaw khespiyirejjasa, Diosajjasa!" 
Psalms42:6 Almajjajj llaquisqui ucapachajj jumat amtassma, Jordán jawiratpacha, Hermón, Mizar kollunacatpacha." 
Psalms42:7 Mic'ay mankhanacatpach ist'asi, uma waraktaman khothutinacapajja; juman apayanit llojjma uma waraktanacajj, naya patjja llumiquipi." 
Psalms42:8 Uru tokerojj Tatituw qhuyapayasitu, arum tokerusti janiw k'ochuñ karjascti, janiraquiw jacayir Diosajjat mayisiñs armascti." 
Psalms42:9 Arjjatir Diosajjarojj sistwa: “Karkajjay, ¿cunatarac armasistasti? ¿Cunatarac llaquit sarnakañajjast waquisi, uñisirejjan t'akhesiyatasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:10 Timanacajjan sawcasitanacapatjja, ch'aqhanacajjamppachaw usutu, urpachaw sapa cut jisqhipjjetu: “¿Cawquincarac Diosamasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:11 Almajjay, ¿cunatarac llacthapistasti?, ¿cunatarac ajjsarthaptasti? Diosaruc suyt'am, wasitat jach'añchjjäta: ¡Jupaw cusisiñajjasa, Diosajjasa!" 
Psalms43:1 Diosay, chekapar uñjita, khoru jakenacat arjjatita, c'ari, ñankha lurir jaket khespiyasita." 
Psalms43:2 Jumaw Diosajjätajja, arjjatirejjätasa: ¿cunatarac jan ist'añ munistasti?, ¿cunatarac timajjan t'akhesiyat llaquit sarnakañajjast waquisisti?" 
Psalms43:3 Khanamamp chica cancañamamp apayanita: ucanacay thaquiman irpitpan, kollan kollumcam puriyitpan, utjäwimcam irpnokaraquitpan." 
Psalms43:4 Diosay, nayajj altaramaruw jac'achasï, arpamp chicaw yuspagaräma. Diosajjay, jumaw jacañajjarojj cusisiytajja." 
Psalms43:5 Almajjay, ¿cunatarac llacthapistasti?, ¿cunatarac ajjsarthaptasti? Diosaruc suyt'am, wasitat jach'añchjjäta. ¡Jupaw cusisiñajjasa, Diosajjasa!" 
Psalms44:1 Diosay, jinchunacajjampiw ist'apjjta, awquinacajjaw yatiyapjjetu: urunacapan luräwinacamata, nayra pachanacan luratanacamata." 
Psalms44:2 Diosar jan uñt'irinacarojj amparamampiw jakonuctajja, marcanacaruw mutuytajja, nayra awquinacajjar utt'ayañataqui." 
Psalms44:3 Janiw espadapamp orak catuntasipquiti, janiraquiw ch'amapampis atipjapquiti; jan ucasti, amparamampi, ch'amamampi, khanamampiw atipjapjje, jupanacar munasitam laycu." 
Psalms44:4 ¡Reyejjay! ¡Diosajjay! Jumaw Israel marcaman atipjañapatac ch'am churtajja," 
Psalms44:5 yanapamampiw timasirinacarojj atipt'apjjta. sutimaruw nanacar uñisirirojj takjjatapjjta. 
Psalms44:6 Janiw nayajj flechajjar alcatquiristti, janiraquiw espadajjas atipayquitaspati;" 
Psalms44:7 jumaw timasirinacarojj atipjayapjjestajja, jumaraquiw uñisirinacajjarus p'enka tucuyaractajja." 
Psalms44:8 Diosay, wiñayaw jumat jach'añchasipjjä, sutimarusti wiñayaw yupaychapjjaraquï." 
Psalms44:9 Jichhajj juman apanucutaw uñjasipjjta, p'enk tucuyapjjaraquista. Janiw nuwasir tamajjamp chicajj mistcjjtati." 
Psalms44:10 Timasirinacajjan jac'aparuw cutjtayanipjjesta, uñisirinacajjasti yänacajj aparapjjetu; munataparjamaw take cun apasipjje." 
Psalms44:11 Qhariñ ovejanacarjamaw amparapar catuyapjjesta, Diosar jan uñt'ir marcanac taypiruw anatatapjjaraquista." 
Psalms44:12 Wali irakataruw marcamarojj aljanuctajja, aljatampisti janiw cuns jicjjatctati." 
Psalms44:13 Jake masejjan tokeñataquiw uchapjjesta, nanacar uñt'irinacan sawcasiñapataquiw utjayapjjesta." 
Psalms44:14 Diosar jan uñt'irinacampiw larusiyapjjesta, marcanacasti nanac uñjasajj p'ekep qhiwisipjje." 
Psalms44:15 Sapüruw jisc'achatajj uñjasta, ajanojjas p'enkajjat orakenquiwa," 
Psalms44:16 nayar toketanac ist'asina, uñisirejjamp timajjamp uñjasina." 
Psalms44:17 Take ucanacan nanacjjar jutatapajja, janiw jumar armat laycücänti, janiw arusjäwim p'aquintat laycücänsa," 
Psalms44:18 janiw chuymanacajjan khepar cuttatap laycücänsa, janiraquiw thaquimat saranucut laycücänsa;" 
Psalms44:19 ucampis jan walt'añ chekanacan aynacht'ayapjjesta, ajjsarcañ ch'amacampiw imjjatapjjesta." 
Psalms44:20 Diosay, jumarutejj armanucupjjeriscasamäna, yakha diosarutejj yupaychapjjeriscäyätjja," 
Psalms44:21 jumajj yatjjasamänwa, chuyma mankhanquir amtäwinac yatitam laycu." 
Psalms44:22 Juma laycuw sapürojj jiwayañ munapjjetu, qhariñ ovejanacarjamaw uñch'uquipjjetu." 
Psalms44:23 Tatay, p'arjjtasiquimaya, ¿cunatarac ictasti? Sartasiquimaya, jan wiñayatac armanucupjjestati." 
Psalms44:24 ¿Cunatarac nanacatac imantastasti? ¿Cunatarac ucatak t'akhesipjjatajjat armastasti? 
Psalms44:25 Ajayunacajjajj lak'aruw chhakantasqui, janchinacajjasti orakenjam katatitaw uñjasi." 
Psalms44:26 Sartasiquimaya, nanacar yanapt'irejj jutaquimaya, qhuyapayasiñam laycojj khespiyapjjaquitaya." 
Psalms45:1 Mojjsa arunacaw chuymajjan phullch'irasqui, mä reyitaquiw k'ochurapiscta: lajjrajjajj kellkerin suma kellkañapjamawa." 
Psalms45:2 Jakenacat sipan juc'amp sumätawa, lacamat munayasiñ arunacajj mistsusqui, Tatitusti wiñayataquiw asquinac churtam." 
Psalms45:3 Jan ajjsarir jake, espadamp wac'antasim, ucaw c'achachirimajja, ucaraquiw jach'añchirimasa." 
Psalms45:4 Atipjañamp sarantam, cheka laycu ch'amachasisa, llamp'u chuymaninacar chekapar uñjasa. ¡Cupi amparamajj muspharcañanac luraypan!" 
Psalms45:5 Mich'inacamajj wali arinacawa, marcanacajj jumaruw maqhatjjapjjtam, reyimp timasirinacajj ajjsarayasjjapjjewa." 
Psalms45:6 Diosay, reyi cancañamajj wiñayataquiwa, reyi cancañamajj chekapar uñjañawa." 
Psalms45:7 Asqui cancañarojj munastawa, ñankharusti uñistawa: ucat Diosamajj jumar ajllistam, masinacam taypin cusisiñampiw phokhanttam." 
Psalms45:8 Isinacamajj suma k'apquir kollanacaniw muct'asi; mirra, áloe, canela ucanacampi; marfilat lurat reyin utapatpach arpanacajj jumar cusisiytam." 
Psalms45:9 Reyinacan phuchanacapaw jumar catokerejj mistunipjje, reinajj cupëjjaman sayt'atäsquiwa, korit lurat c'achachañanacamp uchantata." 
Psalms45:10 Uñtanim, phuchajjay: jinchum alcatanisin ist'ita: marcamat armasjjam, wila masinacamat armasjjaraquim:" 
Psalms45:11 reyejj suma uñnakt'amamp muspharatawa, jupaw uywirimajja, juparojj jaysañamawa." 
Psalms45:12 Tiro marcanquir reyin phuchapa, kamir marcanacajj churäwinacampiw suma chuymam jicjjatañ munapjje." 
Psalms45:13 Acajjay, reyin phuchapajj wali c'achachataw mantani, isipas korimp c'achachatawa;" 
Psalms45:14 reyin ucarojj muspharcay isthapitpun irpapjje; khepap nayrap sarir tawakonac taypina. 
Psalms45:15 Wali cusist'asisaw sarantapjje, reyin utaparuw mantapjjaraqui." 
Psalms45:16 Reyejjay, wawanacamajj nayra awquinacam lantiw reyit kont'asipjjani, takpach oraker jilïrit utt'ayaraquïta." 
Psalms45:17 Nayajj sapa mita jakenac taypin sutim aytatäñapataquejj ch'amachasï, marcanacasti wiñayan wiñayapaw jumarojj jach'añchapjjätam." 
Psalms46:1 Diosaw imantasiñasajja, ch'amañchirisasa, jupaw chijinacan arjjatirisajja." 
Psalms46:2 Uca laycuw jan ajjsarapcañäniti, orakes qhathatiscpan, kollunacas lamar kotar tincuntascpan," 
Psalms46:3 mathapinacapas khothutiscpan, ojjoscaracpan, kollunacarus ojjeñapamp qhathatiyascpan." 
Psalms46:4 Mä jawiraw Diosan marcaparojj cusisiyi, Alajjpachanquirin kollan marcaparu." 
Psalms46:5 Diosajj marcap taypinquiwa, jupaw imascani; Diosaw khanjtatpach marcaparojj yanapascani." 
Psalms46:6 Marcanacajj ojjopjjewa, reyinacajj qhathatipjjewa, orakejj qhathatiwa, ch'aman arup ist'asiyqui ucapachajja." 
Psalms46:7 ¡Nuwasir taman Tatitupajj jiwasanacampïsquiwa! ¡Arjjatirisajj Jacobon Diosapawa! 
Psalms46:8 Tatitun muspharcañ luräwinacap uñjir jutapjjam, oraken lurqui uca muspharcañ luräwinaca:" 
Psalms46:9 aca orak tucuscamaw nuwasiñ t'acurayi; arconac jisc'a jisc'a p'aquinoke, lanzanac t'unari, nuwasiñ carronacsa ninampiw phichhantaraqui."
