Psalms46:10 “Amuct'jjapjjam, nayan Diosätajj uñt'apjjam: Nayajj marcanacat juc'ampïtwa, oraket juc'ampiraquïtwa.”" 
Psalms46:11 ¡Nuwasir taman Tatitupajj jiwasanacampïsquiwa! ¡Arjjatirisajj Jacobon Diosapawa! 
Psalms47:1 Takpach marcanaca, ampar t'ajjllirasipjjam, cusisiñat art'asiñamp Diosar jach'añchapjjam:" 
Psalms47:2 Tatitojj muspharcañ ajjsarcayawa, take acapachan jach'a Reyipawa." 
Psalms47:3 Jupaw marcanacarojj t'unjayistu, jach'a marcanacarus apnakayistu;" 
Psalms47:4 jupaw marcapäñatac ajllisistu: munat Jacobon jach'añchatäñapataqui. 
Psalms47:5 Diosajj cusisiñat art'asiñ taypin konuñapar maqhati, Tatitojj trompetanacan phust'asitap taypin maqhataraqui." 
Psalms47:6 ¡K'ochupjjam, Diosatac k'ochupjjam! K'ochupjjam, reyisatac jayllipjjam." 
Psalms47:7 ¡Diosaw takpach oraken Reyipajja!, cusisiñamp jupar k'ochupjjam." 
Psalms47:8 Diosajj marcanacaruw apnake, ¡Diosajj kollan konuñapjjan kont'atäsquiwa!" 
Psalms47:9 Acapach marcanacan jilïrinacapajj Israel marcampiw tantachasipjje. 
Psalms47:10 Acapachan jilïr cancañajj Diosanquiwa. ¡Jupajj take cunjjar jilïriwa! 
Psalms48:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'a ch'amaniwa! Diosasajj jach'añchatäñataquejj asquiwa, kollan marcapansa, kollan kollupansa." 
Psalms48:2 Kollan kollun amstapajj muncayawa, take acapachan cusisiñapawa: Sión kollojj alajjpachan thiyapawa, jach'a ch'aman reyin marcapawa." 
Psalms48:3 Diosajj Jerusalen utjäwip taypinjja, suma arjjatirit uñt'ayasi." 
Psalms48:4 Acapachanquir reyinacajj mayaquiw jupataquejj sayt'apjje; 
Psalms48:5 Diosan marcap uñjasasti wal mulljasipjje, ajjsarañatsti jaltjjapjjaquiwa;" 
Psalms48:6 ucan ajjsarañajj jupanacar catunti, wawachasiñatac aykosquir warmir uñtata;" 
Psalms48:7 wasar thayajj Tarsis marcanquir barconacar tucjqui uqhama. 
Psalms48:8 Cuntejj ist'apcäyät uc uñjapjjta, take ch'aman Tatitun marcapana, Diosasan marcapana: ¡Jupaw wiñayatac Jerusalen marcar utt'ayi!" 
Psalms48:9 Diosay, kollan utam taypin qhuyapayasiñamat amtasipjjta." 
Psalms48:10 Diosay, takpach oraken sutimajj jach'añchatawa, aytat cancañamajj orak tucuscamaw puri; ch'amamajj asqui cancañamp phokt'atawa." 
Psalms48:11 ¡Sión kollojj cusispan! Chekap arsutanacamampejj Judá orakenquir marcanacajj cusisipjjpan. 
Psalms48:12 Sión koll muytapjjpan, torrenacap jact'apjjpan," 
Psalms48:13 perkanacap amuyapjjpan, suma utanacap uñaquipapjjpan: jutir mita jakenacar yatiyañataqui:" 
Psalms48:14 “Acapï Tatit Diosasajja” sasa. Jupaw wiñay irpirisajja. 
Psalms49:1 Takpach marcanaca, aca arunac ist'apjjam, acapachan jaquirinaca, sum ist'apjjam:" 
Psalms49:2 jan yäkat jakenaca, aytat jakenaca, kamir jakenaca, jan cunan jakenaca." 
Psalms49:3 Lacajjajj yatiñ cancañampiw arsuni, amuyt'äwinacajjajj wali amuyt'cayäniwa;" 
Psalms49:4 säwinac ist'añaruw uchasï; chuymajjan imantat arunacsti arpamp chicaw arsuraquï. 
Psalms49:5 ¿Cunatarac jan wali urunac jutquipan ajjsarascästi? ¿Cunatarac timanacajjan muyuntat jicjjatasisast ajjsarascästi? 
Psalms49:6 Jupanacajj yänacaparuw chuymap uchapjje, kamir cancañapat jach'a jach'ajj tucupjjaraqui," 
Psalms49:7 Janiw qhitis jupa pachpajj khespiyascaspati, janiraquiw khespiyasiñataquejj Diosar kollk churapcaspati." 
Psalms49:8 Jaken jacañapajj wali jila alaniwa, janiw cunas alañataquejj cunjjatcaspati," 
Psalms49:9 wiñay jacañapataqui, jiwañat khespiñapataqui." 
Psalms49:10 Amuyapjjam: yatiñan jakenacajj jiwirïpjjewa, jan yatirinacasa, pisi chuymaninacasa, pachpac jiwi, yänacapasti yakhanacataquiw kheparjje." 
Psalms49:11 Amay imäwiw wiñay utjäwipajja, ucaw wiñay utapajja, marcanacar sutip churcchi ucasa." 
Psalms49:12 Jakejj kamirïscpasa, janiw wiñayäquiti, uywanacjam jiwiriquiwa." 
Psalms49:13 Uqhamaw ch'amapar alcatirinacajj tucusipjje, uqhamaw jupa pachpa jach'añchasirinacan tucuyapajja." 
Psalms49:14 Uca jakenacataquejj jiwaw awatiripajja, ovejanacarjamaw amay imäwirojj anaquisqui. Willjtancan ucapachasti, asqui jakenacaw jupanacarojj atipjapjjani; ch'amanacapajj aynacht'aniwa, utapasti mankhapachaquëjjaniwa." 
Psalms49:15 Nayarusti Diosaw khespiyitani, jiwan amparapat antutnucuyitani, jupamp chicaw irpasjjaraquitani." 
Psalms49:16 Maynitejj kamiriptchi ucajja, jan mayjt'asimti, yänacapas jiljjatchi ucajja, janirac llaquisimti," 
Psalms49:17 jiwjjan ucapachajja, janiw cuns apascaniti, yänacapajj janiw jupar arcjjarcaniti." 
Psalms49:18 Jaccasajj cusisitas sarnakascpan: kamirïtapat jach'ar aptatas uñjasiscpan," 
Psalms49:19 mä uruw jiwañapajj purinini, janiw mayamps khan uñjcaniti." 
Psalms49:20 Jakejj kamirïscpasa, janiw wiñayäquiti, uywanacjam jiwiriquiwa." 
Psalms50:1 Qhititejj diosanacan Diosapäqui uca Tatituw arsu: inti jalsuta, inti jalantat jaquirinacarojj jawsthapi." 
Psalms50:2 Sión marcatpacha, c'ajquir marcatpacha, Diosajj khantasqui." 
Psalms50:3 Diosasajj jutasquiwa, janiw amuc jutquiti: naqhantir ninaw nayrakatapanjam jutasqui, jach'a tutucamp muyuntataw jutascaraqui." 
Psalms50:4 Diosajj alajjat alajjpacharus acapacharus jawsi, marcapar taripäwi uñjayañataqui." 
Psalms50:5 “Nayar iyawsirinacar tantacharapipjjeta, arusjäwejjar wilañchamp chimpuntirinacaru” sasa." 
Psalms50:6 Alajjpachasti Diosan asqui cancañap yatiyi, pachpa Diosaw taripirit sayt'i." 
Psalms50:7 “Israel marcajjay, ist'ita, jumaruw khan parljjayäma; Israel marca, nayaw jumar ircatäma. ¡Nayaw Diosätjja! ¡Juman Diosamätwa!" 
Psalms50:8 Janiw loktanacamar jisc'achcti, janiraquiw wilañchanacamataquis k'apiscti." 
Psalms50:9 Janiw utamanquir vaca kallu loktañam maycsmati, janiraquiw tamanacamat mä cabrit maycsmati," 
Psalms50:10 ch'umi mankhanquir animalanacajj nayanquituwa, kollunacajjanquir warank waranka animalanacas nayancaraquituwa." 
Psalms50:11 Alajjanquir jamach'inacajj nayan uñt'atawa, pampanacan utjirinacas amparajjanquiwa." 
Psalms50:12 Mank'at awtjatasa, janiw jumat mayquirismati: acapachasa, ucan utjirisa, nayancatap laycu." 
Psalms50:13 ¿Vaca aychat mank'añajjajja jan ucajj, cabritonacan wilapch umtjja?" 
Psalms50:14 Diosar loktañamajj yuspagarañ chuymäpan; Alajjpachanquir Diosar arsutanacam phokham," 
Psalms50:15 llaquincasin jawsanita; nayajj khespiyämawa, jumasti jach'aruw aptitäta” sasa." 
Psalms50:16 Jucharar jakerusti Diosajj siwa: “¿Cuna munañanïtas camächinacajj aynakasiñataqui, arusjäwejj aytasiñamataqui," 
Psalms50:17 nayamp jan chekachayasiñ muncasa, arunacajjar jan yäkcasajja?" 
Psalms50:18 Lunthatarojj khomantasaw catoktajja, wachokan sarnakerinacampiw chicachastajja;" 
Psalms50:19 ñankha lurañataquiw lacam jist'artajja, lacamajj c'ari arsuñataquiw waquichasi." 
Psalms50:20 Jilamaruw ina ch'usat c'arinttajja, pachpa jilamaruw jisc'achtajja:" 
Psalms50:21 ucanac lurquipansa, amuquïscäyätwa, nayajj jumjamäquirist uqham amuytajja. Jichhasti jumaruw juchañchäma, ajanumaruw ircatäma." 
Psalms50:22 Diosat armasirinaca, sum ist'apjjam, ucatarac k'al tucjasipquirisma; janirac qhiti arjjatirs jicjjatasisipcasma;" 
Psalms50:23 nayar yuspagarirejj jach'aruw aptitu; asqui thaquejjan saririrusti Diosan khespiyäwip uñjayä” sasa. 
Psalms51:1 Diosajjay, munasiñam laycuy qhuyapt'ayasita, qhuyapayasirïtam laycuy juchanacajjat pampachita." 
Psalms51:2 Ñankha luratanacajjat jarekt'ita, jucha luratanacajjat k'omacht'ita." 
Psalms51:3 Jucha luratajj uñt'astwa, jucha luratajjajj janiw amuyojjat chhaktquiti." 
Psalms51:4 Juma contra, juma contraquiw juchachasta, juchañchctas uca juch lurta. Juchañchatamajj chekapawa; taripäwimasti jan camscayaraquiwa." 
Psalms51:5 Nayajj yuritajjatpach juchan muyuntatätwa; taycajjan puracapatpach juchanïtwa. 
Psalms51:6 Jumarojj k'oma chuymaw cusisiytamjja, chuymajjarusti yatiñ cancañ uchtajja." 
Psalms51:7 Hisopo alimp ch'ajjch'uquipita: nayasti k'omachataw uñjasï; jarekt'itaya, nayasti qhunut juc'amp jank'ow tucjjä." 
Psalms51:8 Cusisiñamp c'uchirtasiñamp phokhantita, p'aquintat ch'aqhanacajjasti wasitat cusisipjjpan." 
Psalms51:9 Janiquiy juchanacajjarojj uñtanimti, take ñankha luratanacajjat k'omachita." 
Psalms51:10 Diosay, k'oma chuymay utjayita, machak asqui ajay churaraquita;" 
Psalms51:11 nayrakatamat jan apanucusistati, janirac kollan ajayums irpakasistati;" 
Psalms51:12 khespiyäw cusisiñam wasitat churjjeta, ch'aman ajayumamp thurt'ayita." 
Psalms51:13 Jucharar jakenacaruw thaquimat yatiyä, juchaninacasti jumaruw maqhatjjapjjätam." 
Psalms51:14 ¡Diosay, wila wartañat khespiyita, Diosajjay, Khespiyirejjay! Lajjrajjasti asqui cancañamat k'ochuni." 
Psalms51:15 Tatay, lacajjay jist'arita, lacajjampisti jach'añchasaw k'ochüma." 
Psalms51:16 Janiw jumajj loktanac munctati; nayajj ucanac loktirismawa, ucampis janiw loktanacajj cusisiyctamti." 
Psalms51:17 Diosatac chekpach loktäwejj cutiquipstat chuym loktañawa. Diosay, llamp'uptat chuymarojj janiw jumajj jisc'achctati." 
Psalms51:18 Tatay, munasiñam laycuy Sión marcarojj asc luram, Jerusalenan perkanacap wasitat sayt'ayam." 
Psalms51:19 Ucapachaw loktäwinac catokasjjäta: churäwinacamp, wilañchanacampi, ucapachaw altaramjjarojj vaca kallunac loktasjjani." 
Psalms52:1 Munañan jake, ¿cunatarac ñankha luratanacamat jach'achastasti? ¡Diosan munasiñapajj jan tucusquiriwa!" 
Psalms52:2 Ñankha lurañac sapürus lup'isctajja, lajjramajj ari cuchillor uñtatawa." 
Psalms52:3 Asquir munañat sipanjja, ñankharuw muntajja, chekapar munañat sipansti, c'ariruw muntajja." 
Psalms52:4 C'arinac parlir lajjra, chuym t'unantir arunacac arsuñ munasctajja." 
Psalms52:5 Diosasti wiñayataquiw tucjätam, t'akhesiyasin utamat jakonucütam; aca oraket jacañam apakaraquïtam." 
Psalms52:6 Diosar jaysir jakenacajj uc uñjasajj ajjsarapjjaniwa, qhä jaketsti larusisaw sapjjani:" 
Psalms52:7 “Uñtapjjam, jan ajjsarir jakeru, Diosar jan iyawsañ munir jakeru, kamir yänacaparojjay alcatchïnjja, ñankha lurañanacapanjjay jach'achaschïnjja” sasa." 
Psalms52:8 Nayasti Diosan utapanjja, ch'ojjñasquir olivo kokar uñtatätwa, wiñayataquiw Diosan qhuyapayasiñaparojj alcatä." 
Psalms52:9 Diosay, jumarojj yuspagar churapunïmawa, nayatac asc luratamata; asqui jakenacam nayrakatan jach'añchäma, munasirïtam laycu." 
Psalms53:1 Pisi amuyt'an jakejj siwa: “Janiw Diosajj utjquiti” sasa. Takeniw ñankhanac lurasajj aynacht'apjje; janiw asqui lurirejj maynis utjquiti. 
Psalms53:2 Diosajj alajjpachatpach jakenacarojj uñtani: “Inach qhitis amuyt'asirejj utjaspa, inach qhitis Diosar thakerejj utjaspa” sasa." 
Psalms53:3 Takeniw pachpac jan walir saranucupjje, takeniw ñankhanac lurapjje, janiw asqui lurirejj qhitis utjquiti, ¡janiw maynis utjquiti!" 
Psalms53:4 Ñankha luririnacajj jan amuyunïpjjewa, marcajjar t'ant'jam mank'antirinacajj jan amuyt'anïpjjewa, Diosar jan art'asirinacajj jan amuyt'asirïpjjewa." 
Psalms53:5 Jupanacajj ajjsarañat qhathatipjjani, Diosajj uñisirin ch'aqhanacap willitatani, jupanacasti mä p'enkaw atipjat uñjasipjjani, Diosan jupanacar jan catokatap laycu." 
Psalms53:6 ¡Israel marcan khespiyasiñapajj Sión marcat jutaquispa! Diosajj marcapar wasitat cusisiycan ucapachajja, Jacobon wawanacapajj cusisiniwa, Israel marcajj c'uchirt'asiniwa." 
Psalms54:1 ¡Diosay, sutim laycuy khespiyasita! ¡Ch'amamampiy arjjatasita!" 
Psalms54:2 Diosajjay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, arunacajjarojj jaysaquimaya;" 
Psalms54:3 jach'a jach'a tucurinacaw nayatac sartasipjje, khoru jakenacaw jiwayañ munapjjetu. ¡Janiw Diosar ajjsartañapajj utjquiti!" 
Psalms54:4 Nayataquisti Diosaw arjjatirejjajja, Tatituw jacañ churirejjajja." 
Psalms54:5 Jupaw uñisirinacajjan ñankha luratanacapjja, jupanac pachpar cutt'ayani. ¡Arsutam phokherïtam laycuy jupanacar t'unjam! Nayasti chuymajjat mistquir loktäwi catuyäma, asqui sutimar yuspagarasaw k'ochüma;" 
Psalms54:6  
Psalms54:7 jumaw take llaquinacat waysusta, uñisirinacajjan aynacht'atap uñjayaraquista." 
Psalms55:1 Diosajjay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya. janiquiy mayisitajjarojj jan ist'ir tucumti." 
Psalms55:2 Jaysaquitaya, ist'araquitaya: llaquinacajjaw aynacht'ayitu. Uñisirejjan arupaw ajjsarayitu, ñankha lurir jakenacan wararitanacapaw qhathatiyitu. Cunayman llaquimpiw apjjatapjjetu, k'apisiñampiw catjañ munapjjetu." 
Psalms55:3  
Psalms55:4 Ajjsarañaw chuymajjar manti, jiwayir ajjsarañaw catuntitu," 
Psalms55:5 mulljasiñamp ajjsarañampiw muyuntitu, ajjsarañat qhathatquiriw uñjasta." 
Psalms55:6 Ucat sista: “jamach'in chhekhapaniquïrista, ucapachajj thoktiristwa, samart'araquiristwa." 
Psalms55:7 Thoktasajj wali jayaruw sarjjerista, wasaran jacasjjerista," 
Psalms55:8 cunayman jach'a thayanacataquiw imantasjjerista, mank'antir tutucataquiw jaltjjerista, jach'a thayampita, jallumpit khespjjerista” sasa." 
Psalms55:9 Tatay, jupanacarojj t'unjamaya, arunacap pejjtuntam, nuwasiñamp uñisisiñampic jupanac taypin uñjta," 
Psalms55:10 uruy arumaw marca taypin muyupayapjje; marcansti jake jiwayañamp ñankha amtañampiquiw utji, ñankha lurañanacaquiw utjaraqui," 
Psalms55:11 marca taypinjja, cunayman ñankhanacaw lurasi; khoru cancañampi, c'arisiñampejj janiw marcat chhaktquiti." 
Psalms55:12 Uñisirejjatejj tokenoketaspajja, amuquïsquiristwa; timajjatejj nayatac sayt'aspajja, jupataquejj imantasjjeristwa;" 
Psalms55:13 ucampis jumaw nayamp chic sarnakerïtajja, jumätaw nayan alcatañajjajja," 
Psalms55:14 jumampiw wali sum parlt'asïyätan; cusisisaw jakenac taypin Diosan utapar saräyätan. 
Psalms55:15 Jiwajj acatjamat timanacajjar catuntpan. ¡Mankhapacharojj jacquirpach mantapjjpan, ñankhajj chuymanacapan tapachrantatawa!" 
Psalms55:16 Nayasti Diosaruquiw art'asï; Tatitusti khespiyitaniwa. 
Psalms55:17 Jayp'usa, willjtasa, chicürusa, jacht'asisaw jupar yatiyasï. Diosasti mayisitajjarojj ist'aniwa." 
Psalms55:18 Nuwasïwinacan imitani, jacañajj khespiyani, uñisirinacajjajj waljanïcchi ucasa." 
Psalms55:19 Wiñay jaquir Diosaw ist'itu, jupanacarusti aynacht'ayaniwa, janiw sarnakäwinacap chekachasiñ munapquiti, janiraquiw Diosarus ajjsarapquiti." 
Psalms55:20 Masinacapataquejj amparanacap loktapjje, jupanac pur arusjäwi luratanac t'unantapjje." 
Psalms55:21 Arunacapajj liq'it sipan juc'amp koñawa, amuyunacapasti nuwasiñ amuyunacawa, arsutanacapajj aceitet sipan juc'amp koñawa, ucanacasti ari espadanacar uñtatawa." 
Psalms55:22 Diosar llaquinacam catuyam, jupasti ch'aman tucuyätam, Diosar jaysirin aynacht'añapjja, janipuniw jupajj muncaniti." 
Psalms55:23 Diosajjay, jumaw jupanacarojj jakontäta, jan uñantcay mic'ay mankharu. C'ari jakenacampi, jiwayir jakenacampejj janiw jacañapat chicats phokhapcaniti. Nayasti jumaruquiw take chuymamp alcatsma." 
Psalms56:1 Diosajjay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, nayar arcnaker jakenacaw utji, uruy arumaw t'akhesiyapjjetu." 
Psalms56:2 Jan karjasisaw timasirinacajj arcnakapjjetu, waljaniw jach'achasiñamp jaljjatapjjetu." 
Psalms56:3 Ajjsarcay urun waytasita, nayajj jumaruquiw alcatsma." 
Psalms56:4 Diosaruw takpach chuymamp iyawsta, arunacap jach'ar aptaracta; Diosaruw takpach chuymamp alcatta, janiw cunarus ajjsarcti: ¿Camächaraquitan jakesti?" 
Psalms56:5 Sapüruw arusquipapjje, amtapjjaraqui nayar ñankha lurañac amtasipqui," 
Psalms56:6 nayar uñch'uquiñataquejj mä chekawja thakapjje, sartatajjamp kont'atajjamp uñch'uquipjje, acatjamat jaljjatasin jiwayañ munapjjetu." 
Psalms56:7 Diosay, t'unjäwitac jupanacarojj catjjäsim, k'apisiñamampiy marcanacarojj t'unjam." 
Psalms56:8 Diosajjay, jaltatanacajjajj juman jaqhutawa, jumaw jachatanacajj apthaptajja. ¿Janit ucanacast kellkataman khanäquisti?" 
Psalms56:9 Jumat yanap maycäm ucapachajja, nayamp timasirinacajj jayar jaltjjapjjpan, uqhämat nayan Diosajjätam yatï." 
Psalms56:10 Diosaruw takpach chuymamp iyawsta, arunacap jach'ar aptaracta; Tatituruw takpach chuymamp iyawsta, arunacap jach'ar aptaracta;" 
Psalms56:11 Diosaruw take chuymamp alcatta, janiw cunarus ajjsarcti: ¿Camächaraquitan jakesti?" 
Psalms56:12 Diosajjay, jumar arsutanacat manumätwa, yuspagarañ chuymampiw phokhäma:" 
Psalms56:13 jiwañat nayar khespiyatam laycu, tincuñat nayar jarc'akatam laycu, Diosan nayrakatapansti jacañ khanan sarnakañajjataqui." 
Psalms57:1 Nayat qhuyapt'ayasit Diosajjay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, jumamp arjjatayasiñataquiw thaksma. Jan walt'añ nayat jithekañapcamasti amparamamp imantayasiñ munta." 
Psalms57:2 Alajjpachanquir Diosaruw art'asï, take cunan yanapir Diosat mayisï." 
Psalms57:3 Jupaw alajjpachat khespiyäwip apayanitani, jupaw nayar jiwayañ munirinacarojj pejjtuntani, qhuyapayasiñapamp, cheka cancañapamp apayanitani." 
Psalms57:4 Oraken jaknokataw uñjasta, jake mank'an leonanac taypinjam jicjjatasta; laca ch'aqhanacapajj lanzanacjam, mich'inacjamawa, lajjrapajj ari espadar uñtataraquiwa." 
Psalms57:5 Diosajjay, jumajj alajjpachat sipan jilanctawa, ¡Khapak cancañamajj takpach orakeruw phokhanti!" 
Psalms57:6 Nayamp timasirinacajj sipit uchantarapipjjetu, uca sipitan jiwañajjataqui; mä jach'a p'iy jalantañajjatac lurarapipjjetu, ucampis jupanacaquiw ucawjarojj jalantjjapjje." 
Psalms57:7 Diosajjay, chuymajjajj waquichatawa, ajayojjajj suma thurt'atawa. Jumataquiw k'ochurapïma." 
Psalms57:8 Almajjay, p'arjjtasimaya; arpamp salteriompi, p'arjjtasipjjam, nayasti machak khantatiruw p'arjjtaraquï." 
Psalms57:9 Tatay, marcanac nayrakatan jach'añchäma, marcanac nayrakatan k'ochunacamp yupaychäma." 
Psalms57:10 Munasiñamajj alajjpachat juc'amp jach'awa; asqui cancañamajj alajjpachcamaw puri. 
Psalms57:11 Diosajjay, jumajj alajjpachat sipan jilanctawa, ¡Khapak cancañamajj takpach orakeruw phokhanti!" 
Psalms58:1 Marc apnakerinaca, ¿chekat taripäwin chekapar t'akapjjta?, ¿chekat jakenacar chekapar uñjapjjta?" 
Psalms58:2 Janiw uqhäm lurapctati, jan walinac lurañ amtapjjtajja, jakenac taypinsti, nuwasiñanac utjayapjjtajja." 
Psalms58:3 Ñankha luririnacajj taycan puracapatpach aynacht'apjje; c'arinacasti janïr yurcasaw pantjasipjje," 
Psalms58:4 catarinacjam jiwayir mich'inïpjjewa, okar tucur jiwayir mich'in catarir uñtatäpjjewa," 
Psalms58:5 amulljayirin arup jan ist'añataqui, laykjjerin arsutap jan yäkañataqui." 
Psalms58:6 Diosajjay, laca ch'aqhanacap t'unaram, Tatay, qhä leonanacan quiwunacap t'unsum;" 
Psalms58:7 ch'umarir umar uñtat chhaktapjjpan; taquisit korar uñtat pharsupjjpan; 
Psalms58:8 ch'urur uñtat phusac tucjjapjjpan, int jan uñjir wawa sullur uñtatäpjjpan." 
Psalms58:9 Janïr sum alintquipan ch'aphinacjam naqhantapjjpan, ch'ojjña korar uñtat jiq'inucutäpjjaracpan." 
Psalms58:10 Asqui jakesti, uqhämat uqhäm apsur uñjasajj cusispan, ñankha luririnacan wilapamp cayunacap wilachsuspan." 
Psalms58:11 Ucapachaw aqham sapjjani: “Asqui jakejj waliruquis purisquejjä, Diosajj chekapar uñjirïscapunisä” sasa." 
Psalms59:1 Diosajjay, nayamp timasirinacat khespiyita, nayar uñisirinacat arjjatita." 
Psalms59:2 Ñankha lurir jakenacat khespiyita, jake jiwayirinacat jarc'aketa," 
Psalms59:3 wali ch'aman jakenacaw utji, nayar jiwayañataquiw suyantasipquitu." 
Psalms59:4 Tatay, janiw kallasirïcti, janiraquiw juchs lurcti; janiw cuna ñankhsa lurcti, jan cuna juchatac catuntañ munapjjetu. Sartasiquimaya, nayar yanapt'irejj jutaquimaya." 
Psalms59:5 Tatay, take ch'aman Diosay, Israelan Diosapa, sartasiquimaya, qhä ñankha lurir marcanacarojj mutuyamaya, qhä ch'ojjña chuyman jakenacat jan qhuyapayasimti." 
Psalms59:6 Arumthapirojj anunacjam wajasisaw cutt'anipjje, marcansti ucsar acsaruw muytapjje:" 
Psalms59:7 lacanacapat jupok ulthusiyapjje, lajjranacapajj espadanacar uñtatawa: “Janiw qhitis ist'quistaniti” sapjjewa." 
Psalms59:8 Jumasti, Tatay, jupanacat larustawa, juchaninacat phiscastawa." 
Psalms59:9 Diosajjay, juman imataw sarnakascta, jumaw ch'amañchirejjätajja, imirejjätasa." 
Psalms59:10 Nayar munasir Diosajj jicjjatitaniwa; uñisirejjan aynacht'atap uñjayitani. 
Psalms59:11 Diosajjay, jupanacat jan qhuyapayasimti, marcajjan ucjjat jan armasiñapataqui; jupanacarojj ch'amamampiy ananucum, mä p'enk aynacht'ayaraquim. ¡Tatay, jumaw nanacar arjjatirïtajja!" 
Psalms59:12 Take arsutanacapampiw juch lurapjje, jach'a jach'a tucuñapar chincatatäpjjpan, c'ari juramentonacamp chinuntayasipjjpan." 
Psalms59:13 K'apisiñamajj jupanacar tucjpan, jupanacajj jiwarapjjpan, Jacobon marcapar Diosan apnakatap yatipjjpan, acapach tucuscam apnakerïtap yatipjjaracpan." 
Psalms59:14 Arumthapirojj anunacjam wajasisaw cutinipjjani, marcansti mank'a thakasaw muytapjjani, jan jicjjatirjamäjjasasti anunacjamaw awullipjjani." 
Psalms59:15  
Psalms59:16 Nayasti willjtaw jumarojj k'ochüma, munasiñamampita, ch'amamampit yatiyä. Jumaw nayan arjjatirejjätajja, jumaw llaquisiñajjan imantasiñajjätajja." 
Psalms59:17 Diosajjay, jumaruw k'ochunac k'ochüma, jumaw nayan imantasiñajjätajja, nayan arjjatirëjjätasa; ¡jumaw nayar munasir Diosätajja!" 
Psalms60:1 Diosay, k'apisiñaman jaytanucupjjesta, tucjapjjaraquista, jichhasti wasitatay ch'am churapjjeta." 
Psalms60:2 Orakerojj qhathatiytawa, jist'jaractawa: jichhasti p'iyanacap asquichjjam, niyaw alliranttañampïsqui." 
Psalms60:3 Marcamarojj jach'a yant'anacampiw t'akhesiytajja, lokheptayir vino churapjjestajja;" 
Psalms60:4 jichhasti arquirinacamarojj mä chimpuy churam, mich'inacat jaltjjapjjañapataqui." 
Psalms60:5 ¡Ist'apjjaquitaya, ch'amamampiy khespiyapjjeta! ¡Munatanacamarojj khespiyaquimaya!" 
Psalms60:6 Diosajj kollan utapan sänwa: “cusisisaw Siquem orak jalanokjjä, Sucot pampa orak laquinokjjaraquï;" 
Psalms60:7 Galaad orakejj nayanquiwa, Manasés orakes nayanquiwa, Efraín orakejj p'ekejjar asjjatasiñawa, Judá orakesti, jilïr cancañ thujrojjawa;" 
Psalms60:8 Moab orakejj jarisiñ llatajjawa; Edom orak patjjaruw wisqhunacajj uchasï; ¡Filisteo jakenacar atipjatajjat arnakasï!”, sasa." 
Psalms60:9 ¿Qhitirac uyunacamp muyuntat marcar irpitanisti? ¿Qhitirac Edom orakcam puriyitanisti? 
Psalms60:10 Diosay, jumajj apanucjjapjjestawa, janiw nuwasir tamajjamp chicajj mistcjjtati." 
Psalms60:11 Uñisirinacajjat arjjatapjjeta, jaken yanapapajj inamayaquiwa." 
Psalms60:12 Diosan yanapapampejj muspharcañanac lurañäni. ¡Jupaw timanacasarojj takjjatani! 
Psalms61:1 Diosajjay, aykosquir arnakasitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, mayisitajjarojj jaysaquimaya." 
Psalms61:2 Chuymajjan aynacht'atap laycojj orak tucuyatpach jumar art'asinsma: jan mistcay karka patjjaruy sayt'ayita," 
Psalms61:3 jumaw nayan imantasiñajjätajja. Jumaw timasirejjat jarc'aker ch'aman pucarätajja. 
Psalms61:4 Wiñayataquiw utaman jacañ munta, amparamamp jarc'akataw utjasiñ munaracta." 
Psalms61:5 Diosajjay, jumaw arsutanacajj ist'istajja, sutim wakaychirinacan catokäwip churjjaraquistajja." 
Psalms61:6 Reyirojj jaya maranac jacañay churam, jupajj walja walja maranacay jacpan;" 
Psalms61:7 asquinacam catokasay marcarojj apnakpan, munasiñamamp asqui cancañamampirac imam." 
Psalms61:8 Nayasti sutimarojj jach'aruw aptä, arsutanacajjsti sapüruw phokharaquï." 
Psalms62:1 Dios sapanac ajayojjajj samarañ jicjjati, khespiyasiñajjajj jupat juti." 
Psalms62:2 Jupaquiw khespiyitu, arjjataraquitu. Janiw pächascäti, jupaw imantasiñajjajja." 
Psalms62:3 ¿Cunapachcamarac nuwañatac arcnakapjjetätasti? ¿Cunapachcamarac tincuyañ munapjjetätasti? ¿Cunapachcamarac llojjesir perkarjam uñjapjjetätasti? ¿Cunapachcamarac tincuñampïsquir uyurjam uñjapjjetätasti? 
Psalms62:4 Nayar tincuyañac lup'isipqui, c'arisiñajj walpun cusisiyi; lacaquiw jach'añchapjjetu, chuymampisti ñankhachapjjetuwa." 
Psalms62:5 Nayajj Dios sapanac samarañ jicjjatta, suyt'añajjajj jupat juti." 
Psalms62:6 Jupaquiw khespiyitu, arjjataraquitu. Janiw tinccäti, jupaw imantasiñajjajja." 
Psalms62:7 Diosat khespiyasïwejjampi, jach'a cancañajjampejj juti, jupaw suma thurt'at karkajjajja, juparaquiw imantasiñajjasa." 
Psalms62:8 Marcajjay, jupar take chuymamp iyawsam, chuymanacam jupar jist'arapjjam, Diosaw jiwasan imantasiñasajja." 
Psalms62:9 Jakejj mä samsump sasiquiwa, kamirisa, jan cunanisa; jupanacarutejj balanzamp waytasispajja, mä samsut sipan phisnaquïspawa." 
Psalms62:10 Ch'ajjwañanacarojj jan wayusipjjamti; janirac lunthatasiñar chuym catuyasipjjamti; kamiris tucusipcätajja, kollker jan alcatapjjamti." 
Psalms62:11 Diosan arsutap ist'ta, jupan arsut arup yatta: “Diosajj ch'amaniwa, ch'amasa, munasiñas jupanquiwa, jupaw sapa maynirojj lurataparjam wajjt'i” sasa." 
Psalms62:12  
Psalms63:1 Diosajjay, jumaw Diosajjätajja, jumar thakasaw khantatta, almajjajj jumatjam pharjatawa; janchejjajj jumatjam awtjatawa, jan umani, jan jacañan waña oraker uñtatawa." 
Psalms63:2 ¡Kollan utaman uñjañ munsma! Ch'amamamp jach'a cancañamamp uñjañ munta," 
Psalms63:3 munasiñamajj jacañat sipan juc'ampiwa, lacajjajj jumaruw k'ochütam." 
Psalms63:4 Take jacäwejjan jach'ar aptäma, jumar art'asisaw amparanacajj aytä." 
Psalms63:5 Jach'a mank'äwinquir jakjamaw cusisï, lacajjasti cusisitaw jach'añchätam." 
Psalms63:6 Arumanacaw iquiñan jumat amtasta, iquintataw jumjjat lup'ista," 
Psalms63:7 Jumaw nayan yanapirejjätajja, ¡amparamancasajj cusisitätwa!" 
Psalms63:8 Ajayojjajj jumamp chict'atawa, cupi amparamasti janiw antutnucquituti." 
Psalms63:9 Nayar jiwayañ munirinacasti, orak mankharuw jalantapjjani;" 
Psalms63:10 espadamp jiwarayataw uñjasipjjani, kamakenacan mank'antataw tucusipjjani." 
Psalms63:11 Reyisti Diosancasaw cusisini, sutip laycu juramento luririnacajj k'ochupjjaniwa, c'arinacan lacapasti llupt'atäniwa." 
Psalms64:1 Diosajjay, aykor arojjarojj ist'aquimaya, ajjsarcay uñisirinacat jacañajj jarc'aketa." 
Psalms64:2 Ñankha lurir jakenacat imantita, nayatac ñankha amtir jakenacat jarc'aketa, nayar jiwayañ munirinacat khespiyita." 
Psalms64:3 Jupanacajj espadar uñtat lajjranacap ariptayapjje, mich'inacar uñtat ñankha arunac parlarpayapjje." 
Psalms64:4 Jan juchan jaker jamasat chhojjriñchañ amtapjje, acatjamat jan qhuyapayasiñampiw chhojjriñchapjje." 
Psalms64:5 Ñankha lurañataquejj purapat ch'amañchasipjje; jamasat sipitanac uchañataquiw amtapjje, janis qhitis uñjcaspajj uqham amuyasipjje," 
Psalms64:6 janis qhitis ñankha luratanacap yatjjatcaspajj uqham amuyasipjjaraqui. Jaken chuyma mankhep uñt'iristi take cun yatjjatani. 
Psalms64:7 Diosaw mich'inacapamp chhojjriñchani, acatjamat chhojjriñchjataw uñjasipjjani;" 
Psalms64:8 pachpa arunacapaw aynacht'añarojj puriyani, jupanacar uñjirinacasti larusipjjaniwa." 
Psalms64:9 Takeniw ucapachajj Diosar jach'añchapjjani, luräwinacapat yatiyapjjani; luratanacap amuyjjapjjaraquini." 
Psalms64:10 Asqui jakejj Tatitumpiw cusisini, jupampiw arjjatayasini, k'oma chuyman jakenacasti cusisitaw jacasipjjani." 
Psalms65:1 Sión marcan Diosapa, jumajj jach'añchatäñataquejj asquïtawa, jumar arsutanac phokhañajj waquisiwa," 
Psalms65:2 jumajj mayisitanacar ist'irïtawa. Take jakenacaw jumarojj maqhatapjjtam. 
Psalms65:3 Jucha luratanacajjajj aynacht'ayapjjetuwa, ucampis jumaw juchanacajjat pampachapjjesta." 
Psalms65:4 Juman ajllit jakejj cusisiñaniwa, juma jac'an jacañapataqui, kollan utaman utjasiñapataqui. Utaman utjir yänacampiy cusisiyapjjeta, temploman kollan churäwinacapampiy phokt'apjjeta." 
Psalms65:5 Khespiyir Diosajjay, muspharcañ asqui cancañampiw jaysapjjestajja; take orakpachaw jumarojj alcatapjjtam, jayanquir kotas alcataractamwa;" 
Psalms65:6 jumïpan kollunacajj pachpaquïsqui, juman ch'amam laycuw thurt'atäsipqui." 
Psalms65:7 Jumaw lamar kot mathapinacarojj t'acuraytajja, jumaw marcanacan ch'ajjwatap amuct'aytajja." 
Psalms65:8 Orak tucuyan jaquirinacajj muspharcañ luräwinacamat qhathatipjje, inti jalsu toketa, inti jalanta tokecamajj, jumïpan cusisiñat art'asiñajj utji." 
Psalms65:9 Jumaw acapach orak uñjasctajja, jallumpiw achunac utjaytajja; jilarquir uma karpampiw trigo yapunac jilaraytajja: uqham lurasaw orak waquichtajja." 
Psalms65:10 Jumaw sucanac umamp karptajja, qhulanac qhusqhachtajja, jallumpiw orakerojj jasac tucuytajja, uqhamat jilarquir achuytajja." 
Psalms65:11 Asquinacamampiw marpach yanaptajja, kenayanacamajj jilarquir asquinac warjjatani;" 
Psalms65:12 wasaranquir ch'ijinacajj ch'ojjñatatiwa, kollunacasti cusisiñ isimpiw isthapisi;" 
Psalms65:13 pampanacajj ovej tamanacampiw phokhantasi, vallenacas yapunacampiw isintasi, cusisiñat takpachaw k'ochupjje." 
Psalms66:1 Take acapachanquir jakenaca, Tatitur cusisit k'ochupjjam," 
Psalms66:2 kollan sutipar k'ochupjjam, aytat cancañapar k'ochunac k'ochupjjam;" 
Psalms66:3 Diosarojj sapjjam: “Luratanacamajj muspharcañapuniwa, timanacamajj jach'a ch'amam laycuw nayrakataman ajjsarañat tincurapjje." 
Psalms66:4 Takpach jakenacaw nayrakataman quillt'asipjje, sutimaruw k'ochupjjaraqui” sasa." 
Psalms66:5 Diosan luratanacap uñjir jutapjjam, jaken asquipatac muspharcay luräwinacap uñjapjjam:" 
Psalms66:6 lamar kotarojj waña orakeruw tucuyäna, nayra pachan jaquir awquinacasajj, wañanjam jawir maqhatapjjäna; jichhasti Diosamp cusisipjjañäni." 
Psalms66:7 Ch'amapampiw wiñayatac marcanacar apnake; nayranacapajj marcanacaruw uñch'uquisqui, kallasir jakenacan jan sayt'añapataqui." 
Psalms66:8 Marcanaca, Diosasar jach'añchapjjam, jach'añchañ k'ochunac jach'at k'ochupjjam." 
Psalms66:9 Jupaw jacañ wasitat churjjestu, janiw cayunacasan tincuñap munquiti." 
Psalms66:10 Diosay, jumaw yant'arojj puriyapjjesta, kollkerjamaw k'omachsupjjesta," 
Psalms66:11 sipitaruw jalantayapjjesta, jach'a llaquinacampiw apjjatapjjesta:" 
Psalms66:12 qhitimpis taquisiyapjjaquistawa; nina cheka, uma chekaw maqhatapjjta, ucampis khepa tokeruw samart'ayapjjesta." 
Psalms66:13 Loktäwinac apt'ataw utamar mantä, nayrakataman churäwinac naqhayarapïma, uqhamat jumar arsutanac phokhä," 
Psalms66:14 chijincasin jumar arscäyäsma, uca arsutanac phokhä." 
Psalms66:15 Liq'i uywanac altaramjjar loktäma, orko ovejanac loktanïma, toronacampi, cabranacamp jumar loktañatac jiwayarapïma." 
Psalms66:16 Diosar arquirinaca, ist'ir jutapjjam, nayatac luratanacap yatiyapjjäma:" 
Psalms66:17 juparuw lacajjajj art'asi, lajjrajjasti juparuw jach'añchi." 
Psalms66:18 Jan wali amuyutejj utjitasapänjja, Tatitojj janiw ist'quitasapänti;" 
Psalms66:19 Diosasti ist'ituwa, achict'asiñamp mayisitajjarojj jaysituwa." 
Psalms66:20 Diosajj jach'añchatäpan, mayisitajjarojj janiw inar tucuyquiti, janiraquiw munasiñaps jithektayquituti." 
Psalms67:1 Diosay, nanacat qhuyapayasipjjeta, nayranacamampiy uñtanipjjeta:" 
Psalms67:2 orakenquirinacajj thaquim uñt'apjjpan, take marcanacasti munañamampi, khespiyäwimamp uñt'apjjaracpan." 
Psalms67:3 Diosay, marcanacajj jumar yupaychapjjpan, ¡takpach marcanac jumarojj jach'añchapjjpan!" 
Psalms67:4 Marcanacajj cusisiñat k'ochupjjpan, asqui cancañamp acapachar apnakatam laycu. Chekaparuw takpach marcanac saraytajja." 
Psalms67:5 Diosay, marcanacajj jumar yupaychapjjpan, ¡takpach marcanac jumarojj jach'añchapjjpan!" 
Psalms67:6 Orakejj achunacap churi, Tatit Diosasaw asquinac churistu." 
Psalms67:7 ¡Diosajj asquinacap churistpan! Acapachanquirinacasti jupar jach'añchapjjpan. 
Psalms68:1 Diosajj sayt'asqui ucapachajja, jupamp timasirinacajj chhuqhutatapjjewa, jupar uñisirinacajj nayrakatapat jaltjjapjjewa;" 
Psalms68:2 jiwk'er uñtataw chhaktapjje, ninamp umatatayat liq'jamaw umatatapjje, ñankha lurir jakenacajj Diosan nayrakatapan tucusipjje." 
Psalms68:3 Asqui jakenacasti cusisipjjewa, Diosan nayrakatapan cusisipjje, cusisiñat t'isctapjji." 
Psalms68:4 Diosar k'ochupjjam, sutipar jach'añchapjjam, kenay patan sarnakerir jach'añchapjjam. Tatitump cusisipjjam, nayrakatapan c'uchirasipjjam." 
Psalms68:5 Diosajj wajchanacan awquipawa, ijma warminacan arjjatiripawa, jupajj kollan utjäwipan jaqui." 
Psalms68:6 Diosaw aynacht'at jakenacataquejj ut waquicharapi, catuntat jakenacar antutayasin asquinac churi; kallasir jakenacaquiw jan achur oraken kheparapjje." 
Psalms68:7 Diosay, cunapachatejj jumajj marcaman nayrakatap sarcäyäta, wasar chekanjam sarantcäyät ucapachajja," 
Psalms68:8 orakejj qhathatïnwa, jallojj alajjpachat purintäna, Sinaí kollojj Diosan nayrakatapan qhathatïna; Israelan Diosap nayrakatan ajjsaräna." 
Psalms68:9 Diosay, jumaw jilarquir umanac jalluntaytajja, wañantat orakemaruw ch'amañchtajja." 
Psalms68:10 Marcamajj uca oraken utjantasïna, Diosay, munasiñam laycuw jan cunan jakerojj waquisirinac churtajja." 
Psalms68:11 Tatituw mä yatiyäw arsu, warank warank jakenacaw ucjjat yatiyapjjäna:" 
Psalms68:12 “Reyinacamp nuwasir tamanacampejj jaltjjapjjewa, warminacajj catuntat yänac jalanokasipjje." 
Psalms68:13 Uywa uyunacan samarañamcamasti palomanacajj kollke chhekhanacap qhiwiliyapjjäna, phuyunacapan korejj c'ajäna." 
Psalms68:14 Ucch'añcamasti take Atipirejj reyinacaruw chhucjayäna, qhunojj Salmón kolluruw qhununtäna” sasa." 
Psalms68:15 Basán kollunacajj wali jach'anacawa, kollunacapajj wali khathanacawa:" 
Psalms68:16 khatha kollunaca, ¿cunatarac Diosan utjasiñapatac ajllit kollur uñisipjjtasti? ¡Tatituw uca kollun wiñayatac jacani!" 
Psalms68:17 Diosan nuwasiñ carronacapajj warank warankawa: Sinaí kollutpach Diosajj kollan chekawjarojj jutanti. 
Psalms68:18 Diosay, alajjpacharuw maqhattajja, catuntat jakenac anaquisa; churäwir uñtat jakenac catokastajja. Tatay, jumar kallcatir jakenacamppachaw jumar maqhatjjapjjtamjja." 
Psalms68:19 Tatitojj sapür jach'añchatäpan, Diosaw jan walt'añanacas apasqui, jupaw Diosasajja, khespiyasiñasasa." 
Psalms68:20 Diosasajj khespiyir Diosawa, jupaw wiñay jiwañat khespiyistaspa." 
Psalms68:21 Diosajj uñisirinacapan p'ekep jaljtayani, ñankha lurañ jan wanir jakenacan p'eke ch'aqhap t'unjani." 
Psalms68:22 Tatitojj siwa: “Basán oraketpach cutiyanjjäma, lamar kota mankhatpach irpsunjjäma," 
Psalms68:23 timasirinacaman wilapampiw cayum jarekasïta, anunacamasti uca wil jallk'apjjaraquini” sasa." 
Psalms68:24 Diosay, jumar wakaychirinacaw uñstasinqui, kollan chekawja tokeruw sarantasipqui. Diosajjan, Reyejjan wakaychirinacapawa." 
Psalms68:25 K'ochurinacajj nayrakat sarantapjje, arpa jachsuyirinacasti khepat arcapjje, chica taypinsti tawakonacaw chhulluchhullunacamp sarantapjjaraqui." 
Psalms68:26 ¡Tatit Diosar cusisiñamp jach'añchapjjam, Israel marcpach tantachat jupar yupaychpan!" 
Psalms68:27 Jupanacan nayrakatap sullquïr Benjaminajj sarantasqui, Judá marcanquir jilïrinacamp chicaw saranti, Zabulón, Neftalí marcanacan jilïrinacapamp chicaw sarantaraqui." 
Psalms68:28 Diosay, ch'amam uñacht'ayaquimaya, nanac laycu lurir qhuyapayir ch'amam uñachayam." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalenanquir utamaruw reyinacajj churäwinac apanipjje, ucawjatpachay jumajj," 
Psalms68:30 Egipto marcar tokenokam, qhä ch'ojjña taypinquir animalanacaru, qhä wajjrasir toro tamanacaru, qhä tupasir vaca kallunacaru. Jupanacajj juc'amp kamiriptañ munasinjja, marcanacaruw t'akhesiyapjje; ¡nuwasiñ munir qhä jakenacarojj chhuqhutatayamaya!" 
Psalms68:31 Munañan jakenacajj Egiptot purinipjjani, Etiopía marcajj Diosataquiw amparanacap loktapjjani." 
Psalms68:32 Orakenquir reyinaca, Diosar k'ochupjjam. Tatitutac k'ochunac jayllipjjam," 
Psalms68:33 alajjpachanjam sarnakeriru, wiñay alajjpachan utjasiriru. Ch'aman arupamp arnakasir ist'apjjam." 
Psalms68:34 “Diosan ch'amap uñt'apjjam”, khapak cancañapajj Israel marcan khanti, ch'amapasti kenayanacjjan c'ajtaraqui." 
Psalms68:35 Diosajj kollan utapan muspharcayapuniwa; jupaw Israelan Diosapajja, jupaw marcaparojj ch'am churi, ¡Diosajj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms69:1 Diosajjay, khespiyasiquitaya, umamp ajjscatirjamätwa:" 
Psalms69:2 ñik'e phuch'uruw jalantascta, janiw cawqhar tact'asirjamäctsa; wali p'iya umcamaw purta, ch'aman umaw apjjetu." 
Psalms69:3 Arnakascäwejj ch'ama thayjtatätwa, mallk'as chhajantjjetuwa; Diosajjar uñch'uccäwejj nayrajjas juyqhuptatäjjewa." 
Psalms69:4 Ina ch'usat uñisirinacajjajj ñic'utanacajjat juc'amp jilawa; ina ch'usat nayar jaljjatirinacajj ch'aqhanacajjat juc'amp ch'ollkhëpjjewa. Jan lunthatascta ucanac cutiyañajjataquiw wayt'apjjetu. 
Psalms69:5 Diosajjay, jumaw jan amuyt'asirïtajj uñt'istajja, janiw juchanacajj imantirjamäcti." 
Psalms69:6 Take ch'aman Dios Tatay, jumar thakerinacajj janiquiy juchajj laycujj p'enk tucupjjpati, Israel marcan Diosapa, jumar suyt'irinacajj janiquiy juchajj laycujj aynacht'añar puripjjpati." 
Psalms69:7 Juma laycuw jisc'achat uñjasta, ajanojjas p'enkamp chhaktatawa." 
Psalms69:8 Jilanacajjataquejj jan uñt'at jakjamätwa, taycajjan wawanacapataquejj yakha marcanquir jakjamätwa." 
Psalms69:9 Utamar munañaw nayar tucuntitu, jumar tokerinacan arunacapajj, nayjjarcamaw wact'i." 
Psalms69:10 Llaquisiñat jan mank'cta ucapachajja, nayat larusipjjetu;" 
Psalms69:11 llaqui isimp uchascta ucapachasti, nayat sawcasipjjetu;" 
Psalms69:12 take jaken parlasitaw sarnakta, umatanacasti nayjjat warurupjje." 
Psalms69:13 Tatay, nayasti jumaruw art'asinsma, Diosajjay, jichhajj yanapt'aquitaya; jach'a munasiñam laycuy ist'ita, yanapt'asir cancañam laycuy khespiyita." 
Psalms69:14 Janiquiy nayan ñek'er jalantañajj munamti, nayar uñisirinacat khespiyaquitaya, walja uma mankhanacat wayst'asiquitaya." 
Psalms69:15 Janiquiy ch'aman umajj apitpati, janiquiy mic'ay chincänajj mank'antitpati, janirac nayjjarus jist'antaspati." 
Psalms69:16 Tatay, munasiñamamp jaysita, jach'a qhuyapayasiñamamp nayar uñtanjjeta;" 
Psalms69:17 janiquiy aca uywatamataquejj ajanum imantasimti: jan walinpun uñjasta, janc'aquiy jaysita." 
Psalms69:18 Nayaruy jac'achasinita, khespiyaquitaya, nayamp timasirinacat jarc'aketa." 
Psalms69:19 Jumaw llaquincatajj uñjasquistajja, jumaw p'enka tucutajjsa, jisc'achatsa uñjistajja, jumaw uñisirinacajjarojj uñt'aractajja." 
Psalms69:20 Jaken toketanacapajj chuymajjaruw t'unanti, jan ch'amanipuniw uñjasta. Qhuyapayasiñ suyta, ucasti janiw jicjjatayasquituti, chuymachirinac suyta, jupanacarusti janiw jicjjatcti." 
Psalms69:21 Mank'at awtjayascta ucapachajja, mulla churapjjetu, umat pharjayascta ucapachasti, vinagre churapjjetu." 
Psalms69:22 Jach'a mank'äwinacapajj sipitapar tucpan, suma mank'anacapasti simpantir chinuñar tucuracpan," 
Psalms69:23 nayranacapajj juyqhuptpan, jiqhanipas qhathatipunpan." 
Psalms69:24 Jupanacjjar k'apisiñam samarasim, akquir k'apisiñamajj jupanacar catjpan;" 
Psalms69:25 utjäwinacapajj ch'usa wasarar tucpan, janirac qhitis chhujllanacapan jacpati;" 
Psalms69:26 jupanacajj juman usuchjat jakeruw arcnakapjje; juman chhojjriñchat jakeruw sawcasipjje. 
Psalms69:27 Ñankhat ñankha jupanacar cutt'ayam, janipun qhuyapayasiñam jicjjatapjjpati." 
Psalms69:28 ¡Wiñay jaquirinacan sutip taypit apanucum! ¡Janipun asqui jakenacamp chic kellkantamti! 
Psalms69:29 Naya llaquit usuntat jakerusti, Diosajjay, khespiyäwimajj waytaquitpanaya." 
Psalms69:30 K'ochunacampiw Diosan sutiparojj jach'añchä, yuspagarasaw jach'a cancañap yatiyä;" 
Psalms69:31 Tatitusti ucampejj juc'amp cusisini, mä toro loktäwimp sipana, wajjranacani, sillunacani vaca kallu loktäwimp sipana." 
Psalms69:32 Uc uñjasajj llaquitanacajj cusisipjjaniwa, Diosar thakerinacan chuymanacapasti ch'amañchasiniwa." 
Psalms69:33 Tatitojj jan cunan jakenacarojj ist'iwa, jupanquir catuntat jakenacarojj janiw jisc'achquiti." 
Psalms69:34 Diosar jach'añchapjjam, alajjpachas acapachasa, lamar kotasa, take ucan jaquirinacasa." 
Psalms69:35 Diosaw Sión marcarojj khespiyani, Judá orakenquir marcanac wasitat sayt'ayani, uywatanacapan wawanacapaw ucanac catokasjjapjjani, sutipar munirinacajj ucan jacasjjapjjani." 
Psalms69:36  
Psalms70:1 Diosajjay, nayar khespiyirejj jutaquimaya, Tatay, nayar yanapt'irejj janc'aquiy jutam." 
Psalms70:2 Nayar jiwayañ munirinacajj, mä p'enk atipjayasipjjpan; nayar ñankha lurañ amtirinacajj, mä p'enkarac jaltjjapjjpan." 
Psalms70:3 Nayat larusirinacajj p'enkachat jaltjjapjjpan. 
Psalms70:4 Jumar thakerinacasti cusisipjjpan, jumamp chic c'uchirasipjjpan; khespiyäwim thakerinacajj wiñayapun arsupjjpan: “Diosajj jach'a ch'amaniwa” sasa." 
Psalms70:5 Naya, llaquir purir jakerusti, Diosajjay, janc'aquiy yanapt'ir jutita. Jumaw arjjatirejjätajja, khespiyasiñajjätasa: ¡Tatay, janc'aquiy jutam!" 
Psalms71:1 Tatay, juman ucaruw jutta: janiquiy wiñayatac atipjat uñjasiyistati." 
Psalms71:2 Asqui cancañam laycuy khespiyita, antutayaraquita, naya tokeruy jinchum alcatanim, khespiyaquitaya." 
Psalms71:3 Jumay nayan arjjatir karkajjäma, jumarac imantasiñ jach'a utajjäma, jumaw karkajjätajja, jach'a utajjätasa." 
Psalms71:4 Diosajjay, ñankha lurir jaken amparapat khespiyita, jake jiwayirin amparapata, khoru jaket jarc'aketa;" 
Psalms71:5 Tatay, jumaw nayan suyt'añajjätajja, wayna cancañajjatpach alcatañajjätasa." 
Psalms71:6 Taycajjan puracapanccäyät ucapachasa, jumaruw alcatäyäsma. Jumaw nayarojj khan uñjayista, jumaruquipuniw nayajj jach'añchäma." 
Psalms71:7 Waljaniw sarnakäwejjampejj muspharapjjäna, jumaquiw nayan arjjatirejjätajja." 
Psalms71:8 Lacajjajj sapüruw khapak cancañamatjja, jach'añchäwi k'ochunacamp phokt'atäsqui." 
Psalms71:9 Janiquiy ch'ama karit toker jisc'achistati, ch'amajjajj tucusisquiwa, janiquiy jaytanucustati." 
Psalms71:10 Timasirinacajjajj nayjjat parlasipjje, nayar jiwayañ munirinacajj jan walinac amtapjje." 
Psalms71:11 Jupanacajj sapjjewa: “Arctapjjam, catuntapjjam, Diosajj jupar apanucjjewa, janiw qhitis arjjatcaniti” sasa." 
Psalms71:12 Diosajjay, janiquiy nayat jayarst'amti; Diosajjay, janc'aquiy nayar yanapt'ir jutam." 
Psalms71:13 Nayar jiwayañ munirinacajj aynacht'apjjpan, tucusipjjaracpan, nayar ñankha luririnacajj t'akhesipjjpan, p'enk tucupjjaracpan." 
Psalms71:14 Nayasti jumaruquiw suyt'ascäma, juc'amp jach'aruw aptäma;" 
Psalms71:15 lacajjajj arjjatatamjjat yatiyani, khespiyäwimat sapür arsuni. Ucajj janiw nayatac amuyañjamäquiti." 
Psalms71:16 Tatay, jach'a luräwinacamat yatiyä, takpach asqui atipjatanacamat arsuraquï." 
Psalms71:17 Diosajjay, wayna cancañajjatpach yatichasista, nayasti jichhürcamaw muspharcañ luratanacamat yatiyascta;" 
Psalms71:18 Diosajjay, ch'ama karit pachan uñjascasasa, jank'o ñic'utan pachanccasasa, janiquiy jaytanuct'asistati, jutir mita jakenacar ch'amamat yatiyañajjaw wact'asquitu." 
Psalms71:19 Diosay, muspharcañ asqui cancañamajj alajjpachcamaw puri: jumajj jach'a luräwinac uñachaytajja; janiw qhitis jumjamajj utjquiti." 
Psalms71:20 Chijinac toke irpaquipasista, jach'a llaquinac uñt'ayista, ucampis machakat jacayjjetäta, orak mankhatpach wayst'asjjetäta;" 
Psalms71:21 aytat cancañajjaruw jiltayjjetäta, wasitat chuymachjjetäta." 
Psalms71:22 Nayasti yuspagar churäma, arsutam phokherïtamatsti, jumataquiw arpa jachsuyä; Diosajjay, Israel marcan Kollanapa." 
Psalms71:23 Tatay, lacajjajj jumar k'ochusajj cusisiniwa, juman khespiyat ajayojjas cusisiraquiniwa." 
Psalms71:24 Lajjrajjajj urpachaw asquïtamat arsuni, nayan aynacht'añajj munirinacajj mä p'enkaw atipjat uñjasipjjani." 
Psalms72:1 Diosajjay, asqui cancañam reyir catuyam, chekapar uñjañam reyin yokapar churam:" 
Psalms72:2 chekapar uñjañamp marcamar sarayañapataqui, jan yäkat wawanacamar chekap uñjañapataqui." 
Psalms72:3 Jach'a kollunacajj sumancañ apanpan, jisc'a kollunacas asqui cancañ puriyanpan." 
Psalms72:4 Reyejj jan yäkat jakenacar arjjatpan, jan cunan jaken wawanacapar yanapt'pan, t'akhesiyir jakenacarusti takjjatpan." 
Psalms72:5 ¡Reyejj jumar wiñay ajjsartirïpan! Intir uñtata, phajjsir uñtat jupajj utjpan." 
Psalms72:6 Ch'ijinacar purjjatir jalljamäpan, oraker jasaptayir jallur uñtatäpan." 
Psalms72:7 Asqui cancañajj urunacapan pankarpan, sumancañasti phajjsin tucusiñapcam utjpan." 
Psalms72:8 Maysa lamar kotat maysa lamar kotcam apnakpan, Eufrates jawirat kalltasa, aca orak tucuscama." 
Psalms72:9 Wasaran jaquir timanacapajj nayrakatapan quillt'asipjjpan, lak'a jallk'apjjaracpan." 
Psalms72:10 Tarsis marcanquir reyinacasa, kota tokenquir reyinacasa, jupataquejj kollk apsupjjpan, Sabá orakenquiri, Seba orakenquir reyinacajj churäwinacap loktapjjpan." 
Psalms72:11 Takpach reyinacajj jupa nayrakatar quillt'asipjjpan, takpach marcanacarac juparojj loktapjjpan." 
Psalms72:12 Jupaw art'asir jan cunan jakerojj antutayani, yanap jan jicjjatir llaquit jakerus yanapani." 
Psalms72:13 Jupaw jan cunan jakenacat qhuyapt'ayasini, aynacht'at jakerus yanapt'ani, jan cunan jakenacan jacañapsti khespiyaraquini." 
Psalms72:14 Jupaw t'akhesiñ taypit waysuni, jacañanacapan jila alanïtap laycu." 
Psalms72:15 ¡Reyejj jallallatäpan! Sabá oraket kori apanirapipjjpan, jupataquejj Diosat mayipjjapunpan, jupajj wiñayapun jach'añchatäpan." 
Psalms72:16 Trigojj yapunacan jilarquir utjpan, kollu patanacansti jilantaracpan; Líbano orakenjam granojj achuntpan, pampa alinacjam puyanacajj pokorpan." 
Psalms72:17 Reyin sutipajj wiñayataquïpan, aytat cancañapasti intir uñtat utjpan; takpach marcanacajj jupa tok asquinac catokapjjpan, takpach jakenacasti sapjjpan: “jumajj cusisiñanïtawa” sasa." 
Psalms72:18 Israelan Tatit Diosapajj jach'añchatäpan, jupaquiw muspharcañanac lurirejja;" 
Psalms72:19 kollan sutipajj wiñayatac jach'añchatäpan, khapak cancañapasti oraker phokhantpan. ¡Uqhamäpan!" 
Psalms72:20 Acawjaruw Isaí chachan David yokapan mayisitanacapajj tucusjje. 
Psalms73:1 Diosajj Israel marcataquejj munasiñaniwa, k'oma chuyman jakenacataquis munasiñaniraquiwa." 
Psalms73:2 Nayasti, mä juc'ampïsapänjja, tincuriscäyätwa, cayunacajjajj niyapuniw llust'äna;" 
Psalms73:3 jach'achasir jakenacar uñisitajj laycu, ñankha jakenacar kamirquipstir uñjatajj laycuraqui." 
Psalms73:4 Jupanacarojj janiw t'akhesiñajj llaquisiyquiti, c'umaraquiw sisantat sarnakapjje;" 
Psalms73:5 janiw jaken llaquip uñt'apquiti, janiraquiw mayninacjamas t'akhesipquiti." 
Psalms73:6 Ucat jach'achasiñajj collarapar tucu, nuwasiñasti isipar tucuraqui;" 
Psalms73:7 ñankha lurañamp pokontatäpjjewa, nayranacapajj thokorirjamawa, chuymapasti ñankha amtäwinac phullch'irayi." 
Psalms73:8 Sawcasiñampi, jach'achasiñampi, jan ajjsart'añampiw ñankha lurañataquejj ajjsarayapjje, nuwasiñataquis ajjsarayapjjaraqui." 
Psalms73:9 Lacapajj alajjpachataquiw achusi, lajjrapasti aca orakpach muyti." 
Psalms73:10 Ucat jakenacajj jupanacar jach'añchi, janiraquiw cuna juchsa jupanacan jicjjatquiti." 
Psalms73:11 Jupanacajj aqham jisct'asipjje: “¿Diosast uc yatispati? Alajjpachanquirist uc amuyaspati” sasa. 
Psalms73:12 Uqhamäpjjew ñankha lurir jakenacajja: jan qhitir yäkasaw kamirquipstapjje. 
Psalms73:13 ¡Inamayaquiw chuyma k'omachasitajjajja! ¡Inamayaquiw amparanacajj ñankhat jarekasitajjasa! 
Psalms73:14 Jan inact'asaw nuwat uñjasta, sapa willjtaw t'akhesiyat uñjasiracta." 
Psalms73:15 Nayatejj jupanacjam amtiriscäyätjja, wawanacamarojj aljantiriscäyätwa." 
Psalms73:16 Nayajj ucjjat amuyt'añ munäyäta, nayataquisti ucajj wali ch'amänwa:" 
Psalms73:17 Diosan kollan utapar mantasinac amuyta, cunarutejj puripcan uca." 
Psalms73:18 Jupanacarojj llust'a chekaruw uchtajja, aynacht'añaruw nuct'aractajja." 
Psalms73:19 Acatjamat t'unjatajj uñjasipjjani, ajjsarañamp tucjataw tucusipjjaraquini." 
Psalms73:20 Tatay, samcat p'arjjtasir jakjam sartascät ucapachasti, c'ari uñnakaparojj jisc'achätawa." 
Psalms73:21 Cunapachatejj chuymajjajj c'allc'uscäna, ajayojjajj t'akhesiyquïtän ucapachajja," 
Psalms73:22 nayajj jan amuyt'asir jalta chuyma jakëyätwa; nayrakatamansti uywar uñtatäyätwa. 
Psalms73:23 Nayasti jumamp chicapuniw utjasïyäta, jumaw cupi amparajjat wayjjarustajja," 
Psalms73:24 amtatamarjamaw irpistajja, khapak chekawjaruw puriyaraquitätajja." 
Psalms73:25 ¿Janit jumast alajjpachan nayatac utjctasti? Jumamp chic utjasajj janiw cuns aca oraken muncti. 
Psalms73:26 Chuymajjasa, janchejjas tucusisquiwa, ucampis Diosaw wiñay catokäwejjajja, jupaw chuymajjarojj catjjäsisqui." 
Psalms73:27 Jumat jayarst'irinacajj tucusipjjaniwa, arsutam jan phokherinacarusti t'unjätawa." 
Psalms73:28 Nayasti Diosaruw jac'achasï, ucaw nayarojj cusisiyitu. Tatay, jumaw arjjatirejjätajja, takpach luräwinacamat yatiyä." 
Psalms74:1 Diosay, ¿cunatarac apanuct'asipjjestasti? ¿Cunatarac k'apisiñamast tamamanquir ovejanacatac naqhisti?" 
Psalms74:2 Nayra pachatpach jicjjatasit marcamat amtasim, jumancañapatac khespiyat marcamat qhuyapayasim, utjäwim uchasit Sión kollut amtasiraquim." 
Psalms74:3 Aca t'unjat marcamar uñjirejj jutaquimaya: uñisirejj kollan utamarojj takpach t'unji. 
Psalms74:4 Timanacamajj atipjasin kollan utaman warurupjje, ¡yakha marcanquir wiphalanac sayt'ayasipjje," 
Psalms74:5 mantañawja puncuruw uchapjje! Ch'umi taypinquir lawa ch'iyirinacjamaw," 
Psalms74:6 hachamp, martillomp jawk'antasajj lawat lurat c'achachatanac t'unthapipjje." 
Psalms74:7 Kollan utamarojj ninampiw ircatapjje, oraketpach allinucusaw tincuyapjje, sutiman utjäwip ñankhachapjje." 
Psalms74:8 Nanacar takpach tucjañataquiw amtapjje; jumar yupaychañ chekawjanac ninamp phichhantapjje. 
Psalms74:9 Janiw kollan chimpunacajj uñjatäcjjeti, janiraquiw profetas utjcjjeti: janiw qhitis cunapachcam uqhämäñap yatquiti." 
Psalms74:10 Diosajjay, ¿cunapachcamarac nanacar uñisirinacast t'akhesiyapjjetanisti? ¿Cunapachcamarac sutim jisc'achapjjanisti?" 
Psalms74:11 ¿Cunatarac ch'eka amparam aythapistasti? ¿Cunatarac cupi amparam khomthapistasti? 
Psalms74:12 Diosajjay, jumaw nayratpach reyïtajja, jumaw aca oraken walja cutinac atipjtajja." 
Psalms74:13 Jumaw lamar kotarojj ch'amamamp payar jaljtaytajja, lamar kotanquir ajjsarcañ animalan p'ekep phallaytajja," 
Psalms74:14 jumaw Leviatán ajjsarcañ animalan p'ekep pallalljtajja, ucarusti, wasaranquir animalanacan mank'añapataquiw jakonuctajja." 
Psalms74:15 Jumaw uma jalsunacsa, jawiranacs jalsuytajja, jumaw jan wañsur jawiranac wañt'aytajja." 
Psalms74:16 Jumanquiw urusa, arumasa, jumaw phajjsimpiru, intimpirojj uchtajja;" 
Psalms74:17 jumaw acapach korpanac ayrunttajja, jumaraquiw jallupacha, awtipacha uchtajja." 
Psalms74:18 Tatay, janiquiy armasimti, timasirejj jisc'achtamwa, jan amuyt'asir marcasti sutim jisc'achi." 
Psalms74:19 Janiquiy nanacat armasipjjestati, tórtola jamach'ir uñtat pisi ch'amäpjjtwa; janiquiy ajjsarcañ animalanacar catuyapjjestati." 
Psalms74:20 Nanacamp arust'äwi luratamat amtasim, acapachajj jan wali lurañanacamp phokhantatawa." 
Psalms74:21 T'akhesiyat jakejj janiquiy p'enk tucpati, jan cunan jakenacarusa, llaquitanacarusa, sutim jach'añchir tucuyam." 
Psalms74:22 Diosay, sartasiquimaya, amtatamajj amtatapunïpan, jan amuyt'an jakenacan jumatac ñankha luratanacap amtasim." 
Psalms74:23 Janiquiy timanacaman ojjotanacap armasimti, janirac jumar kallantañatac wararitapats armasimti." 
Psalms75:1 Diosay, jach'añchapjjsmawa, yuspagar churapjjsma, sutim aytasipjjta, muspharcañ luräwinacam k'ochupjjta." 
Psalms75:2 Tatitojj siwa: “Waquiscan ucapachaw, cheka cancañamp taripä." 
Psalms75:3 Aca orakejj jakenacapamppachas qhathatiscpan, nayaw saphitpach thuruñchiripätjja” sasa." 
Psalms75:4 Jach'a jach'a tucur jakenacarojj sistwa: jan jach'achasipjjamti; ñankha lurir jakenacarusti saractwäjan p'ek waytapjjamti," 
Psalms75:5 ch'amamat jan ucatak p'ek waytapjjamti, janirac k'añu arunac parlirïpjjamti." 
Psalms75:6 Yanapajj janiw inti jalsutsa, inti jalantatsa jutquiti, janiraquiw wasaratsa, kollunacatsa jutquiti." 
Psalms75:7 Jan ucasti, Diosaquiw taripirejja: mayninacarojj aynacht'ayiwa, yakhanacarusti jach'aruw aptaraqui." 
Psalms75:8 Tatitojj k'apisiñ copa ast'atawa, t'amantat phokha vinon vasowa: orakenquir ñankha lurir jakenacasti konchumppach umantapjjani." 
Psalms75:9 Nayasti jach'a cancañapat yatiyapunïwa, Jacobon Diosapataquiw k'ochuraquï:" 
Psalms75:10 Jupaw ñankha lurir jakenacan munañan cancañap tincuyani, asqui jaken ch'aman cancañapsti jiljjatayaniwa." 
Psalms76:1 Diosajj Judá oraken uñt'atawa, sutipajj Israel marcan wali aytatawa;" 
Psalms76:2 kollan utapajj Jerusalenanquiwa, utjäwipajj Sión kollunquiwa." 
Psalms76:3 Ucawjan nuwasiñ armanac t'unjäna, jarc'akasiñanaca, espada mich'inac tucjaraquïna." 
Psalms76:4 Diosay, jumajj khapak cancañanïtawa, jach'a kollunacat sipan juc'ampïtawa." 
Psalms76:5 Ch'aman jakenacajj jakonucutäpjjänwa, nuwasir jakenacajj janiw nuwasirjamäpcänti, ¡jupanacajj wiñayataquiw icjjapjjäna!" 
Psalms76:6 Jacobon Diosapa, ajjsarayañampiquiw carronacampi, caballonacamp sayantaytajja." 
Psalms76:7 Jumajj ajjsarcayapunïtawa: ¿Qhitirac nayrakataman sayt'aspasti? ¿Qhitirac k'apisiñamar saycataspasti? 
Psalms76:8 Diosay, alajjpachatpach arsutam yatiytajja: orakejj ajjsariwa, amuct'araquiwa," 
Psalms76:9 cunapachatejj jumajj taripañatac sayt'ascta, t'akhesiyatanacar khespiyañatac sartascta ucapachajja." 
Psalms76:10 Jaken tipusiñapajj jumar jach'añchañaruw tucu, juc'a k'apisiñapas jumaruw jach'añchi." 
Psalms76:11 Tatitutac arsupjjam, phokhapjjaraquim, jupan jakenacapa, ajjsarcañ Diosar loktäwinac churapjjam." 
Psalms76:12 Jupaw p'ekechirinacarojj jan samanan tucuyi, acapachanquir reyinacarus ajjsarayaraqui." 
Psalms77:1 Diosaruw jach'at art'asta, nayar ist'añapataquiw mayista." 
Psalms77:2 Tatitojjay, llaquisiñajjan jumar thaksma, arumthapejj jan karjasisaw amparanac loktansma, ajayojjasti janiw chuymachasiñ jicjjatquiti." 
Psalms77:3 Diosat amtascta ucapachajj jachtwa, lup'isasti aynacht'ataw amuyasta." 
Psalms77:4 Tatay, jumaw nayranacajjarojj jan ch'irmthapiyctati, samaketajjajj janiw arsuyirjamäquituti." 
Psalms77:5 Nayra pach urunac amthapta, nayra maranacat amtasta;" 
Psalms77:6 arumanacajj k'ochurïcäyät ucjjat lup'ista, chuyma mankhejjan naya pachpaw jisct'asta:" 
Psalms77:7 “¿Tatitojj wiñayataquipunit jaytanucpachïstojja? ¿janipunit mayamp qhuyapayascjjestanejja? 
Psalms77:8 ¿Munasiñapajj tucusjjapunpachati? ¿Arsutapajj jan mayampitaquich tucusjjpachajja? 
Psalms77:9 ¿Diosajj munasiñapat armasjjpachati, jan ucajj, k'apisiñach chuymap jist'antpachajja?” sasa." 
Psalms77:10 Ucat sista: “¡Alajjpachanquirin jiwasanacar jan qhuyapayasjjatapajj walpun chuym usuyitu!” sasa. 
Psalms77:11 Tatitun muspharcañ luratanacapat amtasï, nayra pachanacan luratanacapata," 
Psalms77:12 take luratanacapat lup'isï, muspharcañ luratanacapata." 
Psalms77:13 Diosay, thaquinacamajj kollanawa: ¿qhiti diosarac jumjam ch'amanisti?" 
Psalms77:14 Jumaw muspharcañanac lurir Diosätajja. Jumaw marcanacar ch'amam uñacht'aytajja. 
Psalms77:15 Ch'amamampiw marcamarojj khespiytajja, Jacobon wawanacaparu, Josean wawanacaparu." 
Psalms77:16 Diosay, lamar kotajj jumar uñjasajj qhathatïnwa, mathapinacapasti ajjsarthapïnwa," 
Psalms77:17 kenayanacajj warasquir jall purjjatayäna, pachansti khejjokhejjonacaw sartäna, llijullijunacaw take chekan lliphikeraquïna." 
Psalms77:18 Khejjokhejjonacamajj jach'a thayamp chicaw ist'asïna, llijullijunacamajj acapachpach khant'ayäna, orakesti qhathatïnwa." 
Psalms77:19 Jumajj lamar kotan thac jist'arastajja, umanac taypinjam maqhattajja, ucampis janiw qhitis cayu tact'atam jicjjatcänti." 
Psalms77:20 Marcamarojj ovej tamar uñtat irpäyätajja, Moisesampin Aaronampin amparap toke." 
Psalms78:1 Marcajjay, yatichäwinacajjar ist'am, arunacajj ist'añatac jinchum alcatanita:" 
Psalms78:2 säwinac tokew arsü, nayra pachatpach imantatanac parlä." 
Psalms78:3 Cuntejj nanacajj ist'apcta, yatekapcta, cuntejj awquinacajj yatiyapquitu ucanacjja," 
Psalms78:4 janiw wawanacajjarojj imt'apcäti, jutir mita jakenacampiw Tatitur jach'añchapjjä, ch'amapampit muspharcañ luräwinacapampit yatiyapjjä." 
Psalms78:5 Diosaw Jacobotaquejj mä thac uñstayäna, Israel marcaruw camächit arunac churäna: jupaw nayra awquinacasarojj mayïna, wawanacapar yatichañataqui," 
Psalms78:6 jutir mita jakenacan uca leyinac yatipjjañapataqui, uca khepat yurir wawanacas uñt'apjjañapataqui, jupanacasti wawanacapar yatiyapjjañapataquiraqui;" 
Psalms78:7 Diosar takpach chuymapamp iyawsapjjañapataqui, luräwinacap jan armapjjañapataqui, arsutanacap wakaychapjjañapataqui;" 
Psalms78:8 nayra pachan jaquir awquinacapjam jan sarnakapjjañapataqui, kallasir t'ajjmar jan jakëpjjañapataqui, pächasir chuyman jan jakëpjjañapataqui, Diosat saraktir jan jakëpjjañapataquiraqui." 
Psalms78:9 Efraín ayllunquir arco apnaker jakenacajj, nuwasïw urunjja, kheparuw uñtjjapjjäna," 
Psalms78:10 janiw Diosamp arust'äwi luratanacap yäkapcänti, janiraquiw yatichäwinacaparus jaysañ munapcänti." 
Psalms78:11 Diosan luräwinacapat armasjjapjjäna, muspharcañ luräwinac uñjayatapat armt'jjapjjäna." 
Psalms78:12 Diosajj Egiptonquir Zoán orakenjja, awquinacapan uñjcañaw muspharcañanac luräna," 
Psalms78:13 lamar kotarojj payaruw jaljtayäna, uca chekaw jupanacarojj maqhatayäna, perkanacar uñtat umanac sayt'ayäna;" 
Psalms78:14 mä kenayaw urojj irpäna, nina khanaw arumajj irparaquïna," 
Psalms78:15 wasaran payaruw kark jaljtayäna, jupanacarusti jilarquir um umapjjañapatac churäna;" 
Psalms78:16 Diosajj jach'a karkat jawiranac jalsuyäna, jawiranacjam umanac jaltayäna." 
Psalms78:17 Jupanacasti juch lurasipcaquïnwa; Alajjpachanquirirojj wasaran kallasisipcaquïnwa: 
Psalms78:18 chuymanacapan Diosar yant'apjjäna, munañaparjam mank'a mayisa;" 
Psalms78:19 Diosataquejj arusipjjänwa: “¿Diosast wasaran mank'añ waquichaspati? 
Psalms78:20 Chekans jupajj karkar sac'antasaquiw um jalsuyäna, umasti jawiranacjamaw jalsüna; ucampis, ¿t'ant'a churaraquistaspati?, ¿marcapatac aych utjayaraquispati?” sasa." 
Psalms78:21 Tatitojj uc ist'asinjja, k'apisïnwa; ninjamaw Jacobotaquejj aktäna, Diosan k'apisiñapajj wallakënwa;" 
Psalms78:22 janiw jupanacajj Diosar take chuymamp alcatapcänti, janiraquiw yanapaparus iyawsapcänti." 
Psalms78:23 Diosasti kenayanacaruw mayïna, alajjpach puncunac jist'aräna:" 
Psalms78:24 maná t'ant'a jupanacjjarojj jalluyäna, alajjpach trigo mank'añapataquejj churäna;" 
Psalms78:25 jakesti angelanacan t'ant'ap mank'äna, Diosajj jilarquir mank'añ apayanïna." 
Psalms78:26 Alajjpachatpach inti jalsu thayamp phust'ayäna, ch'amapampiw aynach thayarojj irptäna:" 
Psalms78:27 lak'a tutucar uñtat aycha jalluyäna, lamar kota ch'allar uñtat jamach'inac jalluntayäna;" 
Psalms78:28 Diosajj chhujllanac taypiruw ucanac puriyäna, chhujllanacap jac'aruw puriyaraquïna." 
Psalms78:29 Jupanacasti sist'asiñcamaw mank'apjjäna, uqhamat Diosajj jupanacan munataparjam phokhäna." 
Psalms78:30 Ucampis, mank'at awtjayasiñap janïr apaktayascasa, lacapas mank'amp phokhantatäscän ucapachaw" 
Psalms78:31 Diosan k'apisiñapajj jupanacatac wallakëna; wali ch'aman jakenacaruw jiwarayäna, Israelanquir wali chachanacaruw tucusiyäna." 
Psalms78:32 Ucanac uñjcasasa, juch lurasipcaquïnwa; janiw Diosan muspharcañ luratanacaparojj iyawsapcänti." 
Psalms78:33 Ucat Diosajj jacañ urunacap mä phust'arjamac tucuyäna, wali t'akhesiñ taypina." 
Psalms78:34 Diosajj jiwaraycän ucapachaquiw juparojj thakapjjäna, janc'aquiw Diosar maqhatjjañataquejj thakapjjäna;" 
Psalms78:35 ucapachaquiw alajjpachanquir Diosat amtasipjjäna, ucapachaquiw jupanacar imascatapa, khespiyatap amuyasipjjäna." 
Psalms78:36 Lacaquiw juparojj parlapjjäna, lajjrampisti c'arintapjjänwa," 
Psalms78:37 janiw chuymanacapajj khan arsupcänti, janiraquiw arust'äwiparjamas phokhapcänti." 
Psalms78:38 Diosasti jupanacat qhuyapayasïnwa, ñankha luratanacap pampachäna, janiw jupanacarojj tucjcänti: walja cutiw k'apisiñap t'acurayasïna, janiw tipusiñapamp atipjayascänti;" 
Psalms78:39 Diosajj jupanacan janchïpjjatap amtasïna, jan cutjtir samanar uñtatäpjjatap amuyaraquïna." 
Psalms78:40 ¡Walja cutiw Diosarojj jan jaysapcänti, wasarancasaw chuym usuyapjjäna!" 
Psalms78:41 Wasitatsa, yant'asipcaquïnwa; Israelan Kollanaparuw llaquisiyapjjäna." 
Psalms78:42 Janiw jupanacajj amtasipcänti, Diosajj uñisiripan amparapat ch'amapamp khespiycän uca urutjja;" 
Psalms78:43 Egipto oraken muspharcañanac lurcän ucanacata, Zoán oraken jach'a luräwinac uñachaycän ucanacata," 
Psalms78:44 jawiranacar wilar tucuycän ucata, Egiptonquirinacajj jawiranacat jan umt'irjamäpcän ucata." 
Psalms78:45 Mich'isir chhichhillanqhanacamp jamp'atunacamp apayanïna, ucanacasti take cun mank'antapjjäna, tucjapjjaraquïna," 
Psalms78:46 jump'ipamp achuyat yapunacsti, t'ijut'ijunacaruw catuyäna," 
Psalms78:47 higo yapunacarojj chhijchhimpiw t'unjäna, uva yapunacarusti juyphimpiw tucjaraquïna." 
Psalms78:48 Vaca tamanacapajj chhijchhimpiw jiwarapjjäna, ovej tamanacapasti khejjokhejjompiw tucusipjjäna." 
Psalms78:49 Diosaw jach'a k'apisiñap jupanacatac nactayäna, k'apisiña, juchañchaña, llaquisiñ apayanïna, ucanacajj t'unjir qhitanacar uñtatäpjjänwa." 
Psalms78:50 Ucanac tokew Diosajj k'apisiñap samarayasïna: janiw jiwañat jupanacar khespiycänti, jan ucasti jiwañaruw catjjaruyäna;" 
Psalms78:51 pachpa Egipto marcan jiwarayäna, sapakat utanquir tayna yokall wawanacaru." 
Psalms78:52 Israel marcarojj mä ovej tamar uñtat irpsunïna; tamar uñtat wasar chekanjam anaquïna. 
Psalms78:53 Wali thuriñchat jupanacarojj irpäna, jan ajjsarayasipjjañapataqui, timanacaparusti lamar kotaw p'amp'antäna." 
Psalms78:54 Diosaw marcaparojj kollan oraker irpantäna, jupan cutsuyasit kollunacaruw puriyäna." 
Psalms78:55 Israel marcan nayrakatapatjja, Tatitur jan uñt'ir marcanacarojj ananucünwa; ayllunacaparuw orakenac laquintäna, chhujllanacapan jacayaraquïna." 
Psalms78:56 Jupanacasti Alajjpachanquir Diosarojj, arsutanacapar jan yäkasaw yant'apjjäna, kallasipjjaraquïna," 
Psalms78:57 awquinacapjamaw Diosarojj apanucupjjäna, mays uñtapjjaraquïna; p'aquisir arcor uñtataw c'umthapipjjäna;" 
Psalms78:58 jucha lurañ altaranacapampiw Diosarojj k'apisiyapjjäna, acapach diosanacar yupaychatapampiw Diosan chuymap mayjt'ayapjjäna." 
Psalms78:59 Diosajj uc uñjasajj k'apisïnwa, Israel marcarusti apanucupunïnwa;" 
Psalms78:60 Silo chekan utjäwip jaytanucjjäna, jakenac taypin kollan utjäwip apanucjjäna." 
Psalms78:61 Aytat cancañ chimpupsa, ch'aman cancañ chimpupsa, timasirinacapampiw apakayjjäna." 
Psalms78:62 Marcapataquejj wali k'apisitänwa, timapan espadaparuw jupanac catjjaruyäna." 
Psalms78:63 Waynanacajj ninamp naqhantayataw jiwarapjjäna; jakechasir tawakonacataquejj janiw warurt'añanacajj utjcjjänti; 
Psalms78:64 sacerdotenacajj espadamp jiwayatäpjjänwa, warminacapasti janiw jupanacat jachapcänti." 
Psalms78:65 Tatitusti iquïwitjam sartäna, vinomp machjat nuwasir jakjamaw p'arjjtäna," 
Psalms78:66 timanacaparojj atipjasin alisnucüna; wiñayataquiw p'enk tucuyäna. 
Psalms78:67 Josean wawanacaparus jakonucünwa, janiw Efraín ayllurojj ajllcänti:" 
Psalms78:68 Judá aylluruw ajllïna, Sión munat kollupampiruw chhijlläna." 
Psalms78:69 Kollan chekawjapjja, alajjpachjam utachäna, orakerjamaw wiñayatac thuriñchat sayt'ayaraquïna." 
Psalms78:70 David uywataparuw ajllisïna, uywa uyut juparojj irpsüna;" 
Psalms78:71 ovej tamanacan khepap sarañat irpakäna, Jacobon marcapar awatiñapataqui, Israel marcan awatiripäñapataqui." 
Psalms78:72 Davidasti takpach chuymampiw Tatitun marcapar awatïna, ch'iqhi cancañampiw uñjäna, irparaquïna." 
Psalms79:1 Diosajjay, Tatitur jan uñt'ir jakenacaw orakemarojj mantantanipjje, kollan templomaruw ñankhachapjje, Jerusalenarusti t'unjat marcaruw tucuyapjje." 
Psalms79:2 Uywatanacaman amayanacapjja, allkamärinacan mank'añapataquiw jakonucupjje, arquirinacaman janchipsti, orakenquir animalanacan mank'añapataquiw liwtapjje." 
Psalms79:3 Jerusalen thiyanacanjja, umar uñtat wilanacap wartapjje, janiw jiwatanacar p'amp'iris utjquiti." 
Psalms79:4 Nanac jac'an utjir marcanacan larusiñapäpjjtwa; nanacar muyuntirinacan sawcasiñapäpjjaractwa. 
Psalms79:5 Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac k'apisitaquïscätasti? ¿Cunapachcamarac k'apisiñamasti ninjam naqhanisti?" 
Psalms79:6 Jach'a k'apisiñampiy t'akhesiyam, jumar jan uñt'ir marcanacaru, sutim jan aytasir reyinacaru." 
Psalms79:7 Jupanacaw Jacobon marcaparojj mank'antapjje, utanacap t'unjapjjaraqui." 
Psalms79:8 Nayra awquinacajjan juchanacapatjja, janiquiy nanacar mutuyapjjestati; qhuyapayasiñamajj janc'aquiy purinpan, nanacajj aynacht'ataw uñjasipjjta." 
Psalms79:9 Khespiyir Diosajjay, juman jach'a sutim laycuy arjjatapjjeta, khapak sutim laycuy khespiyapjjeta, juchanacat pampachapjjaraquita." 
Psalms79:10 ¿Cunatarac jucharar jakenacast sasipcani: “Cawquincarac Diosapasti?” sasa. Nanacan uñjcañay Diosar jan uñt'irinacajj mutupjjpan, uywatanacamar jiwayapjjatapat t'akhesipjjaracpan." 
Psalms79:11 Catuntat jaken aykotapajj nayrakatamar purinpan: jiwañar juchañchatanacarusti ch'aman amparamampiy khespiyam. 
Psalms79:12 Tatay, marca masinacajjarojj pakallk cutimp cutiyam, jumar jan walinac luratapata." 
Psalms79:13 Nanacasti marcamjamajja, wiñayaw yuspagarapjjäma, tamamanquir ovejanacjamajja, wiñayaw jach'añchapjjäma, yupaychañ k'ochunac wiñayaw jayllipjjaraquï." 
Psalms80:1 Israel marcan awatiripa, ist'apjjaquitaya, tamar uñtat Josean marcapar irpiri, jaysapjjaquitaya; angelanac taypin khapak konuñaman kont'asiri, ist'apjjaquitaya." 
Psalms80:2 Efraín, Benjamín, Manasés uywatanacamarojj qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim. ¡Sartasiquimaya, ch'amamamp khespiyiriy jutapjjeta!" 
Psalms80:3 Diosay, cunjämäpcäyättejj uqhamaruy cutjtayjjapjjeta, ¡qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipjjeta, nanacasti khespiyataw uñjasipjjä!" 
Psalms80:4 Take ch'aman Dios Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac marcaman mayisitapampisti k'apisitaquïscätasti?" 
Psalms80:5 Mank'añ lantjja, jachañ churapjjesta, uma lantsti, juc'amp jachañanac utjayarapipjjesta;" 
Psalms80:6 marca jac'a masinacajjan sawcascañaruw tucuyapjjesta, timanacajjasti nanacat larusipjjetuwa." 
Psalms80:7 Take atipir Diosay, cunjämäpcäyättejj uqhamaruy cutjtayjjapjjeta, ¡qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipjjeta, nanacasti khespiyataw uñjasipjjä!" 
Psalms80:8 Jumaw Egiptot uva alir apsuntajja, Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenac jakonucusin ayrunttajja;" 
Psalms80:9 jumaw orak korsusajj k'omachtajja, uva alisti, saphintänwa, orakpacharuw phokhantaraquïna;" 
Psalms80:10 ch'iwipajj kollunac imt'äna, layminacapasti jach'a kokanacaruw imt'araquïna;" 
Psalms80:11 layminacapajj lamar kotcamaw purïna, ch'ichtir alinacas Eufrates jawircamaw puriraquïna." 
Psalms80:12 ¿Cunatarac muyuntat perkanacap tincunucuytasti? ¿Cunatarac thac saririnacamp uva alinac jiq'iraytasti? 
Psalms80:13 Ch'uminquir qhuchejj yap k'alpun tucji, ch'umi mankhanquir animalanacasti mank'supjjaraquiwa." 
Psalms80:14 Take ch'aman Diosay, uñtanjjapjjaquitaya: qhuyapayasir nayramamp alajjpachat uñtanim, uva yapum tumpasir jutam," 
Psalms80:15 amparamamp ayruntat uva alïchejjaya, juman ch'amaniptayat aliraquïchejjaya." 
Psalms80:16 Uca alir khakharirimpiru, ninamp phichcatirimpirojj k'apisiñamampiy tucusiyam;" 
Psalms80:17 juman ajllit chacharusti yanapt'aquimaya, jumaw uca chacharojj ch'amañchtajja," 
Psalms80:18 nanacasti janipuniw mayampis jumat sarakapcäti; jacañay churapjjeta, juma saparuquiw aytasipjjäma." 
Psalms80:19 Take atipir Diosay, cunjämäpcäyättejj uqhamaruy cutjtayjjapjjeta, ¡qhuyapayasiñamampiy uñtanipjjeta, nanacasti khespiyataw uñjasipjjä!" 
Psalms81:1 Cusisiñamp Diosar jach'añchapjjam, jupaw ch'amañchirisajja, Jacobon Diosapar cusisiñamp jallallapjjam:" 
Psalms81:2 chhulluchhullunacamp chic k'ochupjjam, muncay arpampi, salteriomp chic k'ochupjjaraquim." 
Psalms81:3 Machak phajjsi uñstipan trompet phust'apjjam, urt'a puripansti, phust'apjjaraquim ucürojj jiwasanacan jach'a urusawa." 
Psalms81:4 Ucajj Israel marcan camächit arunacapawa, Jacobon Diosapan arsutapawa," 
Psalms81:5 Josean sarnakañapatac utt'ayatänwa, Egipto oraket mistcän ucapacha. Nayajj jan uñt'at aru ist'äyäta:" 
Psalms81:6 “Jathintir k'epim callachimat apakjjsma, ch'ama tucuñ lurañamat samart'aysma." 
Psalms81:7 Llaquisiñaman jawsista, nayasti khespiysmawa, khejjoker kenay taypitpach nayajj jaysansma, Meriba phuju jac'an yant'sma." 
Psalms81:8 Marcajjay, ewjjanacajjar ist'am, Israel marca, nayarojj ist'aquitasma:" 
Psalms81:9 Janiw yakha marcanquir diosanacanïyätati, janiw yakha marcanquir diosanacarojj yupaychätati." 
Psalms81:10 Nayaw Tatitu Diosamätjja, nayaw Egipto marcat irpsunsma, lacam jist'aram, nayasti phokt'ämawa, sasa." 
Psalms81:11 “Marcajjasti janiw ist'añ munquitänti; Israel marcajj janiw jaysañ munquitänti. 
Psalms81:12 Ucat munañaparjam sarnakayta, munataparjamaw sarnakapjjaraquïna." 
Psalms81:13 Marcajjatejj ist'itasapänjja, Israel marcatejj thaquejjanjam sarasapänjja," 
Psalms81:14 mä ch'ipjjtanac timanacaparojj aynacht'ayiriscäyäta, uñisirinacaparusti mutuyiriscäyätwa.”" 
Psalms81:15 Tatitur uñisirinacajj ajjsarañat liwirtapjjaspa, juchañchäwipasti jan mayampitaquïspawa." 
Psalms81:16 Diosajj sumïr jac'umpiw marcaparojj mank'ayaspa, wasar misq'impiw umat pharjatap apakaraquispa." 
Psalms82:1 Diosajj alajjpach tantachasïwin sayt'asïna, angelanacan muyuntataw taripirinacarojj taripäna:" 
Psalms82:2 “¿Cunapachcamarac jan wal taripapjjätasti? ¿Cunapachcamarac ñankha lurir jakenacar arjjatapjjätasti? 
Psalms82:3 Jan yäkat jakeru, wajchar yanapt'apjjam, jan cunan jakeru, pist'ayasir jaker chekapar uñjapjjam," 
Psalms82:4 jan yäkat jakeru, jan cunan jakenacar arjjatapjjam, ñankha lurir jakenacat tuwakapjjam." 
Psalms82:5 “Jumanacasti janiw yatipctati, janiraquiw amuyt'apctasa, ch'amacan sarnakapjjtajja. Aca oraken utt'äwipasti qhathatisquiwa." 
Psalms82:6 Nayajj khanañchapjjsmawa: Jumanacajj diosäsipcamsa, takpachanis Alajjpachanquirin wawapäsipcam," 
Psalms82:7 take jakjamaw quipcac jiwapjjäta, munañan cancañamp apnaker jilïrinacjamaw aynacht'apjjaraquïta” sasa." 
Psalms82:8 Diosay, sartasiquimaya, orakerojj taripamaya, jumanquiw takpach marcanacajja." 
Psalms83:1 Tatay, janiquiy amuquïmti, Diosajjay, onjjtasiquimaya." 
Psalms83:2 Uñtam, timasirinacamajj ojjopjjewa, uñisirinacamasti jumar kallcatañataquiw p'ek waytapjje;" 
Psalms83:3 marcamataquiw jan walinac amtapjje, juman arjjatat jakenacamataquiw ñankha amtapjje." 
Psalms83:4 Jupanacajj nanacar t'unjiriw jutañ amtapjje, marcarojj chhaktayañ munapjje, Israelan sutipan jan mayamp amtatäñapataqui." 
Psalms83:5 Juma contra sayt'asiñataquiw mä arusjäwi lurapjje, mä wawaquiw jumataquejj arusipjje:" 
Psalms83:6 Edom orakenquirinaca, Ismael chachan allchhinacapa, Moab orakenquirinaca, Agaran allchhinacapa," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, Amón, Amalec jakenaca, Tiro oraken jaquir filisteonaca," 
Psalms83:8 Asirianquirinacas jupanacampiw chicachasipjje, Lot chachan wawanacaparus yanapt'apjjewa." 
Psalms83:9 Madián jakenacarjam jupanacarojj uñjam, Sísara jakenacarjam luram, Cisón jawira jac'anquir Jabín jakenacarjama:" 
Psalms83:10 camisatejj jupanacajj Endor chekawjan t'unjat uñjasipcäna, oraketaquis wanur tucupcän uqhama." 
Psalms83:11 Jilïr jakenacaparojj Oreb, Zeeb jilïrinacarjam luram, irpanacaparusti Zeba, Zalmuna, jakenacarjam luraraquim," 
Psalms83:12 jupanacajj Diosan ch'iji orakenacap catuntasiñ munapjjäna. 
Psalms83:13 Diosajjay, tutucan apat lak'arjam tucuyam, thayan apat waña laphinacarjam tucuyaraquim." 
Psalms83:14 Camisatejj ninajj ch'umir naqhantqui uqhama, cunjämtejj nina lawranacajj kollunac naqhantqui uqhama." 
Psalms83:15 Thayanacamamp jupanacar arctam, tutucanacamamp ajjsarayaraquim." 
Psalms83:16 Tatay, ajanuparojj p'enk tucuyam, juman sutim thakapjjañapataqui;" 
Psalms83:17 wiñayatac p'enkachat uñjasipjjpan, atipjat jiwarapjjpan;" 
Psalms83:18 juma sapac Diosätam yatipjjpan, aca orakjjar juma sapac Alajjpachanquirïtam yatipjjaracpan." 
Psalms84:1 ¡Take ch'aman Diosay, kollan utjäwimajj muncayawa!" 
Psalms84:2 Takpach almajjampiw temploman uyupancañ munta, takpach chuymajjampiw jacquir Diosar cusisit k'ochta." 
Psalms84:3 Take ch'aman Tatitojjay, Reyejjay, Diosajjay, jamach'inacamppachaw jac'aman tapacht'asi, golondrina jamach'isti, chhiwlinacapataquejj altaraman tap jicjjataraqui." 
Psalms84:4 Utaman jaquirinacajj cusisiñanïpjjewa, jan karjasisaw jumarojj yupaychapjjtam." 
Psalms84:5 Juman ch'amam catokerinacajj cusisiñanïpjjewa, kollumcam puriñ munirinacajj cusisiñanïpjjewa." 
Psalms84:6 Jachañ taypinjam saraquipapcan ucapachajja, uma jalsuruw tucuyapjjani, jallumppachaw asquinacamp phokhantani;" 
Psalms84:7 ch'amanacapajj jiljjataniwa, Sión marcansti Diosaruw uñjapjjani." 
Psalms84:8 Take ch'aman Diosay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, Jacobon Diosapa, arnakasitajjarojj jaysaquimaya." 
Psalms84:9 Nanacar arjjatir Diosay, juman ajllit reyerojj qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim." 
Psalms84:10 Mä uruquis utaman kamañajj juc'amp sumawa, warank urunac ankancañat sipana. Nayajj Diosan templopancañ munta, ñankha lurañ chekawjan jacañat sipana." 
Psalms84:11 Diosaw khant'ayistu, imaraquistu; jupaw qhuyapayasiñampi, aytat cancañamp churi. Jan camscay asqui jaquir jakenacarojj, Tatitojj munasiwa, jach'aruw apti, asquinacap churaraqui." 
Psalms84:12 ¡Take ch'aman Diosay, jumar alcatir jakenacajj cusisiñaniwa!" 
Psalms85:1 Tatay, aca marcamataquejj sinti munasiñanïtawa, Jacoborojj cusisiñap cutcatayjjtawa," 
Psalms85:2 marcaman ñankha luratanacap pampachtawa, takpach juchanacapajj p'amp'antatawa," 
Psalms85:3 k'apisiñam apanucjjtawa, k'apisiñaman nactañaparojj llamp'uchjtawa." 
Psalms85:4 Khespiyir Diosajjay, mayamp khespiyjjapjjaquita, k'apisiñamajj nanacatac tucusjjpan." 
Psalms85:5 ¿Nanacataquejj k'apisitaquïscätati, jan ucajj, mara marach k'apisïtajja?" 
Psalms85:6 ¿Janit wasitat jacañ churapquitäta, marcaman jumamp cusisiñapataquejja?" 
Psalms85:7 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñam uñacht'ayapjjeta, khespiyäwim churapjjeta." 
Psalms85:8 Cuntejj Tatitojj arscän uc ist'ä: Diosajj sumancañjjat marcaparojj yatiyani, takpach chuymamp jupar iyawsirinacaru, jan wasitat ñankha lurapjjañapataqui." 
Psalms85:9 Diosajj jac'asancapuniwa, iyawsirinacapar khespiyañataqui; jach'a cancañapasti orakesan utjasini." 
Psalms85:10 Qhuyapayasiñamp asqui cancañampiw jiquisipjjani, sumancañamp chekapar uñjañampiw mayacht'asipjjani," 
Psalms85:11 asqui cancañajj oraket mistuni, chekapar uñjañasti alajjpachatpach uñtanini." 
Psalms85:12 Tatit pachpaw jall apayanini, orakesasti sum achuraquini." 
Psalms85:13 Asqui cancañajj jupan nayrakatap sarani, jupataquisti thac waquicharapini." 
Psalms86:1 Tatay, ist'aquitaya, llaquimp atipjatätwa, wajcharaquïtwa;" 
Psalms86:2 jacañajjarojj arjjataquimaya, juman asqui arquirimätwa. Jumaw Diosajjätajja, jumar iyawsir uywatamarojj khespiyaquimaya." 
Psalms86:3 Tatay, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, jumaruw sapür art'asinsma;" 
Psalms86:4 Tatay, uywataman chuymaparojj cusisiyaquimaya, juma tokeruw chuymajj loktanta." 
Psalms86:5 Tatay, jumajj munasiñanïtawa, juch pampachiriraquïtawa, jumar art'asirinacataquejj qhuyapayasirïtawa." 
Psalms86:6 Tatay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, achict'asitajjarojj jaysaquimaya;" 
Psalms86:7 llaquisiñajjan jumar art'asinsma, juman ist'asirïtam laycuw mayisinsma." 
Psalms86:8 Tatay, janiw qhiti diosas jumjamajj utjquiti, janiraquiw luratanacamjamajj utjquiti." 
Psalms86:9 Tatay, jumaw takpach marcanac utjaytajja, jupanacasti nayrakatamaruw jutapjjani, jumar yupaychiri, sutimar jach'añchiri." 
Psalms86:10 Jumajj wali jach'a ch'amanïtawa, muspharcañanac lurtajja, juma sapaquiw Diosätajja." 
Psalms86:11 Tatay, thaquimay uñacht'ayita, jan saraktas arcañajjataqui. Chuymajjarusti sutim wakaychir tucuyam." 
Psalms86:12 Diosajjay, Tatitojjay, takpach chuymajjampiw yupaychäma, sutimarusti wiñayataquiw jach'añchä." 
Psalms86:13 Munasiñamajj nayatac jan tupt'cayawa, wiñay mic'ayat nayar waysustajja." 
Psalms86:14 Diosajjay, jach'a jach'a tucurinacaw nayatac sartapjje, khoru jakenacaw nayar jiwayañatac thakapjjetu, janiw jumarus ajjsarapctamti." 
Psalms86:15 Jumasti, Tatay, qhuyapayasir Diosätawa, llamp'u chuymani, munasiñani, asqui Diosätawa." 
Psalms86:16 Uñtaniquitaya, nayat qhuyapt'ayasita, aca uywatamar khespiyam, ch'amam churaraquim." 
Psalms86:17 Khanpun munasiñam uñacht'ayita, uñisirinacajjasti uc uñjapjjpan, p'enk tucupjjaracpan, ¡Tatay, jumaw yanapista, chuymacharaquista!" 
Psalms87:1 Diosan marcapajj kollan kollunacjjar utt'ayatawa. 
Psalms87:2 Tatitojj Sión marcan puncunacaparojj munasiwa, Jacobon takpach utjäwinacapat juc'amp munasi." 
Psalms87:3 Diosan marcapa, wali aytcañanacaw jumjjat yatiyasi:" 
Psalms87:4 “Nayar uñt'ir marcanac taypit aytä: Egiptoru, Babiloniaru, Filistearu, Tiroru, Etiopiaru; uca marcanacajj jumïpan utjapjje.”" 
Psalms87:5 Sión marcatjja, sapjjaniwa: “Aca marcasa, qhuri marcas jupan utjayatawa, Alajjpachanquir pachpaw utt'ayi” sasa." 
Psalms87:6 Tatitojj marcanacan kellkatap taypiruw kellkantani: “Aca marcajj jupïpan utji” sasa. 
Psalms87:7 K'ochurinacampi, thokorinacampisti sapjjaniwa: “Nayan jacañajjajj jumat juti” sasa." 
Psalms88:1 Tatitojjay, Khespiyir Diosajjay, urojj yanapam maysma, arumasti nayrakataman arnakasta;" 
Psalms88:2 mayisitajjajj jac'amcamay purinpan, arnakasitajjarojj ist'aquimaya." 
Psalms88:3 Ajayojjajj llaquinacamp aynacht'atawa, jacañajjasti jiwañar jalantañampiwa;" 
Psalms88:4 jiwatanacamp chic jaqhutäjjtwa, jan ch'aman jaker uñtatätwa," 
Psalms88:5 jiwatanac taypin jaytanucutätwa; nuwasïwin jiwirinacar uñtatätwa, amay imäwin p'amp'antatanacar uñtatätwa, juman jan tumpatäqui ucanacjama, juman armatäqui ucanacjamaraqui." 
Psalms88:6 Wali mic'ay mankharuw jakontista, ch'amac mankhanacaruw liwintista." 
Psalms88:7 Nayaruw k'apisiñam samarasista, cunayman jan walinacampiw aynacht'ayista;" 
Psalms88:8 uñt'at masinacajjat jayarst'ayista, jupanacan uñiscay nayarojj tucuyista. ¡Jan jaltquir catuntat jakjamätwa!" 
Psalms88:9 Nayranacajjasti jachcäwejj juyqhuptatawa. Sapüruw arnakasinsma, amparanacajj juma toker loktansma." 
Psalms88:10 ¿Jiwatanac laycusti muspharcañanac lurasmati? ¿Jiwatanacasti jumar yuspagarañatac sartasipjjaspati? 
Psalms88:11 ¿Cheka cancañamatsti amay imäwin yatiyasispati? ¿Munasiñamatsti jiwatanac taypin parlasispati? 
Psalms88:12 Take cun armt'añ jiwañ ch'amac chekansti, ¿qhitirac cheka cancañamampita, muspharcañ luräwinacamampit aytanisti?" 
Psalms88:13 Nayasti, Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, wali willjtat jumar mayisinsma." 
Psalms88:14 Tatay, ¿cunatarac jisc'achistasti? ¿Cunatarac nayatac maysa tok uñttasti?" 
Psalms88:15 Wayna cancañajjatpach llaquit uñjasta, jiwa korpan uñjasiracta; ajjsarcay jan walinac jumat catoksma, janiw juc'amp catokerjamäcti." 
Psalms88:16 Ajjsarcañ k'apisiñamajj nayjjaruw puriwayi, atipjat uñjasiyaraquitu," 
Psalms88:17 uruy arumaw k'añu umar uñtat muyuntitu, uma jithjamaw chhaktayitu." 
Psalms88:18 Uñt'at masinacamp nayamp chic sarnakerinacamp jayarst'ayjjesta: jichhasti, ch'amacanacaquiw nayamp chic sarnakerëjje." 
Psalms89:1 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamat wiñayapuniw k'ochü, juman asquïtamat jan karjasisaw yatiyä." 
Psalms89:2 Wiñay munasiñamat arsü; arsutam phokherïtamat yatiyä, alajjpachjam jan mayjt'irïtamat parlaraquï." 
Psalms89:3 Jumaw Davidampejj arust'äw luräyätajja, ajllit uywatamarojj arsüyätawa:" 
Psalms89:4 “Allchhinacamaruw wiñayatac utt'ayä, reyit juma lanti kont'asipjjañapataqui” sasa." 
Psalms89:5 Tatay, alajjpachajj muspharcañ luratanacam yatiyi, asqui cancañamasti angelanac taypin yatiyasiraqui." 
Psalms89:6 ¡Tatay, janiw cawquïr diosas alajjpachanjja, jumamp chicachascaspati!" 
Psalms89:7 Take ch'aman ajjsarcay Diosätawa, alajjpachanquirinacamp muyuntatätawa." 
Psalms89:8 Take ch'aman Tatit Diosay, takpach ch'amajj jumanquiwa, cheka cancañasti jumar muyuntiriwa; janiw qhitis jumjamajj utjquiti." 
Psalms89:9 Jumaw lamar kotarojj llamp'uraytajja, jach'a mathapinacarus t'acuraytajja;" 
Psalms89:10 jumaw lamar kotanquir ajjsarcañ animalar t'unjtajja, ch'aman amparamampiw timanacamarojj ananuctajja." 
Psalms89:11 alajjpachas acapachas jumanquiwa, jumaw acapach lurtajja, takpach oraken utjirinacs luraractajja." 
Psalms89:12 Jumaw amsta toksa, aynach toksa lurtajja, Tabor kollump Hermón kollumpejj cusisitaw sutim jach'añchapjje." 
Psalms89:13 Amparamajj take ch'amaniwa; ch'eka amparamajj jan atipcayawa, cupi amparamasti wali ch'amaniwa." 
Psalms89:14 Chekapar uñjañampi, asqui cancañampiw reyi konuñamarojj thurjjäsiyi, munasiñamp, cheka cancañampiw jumar jicjjatirejj jutapjje." 
Psalms89:15 Tatay, jumar cusisiñamp yupaychir marcajj cusisiñaniwa: khanamamp khant'ayat sarnaker marcajj cusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms89:16 juman sutim laycuw sapür cusisiñanïpjje, juman asqui cancañam laycuw cusisipjje." 
Psalms89:17 Jumaw ch'amapätajja, aytat cancañapätasa, qhuyapayasiñam laycuw ch'amanacajjajj jiljjati." 
Psalms89:18 Jiwasanacan arjjatirisajj Tatituwa, Reyisasti Israel marcan Kollanapawa." 
Psalms89:19 Nayra pachanjja, uñstäwi tokew parläyätajja, iyawsirinacamarusti aqham säyätawa: “Marcajj taypit jan ajjsarir chacharuw ajllista, juparuw jach'ar aptta, yanaparacta." 
Psalms89:20 ¡David uywatajjaruw jicjjatta! kollan aceitemp jawintasaw reyit utt'ayta; 
Psalms89:21 yanapajjajj janipuniw jupatac pist'caniti, ¡ch'amajjampiw jupar ch'amañchä!," 
Psalms89:22 janiw timanacajj jupar jaljjatapcaniti, janiraquiw khoru jakenacas atipapcaniti." 
Psalms89:23 Timanacaparojj takjjatäwa; uñisirinacaparusti t'unjäwa. 
Psalms89:24 Munasiñajjampi, asqui cancañajjamp catokani, sutejj laycuw ch'amapajj jiljjatani." 
Psalms89:25 Ch'amapampi, apnakañ cancañapamp thurt'ayä, Mediterráneo lamar kotat kalltasa, Eufrates jawircam puriyasa." 
Psalms89:26 Jupajj nayar art'asitaniwa: “Jumaw Awquejjätajja, Diosajjätasa, khespiyir Karkajjätasa” sasa." 
Psalms89:27 Nayasti tayna yokall wawat uñt'asjjä, acapachanquir reyinac taypin jilïrit uñt'asjjaraquï." 
Psalms89:28 Munasiñajjajj jupa laycojj wiñayäniwa, jupamp arust'atajjasti thuruñchatäniwa." 
Psalms89:29 Allchhinacapajj jupa lantiw marcarojj wiñay apnakapjjani, alajjpachan utjañapcamaw reyi konuñancapjjani." 
Psalms89:30 “Wawanacapatejj camächit arojjar jaytanucupjjani, janirac arsutanacajjarjamas jacapcani," 
Psalms89:31 leyinacajjtejj ñankhachapjjani, janirac arsutanacajj imapcan ucajja," 
Psalms89:32 jawk'añ thujrumpiw juchanacapat mutuyä, jawc'añampiw jan wali luratanacapat t'akhesiyä."
