Psalms89:33 Davidar munasitajjsti janiw jaytanuccäti, janiraquiw jupar arsutajj phokhañs armascäti." 
Psalms89:34 Janiw jupamp lurat arust'äwirojj p'aquintcäti, janiraquiw arsutanacajjs mayjt'aycäti." 
Psalms89:35 Kollan cancañajj laycuw juramento lurta, janiw juparojj c'arintcäti:" 
Psalms89:36 allchhinacapajj jupa lantiw marc apnakapjjani, intin utjañapcamaw reyi konuñancapjjani." 
Psalms89:37 ¡Phajjsir uñtat thurt'atäpjjaniwa! ¡Alajjpach utjañcamajj thurt'atäpjjapuniniwa!.” 
Psalms89:38 Jumasti ajllit reyirojj jakonuctawa, jisc'acharactawa; jupampejj jachjayastawa." 
Psalms89:39 Uywatamampejj arust'äwi p'aquinttajja; pillupsti orakeruw jakonuctajja. 
Psalms89:40 Takpach perkanacap p'iyanoktajja; ¡marcanacap t'unjaractajja! 
Psalms89:41 Take jakew uca chek saraquipasajj lunthatji; uta jac'a masinacapasti jupat sawcasipjje. 
Psalms89:42 Jumajj timasirinacaparuw ch'amañchtajja, uñisirinacapampiw larusiytajja." 
Psalms89:43 Ucampis jupataquejj espadap muthuptaytajja, nuwasiñansti janiw yanapctati." 
Psalms89:44 Aytat cancañap alt'aytajja; reyi konuñapsti orakeruw jakorpaytajja; 
Psalms89:45 walja maranac jacañap apaktajja, p'enka tucuñampiw phokhantaractajja." 
Psalms89:46 Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac imantasïtasti? ¿K'apisiñamasti ninjamapunit naqhanisti?" 
Psalms89:47 Tatay, amtasim, jacañ urunacajjajj juc'ataquiquiwa; juman irnokat jakejj juc'a urunacaquiw jaqui." 
Psalms89:48 Janiw qhitis wiñay jaccaspati, janiw qhitis jiwan ch'amapat khespcaspati." 
Psalms89:49 Tatay, ¿cawquincarac qhuyapayasiñamasti? ¿Cawquincarac Davidar churañatac juramentomp arsutamasti?" 
Psalms89:50 Tatay, uywatanacaman t'akhesitapat amtasim: jakenacan toketanacapjja, chuymajjaruw apascta." 
Psalms89:51 Tatay, timasirinacamajj uqham t'akhesiyapjjetu, ajllitamarojj uqham sapa chellktan jisc'achapjje." 
Psalms89:52 Tatitojj wiñayatac jach'añchatäpan: ¡Uqhamäpan! 
Psalms90:1 Tatay, mitat mitjjar jakenac taypinjja, jumaw nanacan imantasiñajjätajja." 
Psalms90:2 Kollunac janïr utjquipana, acapachas janïr utjquipana, wiñayatpacha, wiñayataquiw jumajj Diosätajja." 
Psalms90:3 Jumaw jakerojj lak'ar tucuytajja, “Jakenaca, lak'ar cuttjjapjjam” sasa." 
Psalms90:4 Jumataquejj warank marajja, wasür tucusir urur uñtataquiwa, arum ch'amacajj tucusqui uqhämaquiwa." 
Psalms90:5 Jakerojj munquir jan munquir aptajja, samcäcaspas uqham chhaktaytajja," 
Psalms90:6 jakenacajj korar uñtataquïpjjewa, alsusinjja willjta tokeruw pankarsu, jayp'u tokerusti pharsusin jiwsjjaraqui." 
Psalms90:7 ¡Juman k'apisiñamajj tucjapjjetuwa, jan amuyun antutapjjetu!" 
Psalms90:8 Jucha luratanacajjajj nayrakataman uñsti, jamasat luratanacajjsti khanaruw mistuytajja." 
Psalms90:9 Jacañ urunacajjajj k'apisiñam laycuw tucusi, jacañajjasti mä samanjamaquiw tucusi." 
Psalms90:10 Yakhepanacajj pakallk tunc maraw jacapjje, ch'amaninacasti quimsakallk tunc maracamaw puripjje, ucatak jacañasti, jan walt'añanacamp, khathami sarnacañampic apani. ¡Urunacasti jakenacjamaw janc'ac tucusiraqui!" 
Psalms90:11 ¿Qhitirac k'apisiñamamp lurjatanac yatisti? ¿Qhitirac k'apisiñam uñt'isti? 
Psalms90:12 Jacañ urunacajjay jaqhuñ yatichapjjeta, amuyunacajjan yatiñ cancañ jicjjatañapataqui." 
Psalms90:13 Tatay, uñtanjjapjjaquitaya, ¿cunapachcamarac apanucupjjetätasti? Aca uywatanacamat qhuyapt'ayasim;" 
Psalms90:14 willjtatpach qhuyapayasiñamamp phokt'apjjeta, jacañajjansti cusisiñampiw k'ochupjjä;" 
Psalms90:15 kawkha urunacatejj t'akhesiyapquista ucqharac cusisiyapjjeta, walja maranac t'akhesipjjatajj laycu." 
Psalms90:16 Uywatanacamajj luratanacam uñjapjjpan, wawanacapasti khapak cancañam uñt'apjjaracpan." 
Psalms90:17 Tatitun munasiñapajj jiwasanacampïpan. Tatay, luräwinacajjarojj juc'ampiy jiljjatayam, ¡jïsa, irnakatanacajjarojj juc'ampiy thuruñcham!" 
Psalms91:1 Alajjpachanquir Take atipirin imat sarnaker jakejja," 
Psalms91:2 Tatiturojj siwa: “Jumätaw imantasiñajjajja, jarc'akasiñajjasa, Diosajjay, jumaruw takpach chuymamp alcatsma” sasa." 
Psalms91:3 Jupaquiw sipit känat khespiyätam, jupaquiw jiwañ usut jarc'akätam," 
Psalms91:4 chhekhanacapampiw imjjatätam, chhekhanacap mankhäjjan imantasïta. Amparapajj jarc'acasiñar uñtataw imätam." 
Psalms91:5 Ajjsarcay arum ch'amacarojj jan ajjsarcamti, urun flecht'at mich'inacarus jan ajjsarcamti," 
Psalms91:6 ch'amacamp chic purinir usunacarus jan ajjsarcamti, uru khanan jiwarayir usunacarus janirac ajjsarcamti;" 
Psalms91:7 ch'ekäjjamanjja, warankaw jiwarani, cupëjjamansti tunca warankaw tucusini, jumarusti janiw cunas camächcätamti." 
Psalms91:8 Nayranacamamp uñjañataquiquiw ucancäta, ñankha lurir jakenacan catokäwip uñjäta." 
Psalms91:9 Jumajj Tatitumpiw imayastajja, Alajjpachanquiriruw arjjatirimat uchastajja." 
Psalms91:10 Chijejj janiw jac'achascätamti, usus janiraquiw utamar purincaniti," 
Psalms91:11 Diosajj angelanacaparuw qhitanini, sarnakäwim imañataqui." 
Psalms91:12 Amparapjjaruw apapjjätam, cayuman kalar jan lanctasiñapataqui;" 
Psalms91:13 catarinacarusa, asïrunacarus takjjatascaquïtawa, leonanac taypinsa, ajjsarcañ animalanac taypinsa, sarnakascaquïtawa." 
Psalms91:14 “Nayar munasitap laycusti, juparojj khespiyäwa, nayar uñt'atap laycusti, juparojj imaraquïwa." 
Psalms91:15 Nayar art'asitan ucapachajja, mayisitaparojj jaysäwa. Jupamp chicaw t'akhesiñancä, llaquisiñat irpsü, jach'aruw aptä;" 
Psalms91:16 walja maranacaw jacayä, ¡khespiyäwejjampiw jupar cusisiyaraquï!”" 
Psalms92:1 Alajjpachanquir Tatay, jumar jach'añchañajj sumapuniwa, sutimar k'ochuñas cusisiñaraquiwa," 
Psalms92:2 willjtanacan qhuyapayasiñamat yatiyañajj asquiwa, arumanac arsutam phokherïtamat parlañajj asquiraquiwa," 
Psalms92:3 arpanacamp chica, salteriomp chica k'ochuñajj cusisiñawa, citaran jachsuyatapamp chic jaylliñajj cusisiñaraquiwa." 
Psalms92:4 Tatay, luräwinacamajj nayatac cusisiñawa, luratanacamajj cusisiñampiw phokt'itu." 
Psalms92:5 ¡Tatay, luratanacamajj sinti muspharcayawa, amtatanacamajj jan amuyt'cayawa!" 
Psalms92:6 Jan amuyt'an jakequiw ucanac jan amuyt'quiti, pisi chuyma jakequiw jan amuycaraquiti." 
Psalms92:7 Jucharar jakenacajj korjamas alintasipcpan, ñankha luririnacajj pankarasipcpansa, jupanacajj wiñayatac tucjatäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms92:8 Jumasti, Tatay, wiñayaw jach'anctajja." 
Psalms92:9 Tatay, timasirinacamajj tucusipjjaniwa, ñankha luririnacasti ananucutäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms92:10 Jumaw ch'am yapjjatista, orko vacan ch'amapar uñtata, p'ekejjarusti k'apquir kollampiw warjjatista." 
Psalms92:11 Nayranacajjajj timanacajjar aynacht'ir uñjani, jinchunacajjasti aynacht'atap ist'apjjani." 
Psalms92:12 Asqui jakenacajj palma kokanacjamaw jilapjjani, Líbano orakenquir cedro kokanacjamaw jiltapjjani." 
Psalms92:13 Tatitun utapan ayruntatäpjjewa, Diosasan uyupan pankarapjje;" 
Psalms92:14 ch'ama karita tokerus achu churasipcaquiniwa, suma laphintata, ch'umintataw sayt'apjjani," 
Psalms92:15 Arjjatir Tatitojjan asquïtap yatiyapjjani, imasirejjan jan ñankha lurirïtap arsupjjani." 
Psalms93:1 Tatitojj reyiwa, reyi isimp isintatawa, Tatitojj ch'aman cancañamp isthapitawa: Jupaw acapach sum thurt'ayi, jan onjjtquir utt'ayaraqui." 
Psalms93:2 Tatay, reyi konuñamajj wiñayatpach jan onjjtquiriwa, jumasti wiñay jaquirïtawa." 
Psalms93:3 Tatay, jawiranacajj khothutiwa, jawiranacajj mathapinac sartayi." 
Psalms93:4 Tatay, jumasti alajjpachanjja, ch'aman mathapinacat juc'amp ch'amanïtawa, lamar kotanacan ojjenacapat jila ch'amanïtawa." 
Psalms93:5 Tatay, arsutanacamajj asquiwa, jan onjjtquiriwa, kollan cancañajj utamar wiñay c'achachiriwa." 
Psalms94:1 Uqhämat uqhäm cutsuyasir Tatay, uqhämat uqham apsusir Diosay, uñachayasimaya." 
Psalms94:2 Jumaw acapachar taripirïtajja, sartasiquimaya, jach'achasirinacarojj lurataparjamay phokhañcham." 
Psalms94:3 Tatay, ¿cunapachcamarac ñankha luririnacast utjanisti? ¿Cunapachcamarac jucharar jakenacast cusisinisti?" 
Psalms94:4 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj k'añu arunac parlirïpjjewa, jach'a jach'a tucurïpjjewa." 
Psalms94:5 Tatay, jupanacaw marcamarojj tucjapjje, jumar iyawsirinacaruw t'akhesiyapjje;" 
Psalms94:6 ijma warminacaruw jiwayapjje, korpacht'ayasir jakenacaruw jiwayapjje, wajchanacaruw jiwayapjje," 
Psalms94:7 janis Tatitojj uñjcaspajj uqham amuyasipjje, janis Jacobon Diosapajj amuycaspajj uqham lup'ipjjaraqui." 
Psalms94:8 Pisi amuyt'an jakenaca, amuyt'asipjjam, jan amuyt'asirinaca, ¿cunapacharac amuyt'asjjapjjätasti?" 
Psalms94:9 Jinchu luriristi, ¿janit ist'canisti? nayranac utjayiristi, ¿janit uñjcanisti?" 
Psalms94:10 Marcanacar chekachiristi, ¿janit mutuycanisti? Jaker yatichiristi, ¿janit yatcanisti?" 
Psalms94:11 Tatitojj yatiwa, t'ajjmar amuyunacac jaken lup'irïtapa." 
Psalms94:12 Tatay, juman yatichat jakejj cusisiñaniwa, camächit arunacam yatichat jakejj cusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms94:13 t'akhesiñ urunacan samarañ catokani, ñankha lurir jaketaquisti, aynacht'añap waquicharapisqui." 
Psalms94:14 Tatitojj janiw marcaparojj apanuccaniti, janiraquiw jupanquirinacarus jaytanuccaniti." 
Psalms94:15 Asqui jakejj jakerjam uñjatäniwa, asqui chuymaninacasti suma urunac jicjjatapjjani." 
Psalms94:16 ¿Qhitirac jucharar jakenacat arjjatitanisti?, ¿qhitirac ñankha luririnacat jarc'aketanisti?" 
Psalms94:17 Tatitutejj jan yanapquitasapänjja, niyaw jiwatanacamp chicäjjeriscäyäta." 
Psalms94:18 Tatay, niy lanctasiñampïscäyät ucapachaw, qhuyapayasiñamajj yanapt'itu." 
Psalms94:19 Llaquinacajjajj walipun yapjjatascän ucapachaw chuymachäwimampejj cusisiyista. 
Psalms94:20 Ñankha lurir taripirinacasti, ¿jumamp mayachasispati? leyin sutipar jan chekapar uñjirinacasti, ¿jumamp chicäspati?" 
Psalms94:21 Jupanacajj asqui jaker ñankha lurañ amtapjje, jan juchan jaker jiwayañataquiw juchañchapjje." 
Psalms94:22 Tatitusti nayan imantasiñajjawa, imantasiñ karkajjajj Diosawa." 
Psalms94:23 Jupaw ñankha luratanacapat mutuyani, pachpa ñankha luräwinacap laycuw t'unjatäpjjani, Diosasaw jupanacarojj tucjani." 
Psalms95:1 Jutapjjam, Tatitur k'ochupjjañäni, arjjatir khespiyirisar cusisit jayllipjjañäni;" 
Psalms95:2 yuspagarañ chuymamp nayrakatapar mantapjjañäni, phust'añanacamp chic jupar jallallapjjañäni." 
Psalms95:3 Tatitojj jach'a ch'aman Diosawa, c'ari diosanacat sipan munañaniwa." 
Psalms95:4 Acapach mic'ay kollunacajj amparapanquiwa, kollunacan ch'utunacapas jupanquiwa." 
Psalms95:5 Jach'a lamar kotajj jupanquiwa, jupaw lamar kotarojj utjayi, amparapampiw waña orak utjayaraqui." 
Psalms95:6 Jutapjjam, orakcam konkort'asipjjañäni; Tatitun nayrakatapar quillt'asipjjañäni, jupaw jiwasanacarojj irnokestu." 
Psalms95:7 Jupaw Diosasajja, jiwasanacasti jupan awatit marcapäpjjtanwa, jupan irpat ovej tamapäpjjaractanwa. Tatitun arup jichhür ist'apjjam:" 
Psalms95:8 “Meriba orakenjam chuymanacam jan kalarayasipjjamti, Masah wasaranjam chuymanacam jan ch'ollkheptayapjjamti:" 
Psalms95:9 nayra awquinacamajj luräwinacajj uñjcasasa, nayarojj yant'apjjetänwa." 
Psalms95:10 Pusi tunc maraw qhä jakenacataquejj k'apisïyäta, ucat säyäta: Aca marcajj wali pantjataw sarnake; ¡janiw arsutanacajjar jaysapquiti!, sasa." 
Psalms95:11 Ucat k'apisiñajjan juramento lurta: Janiw samarañajjar mantapcaniti” sasa. 
Psalms96:1 Tatitutaquejj machak k'ochu k'ochupjjam, acapachanquir jakenaca, Tatitur k'ochupjjam," 
Psalms96:2 Tatitur k'ochupjjam, sutip jach'añchapjjam, sapürupun atipjäwipat yatiyapjjam." 
Psalms96:3 Aytat cancañapat marcanacar yatiyapjjam, muspharcañ luräwinacapat take jakenacar parlapjjam:" 
Psalms96:4 Tatitojj take ch'amaniwa, jach'ar aptatäñapajj waquisipuniwa, c'ari diosanacat sipan wali ajjsarcayawa." 
Psalms96:5 Yakha marcanacan diosanacapajj janiw cunäpquisa, Diosasti alajjpach luririwa;" 
Psalms96:6 aytat cancañampi, lliphipquir khanampiw nayrakatapanqui, ch'amampi, muspharcay cancañampiw kollan utapanqui." 
Psalms96:7 Take marcanquir jakenaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, Tatitun aytat cancañapampiru, ch'amapampir jach'añchapjjam," 
Psalms96:8 Tatitun khapak sutip wakaychapjjam; kollan uta ankäjjaparojj loktanacamp mantapjjam; 
Psalms96:9 kollan templopan Tatitur yupaychapjjam, takpach jakepun nayrakatapan qhathatpan." 
Psalms96:10 Marcanacarojj sapjjam: “Tatituw reyejja” sasa. Jupaw acapacharojj jan onjjtañapatac utt'ayi; jupaw marcanacarojj chekapar uñjas apnake. 
Psalms96:11 Alajjpachajj cusispan, orakejj c'uchiraspan, lamar kotan utjirinacas cusisipjjpan;" 
Psalms96:12 pampanacasa, ucan utjirinacas jallallapjjpan, ch'uminquir kokanacas cusisiñat wararipjjpan," 
Psalms96:13 Tatitojj niyaw purisinqui, acapachar sarayiriw jac'achasisinqui, chekapar uñjasaw acapacharojj apnakani, cheka cancañampiw marcanacarojj sarayani." 
Psalms97:1 Takpach orakejj cusispan, jan jact'cay islanacajj cusisipjjpan. ¡Tatituw Reyejja!" 
Psalms97:2 Jupajj ch'amac kenayanacamp muyuntatawa, chekapar uñjañampi, asqui cancañampiw reyi konuñaparojj ch'amañchi," 
Psalms97:3 ninajj jupan nayrakatap saranti, muyuntir timanacaparusti naqhantiwa." 
Psalms97:4 Khejjokhejjonacapajj acapach khantayi, uc uñjasinsti orakejj ajjsarañat qhathati." 
Psalms97:5 Kollunacajj liq'ir uñtataw umatati, takpach orakenin nayrakatapana." 
Psalms97:6 Alajjpachajj asqui cancañap yatiyi, marcanacasti khapak cancañap uñjapjje;" 
Psalms97:7 acapach diosanacar yupaychirinacajj ajjsarthapipjjewa, yakha diosanacat jach'achasirinacas aynacht'apjjewa. Takpach diosanacaw nayrakatapan konkort'asipjje." 
Psalms97:8 Tatay, Sión marcampi, Judá orakenquir marcanacampejj arsutanacamat walpun cusisipjje." 
Psalms97:9 Tatay, jumaw take orakpachan jilïrïtajja, takpach diosanacat sipan juc'amp jilanctawa." 
Psalms97:10 Tatitojj ñankhar uñisir jakenacarojj munasiwa, asqui arquirinacapan jacañaparojj imiwa, ñankha lurir jakenacan amparapat khespiyaraqui." 
Psalms97:11 Khanajj asqui jaketaquejj c'ajtiwa, cusisiñasti chekap chuyman jakenacataquejj khantaraquiwa." 
Psalms97:12 ¡Asqui jakenaca, Tatitump cusisipjjam, kollan sutip jach'añchapjjam!" 
Psalms98:1 Tatitutaquejj machak k'ochu k'ochupjjam, muspharcañanac luratap laycu: ¡cupi amparapampiw atipji, kollan amparapaw atipayi!" 
Psalms98:2 Tatituw atipjatap yatiyi, asqui cancañap marcanacar uñacht'ayi:" 
Psalms98:3 Israel marca laycusti, qhuyapayasiñapampita, arsutap phokherïtapampit amtasi. Takpach oraken jaquirinacaw Diosasan atipjatap uñjapjje." 
Psalms98:4 Orakpachan jaquirinaca, Tatiturojj cusisiñamp k'ochupjjam, art'asipjjam, jallallapjjam, k'ochupjjaraquim:" 
Psalms98:5 Tatitutaquejj k'ochupjjam, arpamp chic jayllipjjam." 
Psalms98:6 Rey Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, pinquillumpi, trompetanacamp chic k'ochupjjam." 
Psalms98:7 Lamar kotamp ucan utjirinacampejj khothutipjjpan, acapachasa, ucan jaquirinacas ojjtapjjaracpan;" 
Psalms98:8 jawiranacajj amparanacap t'ajjllirasipjjpan; kollunacajj mayachasisin cusisiñamp art'asipjjpan," 
Psalms98:9 orak apnaker jutir Tatitutaqui. Jupaw chekapar uñjañampejj oraker apnakani, marcanacarusti chekaparuw qhusqhac uñjani." 
Psalms99:1 ¡Tatitojj reyiwa! Reyi konuñapajj angelanacjjar utt'atawa. Marcanacajj qhathatipjjpan, takpach orakes onjjtaracpan." 
Psalms99:2 Tatitojj Sión kollun ch'amaniwa, takpach marcanacjjar kont'atawa." 
Psalms99:3 Ajjsarcañ sutipajj jach'añchatäpan: ¡Tatitojj Kollanawa! 
Psalms99:4 Jumajj ch'aman reyïtawa; asqui cancañar munasirïtawa; jumaw chekap sarnakañ uñstaytajja. Jumaw Jacobon wawanacaparojj sum uñjtajja, chekaparuw tariptajja, chekaparuw t'akaractajja." 
Psalms99:5 Tatit Diosasar jach'añchapjjam, cayunacap nayrakatar quillt'asipjjam: ¡Tatitojj Kollanawa!" 
Psalms99:6 Moisesamp Aaronampejj sacerdotenacap taypin aytatawa, Samuelojj sutip jach'añchirinac taypin aytatawa, jupanacajj Tatituruw art'asipjjäna, jupasti mayisitanacaparojj ist'änwa." 
Psalms99:7 Tatitojj kenay taypitpach jupanacarojj parläna, jupanacasti arsutanacap phokhapjjäna, camächit aru catokapjjaraquïna." 
Psalms99:8 Tatay, Diosajjay, jupanacarojj ist'äyätawa, jupanacataquejj juchat pampachir Diosäyätawa, ñankha luratanacapat t'akhesiyir Diosaraquïyätawa." 
Psalms99:9 Tatit Diosasar jach'añchapjjam, kollan kollup nayrakatar konkort'asipjjam: ¡Tatit Diosasajj Kollanawa!" 
Psalms100:1 Tatitur cusisiñamp k'ochupjjam, takpach orakenquirinaca," 
Psalms100:2 cusisit chuymamp Tatitur loktapjjam, jallallt'asis nayrakatapar mantapjjam." 
Psalms100:3 Amtasipjjam, Tatitojj Diosawa: jupaw irnokestu, jiwasanacasti jupancapjjtanwa, jupan marcapäpjjtanwa, ovej tamapäpjjaractanwa." 
Psalms100:4 Puncunacapar jac'achasipjjam, kollan utapar mantapjjam, yuspagar churapjjam, sutip jach'añchapjjaraquim." 
Psalms100:5 Tatitojj munasiñaniwa, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa, cheka cancañapasti jan tucusquiriwa." 
Psalms101:1 Munasiñaruw jach'añchañ munta, asqui cancañaruw aytañ munta, Tatay, jumataquiw k'ochuñ munta;" 
Psalms101:2 chekap jacañpun munta. ¿Cunapacharac nayar tumpitätasti? Reyi utajjansa, sarnakäwejjajj jan camscayäniwa," 
Psalms101:3 ñankha amtäwinacarojj janiw nayranacajjamp uñtcäti. Diosat saraktirinacarojj janiw uñcatcäti, janipuniw jupanacampejj jac'achayascäti." 
Psalms101:4 Ñankha lurañ lup'iñanac apanucü, janipuniw ñankha lurañ muncti." 
Psalms101:5 Jamasat jake masipjjat parlirirojj amuct'ayäwa; uñch'uquisir jakempiru, jach'a jach'a tucurimpirojj janiw alekac uñcatcäti." 
Psalms101:6 Asqui jakenacaruw nayajj uñtä, nayamp chic jacapjjañapataqui; chekap sarnaker jakequiw loktitani." 
Psalms101:7 Sallkantañamp sarnaker jakejj janiw utajjan jaccaniti; ¡c'arinac parlir jakejj janiw nayrakatajjan acht'caniti! 
Psalms101:8 Ñankha lurir jakenacarojj sapa willjtaw amuct'ayä, jan wali jakenacarojj Tatitun marcapat jakonucü." 
Psalms102:1 Tatay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, ¡arnakasitajjajj jac'amcam purinicpanaya!" 
Psalms102:2 Janiquiy llaqui urun nayatac maysa uñtamti. Naya tokeruy jinchum alcatanim; art'asinsma ucapachajj ist'aquitaya. 
Psalms102:3 Jacañajjajj jewk'er uñtataw tucusisqui, ch'aqhanacajjasti nina sanc'jamaw naqhantasqui;" 
Psalms102:4 chuymajjajj aynacht'atawa, korar uñtataw wañsusqui; ¡janiw mank'as munasquituti!" 
Psalms102:5 Jachcäw sarnakcatajj ch'aqhanacaruw janchejj lip'catjjetu. 
Psalms102:6 Wasaranquir pelícano jamach'ir uñtatätwa, lakayanacan jaquir jucu jamach'jamätwa;" 
Psalms102:7 janiw iquis purquituti, uta patjjanquir saparst'at jamach'jamätwa." 
Psalms102:8 Timasirinacajjajj jan inact'asaw tokepjjetu; naya contra k'apisisaw ñankhachapjjetu. 
Psalms102:9 T'ant'a lantejj khellac mank'ta, umañajjasti jachampiw quituntasi," 
Psalms102:10 k'apisiñam laycu, tipusiñam laycu. Jumaw sayt'ayista, uca khepat tincuyaraquista." 
Psalms102:11 Jacañ urunacajjajj ch'iwir uñtataquiw saraquipi, korar uñtataw wañsuscaracta." 
Psalms102:12 Jumasti, Tatay, wiñayapuniw jactajja, sutimajj wiñayapuniw amtatäni." 
Psalms102:13 Sartasimaya, Sión marcat qhuyapt'ayasim, t'akhesiñ urunacajj phokhasjjewa, pampachjjañam urojj purinjjewa." 
Psalms102:14 Uywatanacamajj marcapan kalanacaparuw munasipjje, t'unjat perkanacapat jachapjje." 
Psalms102:15 Takpach marcanacaw Tatitun khapak sutip wakaychapjjani, acapach reyinacasa, aytat cancañamataquiw ajjsarthapipjjani," 
Psalms102:16 Tatitojj Sión marcar wasitat utachcani ucapacha, khapak cancañapan uñstcan ucapacha," 
Psalms102:17 apanucut jaken mayisitap ist'cani ucapacha, achict'asitanacapar jayscani ucapacha." 
Psalms102:18 Acanacajj jutir mita jakenacatac kellkatäpan, machakat utt'ayat marcan Tatitur jach'añchañapataqui." 
Psalms102:19 Tatitojj kollan utjäwipatpach uñtanïna, orakerojj kollan alajjpachatpach uñtanïna," 
Psalms102:20 catuntatanacan aykotanacap ist'añataqui, jiwañatac juchañchatanacar khespiyañataqui:" 
Psalms102:21 Tatitun sutipat Sión marcan yatiyañataqui, aytat cancañapat Jerusalenan parlañataqui;" 
Psalms102:22 jakenacajj take marcanacat mayachasipcan ucapacha, reyinacasti Tatitur yupaychañatac tantachasipcan ucapacha." 
Psalms102:23 Jupaw chica thaquin ch'amajjar thayjtayi, jacañ urunacajj juc'aptayaraqui." 
Psalms102:24 Nayasti juparojj sistwa: “Diosajjay, janiquiy jacäwejj chicatpach apakestati” sasa. ¡Maranacamajj janiw tucuyanïquiti!" 
Psalms102:25 Orakerojj kalltatpach sum utt'aytajja; alajjpachasti amparamamp luratawa; 
Psalms102:26 take ucanacajj tucusjjaquiniwa, jumasti pachpaquïsctawa, ucanacajj isir uñtataw merk'esipjjani, tucusir isir uñtatäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms102:27 Jumasti pachpaquïsctawa, jacañ maranacamajj janiw tucuscaniti." 
Psalms102:28 Uywatanacaman wawanacapajj suma uñjataw jacapjjani, allchhinacapajj nayrakataman wiñayaw jacapjjani." 
Psalms103:1 Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä, takpach chuymajjampiw kollan sutip jach'ar aptä." 
Psalms103:2 Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä, janiw qhuyapayasiñapat armascäti." 
Psalms103:3 Tatituw takpach juchanacajjat pampachitu, jupaw take usunacajjat c'umarachitu;" 
Psalms103:4 jupaw amay imäwit khespiyitu, juparaquiw munasiñamp qhuyapayasiñamp phokt'itu;" 
Psalms103:5 Tatituw asquinacamp cusisiyitu, pacar uñtat machakar tucuyaraquitu." 
Psalms103:6 Tatitojj chekaparuw uñji, t'akhesir jakenacaruw arjjati;" 
Psalms103:7 Moisesaruw thaquip yatichäna, Israelan wawanacaparusti muspharcañ luräwinacap uñachayäna." 
Psalms103:8 Tatitojj munasiriwa, qhuyapayasiriwa, janiw mäc k'apisirïquiti, qhuyapayasiñan phokhantatawa." 
Psalms103:9 Janiw wiñay tokenokquistuti, janiraquiw wiñayas tim amjjäsquiti." 
Psalms103:10 Janiw jucha luratasarjam t'akhesiyquistuti, janiraquiw juchanacasatjam mutuyquistuti;" 
Psalms103:11 camisatejj alajjpachajj oraket jayanquejja, uqhämaw munasiñapajj arquirinacapataquejja;" 
Psalms103:12 camisatejj inti jalsut inti jalantcam wali jayajja, uqhäm jiwasanacat juchanacas jayarst'ayistu." 
Psalms103:13 Cunjämatejj mä awquejj wawanacapat qhuyapayasquejja, uqhamaw Tatitojj iyawsirinacapat qhuyapayasi;" 
Psalms103:14 jupajj jiwasanacan lak'ätas yati, ñek'it luratäpjjatas yatiraqui." 
Psalms103:15 Jaken jacañapajj korar uñtataquiw uñsti, pankarar uñtataquiw pankarsu:" 
Psalms103:16 ch'aman thayamp jalarayatajj chhaktjjewa, janiraquiw qhitis mayamp uñjcjjeti." 
Psalms103:17 Tatitur wakaychirinacataquisti munasiñapajj wiñayawa, asqui cancañapajj allchhin allchhipataquis utjascaquiwa:" 
Psalms103:18 arust'äwiparjam sarnakerinacataqui, arsutanacaparjam phokherinacataqui." 
Psalms103:19 Tatitojj alajjpachan reyi konuñap utt'ayasi, ch'aman cancañapajj alajjpach acapach apnake." 
Psalms103:20 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam: angelanacapa, arsutanacap phokherinaca, arupar janc'ac jaysirinaca." 
Psalms103:21 Tatitun alajjpach tamanacapa, jupar jach'añchapjjam, munañap phokher loktirinacapa, jach'ar aptapjjam." 
Psalms103:22 Takpach luratanacapa, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, jupan apnakat orakpachan jach'ar aptapjjam. ¡Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä!" 
Psalms104:1 Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä, ¡Tatitojjay, Diosajjay, jach'a ch'amanipunïtawa! C'ajquir khapak cancañampiw isthapistajja," 
Psalms104:2 khana isimpiw llawuntastajja. Alajjpacharojj isir uñtat janatattajja. 
Psalms104:3 Jumaw utjäwimarojj umanacjjar utt'aytajja; kenayanacajj juman sarnakañ carronacawa, thayan chhekhanacapjjan sarnakaractajja." 
Psalms104:4 Thayanacajj qhitanacamawa, nina lawranacasti arsutam phokherinacawa." 
Psalms104:5 Oraken saphiparojj sumpun thurt'asiytajja, utt'ayatäcän ucawjat janipun onjjtañapataqui." 
Psalms104:6 Orakerojj lamar kotaw imjjatäna, isïcaspas uqhamaw janjjatäna. Umanacasti kollunacaruw chhaktayäna." 
Psalms104:7 Ucampis ch'aman arunacam ist'asajj sarjjänwa, khejjokhejjo arunacam ist'asajj janc'aquiw jaltjjäna;" 
Psalms104:8 kollunacar maqhatasa, pampanacar sarakasa, cawqharutejj uchctas ucawjaruw acht'jjäna," 
Psalms104:9 cawqhancañapäcäntejj ucawjaruw purjjäna, oraker jan mayamp chhaktayañataqui." 
Psalms104:10 Jumaw uma jalsunacat jawiranac utjaytajja, kollu taypinjam jalañapataqui;" 
Psalms104:11 uca jawiranacat pampanquir animalanacajj umapjje, ch'uminquir asnonacas umat pharjatajj umt'apjjaraqui." 
Psalms104:12 Jawir jac'anacan jamach'inacajj jacasipjje, layminac taypin chhiwekepjjaraqui." 
Psalms104:13 Jumaw alajjpachatpach kollunacarojj karpantajja, alajjpach umampiw orakerojj sisantaytajja." 
Psalms104:14 Uywanacataquiw koranac jiltaytajja, jaken yapuchat alinac jilayaractajja, oraket mank'añ apsusiñapataqui," 
Psalms104:15 ch'amanchir t'ant'a jicjjatañapataqui, chuymapar cusisiyir vino apsusiñapataqui, ajanupar lliphipiyir aceite jicjjatañapataqui." 
Psalms104:16 Kokanacajj umat pharjatap apakasipjje, Tatitun ayrut Líbano orakenquir cedro kokanacasti ucat umt'apjjaraqui." 
Psalms104:17 Uca kokanacanjja, jisc'a jamach'inacamppachaw tapachasipjje, cigüeña jamach'inacasti ucan jacasipjjaraqui." 
Psalms104:18 Karkanacajj cabranacatac uchatawa, mic'ay kollunacasti añathuyanacan imantasiñapawa." 
Psalms104:19 Phajjsirojj pachanac jaqhuñapataquiw uchtajja, intejj jalantañap uñt'asiwa." 
Psalms104:20 Ch'amacanac uchtajja, ch'amac arum purinipansti, ch'uminquir animalanacajj misturanipjjewa;" 
Psalms104:21 leonanacajj mank'atjam wararipjje, Diosat mank'a mayisipjje." 
Psalms104:22 Inti jalsunipansti imantasjjapjjewa, utjäwinacaparuw iquintjjapjje;" 
Psalms104:23 jakesti luräwiparuw mistu, jayp'ucamaw yapupan irnake." 
Psalms104:24 ¡Tatay, luräwinacamajj waljapuniwa! Yatiñ cancañampiw take cuns lurtajja, orakejj luratanacaman phokhantatawa." 
Psalms104:25 Lamar kotajj jan tupt'cayawa, jan jact'cay jaquirinacaw utji; jach'anaca, jisc'anaca;" 
Psalms104:26 lamar kot chicaw barconacajj tuyupjje, Leviatán jach'a animalas ucanquiwa, lamar kotamp anatasiñapataquiw lurtajja." 
Psalms104:27 Take ucanacajj jumaruw suyasipctam, waquisitapar mank'a churañamataqui." 
Psalms104:28 Jumaw mank'a churtajja, jupanacasti catokasipjjewa; amparam lokatatcta ucapachasti, asquinacampiw sist'asipjje;" 
Psalms104:29 ajanum imantascta ucapachajj mulljasipjjewa; samanap apakcta ucapachasti jiwjjapjjewa, lak'aruw tucjjapjjaraqui." 
Psalms104:30 Jacañ samanam qhitancta ucapachasti, machakat utjayataw uñjasipjje. Uqham lurasaw oraker machakaptaytajja." 
Psalms104:31 ¡Tatitun khapak cancañapajj wiñayawa! ¡Tatitojj luratanacapampiw cusisi! 
Psalms104:32 Diosajj uñtanqui ucapachajj orakejj qhathatiwa, kollunacar llamct'qui ucapachasti, jiwk'e mistuyapjje." 
Psalms104:33 Jacañajjcamaw Tatitur k'ochü, jaccasaw Diosajjatac jayllï:" 
Psalms104:34 k'ochojjajj Tatitun chuymapar purquirïpan, nayasti jupanacpun cusisiñ jicjjatä." 
Psalms104:35 Jucharar jakenacajj aca oraken tucusipjjpan, ñankha lurir jakenacajj jiwarapjjpan. ¡Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä! ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms105:1 Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, sutip aytapjjam, muspharcañ luratanacapat marcanacar yatiyapjjam;" 
Psalms105:2 aytat cancañapar k'ochupjjam, muspharcañ luratanacapat yatiyapjjam;" 
Psalms105:3 kollan sutipat cusisipjjam, Tatitur thakerinacajj cusisipjjpan." 
Psalms105:4 Tatitur iyawsapjjam, ch'amapar alcatapjjam, jan karjasis ajanup thakapjjam." 
Psalms105:5 Muspharcañ luratanacapat amtasipjjam, muspcañ luräwinacapampi, arsutanacapamp amtapjjam;" 
Psalms105:6 Abraham uywatapan sarakerinacapa, jupan ajllit Jacobon wawanacapa," 
Psalms105:7 Tatituw jiwasanacan Diosasajja, jupaw takpach oraker apnake." 
Psalms105:8 Warank mita jakenacas saraquipascpan, janipuniw arust'äwipajj armatäcaniti:" 
Psalms105:9 Abrahamamp arust'äw luratapata, Isaacar juramentomp arsutapata," 
Psalms105:10 Jacobotac ley utt'ayatapata, Israel marcatac wiñay arust'äwi luratapata:" 
Psalms105:11 Jupajj sänwa: “Jumaruw Canaán orak churjjäma, jumar wact'ir churäwimjam catuyjjäma” sasa." 
Psalms105:12 Diosajj janiw t'akhesiñap muncänti, jupanacajj mä juc'aniquïpcän ucapachasa, sart'ir jakëpcän ucapachasa," 
Psalms105:13 marcat marca muyupcän ucapachasa, jach'a marcat yakha marcar sart'apcän ucapachasa," 
Psalms105:14 Diosajj janiw qhitin t'akhesiyañaps muncänti, jupanac laycuw reyinacarus mutuyäna." 
Psalms105:15 Jupajj sänwa: “Ajllitanacajjarojj jan llamct'apjjamti, profetanacajjarojj jan ñankha lurapjjamti” sasa." 
Psalms105:16 Qhä orakerojj mach'a apayanïna: mank'añanac jupanacat apakäna," 
Psalms105:17 ucampis Josearuw jupanacan nayrakatap qhitäna, uywatarjam aljantapcän ucaru;" 
Psalms105:18 cadenanacampiw cayunacapat ñach'antapjjäna, ¡carcelaruw uchantapjjäna!" 
Psalms105:19 Tatitun arupaw Josearojj yant'äna, Josean yatiyäwip phokhasiñapcama." 
Psalms105:20 Reyejj Josear antutayañataquiw arsüna, walja marcanacar apnakerejj antutnucuyjjänwa," 
Psalms105:21 reyejj utap apnakerit Josearojj utt'ayäna, takpach yänacap uñjañapataquiw catuyäna," 
Psalms105:22 jilïrinacar yatichañapataquiw utt'ayäna, jilïr jakenacaruw yatiñanïpjjañapatac yatichayäna." 
Psalms105:23 Israel marcajj Egipto marcaruw mantäna, Jacobojj Cam oraken korpachasïna." 
Psalms105:24 Diosajj marcaparojj waljaniptayänwa, uñisirinacapat juc'amp ch'aman tucuyäna." 
Psalms105:25 Egipto orakenquirinacarusti chuymanacap mayjt'ayäna Diosan marcapar uñisipjjañapataqui, uywatanacapar jan walinac lurapjjañapataqui." 
Psalms105:26 Diosasti Moisés uywataparuw qhitäna, Aarón ajllit loktiriparuw qhitaraquïna," 
Psalms105:27 jupanacasti Diosan muspharcañanacap wasaran uñacht'ayapjjäna, ¡Cam oraken muspharcañanac lurapjjäna!" 
Psalms105:28 Diosajj ch'amac apayanisin ch'amact'ayäna, jupanacasti janiw arunacapar ist'apcänti;" 
Psalms105:29 jawir umanacap wilaruw tucuyäna, chawllanacaparusti jiwarayänwa;" 
Psalms105:30 orakepajj c'ayranacamp phokhantatänwa, jamp'atojj reyin iquiñ utapamppachan aywtäna." 
Psalms105:31 Diosajj arumpiquiw jach'a chhichhillanqhanac apayanïna, Egipto orakpacharuw chhichhillanqhamp phokhantayäna." 
Psalms105:32 Jallu lantejj chhijchhiw purintäna, orakerusti nina lawranac apayanïna." 
Psalms105:33 Uva alinacamp higo alinacamp tucjäna, Egipton utjir kokanac tincurayäna." 
Psalms105:34 Diosajj t'ijut'ijunacan puriniñapataquejj aruc arsüna, jan jact'cay t'ijut'ijunacaw purintäna," 
Psalms105:35 orakepan utjir koranac mank'supjjäna, yapunacapan achunacap tucsupjjaraquïna." 
Psalms105:36 Pachpa Egiptoruw jiwamp mutuyäna, sapa utanquir tayna yokall wawaruw jiwayäna." 
Psalms105:37 Diosajj korimp kollkemp apt'asit marcaparojj irpsunïna, ayllunacap taypinsti, janiw qhitis aynacht'cänti;" 
Psalms105:38 Egipto orakenquirinacajj mistjjer uñjasajj cusisipjjänwa, jupanacajj wali mulljatäpjjänwa." 
Psalms105:39 Diosajj mä kenayampiw jupanacarojj imjjatäna, arum ch'amacarusti ninampiw khantayarapïna." 
Psalms105:40 Mank'añ mayitajja, p'isakanac apayanïna, alajjpach t'ant'ampiw sisarayäna." 
Psalms105:41 Karkaruw jist'jäna, umasti karkat jalsunïna, wasaran jawir umanacajj jaltäna." 
Psalms105:42 Kollan arusjäwit amtasïna, Abraham loktiripar arsutat amtasïna." 
Psalms105:43 Diosajj ajllit marcaparojj cusisit irpsunïna, cusisiñat arnakt'asisaw mistunjjapjjäna." 
Psalms105:44 Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenacan orakenacap catuyäna, yakha marcanacan orakenacap churjjäna:" 
Psalms105:45 Tatitun arsutanacap imapjjañapataqui, leyinacap phokhapjjañapataqui. ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms106:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, munasiñanïtap laycu, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms106:2 ¿Qhitirac Diosan muspharcañ luräwinacap arsuspasti? ¿Qhitirac aytat cancañapat jach'añchaspasti? 
Psalms106:3 Cheka cancañar yäkerinacajj cusisiñaniwa, chekapar uñjirinacas cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms106:4 Tatay, marcamar munasitam laycuy nayat amtasita, khespiyir jutcät ucapachay nayar tumpasita:" 
Psalms106:5 ajllitanacaman cusisiñap uñjañajjataqui, marcaman cusisiñapamp cusisiñajjataqui." 
Psalms106:6 Nayra awquinacajjar uñtataw jucha lurapjjta, cunayman ñankhanaca, juchanac lurapjjta." 
Psalms106:7 Nayra awquinacajjajj Egipto marcan janiw muspharcañ luräwinacam amuyapcänti; jach'a qhuyapayasiñamat armasipjjäna, Mar Rojo kota jac'an jumarojj kallcatapjjäyätam." 
Psalms106:8 Diosasti sutip laycuw jupanacarojj khespiyäna, kollan ch'amap uñacht'ayañataqui." 
Psalms106:9 Mar Rojo kotaruw tokenokäna, kotasti wañt'änwa, waña orakenjam irpcatäna." 
Psalms106:10 Uqham lurasaw uñisirin amparapat khespiyäna, timasirin amparapat antutnucuyäna." 
Psalms106:11 Jaljjatirinacarojj umaw ajjscatayäna, janiw maynis jupanacat khespcänti." 
Psalms106:12 Ucat Diosan arunacapar iyawsapjjäna, aytat cancañap k'ochupjjäna." 
Psalms106:13 Ucampis mäquiw Diosan luräwinacap armasipjjäna, janiw amtäwinacap uñt'añatac suyapcänti." 
Psalms106:14 Qhä ch'usa wasaran Diosarojj yant'apjjäna, munatanacaparjam phokhayasiñataquiw wayt'apjjäna." 
Psalms106:15 Ucat Diosajj jupanacan mayitaparjam churäna, jiwarayir usunac jupanacar apayanïna." 
Psalms106:16 Moisesarojj chhujllanac taypin uñisipjjäna, Tatitur catuyat Aarón chacharus uñisipjjaraquïnwa." 
Psalms106:17 Ucat orakejj jist'artäna, Datán chacharusti mank'antänwa, Abiram chachan tamaparus p'amp'antaraquïnwa." 
Psalms106:18 Ninaw jupanacataquejj naqhäna, nina lawrajj ñankha luririnacaruw naqhantäna." 
Psalms106:19 Horeb kollun vaca kall lursusipjjäna, kori umatatayasaw mä dios lursupjjäna, ucaruw yupaychapjjäna," 
Psalms106:20 khapak Tatit lantejj kora mank'er vacan uñnacap uchasipjjäna. 
Psalms106:21 Khespiyir Diosapat armasipjjäna; muspharcañanac Egipton lurquipansa," 
Psalms106:22 Cam oraken muspharcañanac lurquipansa, Mar Rojo kotan muspharcay luräwi lurquipansa." 
Psalms106:23 Diosajj jupanacar tucjañ munäna; jupan ajllit Moisesasti, nayrakatapan achict'äna, ucat k'apisiñap t'acurayäna." 
Psalms106:24 Uca khepatsti muncay orakeruw jisc'achapjjäna, janiw Tatitun arupar iyawsapcänti;" 
Psalms106:25 chhujllanacap taypin Tatitutac arusipjjäna, janiw arsutanacap ist'apcänti." 
Psalms106:26 Tatitusti amparap aytäna, juramento luraraquïna, jupanacar wasaran jiwarayañataqui," 
Psalms106:27 allchhinacapar jiwarayañataqui, yakha marcanac taypir ananucuñataqui." 
Psalms106:28 Baal-peor diosan loktiriparuw tucupjjäna, jiwat diosanacar loktat wilañchanac mank'apjjäna;" 
Psalms106:29 ñankha luratanacapampejj Diosaruw k'apisiyapjjäna, jupanac taypinsti jach'a usuw sartäna;" 
Psalms106:30 Finees chachasti juchanirojj juchap uñt'ayäna, jach'a ususti sayt'jjänwa," 
Psalms106:31 Tatitusti qhä asqui luräwip aytapunïnwa, khepa mita jakenac taypina." 
Psalms106:32 Meriba umanac jac'an Tatiturojj k'apisiyapjjäna, jupanac laycuw Moisesajj jan walir purïna," 
Psalms106:33 jupan chuymap mayjt'ayapjjäna, lacapasti jan arsuñanac parläna." 
Psalms106:34 Tatitun aruparjamajj janiw marcanacar t'unjapcänti, t'unjapjjañapäcän uca marcanacarojj janiw tucjapcänti." 
Psalms106:35 Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenacampiw chicachasipjjäna, luräwinacap yatekasipjjäna:" 
Psalms106:36 diosanacaparuw yupaychapjjäna, sipitanacaparuw jalt'apjjäna;" 
Psalms106:37 ñankhanacaruw yokanacapamp phuchanacapamp jiwayasajj loktapjjäna. 
Psalms106:38 Jan juchan jaken wilap wartapjjäna, wawanacapan wilap wartapjjäna, Canaán orak diosanacaruw wila loktapjjäna. Orakejj wilamp k'añuchataw uñjasïna," 
Psalms106:39 luräwinacapampiw k'añuchasipjjäna, ñankha luratanacapampiw wachokapjjäna." 
Psalms106:40 Tatitun k'apisiñapajj marcapataquiw nactäna, jupanquirinacarojj uñisïnwa;" 
Psalms106:41 Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenacaruw catjjaruyäna, uñisirinacapasti mutuyänwa;" 
Psalms106:42 timanacapajj t'akhesiyänwa, ch'amapampiw ajjsarayäna." 
Psalms106:43 Walja cutiw Tatitojj jupanacar khespiyäna: jupanacasti amtataparojj saycatapjjänwa, pachpa juchanacapampiw aynacht'apjjäna." 
Psalms106:44 Ucampis Tatitojj aykopjjatap uñtanïna, arnakasitanacaparuw ist'äna;" 
Psalms106:45 jupanacamp arusjäwi luratat amtasïna, jach'a qhuyapayasiñampiw ch'alljjtayasïna:" 
Psalms106:46 jupanacar catuntat anaquirinacaruw qhuyapayasiñamp uñjäna. 
Psalms106:47 Tatit Diosajjay, khespiyapjjaquitaya, Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenac taypit irpthapjjapjjeta: kollan sutim jach'añchañataqui, cusisiñamp jumar yupaychañataqui." 
Psalms106:48 Israelan Tatit Diosapajj jach'añchatäpan, wiñayat wiñaycama. Takpach marcajj sispan: “¡Uqhamäpan!” sasa. ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms107:1 Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, munasiñanïtap laycu, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms107:2 Tatitun khespiyatanacajj arsupjjpan, timasirin amparapat antutayatanaca," 
Psalms107:3 marcanac taypit tantachthapitanaca, amsta toketa, aynach toketa, inti jalsu toketa, inti jalanta toketa." 
Psalms107:4 Jupanacajj ch'usa ch'alla wasaran muyupjjäna, janiw marcar irpir thac jicjjatapcänti;" 
Psalms107:5 mank'at awtjayasipjjäna, umat pharjayasipjjäna, jupanacajj jiwarirjamäpjjänwa." 
Psalms107:6 Ucampis t'akhesiñancasin Tatitur art'asipjjäna, jupasti t'akhesïwit waysüna." 
Psalms107:7 Chica thaquiruw jupanacarojj irpjjatäna, jacañ marcaruw irpäna." 
Psalms107:8 Tatiturojj qhuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapjjam, jakenacatac muspharcañanac luratapata." 
Psalms107:9 Umat pharjatanacaruw um churi, mank'at awtjatanacarusti jilarquir mank'a churaraqui." 
Psalms107:10 Jupanacajj ajjsarcay ch'amacan jacapjjäna, cadenanacampi, llaquisiñamp ñach'antataw jacapjjäna;" 
Psalms107:11 Tatitun arsutanacapar kallasipjjatap laycuw t'akhesipjjäna, Alajjpachanquirin amtäwipar jisc'achapjjatap laycuw mutupjjäna." 
Psalms107:12 Diosajj ch'ama tucuñ lurañanacampiw aynacht'ayäna, aynacht'ataw uñjasipjjäna, janiw qhiti yanapt'iris utjcänti." 
Psalms107:13 T'akhesiñancasinsti Tatitut art'asipjjäna, jupasti t'akhesïwit waysüna." 
Psalms107:14 Ch'amac lajja taypit apsüna, cadenanacamp chinuntatat jaranucüna." 
Psalms107:15 Tatiturojj qhuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapjjam, jakenacatac muspharcañanac luratapata." 
Psalms107:16 Jupaw broncet lurat puncunac t'unjäna, hierrot lurat jist'añanac p'aquiräna." 
Psalms107:17 Ñankha luratanacap laycuw usuntapjjäna, juchanacap laycuw t'akhisipjjäna;" 
Psalms107:18 mank'ataquejj ajjtasjjapjjänwa, jiwan puncupan jicjjatasipjjäna." 
Psalms107:19 T'akhesiñancasinsti Tatitut art'asipjjäna, jupasti t'akhesïwit waysüna." 
Psalms107:20 Arup qhitanïna, jupanacarusti c'umaraptayänwa, ¡mankhapachat khespiyäna!" 
Psalms107:21 Tatiturojj qhuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapjjam, jakenacatac muspharcañanac luratapata." 
Psalms107:22 Jach'añchañ loktäwinac jupar catuyapjjam, luräwinacapatsti cusisiñamp yatiyapjjam." 
Psalms107:23 Aljasirinacajj lamar kotaruw yampunacat mantantapjjäna, lamar kotanjam aljañanac apapjjäna." 
Psalms107:24 Lamar kotan Diosan luräwinacap uñjapjjäna, muspharcañ luratanacap uñatatapjjäna." 
Psalms107:25 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw jach'a thayajj sartäna, thayasti jach'a mathapinac sartayäna:" 
Psalms107:26 lakaru amstaru, mankhäjjar jaknakataw uñjasipjjäna, liwnakcäwejj aynacht'atäjjapjjänwa," 
Psalms107:27 machatanacjamaw aytilipjjäna, yatitanacapajj janiw cunataquïcänsa." 
Psalms107:28 T'akhesiñancasinsti Tatitut art'asipjjäna, jupasti t'akhesïwit waysüna." 
Psalms107:29 Jach'a thayarojj llamp'u thayaruquiw tucuyäna, lamar kota mathapinacasti llamp'uchataw uñjasïna." 
Psalms107:30 Ojjenac t'acurir uñjasajj cusisipjjänwa, Diosasti cawqharutejj mistuñ munapcäna, ucaruw puriyäna." 
Psalms107:31 Tatiturojj qhuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapjjam, jakenacatac muspharcañanac luratapata." 
Psalms107:32 ¡Marcan tantachasïwipan jach'añchapjjam! ¡Jilïr jakenacan tantachasïwipan jach'ar aptapjjam! 
Psalms107:33 Diosaw jawiranacarojj wasarar tucuyi, uma jalsunacsti waña orakeruw quipstayi." 
Psalms107:34 Purum orakenac kollpa oraker tucuyi, jakenacapan ñankha lurirïpjjatap laycu." 
Psalms107:35 Wasar orakerojj uma sayt'anacaruw tucuyi, waña orakerojj uma jalsunacaruw quipstayi." 
Psalms107:36 Ucaruw mank'at awtjatanacarojj uchi, jupanacasti marcanacap sayt'ayapjje." 
Psalms107:37 Yapunac yapuchapjje, achur kokanac ayruntapjje, achunac jilarquir apthapipjjaraqui." 
Psalms107:38 Tatituw asquip churi, juc'amp jiljjatayi, uywanacap mirantayaraqui." 
Psalms107:39 Jiwarapcchi ucasa, juc'aniptapcchi ucasa, t'akhesiyat uñjasipjjatap laycuwa, chijinac laycu, llaquinac laycuraquiwa." 
Psalms107:40 Diosajj t'akhesiyir jilïr jakenacarojj jisc'achiwa, jan thaquin wasaranacaruw irpanti." 
Psalms107:41 Jan cunan jakenacarusti Tatituw llaquipat waysu; uywa tamar uñtat sarakerinacaparojj mirantayi. 
Psalms107:42 Asqui jakenacajj uc uñjasajj cusisipjjewa, ñankha lurir jakenacasti lacap lluphantasipjje." 
Psalms107:43 Ch'iqhi jakejj ucanac amuypan, Tatitun qhuyapayasiñap amuyt'aracpan." 
Psalms108:1 Diosajjay, chuymajjajj waquichatawa, jumar k'ochuñataquejj waquicht'atawa, almajjay, sartasiquimaya." 
Psalms108:2 Arpa, salterio, sartasipjjam, nayajj khantat willjtaruw sartä;" 
Psalms108:3 Tatay, jakenac nayrakatan yuspagaräma, marcanac nayrakatan k'ochunacamp jach'añchäma." 
Psalms108:4 Munasiñamajj alajjpachat juc'amp jach'awa, asqui cancañamajj alajjpachcamaw puri." 
Psalms108:5 Diosajjay, jumajj alajjpachjjar kont'atätawa, aytat cancañamasti oraker phokhantatawa." 
Psalms108:6 Ch'amamampiy khespiyapjjeta, munat wawanacaman antutatäpjjañapataqui. ¡Mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya!" 
Psalms108:7 Diosajj kollan utjäwipatpach arsüna: “Atipjañampiw Siquem orak catuntasï, Sucot pampa orak laquinokaraquï;" 
Psalms108:8 Galaad orakejj nayanquiwa, Manasés orakes nayancaraquiwa, Efraín orakejj p'ekejjar jarc'akeriwa, Judá orakejj jilïr cancañ thujrojjawa;" 
Psalms108:9 Moab orakejj jarekasiñ llatajjawa, Edom orakeruw wisqhunacajj liwnokä, Filistea jakenacar atipjasin k'ochü” sasa." 
Psalms108:10 ¿Qhitirac uyuchrantat marcar irpitanisti? ¿Qhitirac Edom chekacam nayamp saranisti? 
Psalms108:11 Diosay, jumajj nanacar apanucupjjestawa; janiw nuwasir tamanacajjamp chicajj mistcjjtati." 
Psalms108:12 Timanacajjar saycatañataquiy yanapt'apjjeta, jaken yanapapan inamayätap laycu." 
Psalms108:13 Diosan yanapapampejj muspharcañanac lurañäni, ¡Jupaw timanacasarojj takjjatani!" 
Psalms109:1 Jach'añchañ Diosay, mayisitajjataquejj janiquiy amuquïmti," 
Psalms109:2 ñankhar jichuntat c'ari lajjraw nayjjat jan walinac parli, c'arinac nayjjat parlapjje," 
Psalms109:3 uñisisiñ arunacampiw muyuntayapjjetu, ina ch'usat nayatac sayt'apjje." 
Psalms109:4 Munasiñanïtajj laycojj c'arintapjjetuwa, ucchañcamasti Diosat mayista." 
Psalms109:5 Asqui luratajjatjja, ñankhampiw cutt'ayapjjetu, munasiñatsti uñisisiñampiw phokhapjjetu." 
Psalms109:6 Ñankha lurir jakeruy taripiripatac ucham, pachpa arjjatiripajj juchañchpan;" 
Psalms109:7 taripäwin juchañchat uñjaspan, pachpa arjjatiripac juchañchjjpan." 
Psalms109:8 Jacañ urunacapajj juc'aquïpan, yänacapsti yakha jak catuntaspan." 
Psalms109:9 Wawanacapajj wajcha kheparapjjpan, warmipasti ijmaraquïpan." 
Psalms109:10 Wawanacapajj mayjasis muyupjjpan, mank'añ mayjasipjjpan, t'unjat utapat jakonucutäpjjpan." 
Psalms109:11 Kollke mayt'irejj yänacap catuntasjjpan, jan uñt'at jakenac yänacap aparjjapjjpan." 
Psalms109:12 Jan qhitis jupat qhuyapayaspati, janirac wajcha wawanacapat qhuyapayaspati." 
Psalms109:13 Allchhipan allchhipajj jiwarayatäpan, sutipajj wiñayatac chhaktpan." 
Psalms109:14 Awquipan ñankha luratanacap Tatitojj amtaspan, taycapan juchapsti janirac pampachpati;" 
Psalms109:15 Tatitojj ucanac amjjäsiscacpan, sutipasti oraket chhaktayatäpan." 
Psalms109:16 Janipuniw jupajj qhuyapayasiñat amtascänti, jan cunan jakeru, mayjasir jakeru, llaquit jakerojj jiwayañataquiw arcnakäna." 
Psalms109:17 Ñankhachañ munirïtap laycojj ñankhachatäpan; asquinac jan munirïtap laycojj asquejj jupat jayancpan. 
Psalms109:18 Ñankhachäwejj isimpjam imjjatpan; puracaparojj umjam ch'ach'antpan, ch'aqhaparus aceiter uñtat mantpan;" 
Psalms109:19 mä isimpjam imjjatpan, wac'amp jiyintatjam t'akhesiypan." 
Psalms109:20 Uqhämay Tatitojj nayamp timasirinacarojj phokhañchpan, nayar c'arintirinacarus luraracpan." 
Psalms109:21 Jumasti, Tatay, sutim laycuy sum uñjita, kollan munasiñamampiy khespiyita." 
Psalms109:22 Nayajj aynacht'at mayjasir jakëtwa, chuymajjas p'aquintataraquiwa;" 
Psalms109:23 ch'iwir uñtataw chhaktascta; thayajj t'ijut'ijurjamaw katatitu. 
Psalms109:24 Mank'atjamaw konkorinacajjajj qhathati; mank'atjamasti t'uqharnucstaractwa. 
Psalms109:25 Jaken larusiñaquiw sarnakta, nayar uñjasajj p'eke qhiwisipjje." 
Psalms109:26 Tatit Diosajjay, yanapt'itaya, munasiñam laycuy khespiyita." 
Psalms109:27 Tatay, jupanacajj yatipjjpan, amparamamp take acanac luratama." 
Psalms109:28 Jupanacajj ñankhachapjjetpasa, jumajj asquimay churita. Timanacajjajj aynacht'apjjpan, uywatamasti ucchañcamajj cusispan." 
Psalms109:29 Nayamp timasirinacajj p'enkamp aynacht'apjjpan. ¡P'enkajj isimpjam jupanacar llawuntpan! 
Psalms109:30 Nayasti lacajjampiw Tatitur wiñay yuspagarä, jakenac taypin jupar jach'añchä:" 
Psalms109:31 Jupaw jan cunan jakerojj arjjati, juchañchirinacat jacañap khespiyaraqui." 
Psalms110:1 Tatitojj Reyejjarojj sänwa: “Cupëjjajjar kont'asim, timanacamar tacjjatayañajjcama” sasa." 
Psalms110:2 Tatitojj Sión kollutpach ch'aman cancañ thujru ayjjaruyätam. “¡Jumamp timasirinacarojj atipjamaya! 
Psalms110:3 Marcamajj atipt'añam urunjja, jumaruw catuyasjjätam. Kollan kollunac patjjanjja, willjta sullar uñtataw wayna cancañamajj sapür machakaptani.”" 
Psalms110:4 Tatitojj mayac arsu, arsutapatsti janiw yakha amtquiti: “Jumaw wiñay sacerdotëtajja, Melquisedec sacerdoten thaquiparjama” sasa." 
Psalms110:5 Tatitojj cupëjjamancasquiwa, k'apisiñap urunjja, reyinacaruw t'unjani;" 
Psalms110:6 marcanacataquiw juchañchäwinac mistuyani, jake jiwatanac arcthapini, orakpachan p'eke ch'aqhanac p'aquirani." 
Psalms110:7 Jalasquir umat thaquipan umt'ani, umasti machak ch'am churani." 
Psalms111:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan! Tatiturojj take chuymampiw yuspagarä, asqui jakenacan tantachasïwipan jach'añchä." 
Psalms111:2 Tatitun luratanacapajj muspharcañawa, luratanacapar munirinacajj sum uñaquipapjje." 
Psalms111:3 Jupan luräwipajj c'ajquiriwa, muncañaraquiwa, asqui cancañapajj wiñayawa;" 
Psalms111:4 amtascay muspharcañanac jupajj luri. Tatitojj munasiñaniwa, qhuyapayasiriraquiwa:" 
Psalms111:5 Jupar iyawsirinacarojj mank'añ churi, arust'äwipat wiñayaw amtasi." 
Psalms111:6 Tatitojj luratanacapan marcaparojj ch'amap uñacht'ayi, Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenacan orakep churjjaraqui." 
Psalms111:7 Luratanacapajj asquiwa, chekaparaquiwa: arsutanacapajj take chuymamp iyawscayawa:" 
Psalms111:8 wiñayatac suma utt'ayatawa, chekapampi, asqui cancañamp luratawa." 
Psalms111:9 Marcaparojj khespiyiwa, arust'äwipsti wiñayataquiw utt'ayi: Diosajj kollanawa, ajjsarcayaraquiwa." 
Psalms111:10 Yatiñ cancañan kalltapajj, Tatitur ajjsartañawa, jupar wakaychirinacajj wali amuyt'anïpjjewa; Tatitojj wiñayaw jach'añchatäni." 
Psalms112:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur ajjsartir jakejj cusisiñaniwa, arsutanacapar munasir jakejj cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms112:2 Asqui jaken allchhinacapajj acapachan kollanäpjjaniwa, sarakerinacapasti oraken munañanïpjjaniwa." 
Psalms112:3 Walja yänacaw utapan utjani, jaker qhuyapt'ayañapasti jan tucusquirïniwa." 
Psalms112:4 Qhuyapayasiñan asqui jakejj, ch'amacan khantir khanjamaw c'ajti." 
Psalms112:5 Asqui jakejj qhuyapayasiñ chuymamp mayt'iriwa, chekap chuymampiw yänacap apnake." 
Psalms112:6 Asqui jakejj janipuniw cunapachas aynacht'caniti. Asqui jakejj aytatapunïniwa. 
Psalms112:7 Jan wali yatiyäwinacarojj janiw ajjsarquiti, chuymapajj Tatituncasajj wali thurt'atawa." 
Psalms112:8 Chuymapajj ch'amañchatawa, janiw ajjsarquiti, timasirinacaparojj sawcasiñampiquiw uñti." 
Psalms112:9 Jan cunan jakenacaruw churäwinac wajjt'i, jaker qhuyapt'ayañapajj jan tucusquiriwa, jan qhitin camscañaw p'ekep waytaraqui." 
Psalms112:10 Ñankha lurir jakesti jupar uñjasajj k'apisiwa, jan camächirjamäjjasajj laca ch'aqhanacap t'urusi. Ñankha jakenacan inampst'añ chuymapajj aynacht'aniwa." 
Psalms113:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur loktirinaca, sutip jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms113:2 Tatitun sutipajj jach'ar aptatäpan, jichhasa, wiñayasa:" 
Psalms113:3 inti jalsu toketa, inti jalant tokcama, Tatitun sutipajj jach'añchatäpan." 
Psalms113:4 Tatitojj marcanacjjar jilïrit kont'atawa, ¡khapak cancañapajj alajjpachat jilanquiwa!" 
Psalms113:5 Janiw qhitis Tatit Diosasjamäquiti, jupajj reyi konuñapjjan kont'atawa." 
Psalms113:6 Alajjpachampir orakempirusti uñtascaquiwa. 
Psalms113:7 Tatituw lak'a oraketpach pist'at jakerojj wayti, k'añu taypit jan cunan jakerojj waysu," 
Psalms113:8 aytat jakenacamp chic kont'ayañataqui, marcapan jilïrinacap taypir uchañataqui." 
Psalms113:9 Jan wawachasir warmirojja, wawanacanïcaspas uqham cusisit taycaruw tucuyi, pachpa utapan lurañanac catuyasa. ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms114:1 Israel marcajj Egipto marcat mistuncän ucapachajja, jaken marcapat mistunjjäna," 
Psalms114:2 Judá marcajj Tatitun kollan utjäwiparuw tucüna; Israel marcajj jupan apnakat marcaruw tucüna. 
Psalms114:3 Lamar kotajj Israel marcar uñjasajj jist'jtänwa, Jordán jawir umasti kheparuw cuttäna." 
Psalms114:4 Jisc'a kollusa, jach'a kollusa, ovej kallunacar uñtataw t'isctapjjäna." 
Psalms114:5 Lamar kota, ¿cunatarac jalttasti? Jordán jawira, ¿cunatarac khepar cuttasti?" 
Psalms114:6 Jach'a kollunaca, ¿cunatarac ovejanacar uñtat t'isctapjjtasti? Jisc'a kollunaca, ¿cunatarac ovej kallunacar uñtat thoktapjjtasti?" 
Psalms114:7 ¡Orake, Tatitun nayrakatapan qhathatim, Jacobon Diosap nayrakatan ajjsartam!" 
Psalms114:8 Jupaw karkanacat uma sayt'anac utjayi. Jupaw karkanacat uma jalsunac mistuyi. 
Psalms115:1 Tatay, khapak sutimarojj jach'añchasimaya, janis nanacarojj jach'añchapquita; munasiñam laycu, chekapätam laycuy jach'añchasim." 
Psalms115:2 ¿Cunatarac ñankha lurir jakenacast jisqhisipquitani: “Cawquincarac Diosamasti” sasasti? 
Psalms115:3 Diosasajj alajjpachanquiwa, cuntejj jupajj munqui uc luri." 
Psalms115:4 Diosar jan uñt'irin diosanacapajj korimpita, kollkempit lurataquiwa, jaken amparapamp lurataquiraquiwa:" 
Psalms115:5 lacanïcasas janiw arsupquiti, nayranïcasas janiw uñjapquiti," 
Psalms115:6 jinchunïcasas janiw ist'apquiti, nasanïcasas janiw muct'apquiti," 
Psalms115:7 amparanïcasas janiw llamct'apquiti; cayunïcasas janiw sarnakapquiti, mallk'anïcasas janiw arsupquiti." 
Psalms115:8 Uca diosanacar luririnacajj ucanac quipcaquïpjjewa, iyawsirinacas pachpaquïpjjaraquiwa." 
Psalms115:9 Israelanquir jakenaca, Tatitur iyawsapjjam: Jupaw yanapistu, arjjataraquistu." 
Psalms115:10 Sacerdotenaca, Tatitur iyawsapjjam: Jupaw yanapistu, arjjataraquistu." 
Psalms115:11 Tatitur iyawsirinaca, jupar alcatapjjam: Jupaw yanapistu, arjjataraquistu." 
Psalms115:12 Tatitojj jiwasanacat amtasistuwa, asquinac churaraquistani, Israel marcarojj asquinac churani, sacerdotenacarojj asquinac churaraquini." 
Psalms115:13 Tatitur iyawsirinacarojj asquinac churani, jisc'arusa, jach'arusa." 
Psalms115:14 Tatitojj wawanacamar waljaniptaypan, jumanacarusa, wawanacamarusa." 
Psalms115:15 Alajjpach acapach lurir Tatitojj asquinacapay jumanacar churpan. 
Psalms115:16 Alajjpachajj Tatitunquiwa, jakerusti orak catuyi." 
Psalms115:17 Jiwatanacajj janiw Tatitur jach'añchapcaspati, janiraquiw mankhapachanquirinacas jach'ar aptapcaspati." 
Psalms115:18 Jiwasanacasti Tatituruw jach'añchapjjañäni, jichhasa, wiñayasa. ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms116:1 Nayajj Tatituruw munasta, mayisitajjar ist'atap laycu;" 
Psalms116:2 naya tokeruw jinchup alcatanitu, wiñayapuniw jupar art'asï." 
Psalms116:3 Jiwañ chinuñanacaw simpantitäna, mic'ayan sipitanacapaw catuntitäna, llaquisiñan, aykoñan catuntataw uñjasïyäta." 
Psalms116:4 Nayasti Tatitun sutip art'asta: “Tatay, jacañajj khespiyita” sasa." 
Psalms116:5 Tatitojj llamp'u chuymaniwa, asquiraquiwa, Diosasajj qhuyapayasiriwa;" 
Psalms116:6 Tatitojj jan yäkat jakenacaruw imasqui: jan ch'amanïquiriruw khespiyitu. 
Psalms116:7 Almajjay, jichhajj samarasjjam, Tatitun nayat qhuyapayasitap laycu." 
Psalms116:8 Ajayojjarojj jiwañat wayoketu, nayranacajjar jachañat apake, cayunacajjar tincuñat sayt'ayi." 
Psalms116:9 Tatitun nayrakatapan sarnakä, wiñay jacañ oraken jacä." 
Psalms116:10 Wali llaquisiñan uñjascasasa, iyawsañajjajj utjascaquïnwa." 
Psalms116:11 Llaquisiñancasajj säyätwa: “Jakenacajj c'aricamaquiwa” sasa. 
Psalms116:12 ¿Cunampirac Tatitur phokherista, nayatac asquinac luratapatsti?" 
Psalms116:13 Khespiyasiñ copa aptä, Tatitun sutip aytä." 
Psalms116:14 Tatiturojj jakenacan nayrakatapan arsutanacajj phokhä. 
Psalms116:15 Tatitutaquejj wali llaquisiñawa, iyawsirinacapar jiwir uñjañajja." 
Psalms116:16 Tatay, nayajj uywatamätwa, jumar loktirïtwa, uywataman wawapätwa: jumaw ñach'antatanacajj t'akanuctajja." 
Psalms116:17 Tatay, yuspagarañ loktäwi catuyäma, sutimaruw jach'añcharaquï." 
Psalms116:18 Tatiturojj jakenacan nayrakatapan arsutanacajj phokhä," 
Psalms116:19 Tatitun kollan utap puncun phokhä, ¡Jerusalén, juma taypin phokhä! ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms117:1 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, takpach jakenaca, jupar art'asipjjam, takpach marcanaca:" 
Psalms117:2 qhuyapayasiñapajj jiwasanacatac wali jach'awa, asqui cancañapajj wiñayawa. ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms118:1 Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, jupajj munasiñaniwa, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms118:2 Israel marcajj sispan: “Tatitun qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:3 Aarón sacerdoten wawanacapajj sapjjpan: “Tatitun qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:4 Tatitur iyawsirinacajj sapjjpan: “Tatitun qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:5 Llaquisiñajjan Tatitur art'asta, jupasti ist'ituwa, khespiyaraquituwa." 
Psalms118:6 Tatitojj nayampïsquiwa: janiw ajjsarayascäti; ¿camächaraquitan jakesti? 
Psalms118:7 Tatitojj nayampïsquiwa, jupaw yanapasquitu, nayar uñisirinacan aynacht'añap uñjä." 
Psalms118:8 Jaker alcatañat sipanjja, Tatitur alcatañaw juc'amp sumajja." 
Psalms118:9 Jilïr jakenacar alcatañat sipanjja, Tatitur alcatañaw juc'amp sumajja." 
Psalms118:10 Take marcanacaw muyuntapjjetäna, ucanacarusti Tatitun ch'amapampiw atipjta." 
Psalms118:11 Take toket muyuntapjjetäna, Tatitun ch'amapampisti atipjtwa;" 
Psalms118:12 tamurayanacar uñtataw muyuntapjjetäna, jupanacasti ch'aphinac taypin naqhir ninjamaw tucusipjjäna. Tatitun sutiparuw jupanacarojj atipjta." 
Psalms118:13 Wali ch'amampiw tincuñajjatac nuct'apjjetäna, Tatitusti yanapt'iriw jutitu." 
Psalms118:14 Tatituruw nayajj jach'añchta, jupaw ch'am churirejjajja. ¡Jupaw khespiyirejjajja!" 
Psalms118:15 Ist'apjjam: asqui jakenacan utanacapanjja, atipjäwi k'ochunacaw jayllisi: ¡Tatitun ch'aman amparapaw atipjayi!" 
Psalms118:16 Tatitun amparapajj jan atipjcayawa, ¡Tatitun ch'aman amparapaw atipjayi!" 
Psalms118:17 Janiw jiwcäti, Tatitun luratanacap yatiyañataquejj jacascaquïwa." 
Psalms118:18 Tatitojj t'akhesiyituwa, mutuyaraquituwa, ucampis janiw jiwañar catjjaruyquituti." 
Psalms118:19 Templon puncunacap jist'ararapipjjeta, Tatitur yuspagaririw mantañ munta." 
Psalms118:20 Acapï Tatitun puncupajja: uca chekaw asqui jakenacajj mantapjjani. 
Psalms118:21 Tatay nayar ist'atamat yuspagarsma, nayar khespiyatamat wakaycharacsma." 
Psalms118:22 Utachirinacan jakonucut kalajja, esquina kalaruw tucjje." 
Psalms118:23 Tatituw uqhäm tucuyi, ucajj jiwasanacatac muspharcayawa." 
Psalms118:24 Jichhüruw Tatitojj lurcän uca urojja: cusisipjjañäni, c'uchirasipjjaraquiñäni." 
Psalms118:25 Tatay, khespiyäwim churapjjaquitaya, take cunamp phokt'apjjaquitaya." 
Psalms118:26 ¡Tatitun sutipar jutirejj kollanäpan! Tatitun utapatpach jach'añchanipjjsma; 
Psalms118:27 Tatituw Diosajja: jupaw khant'anistu. Cusisiñ kalltapjjam, altar thiyacam layminacamp c'achachapjjam." 
Psalms118:28 Tatay, yuspagarsmawa, jumaruw jach'ar aptsma, jumaw nayan Diosajjätajja." 
Psalms118:29 Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, munasirïtap laycu, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms119:1 Jan juchañchcay sarnaker jakejj cusisiñaniwa, Tatitun yatichäwiparjam sarnakerejj cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms119:2 Tatitun arunacapar jaysirinacajj cusisiñaniwa, takpach chuymamp jupar thakerinacajj cusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms119:3 jan cuna ñankha luririnacasa, Tatitun thaquipan sarnakerinacas cusisiñaniraquiwa." 
Psalms119:4 Jumaw arsutanacam yatiytajja, arunacam sum phokhatäñapataqui." 
Psalms119:5 ¡Sarnakäwejjajj thuruñchataquïspa, arunacam phokhañajjataqui!" 
Psalms119:6 Janiw cunat p'enk tucuñajjas utjcaniti, takpach arsutanacam phokcä ucapachajja." 
Psalms119:7 Khana chuymampiw jumar jach'añchäma, chekap arsutanacam yatekcä ucapachajja." 
Psalms119:8 Leyinacam phokhañ munta. ¡Janipun armanucusistati! 
Psalms119:9 ¿Cunjämatarac mä waynast k'oma jacañanïspasti? Arunacamarjam sarnakasa. 
Psalms119:10 Takpach chuymajjampiw thaksma, janiquiy arunacamat saraktañajj munamti." 
Psalms119:11 Chuymajjaruw arunacam imta, juma contra juch jan lurañajjataqui;" 
Psalms119:12 Tatay, jumajj kollanätawa; leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:13 Lacajjampiw yatiyä, juman arsut takpach camächit arunaca." 
Psalms119:14 Arunacamarjam sarnakañ thaquin cusisï, kamir yänacamp cusisiñat sipana." 
Psalms119:15 Arsutanacamat lup'isï, thaquiman sarnakañ amuyt'araquï." 
Psalms119:16 Camächit arunacamampiw cusisï, janipuniw arunacamat armascäti." 
Psalms119:17 Aca uywatamarojj jacayaquimaya, nayasti arunacamarojj phokhäwa;" 
Psalms119:18 nayranacajjay jist'arita, muspharcañ arunacam uñjjatañataqui;" 
Psalms119:19 aca orakenjja sart'ir jakequïtwa: janiquiy arsutanacam nayatac imantamti; 
Psalms119:20 ajayojjajj wali llact'ataw uñjasi, arsutanacam yatiñ munasa." 
Psalms119:21 Jumaw jach'a jach'a tucurinacarojj tokenoktajja, arsutanacamat sarakerinacajj ñankhachatawa." 
Psalms119:22 Llaquinacamp jisc'achañanacamp nayat jithektayita, arunacam phokhatajj laycu." 
Psalms119:23 Jilïr jakenacas nayatac arusipcanejja, uywatamajj arunacamat lup'iscaquiniwa." 
Psalms119:24 Arunacamajj nayan cusisiñajjawa, arsutanacamajj nayan amuyt'ayirejjawa." 
Psalms119:25 Niy jiwirjamätwa, arsutamarjamay jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:26 Sarnakäwejj uñacht'aysma, jumasti ist'istawa. Leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:27 Arsutanacamarjam arcañatac amuyt'ayita, muspharcañ luräwinacamat lup'iñ munta." 
Psalms119:28 Jach'a jachañan uñjasta, arsutanacamampiy chuymacht'ita." 
Psalms119:29 Jan wali thaquit jithektayita, munañaman asquip yatichita." 
Psalms119:30 Cheka thaquin sarnakañ ajllista, arunacamaruw munasta;" 
Psalms119:31 Tatay, arsutanacamaruw iyawsta, janiquiy p'enk tucuyistati." 
Psalms119:32 Arsutanacam phokhañataquiw jalascta, chuymajjar cusisiñamp phokt'atam laycu." 
Psalms119:33 Tatay, leyiman thaquipay uñacht'ayita, nayasti tucuycamaw arcä." 
Psalms119:34 Munañam phokhañay yatichita, takpach chuymampiw arunacam imä." 
Psalms119:35 Arsutanacaman thaquipanay irpita, ucanquiw nayan cusisiñajjajja." 
Psalms119:36 Arsutanacamaruy chuymajj alcatayita, janiquiy inampst'añar puriyistati." 
Psalms119:37 Janiquiy inamay yänacar uñtayistati, thaquiman sarañatac jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:38 Uywatamarojj arsutam phokhaquimaya, iyawsirinacamar arsut arunaca." 
Psalms119:39 Nayar ajjsarayir llaquisiñ apakt'ita, arsutanacamajj munasiñ arunacawa." 
Psalms119:40 Nayaw arsutanacamarojj munasta; asqui cancañamampiy jacañ churita. 
Psalms119:41 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamay uñacht'ayita, khespiyäwimajj arsutamarjamay purinitpan." 
Psalms119:42 Uqhämat nayar tokerirojj arsusï, arunacamar take chuymamp iyawsatajj laycu." 
Psalms119:43 Janiquiy lacajjat cheka arunac apakestati, nayajj arunacamaruw chuymajj uchta." 
Psalms119:44 Jan inact'asaw munañam phokhä, wiñayapuniw munañamar jaysä." 
Psalms119:45 Uqhamat jan qhitin camsat jacä, arsutanacamar arcatajj laycu." 
Psalms119:46 Reyinacan nayrakatapan arunacamat parlä, janipuniw arsuñ p'enkascäti." 
Psalms119:47 Arunacamarojj munastwa, arunacamampejj cusisitaw uñjasta." 
Psalms119:48 Arunacamarojj munastwa, arsutanacamatsti walpun lup'ista." 
Psalms119:49 Uywatamar arsutamat amtasiquimaya, arunacamaruw chuymajj uchayista." 
Psalms119:50 Llaquisiñajjan chuymachasiñajjajj acawa: arunacamaw jacañ churitu. 
Psalms119:51 Jach'a jach'a tucurinacajj jan inact'asaw tokepjjetu, nayasti janiw yatichäwimat sarakascti." 
Psalms119:52 Tatay, nayra pacha arsutanacamat amtasta, arunacaman chuymachasiñ jicjjatta." 
Psalms119:53 Arunacam jaytanucur ñankha luririnacataquejj chuymajjajj walpun k'apisi. 
Psalms119:54 Jaken marcapan jacasajj arunacamajj nayan k'ochojjänwa. 
Psalms119:55 Tatay, arumanacaw sutim aytasta, yatichäwimarjam phokhañ munaracta." 
Psalms119:56 May lurañajjaw wact'itu: ucasti arsutanacam phokhañawa. 
Psalms119:57 Tatay, jumaquiw nayataquejj utjarapistajja, arunacam phokhañataquiw arsta." 
Psalms119:58 Takpach chuymampiw qhuyapayasiñam thakta: arsutamarjamay qhuyapt'ayasita. 
Psalms119:59 Sarnakäwejjaruw uñaquipasta, arunacamarusti wasitat jaysta." 
Psalms119:60 Janc'aquiw sartasta, jan suyasaraquiw arsutanacam phokta." 
Psalms119:61 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj sipitanacampiw muyuntayapjjetu, nayasti janiw munañam phokhañat armascti." 
Psalms119:62 Chica arumaw jumar yuspagarañatac uñatatta, arunacamat jumar yuspagarañataqui." 
Psalms119:63 Jumar iyawsir jakenacampiw chicachasta, arsutanacam phokherinacampiw mayachasiracta." 
Psalms119:64 Tatay, acapachajj munasiñamamp phokhantatawa; leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:65 Tatay, aca uywatamarojj asquinacpun churtajja, arsutanacamarjamaw uñjtajja." 
Psalms119:66 Suma amuyt'a chuymay churita, yatiñ cancañ churaraquita, arsutanacamarojj takpach chuymampiw iyawsta." 
Psalms119:67 Janïr t'akhescasajj pantjataw sarnakäyäta; jichhasti arunacamarjamaw sarnakta. 
Psalms119:68 Jumajj asquïtawa, asqui luraractajja; leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:69 Khoru jakenacajj ina ch'usat c'arintapjjetu, nayasti takpach chuymampiw arsutanacam phokta." 
Psalms119:70 Jupanacan amuyt'anacapajj ch'amact'atawa, nayasti yatichäwimampiw cusista." 
Psalms119:71 T'akhesitajjajj asqui apanirapitu, uqhämat leyinacam yatekta." 
Psalms119:72 Lacamat mistur arunacaruw munasta, warank warank korit sipana, kollket sipana." 
Psalms119:73 Jumaw nayarojj irnokesta, sayt'ayaraquista: arsutanacam yatekañajjataquejj ch'iqhi chuymay churita." 
Psalms119:74 Iyawsirinacamajj nayar uñjasajj cusisipjjaniwa, arunacamar take chuymamp suyatajjata." 
Psalms119:75 Tatay, arsutanacamajj chekapawa, ucarjamaw nayarojj t'akhesiyista." 
Psalms119:76 Munasiñamajj chuymachitpan, nayatac arscäyätajj ucarjam phokhasiñapataqui." 
Psalms119:77 Qhuyapayasiñam uñacht'ayita, jacañ churaraquita, cusisiñajjasti munañam phokhañäniwa." 
Psalms119:78 Khoru jakenacajj p'enkachatäpjjpan, nayar ina ch'usat t'akhesiyapjjatapata, nayasti camächit arunacamat lup'ï." 
Psalms119:79 Iyawsirinacamajj nayamp tantachasipjjpan, arsutanacam uñt'irinacajj nayamp chicachasipjjpan." 
Psalms119:80 Chuymajjajj leyinacamarjam phokherïpan, uqhamat jan p'enk tucuñajjataqui." 
Psalms119:81 Khespiyäwim suycasaw tucusiscta, arunacamaruw take chuymamp iyawsta." 
Psalms119:82 Nayranacajjajj juyqhuptasquiwa, arsutam phokhasiñap suycäwejja, ucchañcamasti sismawa: “¿Cunapacharac chuymachir jutitätasti?” sasa." 
Psalms119:83 Nayajj armanucut jan yäkcañ ch'ama karitäctsa, janiw leyinacamat armascti." 
Psalms119:84 ¿Cunapachcamarac suyästi? ¿Cunapacharac arcnakerinacajjar taripätasti? 
Psalms119:85 Khoru jakenacajj yatichäwim jan yatcasaw sipit p'iyanac allirapipjjetu. 
Psalms119:86 Ina ch'usat arcnakapjjetu, arjjataquitaya, ¡Takpach arsutanacamajj chekapawa!" 
Psalms119:87 Niyapuniw aca oraket chhaktayatajj uñjasta, nayasti janiw arunacamat armascti." 
Psalms119:88 Munasiñam laycuy jacañ churita, nayasti arsutanacam phokhä." 
Psalms119:89 Tatay, arunacamajj wiñayawa, alajjpachat juc'amp suma thurt'atawa." 
Psalms119:90 Cheka cancañamajj wiñayan wiñayapataquiwa, juman lurat orakejj jan onjjtquiriwa." 
Psalms119:91 Arunacam laycuw take cunas jichhürcam utjasqui, take cunas jumar loktiriwa." 
Psalms119:92 Janitejj yatichäwinacamajj nayar cusisiyquitasapänjja, niyaw llaquisiñajjamp tucusiriscäyäta." 
Psalms119:93 Janipuniw arunacamat armascäti, arunacamampiw nayarojj jacayista." 
Psalms119:94 Nayajj jumanquirïstjjaya, khespiyasiquitaya, arunacamarjamaw sarnakta." 
Psalms119:95 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj tucjañataquiw suyjjatapjjetu, nayasti arunacamat lup'iscta." 
Psalms119:96 Take cunan tucusirïtap uñjta, arunacamasti jan tucusquiriwa." 
Psalms119:97 Yatichäwimarojj walpun munasta: ¡Sapüruw ucjjat lup'iscta! 
Psalms119:98 Arunacamajj timanacajjat juc'amp yatiñan tucuyitu, camächit arunacamajj nayamp chict'atapuniwa." 
Psalms119:99 Takpach yatichirinacajjat sipan juc'amp amuyta, arunacam lup'itajj laycu." 
Psalms119:100 Chuyman jakenacat sipan juc'amp amuyta, arunacamarjam sarnakatajj laycu." 
Psalms119:101 Arunacamarjam sarnakañataquejj take jan walinacat jithektasta. 
Psalms119:102 Janiw camächit arunacamat sarakcti, jumaw nayarojj yatichasista." 
Psalms119:103 Arunacamajj lacajjatac wali mojjsawa: misq'it sipan juc'ampiwa. 
Psalms119:104 Arunacam yatisaw amuy jicjjatta, ucat c'ari sarnakañarojj uñista." 
Psalms119:105 Arunacamajj sarnakäwejjatac khanawa, thaquejjan khantiriraquiwa." 
Psalms119:106 Juramento lurta, ucsti phokhäwa: cheka arunacamarjamaw sarnakä." 
Psalms119:107 ¡Tatay, wali llact'ataw jicjjatasta! arsutamarjamay jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:108 Tatay, arsutanacajjajj jumatac asquïpanaya, arunacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:109 Jacañajjajj jiwañ chijir jalantañampiwa; nayasti janiw yatichäwinacamat armascti. 
Psalms119:110 Ñankha lurir jakenacajj sipitanac ucharapipjjetu, nayasti janiw arsutanacamat sarakascti." 
Psalms119:111 Arunacamajj nayatac wiñay catokäwiwa, arsutanacamajj chuymajjaruw cusisiyi." 
Psalms119:112 Takpach chuymampiw leyinacamarjam sarnakañatac arsta, wiñay phokhañataquiw arsta, tucuycam phokhañataquiw arsuracta." 
Psalms119:113 Khepäjjat uñisisir jakenacarojj uñistwa, arunacamarusti munastwa." 
Psalms119:114 Jumaw imantasiñajjätajja, jarc'akasiñajjätasa, arunacamaruw takpach chuymajj catuyta." 
Psalms119:115 Ñankha lurir jakenaca, nayat sarakapjjeta, Diosajjan arsutanacap phokhä." 
Psalms119:116 Arsutamarjamay ch'am churita, uqhämat nayajj jacä; janiquiy inamay suyayistati." 
Psalms119:117 Yanapt'itaya, nayasti khespiyataw uñjasï, jan karjasisaw leyinacam phokhä." 
Psalms119:118 Jumajj arsutanacamat saranucurinacarojj jisc'achtawa, amtäwinacapajj jan amuyt'an amuyunacawa." 
Psalms119:119 Ñankha luririnacajj jumataquejj t'unar uñtatawa, nayasti arsutanacamaruw munasta." 
Psalms119:120 Janchejjajj nayrakataman ajjsarañat qhathati, camächit arunacam laycuw chuymajj alt'ayta." 
Psalms119:121 Janipuniw chekapäc uc lurañ jaytanuccäti; janiquiy t'akhesiyirinacajjan amparaparojj antutistati. 
Psalms119:122 Jumaquiy cusisit jacayita, khoru jakenacajj janiquiy t'akhesiyitpati." 
Psalms119:123 Nayranacajjajj khespiyäwim suycäwiw juyqhupti, arunacamarjam khespiyañam suyascta." 
Psalms119:124 Aca uywatamarojj qhuyapayasiñampiy uñjam, leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:125 Nayajj juman loktirimätwa: amuyt'a cancañay churita, arsutanacam yatiñ munta." 
Psalms119:126 Tatay, urojj purinjjewa, waquisjjew cun lurañamasa: arunacamarojj janiw ist'añ munapquiti;" 
Psalms119:127 nayasti arunacamarojj munastwa, jila alan korit sipana." 
Psalms119:128 Ucat arsutanacamarjamajj sarnakta, c'ari sarnakañarusti uñistwa." 
Psalms119:129 Arunacamajj muspharcañawa, ucat arunacamar jaysta." 
Psalms119:130 Arunacamat khanañchäwejj amuyt'ayituwa, pisi amuyt'aninacarojj amuyt'ayiwa." 
Psalms119:131 Munañ chuymampiw lacajj jist'arta, camächit arunacam yatiñ laycu." 
Psalms119:132 Nayarojj uñtanjjaquitaya, qhuyapayasiraquita, jumar munasirinacar uñjctas uqhamay uñjita." 
Psalms119:133 Arunacamarjam sarnakayita, janiquiy cuna ñankhas nayar atipitpati." 
Psalms119:134 Jakenacan t'akhesiyañapat khespiyita, nayasti arunacamarjamaw phokhä." 
Psalms119:135 Uywatamarojj qhuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim, leyinacamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:136 Umjamaw jachajj nayranacajjat warasi, yatichäwiman jan yäkatätap laycu." 
Psalms119:137 Tatay, jumajj asquïtawa, camächit arunacamajj chekapawa." 
Psalms119:138 Takpach arsutanacamajj asquiwa, arunacamajj chekaparaquiwa." 
Psalms119:139 Arunacamar munañaw take cun armayitu, uñisirinacajjajj arunacamat armt'asipjje." 
Psalms119:140 Arsutamajj wali yant'ataw uñjasi, uywatamasti arsutamaruw munasi." 
Psalms119:141 Jan yäkataquïtwa, jisc'achataraquïtwa, ucampis janiw arunacamat armascti." 
Psalms119:142 Chekapar uñjañamajj wiñay asquiwa, yatichäwimasti chekaparaquiwa." 
Psalms119:143 Llaquisiñanacamp jan walt'añanacampiw catuntitu, arunacamasti cusisiyituwa." 
Psalms119:144 Arsutanacamajj chekapapuniwa; amuyt'a cancañay churita, nayasti jacañ jicjjatä." 
Psalms119:145 Tatay, takpach chuymajjampiw art'asinsma, ist'aquitaya, leyinacam phokhañ munta." 
Psalms119:146 Jumaruw art'asinsma, yanapt'aquitaya, arunacamarjam phokhañajjataqui." 
Psalms119:147 Janïr khanjtanquipan jumat yanap maysma, arunacamaruw chuymajj catuyta." 
Psalms119:148 Janïr ch'amacthapquipan waquichasta, arsutamjjat lup'iñataqui." 
Psalms119:149 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñam laycuy arojjar ist'am, camächit arunacamarjam jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:150 Khoru arcnakerinacajjajj jac'anquiwa, jupanacasti yatichäw arunacamat jayancapjjewa." 
Psalms119:151 Jumasti, Tatay, jac'ancasctawa, takpach arsutanacamajj chekpachapuniwa." 
Psalms119:152 Nayratpach arunacam yatta, wiñay utt'ayat arunacama." 
Psalms119:153 T'akhesitajj uñtaniquitaya, khespiyaraquita, janiw arunacamat armascti." 
Psalms119:154 Nayat arjjatasiquitaya, khespiyaraquita; arsutamarjamay jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:155 Yanapt'amajj ñankha lurir jakenacat jayanquiwa, jupanacajj janiw arunacamarjam jacapquiti." 
Psalms119:156 Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamajj wali jach'awa, camächit arunacamarjamay jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:157 Nayar arcnaker timasirinacajj waljaniwa, nayasti janiw arunacamat sarakascti." 
Psalms119:158 Iyawsäwit sarakerinacar uñjasajj ajjtastwa, arunacamarojj janiw jaysapquiti." 
Psalms119:159 Tatay, arunacamar munasitajj uñtanita; qhuyapayasiñam laycuy jacañ churita." 
Psalms119:160 Takpach arunacamajj chekapawa, takpach arsutanacamajj wiñayawa, asquiraquiwa." 
Psalms119:161 Jilïr jakenacajj ina ch'usat arcnakapjjetu, chuymajjasti arunacamaruw wakaychi." 
Psalms119:162 Nayajj arsutamampejj cusisitätwa, imantat yänac jicjjatasin cusisir jakjamätwa." 
Psalms119:163 C'arisiñarojj uñistwa, janiw uñjañ muncti, yatichäwimarusti munastwa." 
Psalms119:164 Jan karjasisaw sapür jach'añchsma, chekap camächit arunacamata." 
Psalms119:165 Arunacam munirinacajj suman jacasipjje, janiw cunas jupanacarojj tincuyquiti." 
Psalms119:166 Tatay, nayar khespiyañam suyt'ascta, arunacamarjamaw sarnakta." 
Psalms119:167 Nayajj arsutanacamaruw jaysta, takpach chuymampiw munasiracta." 
Psalms119:168 Arunacamarojj jaystwa, jumaw take sarnakäwejj yatistajja." 
Psalms119:169 Tatay, arnakasitajjajj nayrakatamaruy purinpan, arunacamarjamay amuyt'a chuym churita." 
Psalms119:170 Mayisitajjajj nayrakatamar purinpan, arsutamarjamay khespiyita." 
Psalms119:171 Lacajjat jach'añchañ arunacajj mistpan, jumaw leyinacam nayar yatichista." 
Psalms119:172 Lajjrajjajj arsutam phokherïtamat k'ochpan, takpach arunacaman chekapätap laycu." 
Psalms119:173 Amparamajj nayar yanapt'añatac waquichatäpan, arunacamar take cunat sipan munasitajj laycu." 
Psalms119:174 Tatay, nayar khespiyañam munta; cusisiñajjajj munañam phokhañawa." 
Psalms119:175 Jumar jach'añchañataquiw jacañ munta, asqui cancañamajj yanapitpanaya." 
Psalms119:176 Chhaker ovejar uñtataw payinucta, nayar thakerejj jutaquimaya, janiw arunacamat armascti." 
Psalms120:1 Llaquisiñajjan Tatitur art'asta, jupasti ist'ituwa." 
Psalms120:2 Tatay, c'ari parlirinacat jarc'aketa, c'arimp aynacht'ayir lajjrat khespiyita." 
Psalms120:3 C'ari lajjran jake, ¿cunarac catokätasti?" 
Psalms120:4 ¡Nuwasirin ari mich'inacapa! ¡Naqhasquir retama sanc'anaca! 
Psalms120:5 ¡Ay cunaquïcta nayajja, Mesec chekan jaya jakjam apanucutätwa, Cedar chekan ch'ujllan jacaracta!" 
Psalms120:6 Sumancañar uñisirinac taypin jacta, sinti jayapuniw utjasta." 
Psalms120:7 Nayajj sumancañat parlcta ucapachajja, ch'ajjwañat jupanacajj parlapjje." 
Psalms121:1 Nayranacajjampiw kollunac uñatatta: “¿cawquitarac yanapast nayatac jutani?” sasa. 
Psalms121:2 Yanapajj Tatitut nayatac jutani, alajjpach acapach lurir Tatituta." 
Psalms121:3 Janipuniw jupajj tincuñam muncaniti, janipuniw jumar uñjirejj iccaniti." 
Psalms121:4 Janiw jupajj icquisa, samart'quisa, Israel marcar uñjirejj janipuniw icquiti." 
Psalms121:5 Tatituw juman imirimajja, jupaw juman jac'amancasqui." 
Psalms121:6 Intejj janiw urojj ñankha lurcätamti, phajjsis janiraquiw arumajj camächcätamsa." 
Psalms121:7 Tatituw take jan walt'añanacat imasctam; jupaw jacañam imasqui; 
Psalms121:8 Tatituw mistutamsa, mantatamsa uñjascani, jichhürut wiñaycama." 
Psalms122:1 “Tatitun utapar sarañäni” sirinacampejj walpun cusista. 
Psalms122:2 Jerusalén marca: cayunacajjajj niyaw puncunacam chek mantasqui. 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalén marcajj suma utt'atawa, wawanacapan tantachasiñapataqui." 
Psalms122:4 Ucaruw Tatitun ayllunacapajj maqhatapjje, sutipar jach'añchañataqui, Israel marcar siscän ucarjama." 
Psalms122:5 Ucanquiw chekapar uñjañ taripäwinacajja, ucanquiw David reyin taripäw utanacapajja." 
Psalms122:6 Jumanacajj takpach chuymamp sapjjam: “Jerusalén, sumancañajj juman utjpan, jumar munasirinacajj jan qhitin camsatac jacasipjjpan." 
Psalms122:7 Perkanacam taypin sumancañajj utjpan, reyiman utanacapas jan cuna camächcayäpan” sasa." 
Psalms122:8 Jichhasti, jilanacajj laycuw arsü, nayamp chic sarnakerinacajj laycuw arsuraquï: “Sumancañajj jumampïpan." 
Psalms122:9 Tatitu Diosasan utap laycuw juman asquimatac thakä” sasa. 
Psalms123:1 Tatay, juma tokeruw uñtansma; juma, alajjpachan jaquiriruw mayisinsma." 
Psalms123:2 Achict'asiñ chuymampiw Tatit Diosajjarojj uñtapjjta, qhuyapayasiñap suyasa; uywatanacajj uywiripat suyapqui uqhama, uywat warmejj uywiripat suyqui uqhama. Nanacajj Tatitun qhuyapayasiñap suyasipcaracta." 
Psalms123:3 Qhuyapayasipjjet, Tatay, qhuyapayasipjjeta, jisc'achat sarnakañampejj karjatäjjapjjtwa." 
Psalms123:4 Kamirinacajj larch'uquipjjetuwa, jach'a jach'a tucurinacajj jisc'achapjjetuwa, ajayojjajj aynacht'atäjjewa." 
Psalms124:1 Tatitutejj jan jiwasanacampïcasapän ucajja, —Israel marcajj arspan—" 
Psalms124:2 Tatitutejj jan jiwasanacampïcasapän ucajja, jakenacajj chhucjjatapquistän ucapachajja," 
Psalms124:3 jacquirpach mank'antistasapäna, k'apisiñapan jiwasanac contra naqhatap laycu." 
Psalms124:4 Ucapachajj umajj chhaktayjjestasapänwa, jawirajj jiwasanac pat llumiquipasapäna." 
Psalms124:5 Jupokon k'añu umajj cuncacamaw llumcatistasapäna. 
Psalms124:6 Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan, janiw jupajj apanucquistuti, janiraquiw laca ch'aqhanacapampis t'uruntayquistuti." 
Psalms124:7 Jamach'ir uñtataw jacañ khespiyasipjjtan, jiwayirin waquichat sipitapata; sipitajj t'akasïnwa, jiwasanacasti jaltjjapjjtanwa." 
Psalms124:8 Yanapt'ajj Tatitut juti, jupaw alajjpach acapach lurirejja." 
Psalms125:1 Tatitur takpach chuymamp iyawsirinacajj jan onjjtcayäpjjewa; Sión kollur uñtatäpjjewa, wiñayataquiw sayt'asipjje." 
Psalms125:2 Camisatejj kollunacajj Jerusalenar muyuntejja, uqhamaw Tatitojj marcapar muyunti jichhasa, wiñayasa." 
Psalms125:3 Ñankha lurir jakenacan munañan cancañapajj janiw wiñayatac asqui jakenacar apnakcaniti; asqui jakenacan ñankha jan lurasipcañapataqui. 
Psalms125:4 Tatay, asqui jakenacarojj asquinacay churam, khana chuyman jakenacarojj asquinacampiy phokhantam," 
Psalms125:5 jan wali thaquinjam saririnacarusti, ñankha luririnacamp chic aynacht'ayam. ¡Israel marcansti samarañajj utjpan!" 
Psalms126:1 Tatitojj Sión marcar wasitat cusisiycän ucapachajja, samcäcaspas uqhamänwa." 
Psalms126:2 Lacajj larusiñampiw atipjayasïna, lajjrasti cusisiñ k'ochunacampiw phokhantasiraquïna. Ucapachasti Diosar jan uñt'irinacajj sapjjänwa: “Tatitojj jach'a luräwinac jupanacataquejj luri” sasa." 
Psalms126:3 Jïsa, Tatitojj jach'a luräwinac lurarapistu, jiwasanacasti wali cusisitäpjjäyätanwa." 
Psalms126:4 Tatay, wasitat cusisiyjjapjjeta, jallump ch'ojjñatatir wasarar uñtata." 
Psalms126:5 Jacht'asis yapuchirinacajj, cusisiñampiw apthapjjapjjani." 
Psalms126:6 Jathanac apasajj jachasisas sarapcchejja, jayllt'asisaw cutinjjapjjani, trigo yawitanacap markt'ata." 
Psalms127:1 Tatitutejj jan utachcaspajja, inamayaquiw utachirinacajj ch'am tucusipcaspa; Tatitutejj marcar jan imcaspajja, inamayaquiw marc uñjirinacajj uñch'uquisipcaspa." 
Psalms127:2 Willjtat sarnakatanacajj inamayawa, jayp'ucam irnakatas inamayawa, jump'i apsutamp t'ant'a mank'atas inamayawa, Diosajj munat wawanacapan iquiñanacapcam t'ant'a churqui ucapachajja." 
Psalms127:3 Yurirapquistu uca wawanacajj, Tatitun asqui churäwinacapawa." 
Psalms127:4 Waynäpctan ucapach yurirapquistu uca wawanacajj nuwasirin amparapanquir flechanacar uñtatawa. 
Psalms127:5 Ucanacan jakejj cusisiñaniwa. Janiw timanacapamp p'enkachat uñjascaniti, janiraquiw ch'ajjwan atipayascaniti." 
Psalms128:1 Tatitur ajjsart'ir jake, cusisiñanïtawa, Tatitur jaysir jake, cusisiñanïtawa." 
Psalms128:2 Ch'ama tucutamatjam mank'asïta, cusisitaw utjasïta, take cunas waliquiw sararapïtam." 
Psalms128:3 Uta mankhemansti, warmimajj achuntir uva alir uñtatäniwa; wawanacamasti mank'añawjamar muyuntatajja, ch'ich'tanir olivo alinacar uñtatäniwa." 
Psalms128:4 Tatitojj uqhäm jupar wakaychirirojj asquinac churani. 
Psalms128:5 Tatitojj Sión kollutpach asquinac jumar churpan, takpach jacäwimansti, Jerusalén marcan kamirquipstatap uñjawayam." 
Psalms128:6 ¡Allchhinacamar uñjañcam jacawayam! ¡Israel marcansti sumancañajj utjpan! 
Psalms129:1 Wayna cancañajjatpach ucatak t'akhesiyapjjetu, —jichhajj Israel marcajj sispan—," 
Psalms129:2 wayna cancañajjatpach ucatak t'akhesiyapjjetu, ucanacampisti janiw atipjapquituti." 
Psalms129:3 Jiqhanejjarojj jawk'cäwiw chhojjriñchapjjetu, jach'a sucanacjam jawk'cäwejj jist'japjjetu." 
Psalms129:4 Tatitusti chekapar uñjasir cancañapanjja, ñankha lurir jakenacan amparapat khespiyitu." 
Psalms129:5 Sión marcar uñisirinacajj, jan p'enkanpach jaltjjapjjpan." 
Psalms129:6 Uta patan alir korjamäpjjpan, janïr jiq'inuccat wañsur korjama." 
Psalms129:7 Trigo yawirin amparapan jan phokt'ir korjama, markthapirin amparapar jan phokt'ir korjama;" 
Psalms129:8 janiw qhitis ucanacarojj sisquiti: “Tatituy asquinac jumanacar churpan” sasajja. Nanacasti Tatitun sutiparuw jumanacarojj jach'añchapjjsma. 
Psalms130:1 Tatay, jach'a t'akhesiñ taypitpach art'asinsma:" 
Psalms130:2 Tatay, arojjarojj ist'aquimaya; achict'asiñamp mayisitajjarojj jaysaquimaya." 
Psalms130:3 Dios Tatay, jumatejj takpach juchanac amjjäsiscaquismajja, ¿qhitirac nayrakataman sayt'aspasti?" 
Psalms130:4 Ucampis jumaw juchanacat pampachapjjesta, uqhämat jumar wakaychañ yatichapjjesta." 
Psalms130:5 Takpach almajjampiw Tatitur suyt'ascta, takpach chuymajjampiw arunacapar iyawsaracta." 
Psalms130:6 Nayajj Tatituruw suyt'ascta, khanjtaniñap uñch'uquir jaket juc'ampi." 
Psalms130:7 Israel marca, Tatituruy suyt'am, qhuyapayasiñajj Tatitut juti, khespiyäwipajj jilarquiriw jutaraqui." 
Psalms130:8 Jupaw Israel marcarojj take juchanacapat pampachani. 
Psalms131:1 Tatay chuymajjajj janiw inampst'irïquiti, janiraquiw nayranacajjas jach'a jach'a tucurïquiti, janiw muspharcañ jach'a yänacan khepap sarcti, ucanacan jan nayatacjamätap laycu." 
Psalms131:2 Ucatsipana amuquïsctwa, janiw llaquisiñajjajj utjquiti, taycapan amparapanquir jichha ñuñokayat wawjama. ¡Jichha ñuñokayat wawjamätwa!" 
Psalms131:3 Israel marca, Tatituruc suyt'am, jichhasa, wiñayasa." 
Psalms132:1 Tatay, Jacobon ch'aman Tatitupa, Davidat amtasiquimaya, llaquinacapat amtasiraquim; takpach chuymamp juramento luratapat amtasiquimaya:" 
Psalms132:2  
Psalms132:3 “Janiw utajjar mantcäti, janiw samart'añataquis iquintcäti," 
Psalms132:4 janiw nayranacajj ch'irmthapcäti, janiraquiw iccäsa," 
Psalms132:5 Tatitutac mä chekawja jicjjatañcama, Jacobon take atipir Diosapatac mä utjäwi jicjjatañcama” sasa." 
Psalms132:6 Efrata chekawjan arust'äwit ist'apjjta, Jaar oraken uc jicjjatapjjaracta." 
Psalms132:7 Tatitun kollan utapar mantapjjañäni, jupan nayrakatapar konkort'asipjjañäni." 
Psalms132:8 Tatay, kollan arcampiy sartasim, samarañam kolluruy jutam." 
Psalms132:9 Sacerdotenacamajj cusisiñ isimp isthapisipjjpan, jumar iyawsirinacajj cusisiñat art'asipjjpan." 
Psalms132:10 David uywatamar munatam laycujj, janiquiy ajllit reyimataquejj mays uñtamti." 
Psalms132:11 Tatitojj juramentompiw David chacharojj arsüna, uca arsutapatsti janiw may amtcaniti:" 
Psalms132:12 “Juman allchhinacamat mayniruw reyi konuñamar kont'ayä. Wawanacamatejj arust'äw arunacajjar phokhapjjani, yatichäw arunacajjar phokhapjjaraquin ucajja, wawanacaman wawanacapas wiñayaw reyi konuñaman kont'asipjjaraquini” sasa." 
Psalms132:13 Tatituw Sión kollurojj ajllisi, ucawjan jacañataquiw jupajj chhijllasi, aqhäm saraqui:" 
Psalms132:14 “Acaw wiñayatac nayan utjäwejjajja; acawjan jacä, nayar cusisiyatap laycu." 
Psalms132:15 Mank'añanacaparojj asquinacampiw phokhantä, jan utjirin jakenacaparusti mank'ampiw sisarayä." 
Psalms132:16 Sacerdotenacaparojj khespiyasiñ isimpiw isthapiyä, arquirinacaparusti cusisiñampiw art'asiyä." 
Psalms132:17 Davidan ch'amap wasitat sartayä, ajllit reyejjataquejj mä khan khantayarapï."
