Psalms132:18 Timanacaparusti p'enk tucuñampiw isthapiyä, juparusti intjam c'ajayä” sasa." 
Psalms133:1 Uñjapjjam: ¡cunj muncayasa jilanac pur mä wawac suman jacasiñajja! 
Psalms133:2 Ucajj k'apquir kollar uñtatawa, sacerdotenacan p'ekepat llumekasin sunqhap chek sarakqui, cunca isipawjcam purqui uqhamawa." 
Psalms133:3 Hermón kollut saraker sulla umjamawa, Sión kolljjar purir umar uñtataraquiwa. Ucawjaruw Tatitojj asquip apayani: ucasti wiñay jacañawa." 
Psalms134:1 Tatitun uywatanacapa, jupar jach'añchapjjam, Tatitun utapan arum pakar suyirinaca, jupar jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms134:2 Kollan ut toker amparanacam loktapjjam, Tatiturusti jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms134:3 Tatitojj Sión kollutpachay jumarojj asquinac apayanpan: jupaw alajjpach acapach lurirejja. 
Psalms135:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Tatitun sutip jach'añchapjjam, Tatitun uywatanacapa, jupar jach'añchapjjam," 
Psalms135:2 Tatitun utapanquirinaca, Diosasan uta ankäjjapanquirinaca," 
Psalms135:3 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, jupajj munasiriwa; sutipar k'ochupjjam, jupajj qhuyapayasiriwa." 
Psalms135:4 Jupaw Jacoborojj ajllisïna, Israelarusti marcapäñataquiw ajllisiraquïna." 
Psalms135:5 Tatitun muspharcayätap yatta, jupajj take diosanacat sipan ch'amaniwa." 
Psalms135:6 Tatitojj take cuntejj munqui uc luri: alajjpachansa, acapachansa, lamar kotansa, jach'a kota mankhansa." 
Psalms135:7 Orak tucusitpach kenayanac sartayi, khejjokhejjonacampiw jallu purjjatayi; utjäwinacapat thayanacarojj antutnucu." 
Psalms135:8 Jupaw Egiptonquir jakenacan tayna yokall wawanacaparojj jiwarayäna, tayna uywanacaruw jiwarayaraquïna." 
Psalms135:9 Muspharcañ uñacht'äwinac Egipto marcar apayanïna, faraón chachar uñacht'ayañataqui, jilïr jakenacapar uñacht'ayañataqui." 
Psalms135:10 Walja marcanacaruw jiwamp tucjäna; munañan reyinacaruw jiwarayäna: 
Psalms135:11 amorreo orakenquir Sehón reyiru; Basán orakenquir Og reyiru, Canaán orakenquir takpach reyinacaru." 
Psalms135:12 Qhä reyinacan orakenacapsti, Israel marcaparuw catuyjjäna." 
Psalms135:13 Tatay, sutimajj wiñayawa; sutimajj wiñayapuniw amtatäni." 
Psalms135:14 Tatituw marcaparojj chekapar uñjasqui, uywatanacapat qhuyapt'ayasiraqui." 
Psalms135:15 Diosar jan uñt'ir jakenacan c'ari diosanacapajj korit kollket lurataquiwa, jaken amparapamp lurataquiraquiwa:" 
Psalms135:16 lacanïcasinsa janiw parlapquiti, nayranïcasinsa janiw uñjapquiti," 
Psalms135:17 jinchunïcasinsa janiw ist'apquiti, janiw jacañ samananïpquisa." 
Psalms135:18 Uca diosanac luririnacajj ucanacjamaquïpjjewa, ucanacar alcatirinacas pachpaquïpjjaraquiwa." 
Psalms135:19 Israelanquir jakenaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam; Aarón sacerdoten utapanquirinaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam;" 
Psalms135:20 Leví chachan utapanquirinaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam; Tatitur iyawsirinaca, jupar jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms135:21 Tatitojj Sión marcan kollanäpan, Jerusalén marcan jaquir Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan. ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan!" 
Psalms136:1 Tatitur yuspagarapjjam, munasirïtap laycu, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa," 
Psalms136:2 diosanacan Diosapar yuspagarapjjam: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:3 Munañaninacan Munañanipar yuspagarapjjam: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:4 Jach'a muspharcañanac luririru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:5 Yatiñ cancañamp alajjpach luririru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:6 Uma patjjar orak jant'act'iriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:7 Intimp phajjsimp luririru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:8 Urun khanañapatac inti uchiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:9 Arum khanañapatac phajjsimpi, warawaranacamp luririru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:10 Egipto orakenquirinacan tayna yokall wawanacapar jiwarayirir yuspagarapjjam: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:11 Israel marcanquirinacar Egiptot irpsuniriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:12 Take ch'aman amparapamp irpsuniriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:13 Mar Rojo kotar payar jaljtayiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:14 Israel marcar lamar kota taypinjam irpcatiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:15 Mar Rojo kotar Faraonan jakenacapar jakontiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:16 Wasar chek marcapar irpiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:17 Aytat reyinacar jiwarayiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:18 Munañan reyinacar jiwarayiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:19 Amorreo jakenacan Sehón reyipar jiwayiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:20 Basán orakenquir Og reyir jiwayiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:21 Reyinacan orakenacap marcapar catuyiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:22 Uywat Israel marcapar catokäwip churjjeriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:23 Aynacht'añasan jiwasanacat amtasiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:24 T'akhesiyirinacasat khespiyiriru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:25 Jakenacarusa, uywanacarus mank'añ chuririru: qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:26 Alajjpachanquir Diosar yuspagarapjjam, qhuyapayasiñapajj wiñayawa." 
Psalms137:1 Babilonia jawir lacanacan kont'ataw Sión marcat amtasisajj jachapjjäyätan. 
Psalms137:2 Ucawjan alir sauce kokanacaruw arpanacas warct'asipjjäyätan. 
Psalms137:3 Jiwasanacar catuntat anaquirinacasti ucawjan k'ochuñas munapjjäna, jiwasanacat take cun apakerinacajj, cusisiñamp k'ochupjjañas munapjjäna: “Sión marcanquir k'ochunac k'ocht'arapipjjeta” sasa." 
Psalms137:4 ¿Jaken orakepanti Tatitun k'ochup k'ochuñäspasti? 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalén marca, jumat armasirisma ucajja, cupi amparajjajj jan aytquir tucpan." 
Psalms137:6 Jerusalén marca, janitejj jumat amtascä, janitejj juc'amp jumat cusiscä ucapachajja, lajjrajjajj lacajjar pharcatasin lip'catpan." 
Psalms137:7 Tatay, Edom orakenquir jakenacan arsutap amtam. Jerusalén marcajj aynacht'cän ucürojj sapjjänwa: “T'unjapjjam, saphitpach tucjapjjam” sasa." 
Psalms137:8 ¡Jumasti Babilonia marca, t'unjataw uñjasïta! ¡Qhitic nanacar jan walinac luratamat apscätamjja!" 
Psalms137:9 ¡Qhitic wawanacamar catuntasin karkanacar jisctasin jiwaraycanejja! 
Psalms138:1 Tatay, take chuymampiw jumar yuspagaräma; angelanacan nayrakatapan jumatac k'ochurapïma." 
Psalms138:2 Kollan templom uñcatataw quillt'asï, munasiñamampita, cheka cancañamampit sutimar yuspagarä: sutimarusa, arunacamarus take cunjjaruw jilancaytajja." 
Psalms138:3 Art'asinsma ucapachajj ist'istawa, almajjarusti ch'am yapjjatarapista." 
Psalms138:4 Tatay, arsutanacam ist'asinjja, acapachanquir reyinacajj jumaruw yuspagarapjjätam;" 
Psalms138:5 Tatitun thaquipan sumätap k'ochupjjani, Tatitun c'ajquir cancañapan jach'ätap laycu." 
Psalms138:6 Tatitojj alajjpachancchi ucasa, llamp'u chuyman jakerojj uñtaniwa, jach'a jach'a tucur jakerusti jayat uñt'i." 
Psalms138:7 Chijinacar purcta ucapachajja, jumaw jacañajjar imtajja; ch'amamampiw timanacajjan amparapat khespiyistajja." 
Psalms138:8 Tatituw nayarojj asquinacamp phokhantitani: Tatay, qhuyapayasiñamajj wiñayawa, amparamamp luratanacarojj janiquiy armanucumti." 
Psalms139:1 Tatay, jumaw chuymajj uñantista, nayar uñt'araquista:" 
Psalms139:2 jumaw kont'atajjsa, sartatajjsa yattajja, lup'itanacajjarojj jayatpach amuytajja." 
Psalms139:3 Jumaw sarnakatajjsa, samart'atajjsa yattajja, takpach sarnakäwinacajjajj juman uñt'atawa." 
Psalms139:4 Tatay, janïraw lacajjampis arscti ucqhaw jumajj takpach yatjjtajja." 
Psalms139:5 Take toket nayar muyuntista, amparamampiw imjjäsista." 
Psalms139:6 Ucatak yatiñ cancañamajj atipjapunituwa; sinti muspharcayawa, janiw amuyt'irjamäcti." 
Psalms139:7 Ajayum jac'atsti ¿cawquirurac sarästi? nayrakatamatsti ¿cawquirurac jaltästi?," 
Psalms139:8 Alajjpacharutejj maqhatiristjja, jumajj ucanctawa; orak mankharutejj mantiristjja, jumajj ucancaractawa;" 
Psalms139:9 inti jalsu tokerutejj thoktawayirista, jan ucajj lamar kota tucuscamas mantiristjja," 
Psalms139:10 ch'eka amparamajj ucan jicjjatitaspa, cupi amparamasti janiw antutquitaspati." 
Psalms139:11 Ch'amacamp imjjatayasiñtejj amtirista, jan ucajj, khana urun ch'amac arumar tucuñaptejj muniristjja," 
Psalms139:12 ch'amacajj janiw jumat imantquitaspati, arum ch'amacajj urut sipan juc'ampiw khantaspa. ¡Ch'amacas urus jumataquejj pachpaquiwa!" 
Psalms139:13 Jumaw nayarojj irnokasista, taycajjan puracapan utjayasista." 
Psalms139:14 Jumaruw yuspagarsma, muspharcañpun nayataquejj lurtajja, ¡ucsti sumpun yatista!" 
Psalms139:15 Janchejjan jiltatapajj juman uñjatänwa, jan qhitin uñjcat irnokatäcäyät ucchañcama, orak mankhan utjayatäcäyät ucchañcama." 
Psalms139:16 Nayranacamajj lurat janchejj uñjäna; ucanacasti takpachaw kellkatamar kellkantasïna. Jacañ urunacajjajj suma jaqhutänwa, nayrïr uru janïr purinquipana." 
Psalms139:17 Diosajjay, juman amtatanacamajj jan amuycayawa, ucanacajj jan tucusquiriwa." 
Psalms139:18 Ucanactejj jact'añ muniristjja, ch'allat sipan juc'ampïspawa; jaqhuñ tucuyirist ucasa, jumamp chicaquïsquiristwa." 
Psalms139:19 Diosajjay, ñankha luririnacarojj tucusiyamaya, jake jiwayirinacarusti nayat jithektayam," 
Psalms139:20 jumjjat jan wal parlir jakenacat jithektayita, juma contra sayt'ir jakenacat jarc'aketa." 
Psalms139:21 Tatay, ¿janit jumar uñisirinacar uñisirïctjja? ¿Janit jumar kallasirinacar jisc'achirïctjja?" 
Psalms139:22 Jan t'acurcay uñisiñampiw jupanacar uñista, uñisirejjat jupanacarojj uñt'ta." 
Psalms139:23 Diosay, uñaquipitaya, chuymajjar uñantam, nayarojj yant'itaya, lup'itanacajj uñt'araquim," 
Psalms139:24 nayatejj ñankha thaquin sarnakerïstjja, cheka thaquinjamay irpasita." 
Psalms140:1 Tatay, ñankha lurir jaket jarc'akasita, khoru arun jaket imjjatita," 
Psalms140:2 jan wali lurañanac chuymapan amtapjje, sapüruw nuwasiñanac utjayapjje." 
Psalms140:3 Lajjrapajj asïrunacan lajjrapjam waquichatawa, arunacapasti catarinacan mich'ipjamawa." 
Psalms140:4 Tatay, ñankha lurir jaket arjjatita, khoru jakenacat imjjatita, tincuñajjatac sipitanac waquichirinacat jarc'aketa." 
Psalms140:5 Qhä jach'a jach'a tucur jakenacajj sipitanac waquicharapipjjetu; ñankha luririnacajj känanac jant'actatarapipjjetu, sarañajjarusti sipitanac uchantarapipjjetu." 
Psalms140:6 Nayasti Tatiturojj sistwa: “Jumaw Diosajjätajja, Tatay, jach'at mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya;" 
Psalms140:7 Tatay, take ch'aman khespiyirejjay, jumaw nuwasïwin p'ekejjar imasctajja.”" 
Psalms140:8 Tatay, janiquiy ñankha luririn munataparojj jaysamti, janiquiy amtäwinacapan sum sarantañap munamti. Janiquiy nayar uñisirinacajj p'ekenacap waytapjjpati; ñankhachatanacapajj jupanacar wact'pan." 
Psalms140:9  
Psalms140:10 Nina sanc'a q'illiminac jupanacjjarojj jallpan, p'iyanacar wiñayatac jalantapjjpan." 
Psalms140:11 Lacarar jakejj oraken jan acht'pati, khoru jakerusti chijejj arctpan." 
Psalms140:12 Llaquit jaker Tatitun chekapar uñjatap yatta, t'akhesiyat jaker arjjatatap yatiracta." 
Psalms140:13 Asqui jakenacajj sutim jach'ar aptapjjani, chekap jaquir jakenacasti nayrakataman jacapjjani." 
Psalms141:1 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, janc'aquiy jutam, art'asinsma ucapachajj ist'aquitaya." 
Psalms141:2 Mayisitajjajj inciensor uñtat nayrakatamar maqhatanpan, lokatatat amparanacajjasti, jayp'u loktäwjamäpan." 
Psalms141:3 Tatay, lacajj jarc'añatac mä jarq'ir ucharapita, lacanacajj jan jist'arañatac mä uñjir uscurapita." 
Psalms141:4 Ñankha lup'iñ amuy apakt'ita, ñankha lurañanac jan lurayistati; janirac ñankha lurir jakenacamp chicajj jach'a mank'äwincayistati." 
Psalms141:5 Asqui jakejj mutuyitpan, suma jakejj tokenoketpan, ucanac catokañataquejj janiw jaltcäti; mutuycatpachas Tatitut mayisiscaquïwa." 
Psalms141:6 Ñankha luririnacan jilïrinacapajj karkanacat nuct'atäpjjaniwa, arunacajjan asquïtap uñjapjjani." 
Psalms141:7 Ch'aqhanacapajj sepultur jac'an willitatatäniwa, orak sucachsutajj jist'artquejj uqhamäpjjaniwa." 
Psalms141:8 Tatay, nayranacajjajj jumaruw uñtantam, jumaruw imantasiñatac maqhatansma, janiquiy apanucustati." 
Psalms141:9 Jalantañajjatac uchat sipitat khespiyita, ñankha luririnacan sipitapat jarc'aketa." 
Psalms141:10 Ñankha luririnacajj pachpa sipitanacapar jalantapjjpan, nayasti ucchañcamajj sarantascaquïwa." 
Psalms142:1 Tatiturojj wali jach'at art'asta, jach'at qhuyapayasiñ mayista." 
Psalms142:2 Jupan nayrakatapan llaquinacajj arsusta, nayrakatapan llaquejjat yatiyasta," 
Psalms142:3 ucchañcamasti samanajj tucstituwa. Tatay, jumaw sarnakäwejj yattajja, thaquejjarojj mä sipit uchantapjje." 
Psalms142:4 Cupi tokeruw uñtasta, janiw qhitis yanapt'ir jutquituti. Janiw qhitis arjjatir utjquituti. Janiw qhitis nayat llaquirejj utjquiti." 
Psalms142:5 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumaruw saracsma: “Jumätaw nayan imantasiñajjajja; jumaquiw aca jacañ oraken take cunajjätasa” sasa." 
Psalms142:6 Arnakasitanacajjarojj ist'aquimaya, ch'ama thayjtataw uñjasta. Nayar arcnakerinacat khespiyita, jupanacajj nayat sipan juc'amp ch'amanïpjjewa." 
Psalms142:7 Catuntat jacañat khespiyita, jumar jach'añchañatac wayst'asita. Asqui jakenacajj muyuntapjjetaniwa, qhuyapayasiñamp uñjquität ucapachajja." 
Psalms143:1 Tatay, mayisitajjarojj ist'aquimaya, achict'asitajjarojj jaysaquimaya. Jumajj chekapästajjaya, ist'aquitaya." 
Psalms143:2 Janiquiy uywatamarojj juchañchamti, nayrakatamanjja janiw qhitis asquïquiti." 
Psalms143:3 Timasirinacajjajj jiwayañataquiw arcnaketu, orakeruw tacsupjjetu; ch'amac taypin jacayañ munapjjetu, jiwatarjamaw uñjapjjetu." 
Psalms143:4 Ajayojjajj aynacht'atawa, chuymajjajj llaquimp tucusitawa." 
Psalms143:5 Nayra pachanacat amtasta, takpach luräwinacamat lup'ta, amparamamp luratanacamat amuyquipta." 
Psalms143:6 Juma tokeruw amparanacajj loktansma, waña oraker uñtataw jumatjam pharjayasta." 
Psalms143:7 Tatay, mayisitajjarojj janc'aquiy ist'am, samanajjajj tucstañampïsquiwa. Janiquiy ajanum maysar uñtamti, uqhamäspa ucajja, jiwatanacar uñtatïristwa." 
Psalms143:8 Willjtanacajj munasiñam ist'ayita, take chuymamp jumar iyawsatajj laycu. Sarañajjäqui uca thac uñachayita, jumar almajj catuyasitajj laycu." 
Psalms143:9 Tatay, nayamp timasirejjat khespiyita, jumaruw imantasiñatac thaksma." 
Psalms143:10 Munañam lurañ yatichita, nayan Diosajjätam laycu. Munasir ajayumajj cheka thaquinjamay irpitpan." 
Psalms143:11 Tatay, sutim laycuy jacayasita, qhuyapayasirïtam laycuy llaquisiñat wayst'ita." 
Psalms143:12 Qhuyapayasiñam laycuy timasirinacajjar t'unjam, ¡takpach uñisirinacajjar tucusiyam! nayajj juman arquirimästjjaya." 
Psalms144:1 Nayar arjjatir Tatitojj kollanäpan. Jupaw ch'ajjwañatac amparanacajj waquichi, luc'ananacajjarus nuwasiñatac waquicharaqui," 
Psalms144:2 jupaw nayan asqui lurirejjajja, imantasiñ pucarajjasa, khespiñatac waquichat uyusa, jarc'akasiñajjasa, imantasiñajjasa, juparaquiw marcanacar nayamp apnakayirisa." 
Psalms144:3 Tatay, ¿cunarac jakesti, jupat amtasiñamataquisti?, ¿cunarac jakenacasti, jupanacar munasiñamataquisti?" 
Psalms144:4 Jakejj mä samsump sasiquiwa, jacañapajj chhaktir ch'iwjamaquiwa." 
Psalms144:5 Tatay, alajjpach jist'aranim, sarakaniraquim, kollunacar llamct'am, ucanacasti jiwk'e mistuyapjjani," 
Psalms144:6 khejjokhejjorojj antutnucunim, ucanacarusti chhuqhutatayam, mich'inacamamp tucjam." 
Psalms144:7 Alajjpachatpach amparam loktanim, lamar kota umanacat arjjatita, khespiyaraquita, yakha marcanquir jakenacan amparapat khespiyita," 
Psalms144:8 lacanacapajj c'ari parlirinacawa, cupi amparanacapasti c'ari juramento lurañatac aytiriwa." 
Psalms144:9 Tatay, machak k'ochu jayllirapïma, arpamp chicaw k'ochurapïma." 
Psalms144:10 Jumaw reyinacar atipjaytajja; jumaraquiw David loktirimar khespiytajja, jiwayir espadat arjjatita, yakha marcanquir jakenacan amparapat khespiyita, lacanacapajj c'ari parlirinacawa, cupi amparanacapasti c'ari juramento lurañatac aytiriwa." 
Psalms144:11  
Psalms144:12 Yokall wawanacajjajj alinac taypinjam jiltapjje; imill wawanacajjasti templor thurjjäsir kalanacar uñtatäpjjewa; 
Psalms144:13 pirwanacajjajj cunayman mank'añanacamp phokhantatawa, uywanacajjajj walipuniw miranti, pampanacajjan warank warank tamanacaw mirantaraqui." 
Psalms144:14 Vacanacajjajj wallk'ecamaquiwa; janiw sulluririnacajj utjquiti, janiraquiw thaquinacajjan warariyasiñanacas utjquiti." 
Psalms144:15 Uqham phokt'at marcajj cusisiñan marcawa, Tatitut Diosanïqui uca marcajj cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:1 Diosajjay, Reyejjay, jach'aruw aptäma, wiñayaw sutim jach'añchä." 
Psalms145:2 Sapüruw jach'añchäma, wiñayaw sutim jach'ar aptä." 
Psalms145:3 Tatitojj jach'apuniwa, jach'ar aptatäñapajj waquisiwa, jach'a cancañapajj jan amuyt'cayawa." 
Psalms145:4 Jakenacajj wawanacapan wawanacapcamaw luratanacam aytani, muspharcañ luratanacam yatiyapjjani." 
Psalms145:5 Muspharcañ khapak cancañamat jupanacarojj yatiyasini, nayasti muspharcañ luratanacamat parlaraquï." 
Psalms145:6 Ajjsarcay ch'aman luratanacamat yatiyasini, nayasti jach'a luräwinacamat parlaraquï." 
Psalms145:7 Jach'a qhuyapayasiñamat amtasaw yatiyapjjani, juman asqui cancañamat jach'at jallallapjjani." 
Psalms145:8 Tatitojj munasiriwa, qhuyapayasiriraquiwa, k'apisiñapajj c'achhaquiwa, munasiñapasti jilarquiriwa." 
Psalms145:9 Tatitojj takenir munasiriwa, takpach luratanacaparojj munasiñampiw uñji." 
Psalms145:10 Tatay, luratanacamajj takpachapun jumar jach'añchpan, iyawsirinacamajj jumar jach'añchapjjpan." 
Psalms145:11 Aytat kollan sarayäwimat yatiyapjjpan, jach'a luräwinacamat parlapjjpan." 
Psalms145:12 Muspharcañ luratanacamat jakenacar yatiyaspan, aytcay khapak sarayäwimat parlasiracpan." 
Psalms145:13 Khapak marcamajj wiñay khapak marcawa, khapak apnakäwimajj wiñay apnakäwiraquiwa. Tatitojj arsutanacap phokheriwa, take luräwinacapan munasiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:14 Tatituw tincurinacarojj catjjäsisqui, t'uqhasirinacarusti ch'amañchascaraqui." 
Psalms145:15 Takenin nayranacapaw jumarojj uñch'uquisipctam, jumaw waquisitarjam mank'añ jupanacar churtajja." 
Psalms145:16 Jumaw amparam lokatattajja, take jaquirinacarusti asquinac jilarquir churtajja." 
Psalms145:17 Tatitojj take sarnakäwipan chekap uñjiriwa, take luräwinacapan munasiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:18 Tatitojj art'asirinacapan jac'apancasquiwa, takpach chuymamp jupat art'asirinacan jac'apanquiwa." 
Psalms145:19 Jupar arquirinacan munataparjamaw phokhe, arnakasitanacap ist'i, khespiyaraqui." 
Psalms145:20 Tatitojj jupar munirinacarojj imiwa, ñankha luririnacarusti t'unjiwa." 
Psalms145:21 Lacajjajj Diosar jach'añchpan, takpach jaquirinacajj kollan sutip jach'añchpan, jichhasa, wiñayasa." 
Psalms146:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Takpach chuymajjampiw Tatitur jach'añchä. 
Psalms146:2 Jacañajjcamajj Tatituruw jach'ar aptä; jupataquiw k'ochuraquï. 
Psalms146:3 Jilïr jakenacarojj jan alcatapjjamti, jiwir jakëpjjatap laycojj, janiw khespiyapcaspati:" 
Psalms146:4 jiwjjapjje ucapachajja, lak'aruw tucjjapjje, ucürpachaw amtatanacapajj tucusjje." 
Psalms146:5 Jacobon Diosapan yanapat jakejj cusisiñaniwa, Tatitu Diosapar suyt'irejj cusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms146:6 Jupaw alajjpach acapach luri, lamar kotarusa, take ucan utjirinacarusa. Jupajj arsutap phokhapuniwa." 
Psalms146:7 T'akhesiyat jakenacaruw chekapar uñji, mank'at awtjatanacaruw mank'añ churaraqui. Tatituw catuntat jakenacarojj antutnucuyi." 
Psalms146:8 Tatituw juyqhunacan nayranacap jist'ari, Tatituw tincur jakenacarojj wayti; Tatituw asqui jakenacarojj munasi;" 
Psalms146:9 Tatituw yakha marcanquir jakenacarojj uñji, wajchanacampir ijma warminacampiruw uywi, ñankha lurir jakenacataquisti thaquip chhaktayi." 
Psalms146:10 Tatitojj wiñayapuniw apnakani, Sión marca, Diosamajj wiñayan wiñayapaw apnakani. ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan!" 
Psalms147:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Diosasar k'ochuñajj cusiscañawa. Jupar suma k'ochunacamp jach'añchañaw waquisi. 
Psalms147:2 Tatituw Jerusalenarojj wasitat sayt'ayi, Israel marcat ananucutanacarusti tantachthapiraqui." 
Psalms147:3 Jupaw chuyma usuchjatanacarojj waliptayi, chhojjrinacap c'umaracharaqui." 
Psalms147:4 Jupaw warawaranac jact'i, sapa mayarusti suti ucharaqui." 
Psalms147:5 Diosasajj jach'a ch'amanipuniwa, yatiñ cancañapajj jan tucusquiriwa." 
Psalms147:6 Tatituw llamp'u chuymaninacarojj jach'ar apti, ñankha lurir jakenacarusti, lak'ar tucuñapcamaw aynacht'ayi." 
Psalms147:7 Yuspagarañamp Tatitur k'ochupjjam; Diosasataquejj arpamp chic k'ochupjjam. 
Psalms147:8 Jupaw alajjpacharojj kenayanacamp phokhanti, oraketac jallu waquichi, ch'umi mankhanacan koranac ch'ojjñaptayi." 
Psalms147:9 Jupaw uywanacarojj mank'añ churi, juparaquiw allkamarin chhiwlinacaparojj wararipqui ucapachajj mank'añ churi." 
Psalms147:10 Janiw caballonacan ch'amapajj Tatitur cusisiyquiti, janiraquiw jaken ch'amapas cusisiyquiti." 
Psalms147:11 Jupar iyawsirinacaw cusisiyi, qhuyapayasiñapar iyawsirinacaw cusisiyaraqui." 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalén marca, Tatitur jach'añcham; Sión marca, Diosamar jach'añcham." 
Psalms147:13 Jupaw puncunacaman jist'añanacap thuruñchi, wawanacamarusti marca taypin jach'añcharaqui." 
Psalms147:14 Tatituw orakemarojj sumancañ uchi, jilarquir suma trigompiw sist'aytam." 
Psalms147:15 Jupaw arunacap oraker apayani, arunacapasti janc'aquiw yatiyasi." 
Psalms147:16 Jupaw qhunurojj t'awrar uñtat apayani, arum sullanacarusti khellar uñtat willtaraqui." 
Psalms147:17 Jupaw chhullunqhayarojj chhijchhir uñtat apayani; umanacasti thayampiw chhullunqhayar tucu. 
Psalms147:18 Jupajj mä aruc arsu, ucampiquiw chulluraraqui; thayampiw phust'ayi, umasti jaltiwa." 
Psalms147:19 Tatituw Jacoborojj arunacap yatiyi, Israel marcarusti leyinacapamp arsutanacapamp churaraqui." 
Psalms147:20 Janiw cawquïr marcampis uqhäm lurcänti, qhä marcanacajj janipuniw arsutanacap uñt'apcänti. ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan!" 
Psalms148:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Tatiturojj alajjpachatpach jach'añchapjjpan, Tatiturojj alajjatpach yupaychapjjpan." 
Psalms148:2 Tatitun angelanacapa, jupar jach'añchapjjam, takpach tamanacapa, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms148:3 Inti, phajjsi, c'ajquir warawaranaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms148:4 Alajjpacha, Tatitur jach'añcham, alajjpachanquir umanaca, Tatitur jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms148:5 Tatitun sutip jach'ar aptapjjam, arupamp arsusaquiw take cun utjayäna;" 
Psalms148:6 jupaw wiñayatac take cun utt'ayäna, jan tucusquir camächit aru ucharaquïna." 
Psalms148:7 Tatiturojj oraketpach jach'añchapjjam, lamar kotanquir chawllanaca, ajjsarcañ animalanaca." 
Psalms148:8 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, khejjokhejjosa, chhijchhisa, qhunusa, urpusa, arunacap jaysir jach'a thayasa." 
Psalms148:9 Yupaychapjjam, jach'a kollunaca, jisc'a kollunaca, achu churir kokanaca, cedro kokanaca;" 
Psalms148:10 animalanaca, uta uywanaca, orakenjam jisqhanaktir animalanaca, thoknaquir jamach'inaca." 
Psalms148:11 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam, acapachanquir reyinaca, takpach jilïrinaca, acapach apnakerinaca." 
Psalms148:12 Tatitur jach'añchapjjam; chachanaca, warminaca, waynanaca, ch'ama karitanaca, wawanaca." 
Psalms148:13 Tatitun sutip jach'ar aptapjjam, sutipaquiw muspharcañajja. Jach'a cancañapajj alajjpachats orakets jilanquiwa." 
Psalms148:14 ¡Jupaw marcaparojj ch'amañchi! ¡Jupaw iyawsirinacapar jach'ar aptayirejja, ajllit Israel marcapar jach'añchirejja! ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms149:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Tatiturojj machak k'och k'ochupjjam, iyawsirinacap taypin jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms149:2 Israel marcajj utjayiripat cusispan, Sión marcan wawanacapajj Reyipat cusisipjjpan." 
Psalms149:3 Thokoñanacamp sutiparojj jach'añchapjjam, arpanacampi, chhulluchhullunacamp k'ochupjjam." 
Psalms149:4 Tatitojj marcaparojj munasiwa, llamp'u chuyman jakenacarojj atipt'ayiwa." 
Psalms149:5 Asqui jakenacajj jach'a cancañapar uruyapjjpan, iccasas cusisiñat k'ochupjjpan." 
Psalms149:6 Lacanacapan Diosar jach'añchañajj utjpan, amparanacapansti purapar arin espada ayt'atäpjjpan;" 
Psalms149:7 Diosar jan uñt'ir marcanacar uqhämat uqhäm apsusiñataqui, jach'a marcanacar mutuyañataqui," 
Psalms149:8 reyinacar ñach'antañataqui, munañaninacarusti cadenanacamp ñach'antañataqui." 
Psalms149:9 Tatitun arsutapajj jupanacamp phokhasiñapataqui. ¡Ucajj takpach iyawsirinacapar jach'ar aptirïniwa! ¡Tatitojj jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms150:1 ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! Diosarojj kollan utapan yupaychapjjam, muspharcañ alajjpachan jach'añchapjjam." 
Psalms150:2 Wali muspharcañ luratanacapat yupaychapjjam, muspharcañ jach'a cancañapat jach'ar aptapjjam." 
Psalms150:3 Trompet phust'añanacamp jach'añchapjjam, arpanacamp, salterionacamp jach'ar aptapjjam," 
Psalms150:4 tamboranacamp thokoñamp jach'añchapjjam, pinquillonacamp yakha instrumentonacamp jach'ar aptapjjam," 
Psalms150:5 wali cuncayir platillonacamp jach'añchapjjam, jach'at chhulloker platillonacamp jach'ar aptapjjam." 
Psalms150:6 Takpach jaquirinacajj Tatitur yupaychapjjpan. ¡Tatitojj jach'ar aptatäpan! 
Proverbs1:1 Aca säwi arunacajj Salomonan arsüwinacapawa. Jupasti Davidan yokapänwa, Israelan reyiparaqui." 
Proverbs1:2 Aca säwi arunacasti: Yatiñ cancañampi, yatichäwinacampi yatiyañataquiwa, yatiñan phokt'at arunaca amuyt'añana yanapt'añataqui," 
Proverbs1:3 yatichäwinaca, ch'iqhi cancaña jicjjatañataqui, uqhamarac jakerojj asqui cheka cancañana sarnakaña yatichañataqui;" 
Proverbs1:4 jan yatiñan jakenacarusti ch'iqhi cancaña yatichañataqui, uqhamarac waynanacarus yatiña, amuyt'asiña churañataqui." 
Proverbs1:5 Qhititejj yatiñani, ch'iqhïqui ucawa aca arunacjja ist'ejja, ucatsti jicjjatiwa juc'amp yatiñ cancaña, uqhamarac juc'amp suma ewjja arunaca," 
Proverbs1:6 uqhamata jupajj yatiñan jakenacan säwi arunacapa amuyt'añapataqui, uqhamarac parlatanacapa, uñtasïwi arunacapa, jan amuyt'caya arunacapa amuyt'añapataqui." 
Proverbs1:7 Yatiñ cancaña jicjjatañataquisti nayrakatajj waquisiwa Tatitur ajjsaraña; pisi amuyt'an jakenacasti jisc'achapjjewa yatiñarusa, yatichäwirusa." 
Proverbs1:8 “Wawajjay, ist'am awquimana yatichäwinacapa, janiquiy taycaman yatichäwinacapjja jisc'achamti." 
Proverbs1:9 Uca yatichäwinacasti jumataquejj mä suma c'achachäwïniwa, mä suma collarar uñtataraqui." 
Proverbs1:10 Wawajjay, jucharar jakenacatejj pantjayañ munapjjätam ucajja, ¡jan jumajj ist'amti!" 
Proverbs1:11 Inas sapjjaracchïtam “Jutam, nanacampi chica sararaquim, ucatsti munañasaru mä sipita waquichañäni, mä qhiti jan juchani pasasquiri jakeru jiwayañataqui." 
Proverbs1:12 Ucatsti asqui jakenacarojj jacquirpacha mank'antañäni, cunjämatejj jiwajj maypacha sepulturar apasjjejja uqhama." 
Proverbs1:13 Ucatjja take casta kamir cancañwa jicjjatañäni, ¡utanacassti take lunthatata yänacampiw phokhantaraquiñäni!" 
Proverbs1:14 Jumajj nanacampëjjam, ucatsti cunanactejj jicjjatcañäni ucanacjja takeniw jaljasiñäni” sasa." 
Proverbs1:15 ¡Ucampis, wawajja, jan jupanacan ucarojj saramti! Jupanacan jan wali sarnakäwinacapatjja jithektam." 
Proverbs1:16 Jupanacasti janc'aquiwa ñankha lurañ munapjje, ¡masinacaparus janc'aquiw jiwayañsa munapjjaraqui!" 
Proverbs1:17 Jamach'inacan uñjatajja inamayawa sipitajj uchatäsqui," 
Proverbs1:18 ucampis uca jakenacajja jupanac pachpataquiquiw sipita waquichasipjje, ucatsti jacañanacapjja jan walt'añanacaruwa puriyapjje." 
Proverbs1:19 Uqhamawa lunthatanacan tucuyäwipajja: jan wali luririnacarojja, pachpa jan wali luratapawa jupar jiwayani." 
Proverbs1:20 “Yatiñasti callenacana, plazanacanwa arnakasi mayninacan ist'atäñataqui;" 
Proverbs1:21 arunacapjja yatiyiwa mantañ puncunacana, uqhamarac marcana tantachasïwi chekanacana, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Jan yatiñani, sawcasiri, pisi amuyt'an jakenaca, ¿cunapachcamaraqui pisi amuyt'añan sarnakapjjäta, sawcasiñanacamana cusisisa, yatiñarusa jisc'achasasti?" 
Proverbs1:23 Nayan ewjja arunacajjaru ist'apjjeta, ucatsti nayaw yatiñanïña churapjjäma, yatichäwinacajjsa yatiyapjjaraquïma." 
Proverbs1:24 Nayasti jumanacarojj jawsapjjsmawa, ucampis jumanacajj janiw ist'añ munapquistati." 
Proverbs1:25 Jan ucasti suma ewjja arunacajj-jja jisc'achapjjtawa, janiraquiw ewjja arunacajj-jja catokañ munapctati." 
Proverbs1:26 ¡Nayajja larusiraquïwa cunapachatï jan walt'añajj jumanacaru catuntapcätam ucqhajja! ¡Nayajj sawcasiraquïwa cunapachatï ajjsarañajj jumanacar catuntapcätam ucqhajja," 
Proverbs1:27 uqhamarac cunapachatï jumanacar jutcani ajjsarañanacasa, jan walt'añanacasa, llaquisiñanacasa, aykoñanacasa, mä take tucjiri jach'a tutucjama ucqhajja!" 
Proverbs1:28 “Uca urusti jumanacajj jawsapjjetätawa, ucampis nayajj janiw ist'apcämati; thakapjjetätawa, ucampis janiw jicjjatapquitätati," 
Proverbs1:29 jumanacan yatiñ cancañaru jisc'achapjjatamata, Tatitur jan ajjsarapjjatam laycuraqui." 
Proverbs1:30 Jumanacasti suma ewjja arunacajjarojj janiw catokañ munapctati, jan ucasti ewjja arunacajjarojj jisc'achapjjtawa." 
Proverbs1:31 ¡Ucatsti jumanacajj jan wali sarnakapjjatanacamatjja t'akhesiñwa catokapjjäta! Ñankha amtatanacamampisti amjayasipjjätamwa. 
Proverbs1:32 Jan yatiñan jakenacarusti jan wali luratanacapaw tucjani, pisi amuyt'an jakenacarusti jan amuyt'asitanacapaw aynacht'ayani." 
Proverbs1:33 Ucampis qhititejj nayar ist'quitani ucajja, sumancañanwa jacasini, ucatsti janiw ajjsarayascaniti cuna jan walt'añanacansa.”" 
Proverbs2:1 “Munat wawajjay, jumatejj arunacajja catoketäta; camachi arunacajjsa imaraquïta," 
Proverbs2:2 yatiñarusa ist'araquïta; ch'iqhi chuymanïñsa jicjjatañ munaraquïta. 
Proverbs2:3 Ch'iqhi chuymanïñarusa chekap sarnakañarusa take ch'amamampi," 
Proverbs2:4 kollkerjama, jila alani imat yänacarjama, thakaraquïta ucqhajja," 
Proverbs2:5 yatïtawa Tatitur ajjsaraña; ¡jicjjataraquïtawa cunäquitejj Diosar uñt'añajja uca! 
Proverbs2:6 Tatituwa yatiña churirejja; lacapataracwa yatiña, uñt'aña arunacapajj misturaqui." 
Proverbs2:7 Tatitusti cheka, asqui jakeruwa yanapi, arjjataraqui, qhitinacatejj cheka jan pantjasis jacapqui ucanacaru." 
Proverbs2:8 Jupajj cheka sarnaker jakerojj imiwa, asqui jakerojj arjjataraquiwa." 
Proverbs2:9 Ucatsti yatïtawa chekäqui, asquïqui ucsa, ucatjja amuyaraquïtawa take asquina sarnakañapuni sumätapa." 
Proverbs2:10 Yatiñasti chuymamaruw mantätam, ucatsti yatiñan sumätapwa yant'äta." 
Proverbs2:11 Jumarusti suma ewjja arunacampi, ch'iqhi chuymampiwa imätam;" 
Proverbs2:12 ucanacaw khespiyätam jan wali sarnakäwita, uqhamarac ñankha parlir jakenacatsa." 
Proverbs2:13 Imaraquïtamwa cheka sarnakäwinaca apanucusina, jan walinac luras sarnakerinacatsa;" 
Proverbs2:14 jupanacasti jan walinac lurañanwa cusisipjje, ñankhanac lurañanwa cusisipjjaraqui." 
Proverbs2:15 Jupanacasti k'ewi thaquinacan sarnakapjje; cheka thaquitsti maysaruw saranucupjje. 
Proverbs2:16 “Yatiñ cancañaw jan wali sarnaker warmitsa khespiyätam, koña arunacampi iyawsayir warmita." 
Proverbs2:17 Uca warmisti chachaparuwa apanucu, Diosampi suma amtäwiru mantatapat armasiraqui." 
Proverbs2:18 Uca warmin utapar sarañasti, jiwañar sarañ thaquiwa;" 
Proverbs2:19 cawquïri chachanacatejj uca warmimpi utjasir sarapqui ucanacajja janiw cuttancjjapjjeti, janiraquiw wastatampi suma jacañaru cuttanipquiti." 
Proverbs2:20 “Jumasti asqui thaquina sarnakam, asqui jakenacan sarnakäwipan sarnakaraquim." 
Proverbs2:21 Asqui luriri k'oma jakenacasti, aca orakenwa wiñayatac jacapjjani." 
Proverbs2:22 Ucampis jan wali sarnaker jakenacasa, jan sum phokhasa sarnakerinacasa, aca oraketjja apanucuta tucjatäpjjaniwa." 
Proverbs3:1 “Munat wawajjay, jan armasimti nayan yatichäwinacajjata; camachi arunacajjsti chuymamarupuni imam," 
Proverbs3:2 ucatsti jaya maranacaw jacasïta, cusisitaw sarnakasiraquïta." 
Proverbs3:3 Janipuni cunapachas armasimti munasiñampita cheka cancañampita; ucanacsti mä collarjama cuncamar warcuntasim. Chuymamarusti ucanacjja sum imaraquim," 
Proverbs3:4 ucatsti sumaru uñjata, munataraquïyätawa Diosan nayrakatapana, uqhamarac jakenacan nayrakatapansa." 
Proverbs3:5 “Tatitur take chuymamampi catuyasim; juman ch'iqhi cancañamaruquejj jan alcatasimti. 
Proverbs3:6 Take luräwinacamanjja Tatitutjja amtasipunim, ucatsti jupajj cheka thaquinjamwa irpascätam." 
Proverbs3:7 Jan amuyasimti sinti yatiñanïtama; Tatitur ajjsartam, take ñankhatsa jithektam," 
Proverbs3:8 ¡ucawa suma kollajja cuerpomar ch'amañchañataqui! 
Proverbs3:9 “Tatiturojj take kamir cancañamampi jach'añcham, yapumat nayrïri achunac churañampiraqui;" 
Proverbs3:10 uqhamatwa pirwanacamas jilarquiri phokhantani, uqhamarac vino imañanacamasa." 
Proverbs3:11 Munat wawajjay, jan jisc'achamti Tatitun jumar chekachataparojja, janirac tokenokatapatsa colerasimti;" 
Proverbs3:12 Tatitusti qhitirutï munasqui ucarojj chekachiwa, cunjämatejj mä awquejj munat wawaparojj chekachqui uqhama." 
Proverbs3:13 “Cusisiñaniwa qhititejj yatiña cancañ jicjjatqui ucajja, uqhamarac ch'iqhi cancaña catokqui ucasa;" 
Proverbs3:14 ucasti kollquit sipansa, suma korit sipansa juc'amp asquinacwa jicjjatayaraqui." 
Proverbs3:15 Yatiñ cancañajj perlanacata sipansa juc'amp jila alaniwa, ¡janiw wali munatäqui ucanacampisa chicachayat uñjascaspati!" 
Proverbs3:16 Cupi amparampisti walja maranac jacañwa churi, ch'eka amparampisti kamirïñampi, jach'achatäñampwa churaraqui." 
Proverbs3:17 Jupan sarnakäwipar arctañasti asquiwa, thaquipan sarnakañasa suman jacañaraquiwa," 
Proverbs3:18 Yatiñ cancañajj jicjjatiripataquejj jacañawa; ¡cusisiñaniwa uca yatiña catjjäsipqui ucanacajja! 
Proverbs3:19 Tatitusti yatiñampi, ch'iqhi cancañampiwa sayt'ayi alajjpachsa, acapachsa." 
Proverbs3:20 Jupasti yatiñampiwa lamar kotsa jaljtayi, jallsa kenayata puriyaraqui." 
Proverbs3:21 “Munat wawajjay, ch'iqhi cancañampipuni sarnakam, ewjja arunacarjama sarnakaraquim," 
Proverbs3:22 ucasti jumarojj jacañwa churätam, mä collarjamawa c'achacht'araquïtam." 
Proverbs3:23 Ucatsti jumajj jan ajjsarasaw sarnakäta, janipuniw cunapachas lanctcaraquïtati." 
Proverbs3:24 Samart'ascäta ucqhasti janiw ajjsarayascätati; iquintjjäta ucqhasa jan ajjsarasaw icjjaraquïta. 
Proverbs3:25 Janiw ajjsarayascätati acatjamata ajjsaraña jutirirusa, janiraquiw juchararanacjjar tucjaña urojj jutcani ucarusa," 
Proverbs3:26 Tatitusti ch'amañchätamwa jan ajjsarañamataqui, imaraquïtamwa jan sipitar jalt'añamataqui." 
Proverbs3:27 “Cunapachatï yanapt'añajj amparamancascchi ucqhajja, jan “Janiw” siscamti qhititejj yanapa maycätam ucarojja." 
Proverbs3:28 Jichhüru yanapt'irjamäscsta ucjja, jan kharürutac imasimti. Jan jake masimarojj samti “Sarjjaquim, kharüruw cutt'anïta, ucqhawa churäma” sasa." 
Proverbs3:29 Jumar alcatas jac'aman jacasquirirojja, jan ñankha lurañ amtamti." 
Proverbs3:30 Jan qhitis jumar ñankha lurquipanjja, jan qhitimpisa ch'ajjwañaru mantamti." 
Proverbs3:31 Lokhe chuyman jakerojj, jan jach'ar aptamti, janirac jupjam sarnakañsa munamti;" 
Proverbs3:32 Tatitusti jan wali luririnacarojj janiw munquiti, ucampis jupajj asqui jakenacampiwa parlasi." 
Proverbs3:33 ñankha lurir jaken utaparojj ñankhachiwa, ucampis asqui jaken utaparojja asquimpiw phokt'i." 
Proverbs3:34 Tatitojj jisc'achiri jakenacarojj jisc'achiwa, ucampis llamp'u chuyman jakenacatsti qhuyapayasiwa." 
Proverbs3:35 Yatiñan jakenacan churäwipajj aytat cancañawa, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakenacajj p'enkachatäniwa." 
Proverbs4:1 “Wawanaca, awquiman suma ewjja arunacaparojj ist'apjjam; take chuymampi ist'apjjam suma sarnakañ yatekapjjañamataqui." 
Proverbs4:2 Nayajj suma yatichäwinacwa churapjjsma; uqhamasti jan jisc'achapjjamti yatichäwinacajj-jja. 
Proverbs4:3 Nayasti wawäñjja yatiractwa; taycajjan wali munatayätwa," 
Proverbs4:4 awquejjasti aqham sasaw yaticharaquitäna: “Arunacajjsti chuymamar imam; cuntï siscäma ucaraqui luram, ucatwa jacäta." 
Proverbs4:5 Jicjjataraquim yatiñsa, uqhamarac ch'iqhi cancañsa; janipuni arunacajj-jja armasimti." 
Proverbs4:6 Yatiñ cancañarojj janipun apanucumti, jan ucasti munasim, jupaw imascätam." 
Proverbs4:7 Take cunat sipansa nayrakatajj, yatiñ cancaña, suma sarnakaña jicjjatam." 
Proverbs4:8 Yatiñ cancañar munam, jupasti jach'aruw aptätam; jupar khomantasim, ucatsti jach'achätamwa;" 
Proverbs4:9 ¡p'ekemarojj suma muncañwa c'achachätam, ucampiw mä suma coronjama churaraquïtam!”" 
Proverbs4:10 “Munat wawajjay, arunacajja ist'asinjja catoketa, ucatsti walja maranacaw jacäta." 
Proverbs4:11 Nayajj yatiña thaquinjamwa irpäma, suma thaquinjamwa sarnakayaraquïma." 
Proverbs4:12 Ucansti janiw cuna lanctañamas utjcaniti; ucanjama jalcasasa janiw lanctcätati. 
Proverbs4:13 Yatichäwinacsti sum catjjarusim, jan apanucumti; suma jacañamasti uca yatichäwirjam sarnakañanquiwa." 
Proverbs4:14 Jucha lurir jakenacan thaquipanjam jan saramti, janiraqui jan wali sarnakäwipsa arcamti." 
Proverbs4:15 Thaquipan sarnakañjja jan munamti; jupanacatjja jithektam, ucatsti nayrakataru sarantam." 
Proverbs4:16 Jupanacajj jan ñankhanac lurasajja janiw samarapquiti; jan qhitiru aynacht'ayasasti janiw icthapipcaraquisa. 
Proverbs4:17 ¡Jupanacan mank'apasa, umañapasa ñankha lurañampi tucjasiñampiquiwa!" 
Proverbs4:18 “Asqui jakenacan sarnakäwinacapasti willjta khanjamawa; phokhatpach khantañcamaw juc'at juc'at khanti. 
Proverbs4:19 Ucampis jucha lurir jakenacan sarnakäwinacapasti ch'amacaquiwa; ¡janiw yatisipquiti cunar lanctapjjatapsa! 
Proverbs4:20 Munat wawajjay, ewjja arunacajjar ist'am. Ist'apunim ewjjanacajj-jja." 
Proverbs4:21 Janipuni nayrakatamatjja chhaktayamti, ¡jan ucasti chuymarupuni imam!" 
Proverbs4:22 Uca arunacajj suma jacañwa churi, take qhitinacatejj jicjjatapqui ucanacarojja." 
Proverbs4:23 Take cuna imatäqui ucat sipansa chuymam imam, jacañamasti uca chuymamatwa juti." 
Proverbs4:24 C'ari arunaca parlañ jan munamti; saraktam c'arinacatjja. 
Proverbs4:25 Nayrakatarupuni uñtam, nayräjjat uñtaraquim." 
Proverbs4:26 Sum amuyasim cawqharutejj tact'ctajj uca chekjja, ucatsti suma chekarupuniw tact'ätajja." 
Proverbs4:27 Thaquimatjja jan maysaru saranucumti; jan wali sarnakäwinacanjja janipun sarnakañ munamti. 
Proverbs5:1 “Munat wawajjay, sum ist'ita yatiñ cancañajjaru, ch'iqhi cancañajjarusa." 
Proverbs5:2 Uqhamatwa suma yatiñampi sarnakañ yatïta, ucatsti amuyt'ampiw parlaraquïta." 
Proverbs5:3 Jan wali warmin arunacapasti misc'jamawa, arsutanacapasa suma koña aceitjamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs5:4 Ucampis tucuyapajj ajenjor uñtat jaruwa, purapar arini espadat sipansa juc'amp ariraquiwa." 
Proverbs5:5 Uca warmimpi sarnakañajj jiwañaruwa irpi; sarnakäwinacapasti jiwañaru chekacwa puriyaraqui. 
Proverbs5:6 Uca warmisti janiw amuyasquiti jacañ thaquin sarnakañjja, janiraquiw amuyasquiti sarnakäwipan jan sumätapsa." 
Proverbs5:7 “Munat wawajjay, ist'itaya, jan sarakamti nayan suma ewjja arunacajjatjja." 
Proverbs5:8 Jan wali warmit jithektam; jan uta puncuparus jac'achasimti," 
Proverbs5:9 uqhamata kamir cancañamjja yakhanacar jan churañamataqui, jicjjatasitamsa jan uñt'ata jakenacaru jan churañamataqui." 
Proverbs5:10 Uca jan uñt'ata jakenacajj ch'amamp lurctas ucanacampi jan phokt'asiñapataqui. 
Proverbs5:11 Jan ucasti kheparojj jachañaquiw wact'ätam, uccañcamasti cuerpomajj juc'at juc'atjamwa aynacht'jjaraquini." 
Proverbs5:12 Ucatsti ucqhaquiwa jumajj sätajja: “¡Janiqui yatichäwi arunacar jisc'achcpachänti! ¡Janiqui chekachäwi arunacarus apanucpachänti! 
Proverbs5:13 ¡Cunataraqui jan ist'cpachätsti qhitinacatejj nayar yatichapquitäna, uqhamarac sumar irpaña munapquitäna ucanacarusti!" 
Proverbs5:14 ¡Nayasti niyapuniw jan walt'añar purta, take jakenacan nayrakatapana!” sasa." 
Proverbs5:15 “Jumasti warmimampi jacasim, cunjämatejj maynejj jupa pachpan phuch'upan umapata umasquejja uqhama." 
Proverbs5:16 Jan wawanïcamti callenacan jan wali sarnaker warminacampejja, umanacamjja thaquirus wartcasman uqhama." 
Proverbs5:17 Wawanacamasti warmiman wawanacapäñapawa, janiw yakhanacampejja, ¡cunjämatï phuch'usa, umasa jumanquejja uqhama!" 
Proverbs5:18 ¡Juman warmimasti bendecitäpan! ¡Cusisitaqui jacasim waynäcasin warmimampejja! 
Proverbs5:19 ¡Warmimasti suma muncaña tarujar uñtatawa! ¡Jumarusti munasipunïtamwa! ¡Munasiñapampiwa jumarojj muyuntayätam! 
Proverbs5:20 Munat wawajja, ¿cunataquirac yakha warmi thakätasti, jan walt'añaru mantañamataquisti? ¿Cunataquirac yakha warmiru khomätasti?" 
Proverbs5:21 Jaken sarnakäwipasti Tatitun suma uñjatawa, jupasti take luräwinacapwa uñji." 
Proverbs5:22 Jucha lurir jakerusti pachpa ñankha luratapaw catunti; jupan jucha luratapasti chinuñar uñtataw chinjjäsi. 
Proverbs5:23 Jan asqui lurañar chekaptatapasti jiwañaruwa irpani; pisi yatiñanïtapasti, chhakhañaruw aparaquini." 
Proverbs6:1 “Munat wawajja, jumatï garantiata amigom laycu sayt'sta ucajja, jan ucajj yakha jake laycusa ucapachasti," 
Proverbs6:2 juma pachpawa sipita uscusisctajja; juma pachpan arunacamaruraquiw jalantasctajja. 
Proverbs6:3 Munat wawajja, jumajj maynin amparapanctawa, ucatsti khespiyasiñamataquejj acanac luram: Jan p'enkasisa mäqui amigoman ucar achict'asiri saram." 
Proverbs6:4 Jan ucanac k'omachcasinjja jan iquimti, janiraqui mä juc'as samaramti;" 
Proverbs6:5 jumasti catuntirimatjja mä tarujar uñtat jaltjjam; ¡sipitatsti mä jamach'ir uñtat jaltjjam! 
Proverbs6:6 “Jayra jake, q'isimiranacar uñjam; cuntï lurapqui ucanaca uñjam, yatikasiraquim." 
Proverbs6:7 Jupanacajj janis jilïrinïpcchi ucasa," 
Proverbs6:8 ucampis jupanacajj mank'añjja imcatasipjjewa, yapu apthapi pachana." 
Proverbs6:9 Jayra jake, ¿cunapachcamas iquiscäta? ¿Cunapachas iquit sartjjätajja?" 
Proverbs6:10 Jumajj uqham iqui ch'utaliscäta, uqhamarac sum iquiñataquis amparanacama khomthapisiscäta ucqhawa," 
Proverbs6:11 jan cunan uñjasiñajj catuntätam, mä muyuycu jakjama." 
Proverbs6:12 Qhititejj ñankha, jan wali jakëqui ucajja, c'ari arunaca parlasaquiwa sarnake;" 
Proverbs6:13 nayranacapampiwa ch'irmt'i, cayunacapampiwa tact'i, ampar luc'ananacampiwa wicucht'i;" 
Proverbs6:14 amuyupasti ñankha lurañampi chhaktayatawa, chuymapansti jan walinac lup'isaquiw sarnake, ch'ajjwañanac aptañanac lup'isaw sarnakaraqui." 
Proverbs6:15 Ucatsti juparojj jan walt'añajj acatjamatwa catuntani; jupajj mä nayra ch'ipjjtanac tucjatäni, jan cutjcay tucjataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs6:16 “Tatitojj sojjta jan walinacaruw uñisi; ucat juc'ampisa pakallkcama: 
Proverbs6:17 Jach'a jach'a tucuñanacaru, c'ari parlañanacaru, jan juchani jake jiwayañanacaru," 
Proverbs6:18 jan wali amtañanacaru, jan wali lurañanacaru mäqui sarañanacaru," 
Proverbs6:19 c'ari ircatirit sarnakañanacaru, jila pura ch'ajjwañanacaru." 
Proverbs6:20 “Munat wawajjay, chuymamarojj imapunim, awquiman, taycaman ewjja arunacapa, uqhamarac yatichäwinacapsa." 
Proverbs6:21 Chuymamanjja catjjäsipunim aca ewjjanacjja, cuncaru warcuntasiraquim." 
Proverbs6:22 Uca arunacasti saräwimanjja irpätamwa, iccäta ucqhasti imätamwa, iquit sartjjäta ucqhasti jumarojj parlaraquïtamwa." 
Proverbs6:23 Chekpachansa ewjja arunacasa, yatichäwinacasa khanasquir lamparjamawa; chekachäwinacasa, suma ewjja arunacasa, jacañ churir thaquiwa." 
Proverbs6:24 Jan wali sarnaker ñankha warmitsa imätamwa, uqhamarac suma koña arunacapatsa." 
Proverbs6:25 Chuymamanjja jan munapayamti jiwaquïtap laycojja, ¡janirac uñtatapampis catuntayasimti!" 
Proverbs6:26 Jan wali sarnaker warmejja, kollkes laycuquiwa sarnake, ucampis chachanïcasina jucha lurir warmisti, cawquïritejj suma chachäqui uca catuycamaw sari." 
Proverbs6:27 ¿Mä jakesti isipar nina apnakaspati jan naqhantayasisajja? 
Proverbs6:28 ¿Mä jakesti nina sanc'anac patanjam sarnakaspati jan cayupa nacsuyasisajja? 
Proverbs6:29 Uqhamaraquïniwa qhititejj jake masipan warmipampi jucha lurañan sarnakqui ucajja. Juchapjja uñt'asipuniniwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Janiw qhitis lunthatarojj jisc'achquiti, mank'at awtjatätap laycu lunthatasitapatsa;" 
Proverbs6:31 ucampisa lunthatasquirtejj catjatäni ucapachasti, pakallko ucqhampwa lunthatasitapat cutt'ayani, uqhamarac cunatejj jupan utjqui take ucanacwa churjjaraquini." 
Proverbs6:32 ¡Jake masipan warmipampi sarnakerejja, jan amuyt'asiriwa! ¡Qhititejj uqham jan wal lurqui ucajja, jupa pachpawa tucjasisqui!" 
Proverbs6:33 Jupasti nuwjata, jisc'achatäniwa, ucatsti uca p'enka uñjasitapajja janiw armatäcaniti." 
Proverbs6:34 Uca warmin chachapasti colerasisinjja mä ninjamaw naqhani, ucatsti uqhamat uqhama phoksusiñ horasansti janiw perdoncaniti;" 
Proverbs6:35 janiw cuna churatampis chuymachascaniti, janiraquiw churäwinacampis chuymap utt'ayascaspati." 
Proverbs7:1 “Munat wawajjay, arunacajjarojj ist'aquimaya; ewjja arunacajjsti chuymamarupun imam." 
Proverbs7:2 Ewjja arunacajjarusa, yatichäwinacajjarusa ist'amaya; sum imaraquim wali suma munata yänacäcaspas uqhama, ucatsti jacätawa." 
Proverbs7:3 Ampar luc'ananacamaru chinuntasim jan armasiñamataqui, chuymamarusa sum catjjäsim." 
Proverbs7:4 Yatiñ cancañarusti cullacamarjam munam; ch'iqhi cancañarusti mä familiarjam munaraquim. 
Proverbs7:5 Uca yatiñampi, ch'iqhi cancañampiwa jake masiman warmipatjja khespiyätam, uqhamarac iyawsayiri suma arunacapatsa." 
Proverbs7:6 Nayasti mä uruwa uñch'uquiscäyäta, ventanajjana rejanacap taypita," 
Proverbs7:7 ucatsti jan amuyt'asiri walja waynanac taypinjja, uñjtwa mayni jan amuyt'asiriru." 
Proverbs7:8 Jupasti calle thiyaru purisinjja maycataruwa maqhati, ucatsti jake masipan warmipan ucsaruwa sari." 
Proverbs7:9 Urusti jayp'untjjänwa, niya ch'amact'jjaraquïnwa." 
Proverbs7:10 Ucatsti mäquiwa uca warmejj jicjjatiri mistuni, jan wali sarnaker warmjam isthapita, c'arintañ amtäwinacampi phokt'ata." 
Proverbs7:11 Jupasti parlañataquejj jan ajjsariri, jan p'enkasiriraquiwa, janiraquiw utapansa acht'caraquiti." 
Proverbs7:12 Jupasti callenacana, plazanacana, esquinanacanwa sarnakasqui, qhititejj uca chekanjama nayrakatapa saraquipcani ucar catuntañatac suyjjatasa." 
Proverbs7:13 Uca warmisti waynaru jicjjatasinjja khomantiwa, jamp'att'araquiwa, ucatjja jan ajjsarasaw saraqui:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Nayajj sumancäwi sacrificionac loktañataquiw arsüyäta, jichhasti ucjja phocjjtwa." 
Proverbs7:15 Ucataracwa nayajj jumar thaker jutsma; ¡nayajj walpun uñjañ munäyäsma, jichhasti jicjjatsmawa!" 
Proverbs7:16 Iquiñajj patjjarojj Egiptot apanita suma iquïñampiw janjjatanta," 
Proverbs7:17 ucatsti suma k'apquirinacampiw uchaniracta, mirra, áloe, canela ucanacampi." 
Proverbs7:18 Jichhasti jutamaya sisjasiñcama munasiñäni; khantatiñcamaraqui munasiñäni," 
Proverbs7:19 chachajjajj janiw utancquiti, wali jaya saräwincasquiwa;" 
Proverbs7:20 jupajj walja kollke apt'ataw sari, ucatsti puriniñapa uruw utar cutt'asincani” sasa." 
Proverbs7:21 “Uca warmisti waynarojj suma mojjsa arunacampiw iyawsayi. 
Proverbs7:22 Waynasti iyaw sasaw uca warmin khepapa sarawayi, cunjämatejj mä orko vacajj qhariñatac irpatajj uqhama, cunjämatejj mä tarujajj sipitar jalt'ejja uqhama," 
Proverbs7:23 cunjämtejj mä flechajj chuymar mantasin jiwayejja uqhama, cunjämatejj mä jamach'ejj känar jalt'ejja, ucan jiwañapa jan yatisisina." 
Proverbs7:24 “Jichhasti, munat wawajjay, ist'amay suma ewjja arunacajjaru." 
Proverbs7:25 Uca warmi laycu jan maysaru amuyunacam saranucuyamti; jan jupan khepap saras chhakamti. 
Proverbs7:26 Jupasti waljaninacaruw jiwañar puriyi, ¡jiwayatanacapasti waljaniraquiwa!" 
Proverbs7:27 Uca warmin utapar sarañasti, jiwañar sarañ thaquiwa.”" 
Proverbs8:1 Yatiñ cancañajja jach'atwa arnakasisqui, ch'iqhi cancañasti arupjja ist'asiyaraquiwa." 
Proverbs8:2 Kollu amsta chekanacaruwa sayt'asi, thaqui pallkanacaruw sayt'asi." 
Proverbs8:3 Marcar mantañ puncunacanwa arunacapjja ist'ayasqui, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Chachanaca, jumanacataquiwa aca arunacajjajja." 
Proverbs8:5 Jan yatiñani waynanaca, ch'iqhïña yatekapjjam, pisi amuyuninaca, yatiñ cancañanïña yatekapjjaraquim." 
Proverbs8:6 Ist'apjjeta, nayajj yatiyapjjämawa waquisquiri cheka arunaca." 
Proverbs8:7 Cuntï sapcäma ucajja chekawa, janiw nayatac sumäquiti c'ari arunaca parlañajja." 
Proverbs8:8 Take arunacajjawa chekapajja, janiw uca arunacajjanjja c'arisiñajj utjquiti." 
Proverbs8:9 Qhititejj ch'iqhïqui, amuyt'irïqui ucataquejja, arunacajjajj khana jan camscayawa." 
Proverbs8:10 Kollketa, suma korita sipansa, jicjjatapjjam yatichäwinaca, yatiñ cancañaraqui” sasa." 
Proverbs8:11 Yatiñ cancañajj wali jila alani kalanacat sipansa juc'ampiwa; ¡janiraquiw chicachascaspati cunatejj wali muncañäqui ucampisa!” 
Proverbs8:12 “Naya, yatiñ cancañajj, ch'iqhi cancañamp chicaw jacta, suma ewjja arunacwa jicjjatañ yatta." 
Proverbs8:13 Tatitur ajjsarañajj, jan waliru uñisiñawa. Nayasti uñistwa jach'a jach'a tucuñaru, jan walina sarnakañaru, uqhamarac c'arisiñaru." 
Proverbs8:14 Nayanwa utji amtäwisa, lurasïwisa, nayätwa chekapar suma sarnakañajja, uqhamarac ch'amasa." 
Proverbs8:15 Nayïpanwa reyinacas marcar apnakapjje, uqhamarac marca apnakerinacas chekapar leyinaca mistuyapjje." 
Proverbs8:16 Nayïpanwa reyinacajj marcanacar apnakapjje, uqhamarac jilïrinacas chekaparu uñjapjjaraqui." 
Proverbs8:17 Nayasti muntwa qhitinacatejj munapquitu ucanacaru, qhitinacatejj thakapquitani ucanacasti jicjjatapjjetaniwa." 
Proverbs8:18 Nayawa kamir cancaña jach'ar aptatäñsa churta, uqhamarac jan tucusquir jach'a cancaña, nayrar sartañsa." 
Proverbs8:19 Nayasti juc'amp sumwa churta, suma korita, suma kollketa sipana." 
Proverbs8:20 Nayajj chekap thaquinjam sarta, cheka cancaña thaquinjama." 
Proverbs8:21 Qhitinacatejj nayar munapquitu ucanacarojja kamiriptaytwa, utanacaparusa suma imasitanacampiwa phokhantarapta." 
Proverbs8:22 “Tatituw nayarojj kalltatpacha utjayitu, janïra take cun lurañ kalltcäna ucqha." 
Proverbs8:23 Nayarusti kalltanwa luritu, janïra aca orake lurcäna ucqha." 
Proverbs8:24 Nayarojj janïra jach'a kotanacajj utjcäna ucqhatpacha uscusitu, janïra jawiranacasa, uma jalsunacasa utjcäna ucqharaqui." 
Proverbs8:25 Janïra jisc'a kollunacasa, jach'a kollunacasa utjcäna ucqhawa Tatitojja nayarojj uscusitu;" 
Proverbs8:26 janïrawa ucqhajja Tatitojj lurcänti aca oraksa, pampanacsa, aca orakejj luratäqui uca lak'sa." 
Proverbs8:27 Cunapachatï Diosajj alajjpacha lurqui jach'a kota patjjaru ucqhajja, nayajj qhayancascäyätwa." 
Proverbs8:28 Nayajj qhayancascaraquïyätwa, cunapachatï Tatitojj alajjpachana kenaya utjaycäna, uqhamarac kota mankhenquiri uma jalsunacsa utjaycäna ucqhasa," 
Proverbs8:29 uqhamarac ucancascäyäta cunapachatï kotan umanacaparusa, jupajj siscäna jan waña orakeru pasantañapataqui, uqhamarac aca orake utt'aycäna ucqhasa," 
Proverbs8:30 nayajj qhayancascäyätwa Tatitun thiyapana suma phokhasa. Nayawa sapüru jupar cusisiyäyäta, sapa horasansa jupan nayrakatapan anatasiraquïyäta;" 
Proverbs8:31 aca orake lurcäna ucanwa anatasïyäta, ¡nayajj cusisïyätwa jakenac uñjasina!" 
Proverbs8:32 “Jichhasti, wawanacajjay, ist'apjjeta; nayar arcapjjeta, ucatsti cusisitäpjjätawa." 
Proverbs8:33 Ist'apjjam yatichäwinacaru, jan yatiñ cancañarojj jisc'achapcamti." 
Proverbs8:34 Cusisiñaniwa qhititï nayar ist'quitani ucajja, uqhamarac qhititï sapürusa suyjjatasqui utajja puncuna ucajja." 
Proverbs8:35 Qhititejj nayar jicjjatquitani ucajja jacañwa jicjjatani, Tatitun qhuyapayasiñap jicjjataraquini." 
Proverbs8:36 Ucampis qhititï nayar jan jicjjatquitu ucajja, jacañapwa aynacht'añaru apasqui; ¡nayar take uñisirinacasti jiwaruwa munasipqui!”" 
Proverbs9:1 Yatiñ cancañajj mä utwa lurasi, ucarusti pakallko pilaranacampiw c'achacht'i;" 
Proverbs9:2 jach'a mank'äwitaquisti uywanacwa qharirayi, mä suma vino waquicht'i, mank'añ ucharaqui." 
Proverbs9:3 Ucatsti uywatanacaparuwa qhiti art'asa jawsanipjjañapataqui, marcana wali amsta chekata, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs9:4 “¡Acqharu jutapjjam jan yatiñani waynanaca!” sasa. Jan amuyt'asirinacaru sanipjjañapataquiw qhitaraqui, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Jutapjjam nayan t'ant'ajjat mank'eri, uqhamarac vino waquichcta uca umiri." 
Proverbs9:6 Jaytanucjjapjjam jan amuyt'asis sarnakañanaca, ucatsti jacapjjätawa; ch'iqhi jakenacjama sarnakapjjam” sasa." 
Proverbs9:7 Jan ist'asiri ñankha jakeru chekachañansti, tucjata, uqhamarac ñankha arunacac jicjjatäta." 
Proverbs9:8 Jan ist'asiri ñankha jakeru chekacham, jupasti jumarojj uñisïtamwa, ucampis amuyt'asiri jakeru chekacham, jupasti jumarojj munasïtamwa." 
Proverbs9:9 Yaticham yatiñan jakeru, ucatsti juc'ampi yatiñanïniwa; yaticham asqui jakeru, ucatsti juc'ampiwa yatiñapajj jiljjatani." 
Proverbs9:10 Yatiñ cancaña jicjjatañataquisti nayrakatajj Diosar ajjsartañawa; kollana Tatitur uñt'añajj ch'iqhi cancañanïñawa. 
Proverbs9:11 Yatiñ cancañïpan jumajj walja urunacajj jacäta, walja maranacaw jacaraquïta." 
Proverbs9:12 Jumatejj yatiñanïsta ucajja, juma pachpataquiwa yatiñanïyäta; jumatejj jan ist'asirïcäta ucasti, juma pachparaquiwa t'akhesiscaraquïta." 
Proverbs9:13 Pisi yatiñanïñajj arunac apnaker warmjamawa, jan amuyt'ani, jan yatiñani." 
Proverbs9:14 Jupasti uta puncunacapanwa kont'asi, takpach marcas uñstquis ucawjanacana," 
Proverbs9:15 ucatsti thaqui saririnacaruw jawsi, qhitinacatï suma thaquinjama sarasipqui ucanacaru, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs9:16 “¡Jan yatiñani waynanaca aca chekaru jutapjjam!” sasa. Ucatsti qhitharaquiwa sanipjjañapataqui jan amuyt'asirinacaru, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Lunthatat umajj juc'amp mojjsawa; jamasata t'ant'a mank'añasti juc'amp sumaraquiwa” sasa. 
Proverbs9:18 Ucampis jupanacajj janiw yatipquiti, mank'añataqui jawsata jakenacapajja jiwañaru sarasipcatapa." 
Proverbs10:1 Salomonan säwi arunacapa: Amuyt'asiri wawajj, awquiparu taycaparojj cusisiyiwa, jan amuyt'asiri wawasti jupanacarojj llaquisiyiwa." 
Proverbs10:2 Jan wali toketa jicjjatat kamir cancañajj janiw asquïquiti, ucampis cheka lurañajja jiwañat khespiyi." 
Proverbs10:3 Tatitojj asqui jakerojj janiw mank'at t'akhesiyquiti, ucampis ñankha lurir jakerojja mank'at awtjayasiñapjja janiw apakquiti." 
Proverbs10:4 Juc'a irnakeri jakesti, pobrequiw jaqui, wali irnakeri jakesti kamiriptaraquiwa." 
Proverbs10:5 Qhititejj waquisitaparu yapu apthapqui ucajja, amuyt'asiri jakewa, ucampis qhititejj yapu apthapiña horasana iquisqui ucajja p'enkachatäniwa." 
Proverbs10:6 Asqui jakjjaruwa Tatitun bendicionanacapajj juti, ucampis ñankha jakerusti jan wali luräwinacawa aynacht'ayi." 
Proverbs10:7 Asqui jaketjja suma amtañaw utji, ucampis ñankha jakerojja mäquiwa armatäjje." 
Proverbs10:8 Yatiñanïqui ucajj yatichäwi arunacjja catokasiwa; jan wali parlir jakesti tucusiñaruwa puri. 
Proverbs10:9 Jan cuna manunïqui ucajj, janiw cunarus ajjsarquiti; jan wal sarnakeristi, jan waliwa tucusiraqui." 
Proverbs10:10 Jan wali amtampi nayra ch'irmt'irejj, jach'a jan walt'añaruwa manti; jan wali parlir jakesti tucusiñaruwa puri." 
Proverbs10:11 Asqui jaken arunacapajj, jacañ churir arunacawa, ucampis ñankha jakerusti jan wali luräwinacawa aynacht'ayi." 
Proverbs10:12 Uñisiñajj ch'ajjwanacwa utjayi, ucampis munasiñajj take juchanacwa pampachi." 
Proverbs10:13 Yatiñan jaken parlatapanjja yatiñ cancañawa utji, ucampis jan amuyt'an jaketaquisti ucajj lawampi jawk'anokcsnas uqhamawa." 
Proverbs10:14 Yatiñan jakenacajj wali amuyt'ampiwa parli, ucampis jan yatiñani jakenacan parlatapasti jan walt'añanac utjayirjamawa." 
Proverbs10:15 Kamir jakerojj, kamir cancañapawa arjjati; pobresti jan walt'añaruwa puri, pobrëtap laycu." 
Proverbs10:16 Asqui jaken catokäwipajj jacañawa; jucharar jaken apthapïwipasti jucha lurañaquiwa. 
Proverbs10:17 Qhititï ewjja arunacaru phokhasa sarnakqui ucajja, jacañ thaquinjamwa sarasqui; qhititï ewjja arunacaru jan phokqui ucajja, chhakañ thaquinjamwa sarasqui." 
Proverbs10:18 Qhititï uñisirïtapa imt'asqui ucajja, c'ariwa; qhititï ch'ajjwanaca aptqui ucasti, jan amuyt'aniwa." 
Proverbs10:19 Wali parlañanjja jucha lurañawa utji, ucampis horasapar amuct'añasti yatiñ cancañanquiwa." 
Proverbs10:20 Asqui jaken arunacapajj k'omachata kollkjamawa, ucampis ñankha jaken amuyupasti jan cunataquiwa." 
Proverbs10:21 Asqui jaken arunacapajj waljaninacaruw yatichi, ucampis jan yatiñani jakejj jan amuyt'asirïtap laycuw jiwi." 
Proverbs10:22 Tatitun bendicionapawa kamiriptayi; janiw cuna llaquisiñsa ucampi chicajj apayanquiti. 
Proverbs10:23 Jan yatiñan jakejj juchanac lurasawa cusisi; yatiñan jakesti, yatiñ cancañatwa cusisi." 
Proverbs10:24 Cuntï jucharar jakejj wal ajjsarqui ucawa jupjjar juti, ucampis asqui jaketaquisti cunanactï jupajj munqui ucanacaw phokhasiraqui." 
Proverbs10:25 Cunjämatejj jach'a tutucajja mäqui pasawayejja, uqhamawa jucharar jakejj mäqui chhaktawayjje, ucampis asqui jakejj wiñayataquiwa jacasqui." 
Proverbs10:26 Jayra jakejj qhithasiripataquejja, cunjämatï vinagrejj lacataqui jan walïquejja, uqhamarac jiwk'es nayrataqui jan walïquejja, uqham jan waliwa." 
Proverbs10:27 Tatitur ajjsaras jaquir jaketaquisti, jacañapajj juc'amp yapjjatatawa, ucampis ñankha lurir jaken jacañapajj juc'aptayatawa." 
Proverbs10:28 Asqui jakenacan suyt'äwipasti cusisiñ catokañapawa utji, ucampis ñankha jakenacan suyt'äwipasti tucusiniwa." 
Proverbs10:29 Asqui luririnacarojj Tatitojj imiwa, ucampis jupajj jan wali luririnacarojj tucjiwa." 
Proverbs10:30 Asqui jakejj janipuniwa aynacht'añaru purcaniti, ucampis ñankha jakejj janiw aca oraken jaccaniti." 
Proverbs10:31 Asqui jaken lacapatwa yatiñ cancañajj mistsu, ucampis ñankha jaken lajjrapjja qharekapjjaniwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Asqui jakejj asquinacwa parli; jucharar jakesti jan walinacacwa parli. 
Proverbs11:1 Tatiturojj c'ari pesanacajj ajjtasiyiwa, ucampis phokhat pesanacajj juparojj cusisiyiwa." 
Proverbs11:2 Jach'a jach'a tucuñajja jan walt'añanacwa apani; yatiñ cancañasti llamp'u chuymaninacamp chicawa. 
Proverbs11:3 Cheka sarnaker jakenacarojj cheka cancañapawa irpi; c'ari sarnaker jakenacarusti c'ari cancañapawa tucji. 
Proverbs11:4 Taripäwi urun kamir cancañajj maynirojj janiw yanapcaniti, ucampis cheka cancañajja jiwañatwa khespiyani." 
Proverbs11:5 Cheka cancañajj asqui jaken thaquipjja chekaptayiwa, ucampis jucharar jakejj jupa pachpan jan wali luratap laycuw aynacht'i." 
Proverbs11:6 Cheka sarnaker jakenacarojj cheka cancañawa khespiyani, ucampis juc'ampi munir jakenacarojja pachpa juc'ampi munatapaw catjascani." 
Proverbs11:7 Cunapachatï jucharar jakejj jiwjje ucqhajja, tucusjjewa amtäwinacapasa, suyt'äwinacapasa." 
Proverbs11:8 Diosajj asqui jakerojj t'akhesiñatjja khespiyiwa, ucatsti jupa lantejj jucharar jakeruwa t'akhesiñaru uchi." 
Proverbs11:9 Jucharar jaken arunacapajj masinacaparojj tucjiwa, ucampis asqui jakenacan ch'iqhi cancañapaw khespiyi." 
Proverbs11:10 Asqui jakenacan nayrar sartatapatjja marcajj cusisiwa; ñankha jakenacan jiwatapatjja cusisiñat t'iscti. 
Proverbs11:11 Asqui jakenacan suma luratanacapampiwa marcajj jach'ar aptasi, ucampis jucharar jakenacan arunacapasti tucjiwa." 
Proverbs11:12 Jan amuyt'an jakejj jake masiparojj jisc'achiwa, ucampis amuyt'ani jakejja amuquïsquiwa." 
Proverbs11:13 Arunaca apnakerejj takwa parli, ucampis asqui jakejja imjjäsiwa, janiw qhitirus arsquiti." 
Proverbs11:14 Marca apnakerinacatejj jan marcaru suma apnakcapqui ucasti aynacht'aniwa, ucampis walja amuyt'ayirinïqui uca marcasti jan cuna ajjsarasaw jacasiraqui." 
Proverbs11:15 Jan uñt'at jakeru mayt'añansti llaquisiñawa utji, ucampis qhititejj jan mayt'qui ucawa cusisita jacani." 
Proverbs11:16 Suma uñnakani warmejj jach'aru aptatäñwa catokani, jan ajjsariri jakesti kamir cancañanacwa jicjjataraqui." 
Proverbs11:17 Qhuyapayasirïqui ucajj, jupa pachpataquiwa asqui lurasqui, ucampis khorüqui ucasti, jupa pachpataquiwa jan wal lurasqui." 
Proverbs11:18 Jucharar jakejj luratapatjamwa catoke; cheka cancañampi luriristi luratapatjamwa catokaraqui. 
Proverbs11:19 Cheka cancañampi sarañajj suma jacañwa churi, ucampis jan wal sarnakañasti jiwañaruwa irpi." 
Proverbs11:20 Jan wali amtäwini jakenacarojj Tatitojj janiw munquiti, ucampis jupajj munasiwa asqui lurasa sarnakeri jakenacarojja." 
Proverbs11:21 Chekpachansa ñankha lurir jakejj janiw jan mutuyata kheparcaniti, ucampis asqui jakenacajj suma khespiyatäpjjaniwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Jan amuyt'ani warmejj jiwaquïcchisa, cunjämatï mä qhuchhejj nasapana kori anillompi uchatäcaspa uqhamaquiwa." 
Proverbs11:23 Asqui jakenacan amtäwinacapajj sumarcamaquiw mistsu, ñankha jakenacan k'ellisitapajj colerasiñaquiwa." 
Proverbs11:24 Qhitinacatejj masinacapar cuns churqui ucanacajj juc'amp catoke, ucampis qhitinacatejj jupataquiqui munapqui ucanacajja pobrewa tucusipjjani." 
Proverbs11:25 Qhititï churañ yatqui ucaw juc'amp catoke; churiristi churatapatjamwa catokaraquini. 
Proverbs11:26 Qhititejj trigonac catuntasin imantqui ucajja, jaken uñisitawa, ucampis qhititï masipar aljqui ucajja, suma jaket uñt'atawa." 
Proverbs11:27 Qhititejj asqui luraña thakqui ucajja, sumata uñjatäniwa, ucampis qhititï jan wali luraña thakqui ucajja jan walwa jicjjatani." 
Proverbs11:28 Qhititejj kamir cancañapar alcatqui ucajja, mä waña laphir uñtataw jalaktani, ucampis asqui jakenacajja mä kokan layminacapjamawa ch'ojjñtani." 
Proverbs11:29 Jan amuyasisa utapa apanucurejja, jan cunaniw kheparani; jan amuyt'an jakejja, yatiñan jaken sirviripäniwa." 
Proverbs11:30 Cheka cancañajj jacañwa churi, ñankha lurañasti jacañjja apakewa." 
Proverbs11:31 Asqui jaketejj aca oraken mutuñ catokchejja, ¡ucat juc'ampwa ñankha jakesa, jucharar jakesa mutuñ catokani!" 
Proverbs12:1 Qhititejj chekachatäñaru munqui ucajja, yatiñ cancañaruwa muni; chekachatäñaru uñisqui ucajja, jan amuyt'aniwa." 
Proverbs12:2 Asqui jakejj Tatitun qhuyapayasiñapwa jicjjati, jan wali amtan jakerusti juchañchiwa." 
Proverbs12:3 Jan wali lurañajj janiw qhititaquis suma kalltäquiti, ucampis asqui jakenacajja asqui luratapampejja sumaw sayt'ani." 
Proverbs12:4 Asqui lurir warmejj chachaparojj jach'aruw apti, ucampis jan wali warmejja chachaparojj jisc'achayiwa." 
Proverbs12:5 Asqui jakenacan amtäwipajj cheka lurañawa, ucampis ñankha lurir jakenacan amtäwipajja ñankha lurañaquiwa." 
Proverbs12:6 ñankha jaken arunacapajj jiwayir sipitjamawa; asqui jaken parlatanacapasti khespiyatäñataquiwa. 
Proverbs12:7 Ñankha jakenacajj aynacht'apjjewa, ucatsti ucaraquiw tucuyapajja, ucampis asqui jaken utapasti janiw tucjatäcaniti." 
Proverbs12:8 Yatiñan jakejj, yatiñapatjamajja jach'ar aptatäniwa, ucampis jan amuyt'ani ñankha jakejja jisc'achatäniwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Qhititejj jisc'achätaqui loktirinacanïqui uca jakejj juc'amp aytatawa, qhititejj jach'ar aptata jan mank'at kheparqui uca jaket sipansa." 
Proverbs12:10 Asqui jakejj uywanacapatjja qhuyapayasiwa, ucampis ñankha lurir jakejja janiw qhuyapayasquiti." 
Proverbs12:11 Yapuchiri jakejj walja mank'añaniwa; jan amuyt'asiri jakesti inamaya luräwinacan sarnake. 
Proverbs12:12 Jan wali amtañanacasti ñankha jakenacan känapawa; asqui jakenacan luratanacapasti wiñayataquiwa. 
Proverbs12:13 ñankha lurir jakejj jupa pachpan c'arisitanacapampiwa q'ituntasisqui, ucampis asqui jakejja t'akhesiñatjja mistuquipuniwa." 
Proverbs12:14 Sapakata jakewa apthapi parlatapatjama, luratapatjamaw catokaraquini." 
Proverbs12:15 Jan amuyt'an jakejj amuyasiwa take cunansa walicjama lurascatapa, ucampis yatiñan jakejja suma ewjja arunacarojja ist'iwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Jan amuyt'an jakejj mäquiwa cunatsa colerasi, ucampis ch'iqhi jakejja jan wali chuyma uscay arunacarojj janiw yäkquiti." 
Proverbs12:17 Cheka testigojj cunatï chekäqui ucwa arsu; c'ari testigosti, c'aricwa ircati." 
Proverbs12:18 Utjapuniwa parlatanacapampi mayniru usuchjirejja, ucampis yatiñan jakenacan arunacapasti mä kolljamawa." 
Proverbs12:19 Qhititejj chek parlqui ucan arunacapajja wiñayataquiwa, ucampis qhititejj c'ari parlqui ucan arunacapajja mäquiwa chhaktawayjje." 
Proverbs12:20 Ñankha lurir jakenacan lup'itanacapanjja c'ariwa utji; sumanquir jakenacan suma ewjja arunacapansti cusisiñawa utji. 
Proverbs12:21 Asqui jakejj janipuniw cuna jan walt'añansa t'akhescaniti, ucampis ñankha lurir jakejja take jan walinacjja mayacwa catokani." 
Proverbs12:22 Tatiturojj c'ari parlirinacajj ajjtasiyiwa, ucampis cheka parlirinacajja cusisiyiwa." 
Proverbs12:23 Ch'iqhi jakejj yatiñapatjja janiw jach'achasquiti, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakejja, pachpa jan amuyt'apampiw t'ajjmarätap khanañchasiraqui." 
Proverbs12:24 Irnakeri jakejj apnakaniwa, ucampis jayra jakejja apnakatäniwa." 
Proverbs12:25 Llaquejj jakerojj mayjt'ayiwa; suma arusti cusisiyiwa. 
Proverbs12:26 Asqui jakejj masipan irpiripawa, ucampis ñankha lurir jakenacajja maysaruwa saranucupjje." 
Proverbs12:27 Jayra jakejj, janiw cuns caturjamäquiti, ucampis k'apha jakejja kamir cancañanacwa jicjjatani." 
Proverbs12:28 Cheka sarnakañajj jacañaruwa irpi; ñankha lurañasti jiwañaruwa irpi. 
Proverbs13:1 Yatiñan wawajj awquipan ewjja arunacapjja catokasiwa, ucampis jan ist'asir wawajja janiw chekachäwi arunacjja catokasquiti." 
Proverbs13:2 Asqui jakejj parlatapatjama catokani, ucampis ñankha jakejja jan walinaca lurañacpun munasqui." 
Proverbs13:3 Qhititejj amuyt'ampi juc'a aruqui parlqui ucajja, jupa pachpawa imasiscani, ucampis qhititï jan amuyt'asa sinti parlqui ucajja, jupa pachparaquiwa jan walt'añaru puri." 
Proverbs13:4 Jayra jakejj walwa cunsa muni, ucampis janiw jicjjatquiti; k'apha jakesti walja yänacwa jicjjati." 
Proverbs13:5 Cheka jakejj c'ari arunacarojja uñisiwa, ucampis ñankha lurir jakejja jan wali parlatapatwa p'enkachata uñjasi." 
Proverbs13:6 Cheka luräwinacapaw cheka lurir jakerojj arjjati; jucharar jakerusti ñankha luratanacapaw tucji. 
Proverbs13:7 Yakhepanacajj jan cunanïsinsa, kamirïcaspas uqhamaw tucupjje; yakhepanacasti take cunanïcasinsa, pobrëcaspasa uqhamaw tucupjjaraqui." 
Proverbs13:8 Kamirirojj kamir cancañapawa jacañapa khespiyi; pobre jakenjja janiw cunapachas ajjsarayañanacjja ist'quiti. 
Proverbs13:9 Cheka jakenacajj suma khananjamaw c'ajapjje, ucampis ñankha lurir jakenacajja mechjamaw jiwarjjapjje." 
Proverbs13:10 Jach'a jach'a tucuñajj nuwasiñanacacwa apani, ucampis yatiñ cancañajja llamp'u chuymaninacampiwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Mäqui jicjjatata kamir cancañajj, mäquiwa tucusjje, ucampis qhititejj juc'at juc'ata jicjjatquejja, ucawa juc'ampi jiljjatayi." 
Proverbs13:12 Cuna suyt'äwinacatejj jan phokhascjje ucasti chuyma usuyasiñaquiwa, ucampis munatasarjam phokhasi ucajj jacañ kokjamawa." 
Proverbs13:13 Qhititejj yatichäwiru jisc'achcani ucajja, t'akhesiniwa, ucampis qhititejj camachi arunacaru ist'cani ucajja, churäwi catokani." 
Proverbs13:14 Yatiñan jaken yatichäwinacapajja jacañ chuririwa, jiwañan amparapatsa khespiyaraquiwa." 
Proverbs13:15 Suma amuyt'ampi sarnakeri jakenacasti takeninsa munatawa sarnakapjjani, ucampis c'ari jakenacajja tucjatäñaruwa sarasipqui." 
Proverbs13:16 Qhititejj ch'iqhïqui ucajja, ch'iqhi cancañampiwa cuns luri; jan amuyt'an jakesti lokhe luratanacapatwa cawqui cawc tucu." 
Proverbs13:17 Jan wali yatiyirejj jan walt'añanacaruw puriyi; cheka yatiyiristi sumaruwa puriyaraqui. 
Proverbs13:18 Suma ewjja arunacaru jisc'achirejja, pobre uqhamaraqui jisc'achataquiw sarnakani, ucampis qhititejj chekachäwiru ist'qui ucajja, suma jach'añchataraquïniwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Amtäwiru phokherïñajja cusisiñawa; jan amuyt'an jakenacasti, janiw jan walinacat jithektañ munapquiti." 
Proverbs13:20 Suma yatiñan jakenacamp chica sarnakerejja, suma yatiñaniraquïniwa; jan amuyt'an jakenacamp chica sarnakeristi, jan walt'añaruwa puriraquini." 
Proverbs13:21 Jucharar jakenacajja jan walt'añampi arcnakatäpjjewa, ucampis asqui jakenacajja asquinacwa catokapjjani." 
Proverbs13:22 Asqui lurir jakejja yänacapjja wawanacapans wawanacaparuw jaytawayi, ucampis jucharar jaken yänacapajja, asqui jakenacataquiw kheparjjani." 
Proverbs13:23 Pobre jakejj yapuchqui ucatjja, waljaniwa mank'apjje, ucampis cawquintejj jan cheka cancañajj utjqui ucanjja, takpachawa apt'ataraqui." 
Proverbs13:24 Qhititejj wawapar jan chekachqui ucajja, janiw wawapar munquiti, ucampis qhititejj wawapar munqui ucajja, chekachiwa." 
Proverbs13:25 Asqui jaquejj sist'asiñcamawa mank'asi, ucampis ñankha lurir jakejja mank'atsa awtjatawa sarnake." 
Proverbs14:1 Yatiñan warmejj utapjja sumwa uñjasi, ucampis jan amuyt'an warmejja pachpa amparapampiwa utaparojj tucji." 
Proverbs14:2 Cheka sarnaker jakejj Tatituruw ajjsarti, ucampis jan wali sarnaker jakejja jisc'achiwa." 
Proverbs14:3 Jan amuyt'an jakejja jach'a jach'a tucuñampiwa parli; yatiñan jaken arunacapasti arjjatañataquiwa. 
Proverbs14:4 Yuntajj jan utjqui ucqhasti, trigojj pist'iwa; yunta vacan ch'amapampiwa cosechajj juc'amp jiljjati." 
Proverbs14:5 Cheka testigojj janiw c'arisquiti, ucampis c'ari testigojja c'arinaca arsu." 
Proverbs14:6 Ñankha lurir jakejj yatiñ thakasinjja janiw jicjjatquiti, ucampis ch'iqhi jakejja janc'aquiwa yatiñ cancaña jicjjati." 
Proverbs14:7 Jan amuyt'asiri jaketjja jithektam; jupan arunacapanjja janiw yatiñ cancaña jicjjatcätati. 
Proverbs14:8 Yatiñ cancañajja yatiñan jakerojj amuyt'ayiwa sarnakañapanjja, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakerojj pachpa jan wali luratanacapaw sallkji." 
Proverbs14:9 Jan amuyt'an jakenacajj juchapatjja janis cunäcaspa uqhamwa jan yäkapquiti, ucampis cheka lurir jakenac taypinjja suma jacañawa utji." 
Proverbs14:10 Chuymawa jupan pachpa llaquisitapjja yatisi; cusisiñapsa janiraquiw jan uñt'atanacarojj yatiyquiti. 
Proverbs14:11 Ñankha jakenacan utapajj tucjatäniwa, ucampis asqui lurir jakenacan utapajja janiw tucjatäcaniti." 
Proverbs14:12 Jaken amuyatapatjja sarnakäwinacapajja walicjamaquiwa, ucampis tucuyapajja jiwañaquiwa." 
Proverbs14:13 Larusiñansa chuymajj ususcaquispawa, cusisiñasa llaquisiñaruquiw tucuyaspa." 
Proverbs14:14 Jan amuyt'an jakejja sarnakatapampejja cusisitaquiwa, ucampis asqui jakejja suma luratapampiwa cusisi." 
Proverbs14:15 Jan amuyt'asiri jakejj take cuntejj sapqui ucarojja iyawsaquiwa, ucampis ch'iqhi jakejja amuyt'asiwa cawquinjamas sarasqui uca." 
Proverbs14:16 Yatiñan jakejj jan walirojja ajjsariwa, ucatsti jithektaraquiwa, ucampis jan yatiñan jakejj ch'amaparuquiw alcati." 
Proverbs14:17 Qhititejj mäqui cunatsa colerasqui ucajja, mäquiraquiwa jan walinacjja lurjjaraqui, ucampis jan mäqui colerasqui ucajja, c'achatacwa luri." 
Proverbs14:18 Pisi chuyman jakenacasti jan amuyt'an jakenacat catokerïpjjewa, ucampis ch'iqhi jakenacajja yatiñ cancañampi muyuntatäpjjewa." 
Proverbs14:19 Ñankha jakenacajj suma jakenacataquiwa alt'asipjjani, uqhamarac asqui jakenacan puncunacapanwa achict'asipjjani." 
Proverbs14:20 Pobrenacasti jake masipansa uñisitawa, ucampis kamirejj wali munataraquiwa." 
Proverbs14:21 Qhititejj jake masipar jisc'achqui ucajja, juchwa luri, ucampis, ¡cusisiñaniwa qhititejj pobre jaketa qhuyapayasqui ucajja!" 
Proverbs14:22 Qhitinacatejj ñankha luraña thakasipqui ucanacajja, thaquitjja maysaruwa saranucupjje; asqui luraña thakapqui ucanacasti qhuyapayasirïpjjewa, suma phokherïpjjaraquiwa." 
Proverbs14:23 Take ch'ama tucutat jilpacha catokañajj utji, ucampis wali parlatatjja pobrernucstañaquiw utji." 
Proverbs14:24 Yatiñan jaken coronapasti yatiñ cancañapawa, ucampis jan yatiñan jakensti, pisi amuyt'aparaqui." 
Proverbs14:25 Cheka testigojj mayninacarojja khespiyiwa jacañanacapjja, ucampis c'ari testigojja jiwañaruwa puriyi." 
Proverbs14:26 Tatituru jach'añchiri jakensti take chuyma jupar suyt'añaw utji, uqhamarac wawanacapas Tatitun imatäniwa." 
Proverbs14:27 Tatitur jach'añchas sarnakañanjja jacañawa utji; jupaw khespiyi jiwañan amparapatsa. 
Proverbs14:28 Reyitaquejja walja jakenacar apnakañajja, jach'ar aptatäñawa; juc'a jakenacar apnakañasti, aynacht'añawa." 
Proverbs14:29 Wali llamp'u chuymanïñajj wali ch'iqhi cancañ uñacht'ayi; jan paciencianïñasti t'ajjmarätapwa uñacht'ayaraqui. 
Proverbs14:30 Samarañ chuymanïñajj cuerporojj jacañwa churi, ucampis envidiasiñajj ch'aqhatpachwa jakerojj tucji." 
Proverbs14:31 Pobreru t'akhesiyirirojj Diosaruwa jisc'achasqui, ucampis pobrer qhuyapayirejja Tatituruw jach'ar aptasqui." 
Proverbs14:32 Ñankha jakerojj jupa pachpan ñankha luratapawa tucjasqui, ucampis cheka lurir jakerojja cheka luratapawa arjjati." 
Proverbs14:33 Yatiñ cancañajj amuyt'asiri jakenacanwa utji; jan amuyt'an jakensti janiw yatiñajj uñt'atäquiti. 
Proverbs14:34 Cheka cancañajj mä marcarojj jach'aptayiwa, ucampis juchajj p'enkachayiwa." 
Proverbs14:35 Ch'iqhi uywatajj reyirojj cusisiyiwa, ucampis jan cuns lurir uywatajja reyin colerapacwa catokani." 
Proverbs15:1 Suma arumpi cutt'ayañajja colerañjja apakewa, ucampis jan wali arumpi cutt'ayañajja, juc'ampwa colerasiyi." 
Proverbs15:2 Yatiñan jakenacajj yatiñ cancañampiw parlapjje, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakenacajja lokhe arunacacwa parlapjje." 
Proverbs15:3 Tatitojj take chekanquiwa; jupajj uñch'uquisquiwa asqui jakenacaru, uqhamarac ñankha jakenacarusa." 
Proverbs15:4 Suma arunacajj jacaña kokjamawa, ucampis jan wali arunacajj jaken chuymaparojj usuchjiwa." 
Proverbs15:5 Jan amuyt'an jakejj awquipan yatichäwiparojj jisc'achiwa; awquipar ist'qui ucajj yatiñanïtapwa uñacht'ayi. 
Proverbs15:6 Cheka lurir jaken utapan take cunapas jan tucusquiriw utji, ucampis ñankha lurir jaken cuna jicjjatatanacapasa jan cunataquiwa." 
Proverbs15:7 Yatiñan jakejj wali suma yatichäwinacwa parli, ucampis jan yatiñan jakejj jan walinacacwa luri." 
Proverbs15:8 Tatitojj ñankha jakenacan loktatanacapjja janiw uñjañ munquiti, ucampis cusisiñampiwa catoke cheka jakenacan mayisitanacapjja." 
Proverbs15:9 Tatitusti ñankha jakenacan sarnakatanacapjja janiw uñjañ munquiti; qhititejj cheka cancañana sarnakqui ucaruw munasiraqui. 
Proverbs15:10 Qhititejj suma thaquina sarnakaña apanucqui ucarojj khoru cancañampi chekachatawa; qhititejj chekachäwiru jisc'achqui ucasti jiwaniwa. 
Proverbs15:11 Tatitutejj sum uñjchi, yatiracchi cunatï jiwañansa, sepulcronsa ucjja, ¡ucat juc'ampwa Tatitojj jakenacan chuymapjja uñt'i!" 
Proverbs15:12 Jan yäkasir jakesti janiw munquiti jupar chekachqui ucarojja, janiraquiw yatiñan jakenacampis sarnakañ munquiti." 
Proverbs15:13 Cusisit chuyman jakesti ajanupanjja cusisitaraquiwa; llaquit chuyman jakesti llaquita ajanuniwa. 
Proverbs15:14 Yatiñan jakejj juc'ampwa yatikañ muni, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakejja jan walinacampiw apayasi." 
Proverbs15:15 Qhititejj llaquitäqui ucataquejj take urunacasa jan walicamaquiwa; qhititejj cusisitäqui ucataquisti jan tucusquiri cusisiñawa. 
Proverbs15:16 Wali kamiri, llaquita jacañat sipansa, wali asquiwa pobrëscaña, Tatiturusa yupaychascañajja." 
Proverbs15:17 Vaca aycha uñisiñampi mank'añat sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa munasiñampi ch'ojjñanaca mank'añajja." 
Proverbs15:18 Mäqui colerasir jakejj nuwasiñanacwa utjayi; qhititejj llamp'u chuymanïqui ucasti, pachparuwa ch'ujtayi." 
Proverbs15:19 Jayra jakena thaquipajj ch'aphinacamp phokhantatawa, ucampis cheka jakena thaquipajja suma qhusqhaquiwa." 
Proverbs15:20 Yatiñan wawajj awquiparu, taycaparojj cusisiyiwa; jan yatiñan wawasti awquiparu, taycaparojj jisc'achiwa." 
Proverbs15:21 Jan amuyt'an jakesti jan wali sarnakatapatjja cusisiwa; ch'iqhi jakesti sarnakäwinacapjja chekachasiwa. 
Proverbs15:22 Cunapachatejj jan jisct'asiñajj utjqui ucqhajj, amtäwinacajja aynacht'iwa; walja amuyt'ayirinacampiw sumar mistsuñajj utji." 
Proverbs15:23 ¡Cunj asquisa jisct'aru arunac jicjjatañajja, ucat juc'ampisa horasapar jicjjatañajja!" 
Proverbs15:24 Jacañar irpir thaquejj amstaruwa sari, ucatsti yatiñan jakerusa khespiyaraquiwa jiwaña aynacharu puriñatsa." 
Proverbs15:25 Tatitojj jach'a jach'a tucurin utapjja tucjiwa, ucampis ijma warmin orakep janiw jittayquiti." 
Proverbs15:26 Tatitojj janiw uñjañ munquiti ñankha jakenacan amtäwinacaparojja, ucampis juparojj suma k'oma arunacawa cusisiyi." 
Proverbs15:27 Walja yänacaru munapayirejj pachpa utapwa tucji, ucampis qhititejj jan kollke chilltayasqui ucaw jacani." 
Proverbs15:28 Asqui jakejj janïra parlcasinjja suma amuyt'asisinwa arsu, ucampis ñankha jakejja mäquiwa jan wali arunaca parlatati." 
Proverbs15:29 Tatitojj ñankha lurir jakenacatjja jithektiwa, ucampis asqui jakenacan mayisitanacapjja ist'iwa." 
Proverbs15:30 Suma cancañampi uñtäwejj chuymarojj cusisiyiwa; suma yatiyäwinacasti ch'amañchiwa. 
Proverbs15:31 Jacañ churir chekachäwi arunacar ist'irejj, yatiñan jakenac taypinwa jacani." 
Proverbs15:32 Yatichäwiru jisc'achirejj jupa pachpawa jan wal lurasisqui; chekachäwiru ist'iristi, amuyt'asiñwa jicjjati." 
Proverbs15:33 Tatitur ajjsarañajj yatiñ cancañwa utjayi; llamp'u chuyman tucuristi jach'ar aptatawa. 
Proverbs16:1 Jakejj chuymapanjja cunanac lurañataquis amtaquiwa, ucampis Tatituw munañani uca amtäwiru phokhasiñapataquisa jan phokhasiñapataquisa." 
Proverbs16:2 Jaketaquejj cunanac luratapasa walicjamaquiwa, ucampis Tatitojj yatiwa amtäwinacapajj waliti jan ucajj janicha ucjja." 
Proverbs16:3 Take luräwinacamjja Tatitun amparapar jaytam, ucatsti amtäwinacamajj phokhasiniwa." 
Proverbs16:4 Take cunsa Tatituw luri mä amtäwimpi; uqhamarac ñankha jakerusa t'akhesiña urutaqui. 
Proverbs16:5 Jach'a jach'a tucur jakenacarojj uñisiwa; jupanacasti mutuyatäpjjaniwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Jucha luratarojja munasiñampi, cheka cancañampiwa pampachi; Tatitur ajjsaratap laycuwa maynejja jan walita jithekti." 
Proverbs16:7 Cunapachatï jaken sarnakäwipajj Tatitutac sumäqui ucqhajja, uñisiripampisa Tatitojj juparojj sumancayiwa." 
Proverbs16:8 Lunthatasiñanacampi waljanaca jicjjatañata sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa chekapa lurañampi juc'aqui jicjjatatajja." 
Proverbs16:9 Jakejj chuymapanjja sarnakañapatwa lup'isqui, ucampis sarnakäwipjja Tatituw irpasqui." 
Proverbs16:10 Tatituw reyerojj yanapi amtäwinacapana jan pantjasisa chekapar uñjañapataqui. 
Proverbs16:11 Pesanacasa, tupuñanacasa Tatitunquiwa, chekaparu uñjañapataqui; take pesanacawa jupan lurata." 
Proverbs16:12 Reyinacajja jan wali luräwinacarojja uñisiwa, reyi konüñan chekapa lurañanacjjaru utt'ayatätap laycu." 
Proverbs16:13 Reyinacajj munapjjewa, cusisiñampiw uñjapjjaraqui, qhititejj cheka cancañampi parlasqui ucarojja." 
Proverbs16:14 Reyin colerasitapajj jiwañ apani, ucampis yatiñan jakejja sumaptayiwa uca colerasiñapjja." 
Proverbs16:15 Reyin cusisitapajj suma jacañwa utjayi; suma cancañapasti purekeri jallur uñtatawa. 
Proverbs16:16 Korit sipansa yatiñ cancaña jicjjatañawa asquejja; kollket sipansa amuyt'anïñawa asquejja. 
Proverbs16:17 Asqui jakenacan sarnakäwipasti jan walinacata jithektañawa; asqui thaquin sarnaker jakesti, jupa pachpawa jacañapa imasisqui." 
Proverbs16:18 Jach'a jach'a tucuñanjja aynacht'añawa utji; pek'e waytat sarnakañansti tincuñaw utji. 
Proverbs16:19 Asquiwa pobrenacampi jisc'ar tucuñajja, jach'a jach'a tucuñampi kamirïñat sipansa." 
Proverbs16:20 Qhititejj Diosan arunacapar ist'i ucajja, cusisiñwa jicjjatani; ¡cusisiñaniwa Tatitur iyawsir jakejja!" 
Proverbs16:21 Qhititejj yatiñampi amuyt'qui ucajja, ch'iqhi jaketa uñt'atawa; suma arumpi parlañasti sumwa amuyt'ayi." 
Proverbs16:22 Suma amuyanïñajja suma jacañ jicjjatañawa; pisi amuyt'an jaker yatichañasti lokhe cancañawa. 
Proverbs16:23 Qhititejj yatiñampi amuyt'qui ucajja, yatiñampiwa parli; arunacapasti sumwa amuyt'ayi." 
Proverbs16:24 Suma arunacajj wali suma misc'jamawa, jaken chuymapataquisa mojjsawa, cuerporus ch'amañcharaquiwa." 
Proverbs16:25 Jaken amuyatapatjja sarnakäwinacapajj walicjamaquiwa, ucampis tucuyapajj jiwañaquiwa." 
Proverbs16:26 Irnakerin mank'at awtjayasitapaw irnakañar nuct'i; mank'at awtjayasiñaw jupar nuqhunucu. 
Proverbs16:27 Ñankha lurir jakejj jan wali lurañanacacwa lup'isqui; ¡arunacapasa ninjamawa lacapat mistu! 
Proverbs16:28 Jan ist'asir sajjra jakejja ch'ajjwañanacwa sartayi; arunac apnaker jakesti uñisiñ utjayi. 
Proverbs16:29 Ñankha lurir jakejj amigoparojj sallkantiwa; ñankha thaquiruwa saranucuyaraqui. 
Proverbs16:30 Nayranacapsa ch'irmt'araquiwa jan walinaca lurañatac amtan jakejja; lacapsa achurasiraquiwa jan walinac lurasajja. 
Proverbs16:31 Jank'o ñic'utanëjjañajja mä suma coronjamawa, cheka thaquin sarnakatata jicjjatatajja." 
Proverbs16:32 Paciencianïñaw asquejja, jan ajjsarir jaket sipansa; marcanacar catuntañat sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa jiwasa pachpa apnakasiñajja." 
Proverbs16:33 Jakenacajja suertenacwa apsuyasipjje, ucampis Tatituw phokhayi munañaparjama cunjamäñapataquisa." 
Proverbs17:1 Wali asquiwa kholu t'ant'a samarañan jacasin mank'asiscañajja, walja fiestanacan nuwasis jacañat sipansa." 
Proverbs17:2 Ch'iqhi uywatasti utaniruw tucji, jan ist'asiri yokapats jilanquiwa; patronapan wawanacapamp chicaraquiwa herencia catokaraquini." 
Proverbs17:3 Korisa, kollkesa ninamp yant'atawa; jaken amtatanacapsti Tatituw yant'araqui." 
Proverbs17:4 Ñankha lurir jakempi, c'ari jakempejja, jan wali arunacaruquiwa ist'apjje." 
Proverbs17:5 Qhititejj pobre jaketa sawcasqui ucajja, jupan luririp Tatituruw jan wal lurasqui; qhititejj jake masipan aynacht'atapata larusqui ucajja, mutuyataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs17:6 Chuyman awquinacan coronapasti allchhinacapawa; wawanacajj awquip taycapatwa alawt'asi. 
Proverbs17:7 Jan amuyt'an jaketaquejja janiw sumäcaspati suma arunac parlañapajja, janiraquiw mä jilïri jaken c'ari arunaca parlañapas sumäcaraquispati." 
Proverbs17:8 Qhititejj cun lurañataquis kollke chilltasa sarnakqui ucajja, take cunataquis ch'amanïcaspa uqhamwa amuyasi; cuna lurañanacansa walt'ascaquiwa amuyatapatjja." 
Proverbs17:9 Qhititejj jan wali luratata perdonqui ucajja, juc'ampi suma munasiñwa utjayi; qhititejj jan wali luratata parlascaqui ucajja, jake masiparojja juc'ampiwa jithekayi."
