Proverbs17:10 Amuyt'asiri jakejj sumwa catokasi jupan asquipataqui toketäqui ucjja; jan amuyt'an jakesti janiw catokascaspati pataca cuti jawk'jatäcaspa ucasa. 
Proverbs17:11 Jan ist'asiri pitthapir jakesti nuwasiñanacacwa thake, ucampis khoru qhitanacaw jupatac jutani." 
Proverbs17:12 Jan amuyt'an ñankha amtäwin jakempi jiquisiñat sipansa, walïcaspaw wawanacap aparat khoru osampi jiquintasiñajja." 
Proverbs17:13 Qhititejj asqui luratata ñankhampi cutiyqui ucan utapatjja, janipuniw jan wali lurañanacajj saraktcaniti." 
Proverbs17:14 Ch'ajjwaña kalltañasti, umasa jilarcaspa uqhamawa; uca ch'ajjwañata jithektañasti juc'ampi asquiwa." 
Proverbs17:15 Walwa Tatitojj uñisi aca paya luräwinacaru: jucharar jaker asquit uñt'aña, asqui jaker juchañchaña." 
Proverbs17:16 Jan amuyt'ata laycusti inamayaquiw jan amuyt'an jakejj yatiñ cancaña kollkempis alasiñ munascaspa. 
Proverbs17:17 Mä amigojj take horasan munasiripuniwa; llaquisiñansti mä jiljamaw chuymachasi. 
Proverbs17:18 Jan amuyt'an jakejj sayt'aquiw garantiatjja amigop laycu; ucatsti jupaw phokhañapäni. 
Proverbs17:19 Qhititejj tokesiñ munqui ucataquejja, nuwasiñawa jupatac suma; qhititejj sinti parlqui ucajja, aynacht'añapwa thakasqui." 
Proverbs17:20 Jan ist'asiri jucharar jakejj janipuniw ascjja jicjjatcaniti; c'ari arunac parliristi jan walt'añaruwa purini. 
Proverbs17:21 Awquejj jan amuyt'an wawanïtap laycuw llaquisi; mä lokhe wawan awquipäñajj janiw cuna cusisiñs apanquiti. 
Proverbs17:22 Cusisit chuymajj jaken jacañapwa sumaptayi, ucampis llaquisit chuymajj jan ch'aman tucuyi." 
Proverbs17:23 Ñankha lurir jakejj jan qhitins uñjcataw kollk chilltayasi, uqhamata cheka lurañäqui uca maysar k'ewiñataqui." 
Proverbs17:24 Yatiñan jakejj juc'amp yatiñanïñwa muni, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakejja janiw cawquiru saratapsa yatisquiti." 
Proverbs17:25 Jan amuyt'an wawajj colerasiña, jachañacwa utjayi awquipa taycapataquejja." 
Proverbs17:26 Jan juchanir multa apsuñajja janiw walïquiti, janiraquiw aytata jakeru jawk'añas walïquiti." 
Proverbs17:27 Yatiñan jakenacajj juc'acwa parlapjje, ch'iqhi cancañajj amuct'añawa." 
Proverbs17:28 Jan amuyt'an jakejja yatiñanïcaspas ch'iqhïcaspas uqhamaw amuyasi, mäwjana amuqui kheparatapata." 
Proverbs18:1 Qhititejj jupataquiqui cuns munqui ucajja, munañaparuquiwa sarnake, ucatsti take suma amtäwinac contraw tucu." 
Proverbs18:2 Jan amuyt'an jakejj janiw yatekañ munquiti; jan ucasti jupan amuyt'äwipacwa parlañ muni. 
Proverbs18:3 Ñankha lurañanjja p'enkachäwiquiwa utji; jach'a jach'a tucuñanjja jisc'achayasiñaquiw utji. 
Proverbs18:4 Jaken arunacapasti walja umanacar uñtatawa, jalir jawirjamawa, jacañ churir phuch'uraquiwa." 
Proverbs18:5 Janiw asquïquiti taripirinacan juchan jaket arjjatañapajja; janiraquiw asquïquiti jan juchan jaken sarnakasiñaparus janiw sañajja. 
Proverbs18:6 Jan amuyt'an jakejj parlatanacapampejja jan walt'añaruwa manti, jan wali parlatapatwa jawk'jatas uñjasiraqui." 
Proverbs18:7 Jan amuyt'an jakejj parlatapampejja jupa pachpa tucjatäñaruwa purisqui; parlatapampejja mä lazompjamawa cuncaparu uchantasisqui. 
Proverbs18:8 Arunac apnaker jaken parlatanacapajja suma mojjsjamawa, ucampis chuyma mankheru mantasinwa jan walt'ayi." 
Proverbs18:9 jopana jayrasiri jakejj, ¡tucjirina jilapawa!" 
Proverbs18:10 Tatitun sutipajj imantasiña jach'a torrer uñtatawa, asqui jakenacajj jupan ucar imantasiñataqui jutapqui ucanacataquejja." 
Proverbs18:11 Kamiristi amuyasiwa jupan yänacapajj, mä marcar alto perkanacampi muyuntatäcaspa uqhama." 
Proverbs18:12 Jach'a jach'a tucuñanjja, aynacht'añawa utji; llamp'u chuyma tucuñansti, jach'ar aptatäñawa utjaraqui." 
Proverbs18:13 Maynin arunacapa jan sum ist'casina arsuñajja, jan amuyt'anïña, mä p'enkaraquiwa." 
Proverbs18:14 Usutarojj ch'am catjjatatapawa wayjjäsi, ucampis ch'am thayjtatarusti, ¿qhitirac wayjjäsispasti?" 
Proverbs18:15 Yatiñan jakenacampi, ch'iqhi jakenacampiwa yatiñ cancaña thakapqui ucjja jicjjatapjjaspa." 
Proverbs18:16 Mä wajjt'äwi churatapampejja cawqhacamas mantascaquispawa, uqham luratapampejja jilïrinacan ucarus puriscaquiwa." 
Proverbs18:17 Qhititejj jupa pachpata arsusqui ucan arupajja walicjamaquiwa, ucatsti cunapachatï jupa conträqui ucajj purini ucqhasti, takwa khansuyi." 
Proverbs18:18 Ch'ajjwañanacarojj Tatituw chekaparu uñjañapampi tucuyi, ucatsti yakha yakharacwa ch'amaninacar jaljtayi." 
Proverbs18:19 Chuyma usuchjat jilatajja, jach'a perkanacampi muyuntayat marcjamäjjewa, janiraquiw cun ist'añsa munquiti. Jila pura ch'ajjwañanacasti, cunjämatï mä palacion rejanacapajj jan pascaya wali uchantatäquejja uqhamaw jaljtayaraqui." 
Proverbs18:20 Sapa mayniwa sist'asiñcama mank'ani, suma arunac parlatapata." 
Proverbs18:21 Jiwañas jacañasa parlatatjamwa waquisi; qhitinacatejj sinti parlapqui ucanacajj jan walt'añampiwa t'akhesini. 
Proverbs18:22 Esposa jicjjatañajj suma asqui jicjjatañawa; Diosan bendicionap catokañaraquiwa. 
Proverbs18:23 Pobre jakejj suma arumpiw achict'asi; kamir jakesti jach'a tucuñampiwa parli. 
Proverbs18:24 Yakhep amigonacasti janc'aquiw apanucusiraqui, ucampis mä amigow utji jilat sipansa juc'amp suma." 
Proverbs19:1 C'ari jakëñata, jan yatiñan jakëñata sipansa, juc'ampi asquiwa pobrëscañajja, cheka cancañana sarnakascañajja." 
Proverbs19:2 Jan sum cunsa yatjjatasa lurañajja janiw walïquiti; mäqui lurjañanacanjja pantjasiñawa utji. 
Proverbs19:3 Jakejj jan amuyt'asirïtap laycojja suma sarnakañapjja chhakhayiwa, ucatsti jakejj Tatituruquiw juchañchi." 
Proverbs19:4 Kamir cancañajj walja amigonacwa utjayi, ucampis mä pobre jakerojja amigonacapajj apanucjjewa." 
Proverbs19:5 C'ari testigojj, c'ari arunac parlir jakesa mutuyatapunïniwa; janiw cunjämatsa jaltcaniti." 
Proverbs19:6 Cunsa wajjt'asir jakerojja, take jakenacaw thakapjje, amigoparus tucupjjaraqui." 
Proverbs19:7 Mä pobre jakerojj pachpa jilanacapasa jisc'achiwa, amigonacapasti ucatsa juc'ampiwa juparojj apanucupjjani. ¡Janiw juc'ampi arunacajj utjquiti jupanacar jicjjatañataquejja!" 
Proverbs19:8 Qhititejj yatiñ cancaña jicjjatqui ucajja, jupa pachpawa munasi; qhititejj ch'iqhi cancaña jicjjatqui ucajja, cusisiñwa jicjjati." 
Proverbs19:9 C'ari testigojj mutuyatapunïniwa; c'ari jakerusti jiwañawa suyt'asqui. 
Proverbs19:10 Jan amuyt'an jakerojja janiw wact'quiti wali kamirinacjama jacañapajja, ucatsa juc'ampiwa mä uywataru jan wact'quiti jilïrinacaru apnakañapajja." 
Proverbs19:11 Yatiñan jakejj janiw mäqui colerasquiti, chuyma usuchjatasa janis cunäcaspa uqhamac uñji, uqham luratapasti jach'a cancañawa." 
Proverbs19:12 Reyin colerasitapajj leonan wararitapjamawa; qhuyapayasiñapasti alinacaru sullajj sulljjatquisa uqhamawa. 
Proverbs19:13 Jan amuyt'an wawajj awquiparojj t'akhesiyiwa. T'iñi thakher warmisti jan sayt'as ch'akeri umjamawa. 
Proverbs19:14 Awquita taycatjja uta kamir cancaña catokañawa utji, ucampis ch'iqhi warmjja Tatituquiw churi." 
Proverbs19:15 Jayrasiñajj iquïcwa iquiyasqui, ucatsti jayra jakejja mank'atjamajja t'akhesiniwa." 
Proverbs19:16 Tatitun camachi arunacapa imirejj jacañapwa imasisqui, ucampis Tatitun yatichäwi arunacaparu jisc'achirejja jiwaniwa." 
Proverbs19:17 Mä pobre jaker mayt'irejj Tatituruw mayt'asqui, ucatsti Tatit pachpawa uca manjja phokjjani." 
Proverbs19:18 Wawamarojj horasäquipana chekacham, ucampis janiw jiwayañcama jawk'jätati." 
Proverbs19:19 Wali colerir jakejj mutuñ catokani; jan mutuyata kheparani ucasti, juc'amp jan waliruwa sarani." 
Proverbs19:20 Ist'am suma ewjja arunacaru, chekachäwi arunacsa catokasiraquim; uqhamatwa yatiñan jakëyätajja." 
Proverbs19:21 Jakejj waljanacwa amti, ucampis Tatitun munañapaquiwa phokhasi." 
Proverbs19:22 Mä jakenjja suma chuymanïñapawa munasi; apjasiri jakëñata sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa pobre jakëscaña." 
Proverbs19:23 Tatitur ajjsarañajj jacañaruwa irpi; ucatsti cusisitaquiwa jacasi, cuna jan walt'añansa jan t'akhesisa." 
Proverbs19:24 Jayra jakejja amparapampi plator lokantcasasa, jayrasiwa lacaparu mank'a apcatasiña." 
Proverbs19:25 Jan qhitiru yäker jakejj mutuyatäqui ucqhasti, jan amuyt'asir jakejj uqham uñjasinjja amuyt'asjjewa; yatiñan jakesti mä sapa chekachataquiwa yateke." 
Proverbs19:26 Awquiru ñankhachañasa, taycaru utat apanucuñasa, uca luräwinacajj mä wawataquejj jach'a p'enkawa, jan arjjatcayaraquiwa." 
Proverbs19:27 Munat wawajjay, chekachäwi arunacarutejj jan ist'cäta ucajja, suma ewjja arunacatwa sarakttajja." 
Proverbs19:28 C'ari testigojj cheka cancañatjja sawcasiwa; jucharar jakesti jan walinacwa parli. 
Proverbs19:29 Ñankha jan yäkasir jakenacataquejja jawk'jañ lawajj waquichatawa; jan amuyt'an jakenacataquisti asot'ejj jiqhanipataquejj waquichatawa. 
Proverbs20:1 Vinojj jakerojj jan amuyun tucuyi, machjasiña umañanacasti jan walinacwa parlayaraqui; qhititejj uqhama machjasiñana sarnakqui ucajja, janiw yatiñ cancañampi cuns lurquiti." 
Proverbs20:2 Mä colerata reyejj warariri leonar uñtatawa; qhititejj jupar colerayqui ucajja, jacañapjja jan walt'añaruw puriyasqui." 
Proverbs20:3 Mä suma jach'añchäwiwa qhititejj ch'ajjwañanacaru jan mantqui ucataquejja; ucampis jan amuyt'an jakejja uca ch'ajjwañanacarojja mantañ munaquiwa. 
Proverbs20:4 Jayra jakejj kholliña horasajja janiw khollquiti, ucampis yapu apthapi horasajj thaktaniwa, ucatsti janiw jicjjatcaniti." 
Proverbs20:5 Imantata amtäwi arunacajj jaken chuymapanjja walja umar uñtatawa, ucampis qhititï ch'iqhi jakëqui ucajja, yatiwa cunjäm jicjjatañsa." 
Proverbs20:6 Walja jakenacawa sapjje: “Suma asqui jakëtwa” sasa, ucampis janiw qhitis asqui jakejj utjquiti." 
Proverbs20:7 ¡Take cunans asquinwa cheka jakejj jacawayi cusisiñanïpjjewa jupan wawanacapajja! 
Proverbs20:8 Cunapachatï reyejj taripäwin kont'asi ucqhajja, maya uñcatasaquiw cunatejj jan walïqui ucjja catji." 
Proverbs20:9 Janiw qhitis siscaspati: “Chuymajj-jja k'omachastwa, take juchatsa k'omäjjtwa” sasajja." 
Proverbs20:10 Tatiturojj c'ari pesanacasa jisc'aptayat tupuñanacasa ñankhachiwa. 
Proverbs20:11 Mä waynan cheka sarnakatapajja, luratanacapatwa uñt'asi." 
Proverbs20:12 Tatitun uchatawa jinchus ist'añataqui, uqhamarac nayras uñjañataqui." 
Proverbs20:13 Jan ancha iquimti, pobreptätawa; jan iquimti, uñnakam, mank'añamasti jilarquiriwa utjätam." 
Proverbs20:14 Alasirejj: “Acajj janiw sumäquiti” sasaw uñi, ucampis alasjjasajja: “Walicpuni alastjja” sasaw jupa pachpa parlasi." 
Proverbs20:15 Acapachan korinacata sipana, uqhamarac suma yänacat sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa qhititejj yatiñampi parlqui ucajja." 
Proverbs20:16 Qhititejj jan uñt'at jaket garantiata sayt'qui ucajja isipas apakatäniwa; ucatsti isipajj prendata jaytatäniwa. 
Proverbs20:17 Jaketaquisti sumawa c'ari arunaca mank'añajja, ucampis uca khepatjja lak'sa mank'caspa uqhamaw tucjje." 
Proverbs20:18 Suma amtäwinacajja suma ewjja arunacampiwa wact'ayasi; uqhamarac guerran nuwasiñataquisa wali yatiñampi sarañawa. 
Proverbs20:19 Arunac apnaker jakejj jan arsuñäqui uca arunacjja arsuscaquiwa, uqhamajj arunac apnaker jakenacampejj jan mayachasimti." 
Proverbs20:20 Qhititejj awquiparu, taycaparu ñankhachqui ucajja, wali ajjsarcaña ch'amacanwa jiwani." 
Proverbs20:21 Cunatï kalltana jasac jicjjatatäqui ucajja, tucuyarojja janiw cusisiñ churcaniti." 
Proverbs20:22 Jan jumajj samti: “Uqhamat, uqhamwa luraraquëjja” sasajja, jan ucasti Tatitur iyawsam, jupaw atipayascätam." 
Proverbs20:23 Tatiturusti jan phokhat pesanacasa, uqhamarac c'ari balanzanacasa ñankhachiwa." 
Proverbs20:24 Tatituwa jaken sarnakäwipa sarayasqui; janiwa qhitis yatisquiti jupa pachpan tucuyäwipjja. 
Proverbs20:25 Janiwa walïquiti jakena mäqui Diosar mä cuna churañataqui arsutapajja, uca arsutapatjja mayjaracwa kheparojj amtjje." 
Proverbs20:26 Yatiñan reyejj jan ist'asiri ñankha jakenacarojja jupa nayrakatatjja jakonucuwa, ucatsti jupanacarojja mä ruedampiwa tacjjatayi." 
Proverbs20:27 Jaken ajayupajj Tatitun khanapawa; ucatsti chuyma mankhepwa khanantaraqui. 
Proverbs20:28 Reyejja jaya maranacawa reyi konuñapanqui, cunapachatï munasiñampi, cheka cancañampi apnakqui ucqhajja." 
Proverbs20:29 Jach'a jach'a tucuñasti waynanacanjja ch'amanacapanquiwa; chuyman awquinacanjja jank'o ñic'utanacapawa mä jach'añchäwejja. 
Proverbs20:30 Jaken ñankhanac luratapatjja, jawk'jjañampi usuchnokañampiw kolli; uca jawk'jatanacawa chuymapjja waliptayi." 
Proverbs21:1 Reyin amtatanacapajj Tatitun amparapanquiwa; Tatituraquiwa sarayasqui, cunjämatï jawiranacajj sarasqui uqhama." 
Proverbs21:2 Jaketaquejj walicjamaquiwa take luratanacapajja, ucampis Tatitojj yatiwa jakenacan amtäwinacapjja." 
Proverbs21:3 Sacrificionaca loktañata sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa Tatitutaquejj cheka cancañana sarnakañamajja." 
Proverbs21:4 Jach'a jach'a tucuñasa, amtañasa, jan walinac lup'iñasa, juchawa." 
Proverbs21:5 Suma amuyt'ampi cuna amtäwinaca waquichatasa sumaquiwa phokhasi, ucampis mäqui waquichata amtäwinacajja aynacht'añaruwa puriyi." 
Proverbs21:6 C'arimpi kamir cancaña jicjjatatajj, mäquiwa chhaktawayjje; amtañanacapan pantjasiritaquisti jiwañaquiwa utji." 
Proverbs21:7 Jucharar jakerojj jupa pachpan jan wali luratapawa tucjani, cheka cancañana jan sarnakañ munirïtap laycu." 
Proverbs21:8 Jucharar jaken sarnakäwipajj k'ewinucuta jan waliwa, ucampis cheka lurir jaken luratanacapajj k'omawa." 
Proverbs21:9 Juc'amp asquiw mä c'uchuna jacañajja, suma jach'a utana ch'ajjwiri warmimp jacañat sipansa." 
Proverbs21:10 Jucharar jakejja ñankha lurañacwa lup'isqui; janipuniw jake masiparojj suma cancañampi uñjañ munquiti. 
Proverbs21:11 Ñankha jakeru mutuyir uñjasaw, jan amuyt'an jakejja yateke; yatiñan jakesti mä cuti yatichataquiw yateke." 
Proverbs21:12 Chekapar uñjir Diosajj, ñankha jakenacan utapjja uñch'uquisquiwa; ñankha lurir jakenacarojj tucjatäñataquiw catuyaraqui." 
Proverbs21:13 Qhititejj pobrenacan yanap mayitapar jan ist'cani ucarojja, janiraquiw ist'atäcaniti cunapachatï jupajj yanapa maycani ucqhajja." 
Proverbs21:14 Colerata jakeru jamasata wali amuyt'ampi wajjt'añajja, sumaptayiwa." 
Proverbs21:15 Cunapachatï cheka cancañampi uñjatäqui ucqhajja, asqui jakejja cusisiwa, ucampis jan wali luririnacataquejja tucjatäñapawa purini." 
Proverbs21:16 Qhititejj ch'iqhi cancañampi jan sarnakcani ucajja, jiwatanac taypiruwa purini." 
Proverbs21:17 Qhititejj sarnakqui cusisiñanacana, machañanacana, suma k'aphinaca uchasiñanacana ucajja, pobrernucstaniwa." 
Proverbs21:18 C'ari jucharar jakejja, asqui cheka jaken t'akhesiñapwa t'akhesini." 
Proverbs21:19 Juc'amp asquiwa wasarana jacañajja, coleriri ch'ajjwiri warmimp jacañat sipana." 
Proverbs21:20 Yatiñan jaken utapanjja kamir cancañanaca, suma k'aphinacawa utji, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakesti take cunanacapwa tucji." 
Proverbs21:21 Qhititejj chekana, asquina sarnakañ thakqui ucajja, jacañwa jicjjatani, jach'ar aptataraquïniwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Yatiñan jakejj suma sayt'ayat marcaruwa jaljjati, uca marcajj cunanacarutejj alcatcäna ucarusa tucjaraquiwa." 
Proverbs21:23 Qhititejj suma amuyt'ampi cunsa parlqui ucajja, janipuniw jan walt'añanacarojj mantquiti." 
Proverbs21:24 Jach'a amtañani, jach'a jach'a tucuri, jan amuyt'ani, ucaw sutipajja; qhititejj wali jach'a amtañanacampi lurqui ucajja." 
Proverbs21:25 Jayra jakejj take cunsa walwa muni, ucampis janiw jicjjatquiti jan irnakatap laycu;" 
Proverbs21:26 uru jornälpachawa take cuns munapayasqui, ucampis asqui jakejja, jan mich'asisawa churi." 
Proverbs21:27 Tatitojj jucharar jakenacan sacrificio loktatanacaparojja uñisiwa, jupanacan jan wali amtäwinacamp loktapjjatap laycu." 
Proverbs21:28 C'ari testigojj tucjatäniwa, ucampis qhititejj ist'asiña yatqui ucajja, yatipuniniwa cunjäm arsuñsa." 
Proverbs21:29 Ñankha lurir jakejja ajjsarayasiñanacapjja imt'iwa, ucampis asqui jakejja jacäwipjja chekachasiwa." 
Proverbs21:30 Tatitun nayrakatapanjja janiw yatiñasa, ch'iqhi cancañasa, suma amuyt'anacasa cunäcjjeti." 
Proverbs21:31 Jakejj guerrar sarañataquiw caballo waquichasi, ucampis Tatitunquiwa atipjañajja." 
Proverbs22:1 Walja korinïñata sipana, uqhamarac walja kollquinïñata sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa suma jaketa uñt'atäñajja." 
Proverbs22:2 Kamiri jakesa, pobre jakesa pachpa jakequiwa; panpachaniruw Tatitojj ucharaqui." 
Proverbs22:3 Ch'iqhi jakejj jan walt'aña uñjasinjja jaltjjewa, ucampis jan amuyt'asir jakejja mantascaquiwa, ucatsti ñankha luräwinac jicjjati." 
Proverbs22:4 Llamp'u chuymampi Tatitur ajjsaras sarnakañajja, kamir cancaña, jach'ar aptatäña jacaña catokañawa utji." 
Proverbs22:5 Ñankha lurir jaken sarnakäwipajj sipitanacampi phokt'atawa, ucampis suman sarnakañ muniristi uca jan walt'añanacatjja saraktiwa." 
Proverbs22:6 Wawarojja suma sarnakañapataquejja jisc'atpach sum yaticham, ucatsti awquëjjan ucqhajja janiw uca yatichäwinacatjja armascaniti." 
Proverbs22:7 Kamir jakejj pobrenac taypinjja mä reyjamawa; manuninaca taypinjja, kollke mayt'irejj reyjamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs22:8 Qhititejj jan walinaca lurqui ucajja, jan walinacwa catokaraquini; ¡juparusti Tatituw tucjani colerasiñapampi, jach'a cancañapampi!" 
Proverbs22:9 Qhititejj mayninacaru qhuyapayasiñamp uñji ucajj bendicitawa, jupan t'ant'a pobrenacaru churatap laycu." 
Proverbs22:10 Ñankha jakeru jakonucum, ucatsti tucusjjaniwa jachjayasiñanaca, uqhamarac ch'ajjwañanacasa, tokesiñanacasa." 
Proverbs22:11 Reyejj khana chuyman jakeruwa muni, suma arumpi parlir jakempiw suman sarnakasiraqui." 
Proverbs22:12 Tatitojj yatiñan jakeruw sum uñjasa imasqui, ucampis khanstayiwa c'ari jakenacan parlatanacapjja." 
Proverbs22:13 Jayra jakejj jan irnakaña munasinjja, cunaymanampiwa tuwakasi, aqham sasa: “Callenjja mä leonaw utji, nayarojj mank'antitaspawa” sasa." 
Proverbs22:14 Wali mankha phuch'ur uñtatawa jan wali sarnaker warmin arunacapajja; qhitirutejj Tatitojj mutuyañ munqui ucarojja uca warmin ucaruraquiw puriyi. 
Proverbs22:15 Pisi amuyt'amp lurañasti, waynanacan amuyupawa; ucasti apakasiwa jawk'ampi chekachatän ucqha." 
Proverbs22:16 Qhititejj kamiriptañ munasa pobreru t'akhesiyqui, jan ucajj kamirirusa cuns churqui ucajja, pobres cancañanwa tucusini." 
Proverbs22:17 Take chuymamp ist'am yatiñan jakenacan säwi arunacapa, amuyt'araquim cuntï yatichcsma ucanaca." 
Proverbs22:18 Ancha sumäniwa aca arunaca amjjäsiñamajja, uqhamata takenisa mayaqui arsuñataqui." 
Proverbs22:19 Jichhüruw nayajj jumar yatiysma, Tatitur take iyawsañama uchañamataqui." 
Proverbs22:20 Nayajj kellkarapsmawa quimsa tunca säwi arunaca, ucanacasti suma ewjja arunacawa, yatiña arunacaraquiwa," 
Proverbs22:21 jumar cheka cancaña uñt'añama yatichañataqui, uqhamata qhititejj jisct'ätam ucar suma yatiyäwi arunaca churañamataqui." 
Proverbs22:22 Pobretjja jan aparamti pobrëtap laycu, janirac juezanacan nayrakatapansa t'akhesiyamti," 
Proverbs22:23 Tatitojj jupatwa arjjatani, t'akhesiyaraquiniwa qhititejj t'akhesiyqui ucanacarojja." 
Proverbs22:24 Jan chicachasimti, janirac suman sarnakamti colerasiri jan wali jakempejja," 
Proverbs22:25 jan yatekasiñamataqui jan wali sarnakäwinacapata, jan cuncamaru wisqhampi jaychjayasiñatac uchascamti." 
Proverbs22:26 Janipun arsumti mayni jakenacan manunacap phokhañataquejja. 
Proverbs22:27 Janitejj cunampi phokherjamäcätajja, janjjatasiña iquiñamamppachwa aparapjjätam." 
Proverbs22:28 Nayra awquinacaman uchat korpanacjja, jan onokeycamti." 
Proverbs22:29 Qhititejj mä cunsa suma lurcani ucajja, reyinacaruwa sirvini, janiwa aynacht'ata jakenacar sirvcaniti." 
Proverbs23:1 Cunapachatï mä jilïrejj mank'añatac jawsayätam ucqhajja, jumajj sum amuyt'asim qhitin nayrakatapantejj jicjjatascta uca." 
Proverbs23:2 Jumajj wali mank'at awtjatäscamsaya, juc'ac mank'am;" 
Proverbs23:3 jan uca suma mank'añanacapa ancha munarakamti, jumarojj pantjayasquiristamwa." 
Proverbs23:4 Jan ch'amañchasimti kamiriptañataqui; ucjjat llaquisiñjja apanucum. 
Proverbs23:5 Kamir cancañajj mä juc'ataquiquiwa; mäquiraquiwa tucusjje, cunjämatejj pacajj chhekhanëjjasin mäqui thoktawayjjejja uqhama." 
Proverbs23:6 Jan kont'asimti mich'a jakempi mank'añataquejja, janirac suma mank'anacapsa munapayamti." 
Proverbs23:7 Jupajj jumataquejj mallk'amanjja mä t'awrar uñtatäniwa. Jupasti sätamwa: “Mank'asim, umasim” sasa, ucampis chuymapanjja jan walwa juma tokejj lup'iscani." 
Proverbs23:8 Ucatsti cuntï mank'cta ucjja wak'aksütawa, ucatjja suma arunacamajj inamayaquïniwa." 
Proverbs23:9 Jan amuyt'an jakerojj jan parlamti, ch'iqhi arunacamatjja jupajj sawcasïtamwa." 
Proverbs23:10 Jan onokeyamti nayra korpanacjja, janirac wajchanacan orakep catuntasimti;" 
Proverbs23:11 jupanacajj wali ch'amani khespiyirinïpjjewa; uca Tatituw jupanacat arjjatasisinjja jumatac sayt'ani. 
Proverbs23:12 Yatichäwi arunacjja sum chuymamar catokam, ucatsti uca arunacar jaysasaraqui sarnakam." 
Proverbs23:13 Wawar chekachañatejj waquischi ucajja, jan uqhamaqui pasayamti, jan ucasti mutuyam, mä kawkha asot'ejja janiw jiwaycaniti;" 
Proverbs23:14 wawarojj chekachäta ucajja, jiwañatwa khespiyascäta." 
Proverbs23:15 Munat wawajjay, jumatejj yatiñ cancaña jicjjatäta ucajja, nayajj wali cusisitäyäwa;" 
Proverbs23:16 jumatejj chekpuni parläta ucajja, nayajj walipuniw cusisëjja." 
Proverbs23:17 Jucharar jakenacat jan envidiasimti, jan ucasti Tatiturupuni ajjsaram;" 
Proverbs23:18 ucatsti tucuyamajj sumäniwa, suyt'äwimasa janiw t'unatäcaniti." 
Proverbs23:19 Wawajjay, sum ist'am, ucatsti yatekaraquim; suma thaquïqui ucpuni sarañ munam." 
Proverbs23:20 Machir jakenacampejj jan mayachasimti, janirac sinti mank'eri jakenacampisa." 
Proverbs23:21 Machirinacasa, sinti mank'erinacasa tucjasiñaruw puripjje, jayra jakenacasa isitsa thantharnucstataw sarnakapjje." 
Proverbs23:22 Ist'am jumar jathasir awquimaru; taycamajj chuymanëjjani ucqhajja jan jisc'achamti. 
Proverbs23:23 Alasim cheka cancaña, uqhamarac yatiñ cancañsa, ucatsti yatichäwimpi, amuyt'añampjja jan aljamti." 
Proverbs23:24 Awquejj waliw cusisi wawapan yatiñ cancañanïtapata cheka lurirïtapata, ucatwa jach'ar aptasi." 
Proverbs23:25 ¡Jumasti awquimarusa, taycamarusa cusisiyam, jach'ar aptayaraquim!" 
Proverbs23:26 Munat wawajjay, take chuymamampi yatichäwinacajja catokam, ucatsti uqhamar sarnakaraquim." 
Proverbs23:27 Jan wali sarnakeri warmejj, c'ullc'u wali mankhe phuch'ur uñtatawa, jan waliru puriyañataqui." 
Proverbs23:28 Uca warmejj lunthatjamawa suyjjatasa chachanacar catunti, ucatsti walja chachanacaruw chhakañar puriyi." 
Proverbs23:29 ¿Qhitisa t'akhesejja? ¿Qhitisa aykojja? ¿Qhitisa ch'ajjwañana, jachañansa sarnakejja? ¿Qhitisa jan juchata nuwatajja? ¿Qhitis nayras ch'ojjñantatajja?" 
Proverbs23:30 Qhititejja vino machañanacana sarnakasqui, uqhamarac yakha machañanacsa uñstayqui ucawa uqham t'akhesisquejja." 
Proverbs23:31 Vinomp machjasiñarojj jan uñtamti, ¡suma wilarascatapata, copana suma khantascatapatsa, uqhamarac suma koñaqui umt'añjamätapatsa!" 
Proverbs23:32 Ucampis tucuyarojja mä catarjamawa achjasina wali usuyasi; 
Proverbs23:33 ucatsti jan uñjañanacwa uñjayaractam, uqhamarac lup'iyaractam, jan parlañanaca parlayaractam." 
Proverbs23:34 Jach'a kota taypinccasmasa, jan ucajj mä jach'a lawa puntanccasmasa uqhamawa amuyasïtajja," 
Proverbs23:35 ucatsti sätawa: “Nuwapjjetuwa, ucatsti janiw usquituti; jawk'apjjetuwa, janiw amuyascti, ucampis iquit sartasinjja wastataw juc'amp vino thakeri sarä” sasa." 
Proverbs24:1 Jucharar jakenacatjja jan envidiasimti, janirac jupanacamp chica sarnakañsa munamti," 
Proverbs24:2 jupanacajj jan wali lurañanacatacwa lup'isipqui, ucatsti jan wali lurañanacatacwa parlapjjaraqui." 
Proverbs24:3 Yatiñ cancañampiwa utajj lurata, cimientonacapasa ch'iqhi cancañampiwa uchantataraqui." 
Proverbs24:4 Ucatjja uta mankherojja yatiñampiw phokhantataraqui, jila alani muncaña yänacampi." 
Proverbs24:5 Wali ch'aman jaket sipansa, yatiñan jakewa juc'amp jilanquejja; ch'amanïñata sipansa yatiñ cancañawa juc'amp luraspajja." 
Proverbs24:6 Wali suma amuyt'äwinacampiwa guerran nuwasiñajj waquisi, walja ewjjerinacampiwa atipjañajj utjaraqui." 
Proverbs24:7 Jan yatiñan jakejj tribunalanjja, janiw cun sañsa yatquiti, jupan yatiñ cancañapajj jayancatap laycu." 
Proverbs24:8 Jan walinacaqui lup'ir jakejj “Jan wali amtir jake” sasa sutichatäniwa. 
Proverbs24:9 Jan amuyt'an jakesti jucha lurañacwa munasqui; ¡jan yäkasir jakesti, uñisitawa jakenacanjja!" 
Proverbs24:10 T'akhesiña horasantejj mayjt'asïta ucapachajja, juc'a ch'amaniquiwa jicjjatasjjäta." 
Proverbs24:11 Jiwañataqui juchañchatäqui ucanacarojj khespiyam; khespiyam jan walt'añancqui ucanacarojja. 
Proverbs24:12 Jumajj sascamsa: “Janiw cunsa yatcäyätti” sasa, ucampis Tatitojj chuymamjja uñt'iwa, yatiraquiwa cunjämattejj khespiyascasamäna ucsa. Tatituwa sapa mayni jakenacarusa luratapatjama churi." 
Proverbs24:13 Munat wawajjay, misq'iy mank'am, ucan sumätap laycu; mallt'am, jumataquejj sumawa." 
Proverbs24:14 Uqhama misq'jamäniwa jumataquejja yatiñ cancañasa, uñt'añasa; jumatejj ucanac jicjjatäta ucajja, suma tucuyäwi jicjjatäta, ucatsti suyt'äwimajja janipuniw tucjatäcaniti." 
Proverbs24:15 Jucharar jake, jan amtamti asqui jake contra jan wali lurañanaca, janiraqui utaparusa jan walinacjja luramti;" 
Proverbs24:16 asqui jakejj pakallk cutis aynacht'canejja, cutjtascaquiniwa, ucampis jucharar jakejj jan walt'añapanjja k'alawa aynacht'ani." 
Proverbs24:17 Cunapachatejj uñisirimajj jan walt'cani, uqhamarac aynacht'cani ucqhajja, jan cusisimti, janirac fiestsa luramti." 
Proverbs24:18 Tatitutaquejj uqham luratamajja janiw sumäcaniti, ucatsti jupan colerapajj jupjjatjja saraktaniwa." 
Proverbs24:19 Jan colerasimti jucharar jakenac laycojja, janiraqui ñankha jakenacatjja envidiasimti." 
Proverbs24:20 Jucharar jakejj janiw suma tucuyäwi jicjjatcaniti; ¡jucharar jakejj mä lamparjamawa jiwt'awayjjani! 
Proverbs24:21 Munat wawajjay, Diosarusa, reyirusa ajjsaram; uñisirinacamampejj jan mayachasimti." 
Proverbs24:22 Jupanacan tucusiñapajj acatjamatwa purinini, ucatsti Diosampi, reyimpi mutuycani ucjja janiw qhitis yatquiti." 
Proverbs24:23 Acanacajj yatiñan jakenacan säwi arunacaparaquiwa: Tribunalanacanjja takenirusa chekaparu uñjatäñapawa waquisi. 
Proverbs24:24 Qhititejj juchan jakeru sani: “Janiw juchanïctati” sasa ucarojja, jakenacajj ñankhachaniwa, marcanacasa juparojj uñisiraquiniwa." 
Proverbs24:25 Ucampis qhitinacarutejj mutuyapcani ucanacajja cusisitaw jacapjjani, jakenacasa jupanacarojj bendiciraquini." 
Proverbs24:26 Qhititejj cheka suma arunac arsqui ucajja, lacatsa suma jamp'atcaspa uqhamawa." 
Proverbs24:27 Ankan negociomäqui ucjja tucuyam, pampan lurañanacamäqui ucjja luram, ucatwa utama lurasismajja." 
Proverbs24:28 Masim contrajj jan amanutjja testigota sayt'amti, janiraqui c'ari arunacjja khanañchamti." 
Proverbs24:29 Janipun cunapachas lup'imti: “Cunjämtï nayar lurquitojja, uqhamaracwa nayajj luraraquëjja” sasa." 
Proverbs24:30 Jayra jaken yapu jac'apwa pasawayta, pisi amuyt'an jaken uva yapup jac'a." 
Proverbs24:31 Ucatsti yapupwa uñjta ch'aphinacampi chhaktayata, kala uyupasa liju tucjataraqui." 
Proverbs24:32 Uqham uñjasinsti chuymajjanjja amthapistwa; uc uñjasinsti aca yatichäwi yatekta: 
Proverbs24:33 jumajj juc'ampis ict'ascactawa, amparanacamsa khomjjarusiscactawa sum iquiñataqui," 
Proverbs24:34 uccañcamasti pobrernucstañawa acatjamata catuntätam, mä muyuycu jakjama wali ch'amampi." 
Proverbs25:1 Acanacajj Salomonan säwi arunacaparaquiwa, ucsti Judá orakenquir Ezequías reyin sirviri jakenacapan kellkatänwa." 
Proverbs25:2 Diosan jach'a cancañapawa cunsa jamasar imantqui ucajja, ucatsti reyitaquejj uca imantata yatjjatañasti jach'a cancañaparaquiwa." 
Proverbs25:3 Ucampis janiw amuyt'añjamäquiti alajjpacha amstata, orak mankheta, uqhamarac reyin amtäwinacapatsa." 
Proverbs25:4 Kollkena k'añupjja apakam, ucatsti kollket lurirejja mä copwa lurani;" 
Proverbs25:5 reyiru sirvir jucharar jakjja apakam, ucatsti tronopajja cheka cancañanwa sayt'awayani." 
Proverbs25:6 Reyin nayrakatapana jan jach'a jach'a tucumti, janirac jilïri jaken konuñaparus kont'asimti;" 
Proverbs25:7 jilïrinacan p'enkachatäñata sipansa juc'amp asquiwa: “Acqhar kont'asim” satäñajja. 
Proverbs25:8 Cuntï nayramampi uñjcäta ucjja jan mäqui tribunalaru yatiyiri saramti, yakha testigo jakesti yakharacwa khanañcharaquispa uca laycu, ucatsti jumajj tucuyarojj janiw camachcasmasa." 
Proverbs25:9 Qhititejj juchañchcätam ucatjja sayt'asim, ucampis yakha jaken jamasa luräwipjja jan khansuyamti;" 
Proverbs25:10 yakha jakejj jumar ist'asinjja p'enkachayiristamwa, ucatsti jumar jan walita uñt'apquiristam ucasti jan asquichcayäspawa." 
Proverbs25:11 Mä suma arojja horasana arsutajja, kori manzanajj kollker q'iñintatäquejja uqhamawa." 
Proverbs25:12 Suma korita lurata anilloru, uqhamarac collarar uñtatjamaraquiwa, qhititejj suma yatiñampi chekachäwi arunaca catokasqui ucataquejja." 
Proverbs25:13 Cunjämatï yapu apthapi horasanjja junt'un irnakerirojja qhunu thayajj thayart'ayejja, uqhamawa suma phoker sirvirejja utanipar cusisiyi." 
Proverbs25:14 Jan cuna churcasa: “Nayajj churtwa” sasa jach'achasiri jakejj; mä thayjamawa thayi, jan uman kenayar uñtatjamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs25:15 Llamp'u chuymanïñajja coleratarojj sumaptayiwa; suma arunacasti colerat arsüwinacarojj p'aquintiwa. 
Proverbs25:16 Misq'i jicjjatäta ucajj, jan jilañchjasa mank'amti. Jilañchjasa mank'äta ucasti wak'akjasïtawa." 
Proverbs25:17 Amigoman utaparojj jan ancha visitir saramti, jumampi amjayasjjasinjja, uñisjjaquiristamwa." 
Proverbs25:18 Qhititejj amigop contra parlqui ucan c'ari arunacapajja, c'uphañar uñtata, espadar uñtata, wali arini flechjamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs25:19 T'akhesiña horasana mä jan wali lurir jaker alcatañajja, p'acjata cayunis sarnakcsna uqhamawa, jan ucajj p'iya laca ch'aqhampis mank'csna uqhamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs25:20 Llaquit jaker cantjjayañajj, vinagrempi iñawtatata janchiru warjjatcsnasa uqhamawa, jan ucajj wali thayansa isi apsuscsnajja uqhamaraquiwa." 
Proverbs25:21 Uñisirimatejj mank'at awtjayaschi ucajja, mank'añ churam; umat pharjayaschi ucajja, umsa churaraquim;" 
Proverbs25:22 uqham lurasinsti llacthapisiyätawa, p'enkasiyaraquïtawa, ucatsti Tatituw jumarojj cutiyjjätam." 
Proverbs25:23 Cunjämatejj amsta toketa thayajj jallu jutayquejja, uqhamaraquiw jan wali arunacajj colerañanacjja apani." 
Proverbs25:24 Juc'amp asquiwa mä c'uchuna jacañajja, suma jach'a utana tokesir warmimpi jacañat sipana." 
Proverbs25:25 Cunjämatejj umat pharjat jaketaquejj thaya umajj sumäquejja, uqhamaraquiw jakerojj cusisiyi jaya toket catokata suma yatiyäwinacajja." 
Proverbs25:26 Cunjämatï jalsur umajj jani konchüquisa, ni k'añuchatäcaraquisa, uqhamaw asqui jakejja, jucharar jaken nayrakatapanjja qhathati." 
Proverbs25:27 Walja misq'i mank'añajja janiw walïquiti, ucampis wali asquiraquiwa, cunatï ch'amäqui uca yatjjatañajja." 
Proverbs25:28 Cunjämatï mä marcajj jan perkanïcasina jan walt'añancquejja, uqhamawa qhititejj jupa pachpa jan suma sarnakañ yatqui ucajja." 
Proverbs26:1 Cunjämatejj yapu apthapi horasan qhunusa, jallusa jan munascjjetejja, uqhamaw jan amuyt'an jaken jach'ar aptatäñapajj jan waquisquiti." 
Proverbs26:2 Cunjämatejj chhakat jamach'isa, jan ucajj golondrina sat jamach'isa laka tokena maysar maysar jan tapani jalnakasquejja, uqhamawa maldicionajj ina ch'usatjja janiw wact'caraquispati." 
Proverbs26:3 Caballorojj ajjaptayañawa, asnorojj jaquimampiwa irpnakaña, jan amuyt'an jakesti jawk'jasaraquiw chekachañajja." 
Proverbs26:4 Jan amuyt'an jakerojj jan arjjayamti, jupjama jan tucuñamataqui." 
Proverbs26:5 Jan amuyt'an jakerojja jupatacjam arunacampi cutt'ayam, jan jupan amuyaparjama yatir tucuñapataqui." 
Proverbs26:6 Jan amuyt'an jaker ewjja arunaca apayañajj, cayu apakasisina, jan walt'añanacsa thakascsna uqhamawa." 
Proverbs26:7 Cunjämatï cojo jakejj jan jayar sarirjamäquejja, uqhamaraquiw jan amuyt'an jaken säwi arunacapajja." 
Proverbs26:8 Cunjämatï maynejj k'orawaru kalamp chincatcaspa k'orawt'añataqui, uqhamaraquiw jan amuyt'an jaker jach'ar aptañajja." 
Proverbs26:9 Cunjämatï machat jakejj ch'aphin ch'aphintatajja jan usuyasquejja, uqhamawa jan amuyt'an jakejja parlatajja jan amuyt'quiti." 
Proverbs26:10 Cunjämatï flecht'iri jakejj flechanacapampi flecht'asa take saririnacaru usuchjejja, ucar uñtataraquiw jan amuyt'an jakeru irnakañ churañajja." 
Proverbs26:11 Cunjämatï mä anojj wak'aksutaparu cuttasejja, uqhamawa jan amuyt'an jakejj jan wali luräwinacaparu cuttasiraqui." 
Proverbs26:12 Yakhep jakejj wali yatiñanïcaspasa uqhamaw tucu, ucampis jan amuyt'an jakewa jupat sipana chekachasispa." 
Proverbs26:13 Jayra jakejj jan irnakañ munasinjja, cunaymanampiw tuwakasi, aqham sasa: “Callenjja mä leonaw utji, nayarojj mank'antitaspawa” sasa." 
Proverbs26:14 Cunjämatï mä puncojj bisagrapana ucsar acsar onjjtasquejja, uqhamawa jayra jakejj iquiñapana maysar maysar korumquiptasqui." 
Proverbs26:15 Jayra jakejj amparapamp plator lokantcasinsa, jayrasiwa lacapar mank'a apcatasiñjja." 
Proverbs26:16 Pakallk jakenacajj suma aruscataña yatipqui ucanacat sipansa, jayra jakejj wali yatiñanïcaspasa uqhamawa amuyasi." 
Proverbs26:17 Qhititejj mayninacan ch'ajjwañanacapar mantasin ch'ajjwasqui ucajja, mä anurusa jinchunacapata catthapcaspa uqhamawa." 
Proverbs26:18 Cunjämatï mä lokhe jakejj ninani flechanaca flecht'asquejja," 
Proverbs26:19 uqhamawa amigopar sallkjir jakejja, ucatsti saraquiwa: “Alekaw sawct'asiscsma” sasa." 
Proverbs26:20 Jan lawampejj ninajj jiwarjjaquiwa; arunaca apnakeritejj jan utjqui ucqhajja ch'ajjwanacajja tucusjjewa. 
Proverbs26:21 Nina sanc'ayañataquejj q'illimiwa munasi; nina naqhayañataquisti lawaraquiw munasi; ch'ajjwanaca utjañapataquisti arunac apnakeri jakew munasi. 
Proverbs26:22 Arunaca apnakañajj jaketaquejj mojjsjamawa, ucampis chuyma mankhekamawa purt'i." 
Proverbs26:23 Cunjämatï ñek'e phuqhu patjjaru kollkempi apaquipatäcaspajja, uqhamawa jan wali amtampi suma arunacajja." 
Proverbs26:24 Uñisir jakejj parlqui ucqhajja imt'iwa, ucampis chuymap mankhenjja jan wali lurañanacwa amtasqui." 
Proverbs26:25 Suma koña arunacampi parlätam ucqhasti, jan iyawsamti chuymapan jan wali lurañanacampi phokt'atätap laycu." 
Proverbs26:26 Jupasti uñisiñapa imt'añsa muncani ucasa, ñankha luräwipajja takeninsa uñjcañawa khanstani." 
Proverbs26:27 Qhititejj mä p'iya allini ucajja, uca pachparuwa jalantani; qhititejj mä jach'a kala korumt'aycani ucajja, uca pachpa kalawa jupjjaru jaljjattani." 
Proverbs26:28 C'ari jakejj chekarojj uñisiwa; koña sallka aruni jakesti jan walt'añanacwa sartayi. 
Proverbs27:1 Kharürutjja jan jach'a jach'a tuccamti; janiw yatctati kharürojj cunatejj pascani ucjja. 
Proverbs27:2 Janiw asquïquiti juma pachpa jach'achasiñamajja, jan ucasti mayninacan jach'añchatäña munam." 
Proverbs27:3 Kalasa, ch'allasa jathiwa, ucampis jan amuyt'an jaken colerasitapajj ucanacat sipansa juc'amp jathiwa." 
Proverbs27:4 Colerasiñajj jan wali tucjiriwa, ucampis envidiasiñajja ucat sipansa juc'amp jan waliwa." 
Proverbs27:5 Juc'amp asquiwa khana chuymampi maynir chekachañajja, jamasataqui munañat sipansa." 
Proverbs27:6 Uñisirin jamp'att'atanacapat sipansa, juc'am asquiwa chojjriñchjasiri amigopar alcatañajja." 
Proverbs27:7 Mank'at jan awtjatäqui ucataquejj, misq'isa janiw sumäcjjeti, ucampis qhititï mank'at awtjatäqui ucataquisti, cuna jarusa mojjsaquiwa." 
Proverbs27:8 Cunjämatï mä jamach'ejj tapapata jayana sarnakejja, uqhamawa qhititï nacïwipat jayana sarnakqui ucajja." 
Proverbs27:9 K'apquir perfumenacajja jaken chuymaparuw cusisiyi; ewjja arunacasti jaken jacäwiparuw cusisiyi. 
Proverbs27:10 Amigonacamarojj jan apanucumti, janirac awquiman amigonacaparusa. Jilaman utaparusti janipuniwa jan walt'añanacamata parlirejja sarätati. Jayanquiri jilatat sipansa, uta jac'anquiri jake masiwa juc'amp asquejja." 
Proverbs27:11 Munat wawajjay, yatiñanïmaya, nayarojj cusisiyitätawa; uqhamatwa arsusëjja nayar toker jakenacarusa." 
Proverbs27:12 Ch'iqhi jakejj jan walt'aña uñjasinjja jaltjjewa; jan amuyt'asiri jakesti mantascaquiwa, ucatsti t'akhesiwa." 
Proverbs27:13 Qhititï jan uñt'ata jaketa garantiata sayt'qui ucatjja, isipa apakam, ucatjja prendat catjjäsim." 
Proverbs27:14 Qhititejj amigopar willjtata jach'at aruntqui ucajja, amigopataquejja tokenokcaspasa ucamp sasiwa." 
Proverbs27:15 Cunjämatejj jallupachanjja jan sayt'asa umajj ch'akanejja, uqhamar uñtatawa cunatsa colerir warmejja." 
Proverbs27:16 Cunjämatejj thayajj jan catthapiñjamäquejja, janirac aceites amparar catjjäsiñjamäquejja, uqhamawa uca warmejj jan jarc'añjamäquiti." 
Proverbs27:17 Cunjämatejj hierrojja yakha hierrompi lek'jasa ariptayatajja, uqhamaraquiw jakejj jake masipampi suma amuyt'ayataraqui." 
Proverbs27:18 Qhititejj higo yapu sum uñjqui ucajja, achupatjja mank'asiwa; qhititejj uywiripan yänacapa sum uñjqui ucajja, jach'achatawa." 
Proverbs27:19 Cunjämatejj jakejj umar uñjjatasina ajanupa uñjasquejja, uqhamaraquiw jakenacajja chuymanacapjja uñt'asipjjaraqui." 
Proverbs27:20 Janipuniw cunapachas sisthapipquiti jiwasa, amay imäwisa, jakesa maynin yänacap munapayasinjja." 
Proverbs27:21 Korirusa, kollkerusa ninaw yant'i; uqhamaraquiw jakerojj yant'araqui jach'ar aptatäñampi." 
Proverbs27:22 Jan amuyt'an jakerojj wastata wastatsa lek'jascam, janipuniw jan wali lurañanacapjja apakcasmati." 
Proverbs27:23 Ovejanacamjja suma uñjasim, ovej tamanacamatjja llaquisipunim," 
Proverbs27:24 kamir cancañasa, reyïñasa janiw wiñayäquiti." 
Proverbs27:25 Cunapachatï pastonacasa, ch'ojjñatatcani ucqhawa, jumajj uywamataqui kolluta alinacjja apthapisïta," 
Proverbs27:26 ucatsti ovejanacamatjja t'awra catokäta isi lurasiñamataqui, cabritonacatsti kollkwa catokaraquïta orakenaca alasiñamataqui," 
Proverbs27:27 kachu cabritonacatjja jilarquiri lechwa catokaraquïta, jumasa, familiamasa, uywatanacamasa mank'apjjañamataqui." 
Proverbs28:1 Ñankha lurir jakejja jan qhitin arcnakcataw jaltjje, ucampis asqui jakenacajja janiw cunarus ajjsarquiti, mä leonjamawa ch'aman sayt'asi." 
Proverbs28:2 Cunapachatejj mä marcan jan walt'añanacajj utji ucqhajja, apnakerinacapajja waljaw jakortapjje, ucampis suma yatiñampi apnakerejj yatiwa sum apnakaña." 
Proverbs28:3 Cunjämatejj sinti purir jallojj cosechanaca tucjquejja, uqhamawa pobrenacaru t'akhesiyiri jucharar jakejja." 
Proverbs28:4 Leyi contra sayt'irinacajj, jucharar jakeruw jach'achi; ley phokherinacasti, jucharar jake contraraquiwa." 
Proverbs28:5 Jucharar jakenacajj janiw amuyt'apquiti cheka cancañatjja, ucampis qhitinacatejj Tatitur thaktapqui ucanacaw take cun amuyt'apjje." 
Proverbs28:6 Sallkjasiri kamir jaquïñat sipansa, juc'amp asquiwa pobrëscaña, uqhamarac cheka lurirïñasa." 
Proverbs28:7 Qhititejj Diosan leyip phokqui ucajja, ch'iqhi wawawa, ucampis sinti mank'er jakenacampi chicachasiri wawasti, awquiparojj p'enkachayiwa." 
Proverbs28:8 Qhititejj kamir cancañapa waljaptayqui jila interesanaca apsusa ucajja, qhititejj pobre jakenacata qhuyapayasqui, ucaw kamir cancañapjja waljaptayasi." 
Proverbs28:9 Qhititejj Diosan leyiparu jan ist'añ muncani ucarojja, Diosajj janiw mayisitapjja ist'caraquiniti." 
Proverbs28:10 Qhititejj asqui jakenacaru jan wali thaquinjama irpani ucajja, jupa pachpan sipita waquichataparuwa jalantascani, ucampis jan juchan jakenacajj cunatejj asquïqui ucwa catokapjjani." 
Proverbs28:11 Kamir jakejj wali yatiñaniwa tucu; ch'iqhi pobre jakesti juparojj yant'aspawa. 
Proverbs28:12 Cunapachatejj asqui jakenacajj atipjapqui ucqhajja, jakenacajj cusisipjjewa; cunapachatejj jucharar jakenacajj atipjapqui ucqhasti, jakenacajj sustjasiñatjja imantasjjapjjewa." 
Proverbs28:13 Qhititejj juchap imantascani ucajja, janiw nayrar sarcaniti, ucampis qhititejj juchap arsusisina jaytanucjjani, ucasti perdonatäjjaniwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Cusisiñaniwa Tatiturupuni ajjsartiri jakejja, ucampis chuyma kalarayasiri jakejj jan walt'añaruwa purini." 
Proverbs28:15 Mä jan wali apnaker khoru jilïrejj, wararir leonjamawa, jan ucajj mank'at awtjat osor uñtatawa pobre jakenacar t'akhesiyas apnake." 
Proverbs28:16 Jan amuyt'an marca apnakerejj juc'ampiw jakenacar t'akhesiyi, ucampis qhititejj jan munapayirïqui ucajja, jaya maranacaw jacani." 
Proverbs28:17 Qhititejj jake jiwaycani ucajja, jiwañcamaw imantasiñatac jalnakascani. ¡Uca jakerojj jan qhitis jarc'panti!" 
Proverbs28:18 Cheka lurir jakejj jan walt'añatjja khespiyatäniwa, ucampis ñankha jakejja jan walt'añaruwa purini." 
Proverbs28:19 Qhititejj orakepana yapu yapuchqui ucanjja, jilarquiriwa mank'añapajja; qhititejj jayrasiñana sarnakasqui ucajja, pobre sarnakañaquiw jilaranejja." 
Proverbs28:20 Cheka lurir jakejj jach'añchatäniwa; qhititejj sallkjañampi mäqui kamiriptqui ucajja, juchañchatäniwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Janiw jake masi ajlliñajj walïquiti, uqhamatwa mä juc'a mank'a laycusa juchar puriñajj utji." 
Proverbs28:22 Inampst'iri jakejj mäquiwa kamiriptañ muni, ucampis jupajj janiw yatquiti pobres cancaña jupjjaru jutañapjja." 
Proverbs28:23 Jach'añchiri jaket sipana, c'umisiri jakew khepjjarojj munatäni." 
Proverbs28:24 Jake jiwayirin amigopawa awquiparu taycaparu lunthatejja; jupasti saraquiwa: “Janiw awquir taycar lunthatañajj juchäquiti” sasa. 
Proverbs28:25 Qhititejj juc'ampi munqui ucajja, nuwasiñanacwa utjayi, ucampis qhititejj Tatitur iyawsqui ucawa nayrar sarti." 
Proverbs28:26 Jan amuyt'an jakewa, jupa pachpan amuyt'aparu alcatasqui ucajja, ucampis qhititejj yatiñ cancañampi cunsa lurqui ucawa khespiyatäni." 
Proverbs28:27 Pobreru yanapt'irinsti, janiw cunapas pist'caniti, ucampis qhititejj pobreru jan yanapt'añ muncani ucajja, wali maldecitäniwa." 
Proverbs28:28 Cunapachatejj ñankha lurir jakenacajj atipjapqui ucqhajja, jakenacajja imantasjjapjjewa; cunapachatejj uca jan wali jakenacajj tucusipqui ucqhasti, asqui jakenacajj juc'ampiw utji." 
Proverbs29:1 Qhititejj chekachatajj jan ist'asiñ munqui ucajja, mäquiwa tucjatäni jan mayampitaqui." 
Proverbs29:2 Cunapachatejj asqui jakenacajj jiljjatapqui ucqhajj, jakenacajj cusisipjjewa; cunapachatejj khoru jakenacajj jilïrit apnakapqui ucqhasti, jakenacajj waliw t'akhesipjje." 
Proverbs29:3 Yatiñan wawajj awquiparojj cusisiyiwa; qhititejj jan wali sarnaker warminacampi sarnakqui ucasti, kollkepwa tucjasi." 
Proverbs29:4 Cheka cancañampi apnaker reyejj, marcarojj thuruñchiwa, ucampis sinti jila impuesto apsurejj tucjiwa." 
Proverbs29:5 Qhititejj amigopar sinti jach'achqui ucajja, chekpachansa amigopan jan walt'añapataquiw sipita uchasqui." 
Proverbs29:6 Ñankha lurir jaken sipitapajja, jupan pachpa jucha luratapawa, ucampis cheka lurir jakesti cusisitaw c'uchiqui jacasi." 
Proverbs29:7 Asqui jakesti pobren sarnakäwinacapatjja llaquisiwa, ucampis ñankha lurir jaketaquejja janiw ucajj cunäquisa." 
Proverbs29:8 Ojjoñanacan sarnaker jakenacasti marcarojj ch'ajjwanacwa apti, ucampis yatiñan jakenacajj marcarojj sumancañwa utjayi." 
Proverbs29:9 Janiw walïquiti mä yatiñan jakena jan amuyt'an jakempi ch'ajjwañapajja; jan amuyt'ani jakejj colerasiwa, sawcasiraquiwa, ucatsti janiw cuna ascsa jupampejj apscaniti." 
Proverbs29:10 Jake jiwayir jakenacajj asqui jakenacarojj uñisipjjewa, ucampis asqui jakenacajj thakapjjewa cunjämata jupanacampi sumancañsa." 
Proverbs29:11 Jan amuyt'an jakejj mäquiwa cunatsa colerasi, ucampis yatiñan jakejja colerasiñapjja mäquiwa apanucu." 
Proverbs29:12 Mä jilïritejj c'ari arunacar ist'añ yatinejja, sirvirinacapajja jan walicamaquëjjaniwa." 
Proverbs29:13 T'akhesiyata jakerusa, t'akhesiyir jakerusa, Tatituwa panpachaniru nayra churi." 
Proverbs29:14 Suma cancañampi pobrenacar apnaker reyin tronopajj wiñayataquïniwa. 
Proverbs29:15 Jawk'ampi tokempiw yatekañajja utji. ucampis munañapampi sarnakeri wawasti taycaparojj p'enkachayiwa. 
Proverbs29:16 Ñankha lurir jakenacan walja utjatap laycusti, walja jucha lurañanacaw utjaraqui, ucampis cheka asqui jakenacajj ucanacan aynacht'apjjatanacapjja uñjapjjaniwa." 
Proverbs29:17 Wawamarojj chekacham, ucatsti samarataw jacayätam, walirac cusisiyaraquïtam." 
Proverbs29:18 Cawqhantejj Diosan arunacapajj jan yatichasqui ucqhanjja, jakenacajja munañaparuwa sarnake; ¡cusisiñaniwa Diosan leyipa phokher marcajja!" 
Proverbs29:19 Mä esclavorojj janiw arumpiqui chekachañjamäquiti, jupajj amuyasquiwa, ucampis janiw lurañ munquiti." 
Proverbs29:20 Jan amuyt'asis mäqui parlir jaket sipansa, mä jan yatiñan jakewa suma parlaspajja." 
Proverbs29:21 Qhititejj mä sirviriru wawatpacha sinti munata uywani ucajja, kheparojj amtasiniwa." 
Proverbs29:22 Qhititejj mäqui cunatsa colerasqui ucajja, nuwasiñanacwa utjayi, waljanacan pantjasiraqui." 
Proverbs29:23 Jach'a jach'a tucuñajj jakerojj jisc'aruw tucuyi, ucampis jisc'aru tucuñawa jach'ar aptatäñjja utjayi." 
Proverbs29:24 Lunthataru yanapirejj jupa pachpaw uñisisi; lunthatjjat khanañchirinaca ist'casinsa jupajj janiw arsquiti. 
Proverbs29:25 Jakenacar ajjsarañajj sipitar uñtatawa, ucampis qhititejj Tatitur iyawsqui ucawa imatäni." 
Proverbs29:26 Waljaniw jilïrin chekapar uñjañapa thakapjje, ucampis Tatituquiwa chekapar uñjirejja." 
Proverbs29:27 Cheka lurir jakenacajja uñisiwa jan wali jakenacarojja; ñankha lurir jakenacasti cheka lurir jakenacarojj uñisiraquiwa. 
Proverbs30:1 Acanacajj Masa chekanquir Jaqué sat chachan Agur yokapan säwi arunacapawa. Agur chachasti parlänwa Itiel, uqhamarac Ucal sisqui uca chachanacaru, aqham arunaca:" 
Proverbs30:2 Jakenac taypinjja jan yatiñan jakëtwa, janiw nayanjja jakjama amuyt'asiñajjajja utjquiti." 
Proverbs30:3 Janiw nayajj yatiñ cancaña jicjjatcti; janiraquiw Diosan yatiñapatsa yatcti. 
Proverbs30:4 ¿Qhitis alajjpacharu maqhati, sarakanisa? ¿Qhitis thayarojj amparapar k'apjjäsispajja? ¿Qhitis lamar kotarojj isipampi llawuntaspajja? ¿Qhitis oraken korpanacapjja utt'ayejja? ¿Jumajj yattati jupan sutipjja, uqhamarac wawapan sutipsa?" 
Proverbs30:5 Tatitojj jupar iyawsirinacarojj imiwa; jupan arsutanacapasti chekapawa. 
Proverbs30:6 Jan cunsa arunacaparojj yapjjatamti, jan ucasti jumarojj tokeristamwa, ucatsti c'arita uñt'ataraquïsmawa." 
Proverbs30:7 Dios Tata, nayajj pä luräwinacaqui maysma; ucanacsti janïra naya jiwquipanaya churita." 
Proverbs30:8 Nayatjja jithektayita ch'ojjña lurañampita, c'arisiñampita, janiraqui uywistati kamirsa, jan cunansa, jan ucasti cunatejj jacañajjataqui mank'añajj waquisqui ucac churita." 
Proverbs30:9 Nayajj kamirëjjerista ucajja inas jumatjja armasjjerista: “¿Qhitirac Diosasti?” sasa; pobrërista ucasti inas lunthatasjjerista, uqhamat kollan sutimwa nayajj p'enkachayirista." 
Proverbs30:10 Jan sirviritjja jan wali arunaca parlamti patronapa nayrakatanjja, jupasti ñankhachiristamwa, ucatsti jumajj mutuñ catokasma." 
Proverbs30:11 Yakhep jakenacajj awquiparojj ñankhachapjjewa; janiraquiw taycaparus bendisipquiti. 
Proverbs30:12 Yakhep jakenacajj amuyasipjjewa k'omäpcaspasa uqhama, ucampis janiw juchanacapatjja k'omachasipquiti." 
Proverbs30:13 Yakhep jakenacajj jach'a jach'aw tucupjje, ucatsti mayninacarojj jisc'achañampiw uñjapjje." 
Proverbs30:14 Yakhep jakenacajj khorüpjjewa, lacanacapasti espada uqhamarac cuchillor uñtatawa, marcanquir pobre jakenacar tucjañataqui." 
Proverbs30:15 Sanguijuela sat animalajj pä kalluniwa, ucanacasti mayiñacwa yatipjje. Utjaraquiwa quimsa uqhamarus pusiraqui, ucanacasti janipuniw sisthapipquiti:" 
Proverbs30:16 amay imäwi, jan wawachasir warmi, jan uman orake, jan sisthapiri nina." 
Proverbs30:17 Qhititejj awquiparu jisc'achqui, uqhamarac chuyman taycapatsa sawcasqui ucajja, waquisiwa cuervo sat jamach'impi jupan nayranacapajj apsutäñapa, janchipas siwek'aranacan mank'antatäñapa." 
Proverbs30:18 Quimsaw, uqhamarus pusicamawa, nayataquejj wali muspharcañanaca, uqhamarac jan amuyt'cayaraqui:" 
Proverbs30:19 pacan alto chekan tuynakatapa, asiruna karka patan sarnakatapa, mä barcona jach'a kotana saratapa, mä chachajj warmimpi sarnakataparaqui." 
Proverbs30:20 Jan wali sarnakeri warmin luratapajja aqhamawa: Jupajj jucha luratapjja imt'asiwa, ucatsti “Janiw cuna ñankhsa lurcti” saraquiwa." 
Proverbs30:21 Quimsa casta jakenacawa utjapjje, uqhamarus pusicama, jupanacajj jan walinac lurapjje mä marcarus qhatatiyapjjewa:" 
Proverbs30:22 mä uywatana reyïñaru puritapa, jan yatiñan jaken jilarquiri mank'añanïtapa," 
Proverbs30:23 jisc'achat warmin casarasitapa, uqhamarac mä uywata warmin warmi lanti kheparjjatapa." 
Proverbs30:24 Aca orakenjja pusi jisc'a animalanacaw utji, ucanacasti yatiñan jakenacat sipansa juc'amp yatiñanïpjjewa:" 
Proverbs30:25 q'isirmitanaca, ucanacasti jan ch'amani waljäpjjewa, jupanacasti yapu apthapi horasawa mank'añjja apcatasipjje;" 
Proverbs30:26 wanc'unaca, ucanacasti janiw waljanïpquiti, jupanacasti karka taypinacanwa jacapjjaraqui;" 
Proverbs30:27 t'ijut'ijunaca, ucanacasti jan reyinïcasinsa, tam tamawa sarantañ yatipjje;" 
Proverbs30:28 jararanqhunaca, ucarusti amparampejj catthapiñjamaquiwa, ucampis uca jararanqhojja reyin palaciopcamaw puri." 
Proverbs30:29 Quimsa jan ajjsaririnacaw utji, uqhamarus pusicama munañan cancañamp sartiriraqui:" 
Proverbs30:30 leonajj, wali ajjsarcañawa, janiraquiw jupajj qhititsa, cunäquipansa jaltañ yatquiti;" 
Proverbs30:31 jach'a jach'a tucur gallo, orko cabrito, uqhamarac ejercitopan nayrakatapa sarir reyi." 
Proverbs30:32 Jumatejj jan sum amuyt'asisa jach'a jach'a tucsta, uqhamarac jan walinacsa amtsta ucajja, acanac lup'iñaru uchasim:" 
Proverbs30:33 leche jirüta ucajja, mantequillaw misturapjjätam; nasamata wali ch'amamp khejjsüta ucajja, wilaquiwa mistjjani; maynirutejj colerayäta ucajja, nuwasiñaruwa mantäta." 
Proverbs31:1 Acanacajj Masa sat chekanquiri Lemuel sat reyin säwi arunacapawa; uca arunacampiraquiw taycapajj jupar yatichawayäna: 
Proverbs31:2 “Nayat yuriri munat wawajjay, Diosan churat wawajjay, ¿cunampirac jichhasti säma?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ch'amamjja warminacaru jan tucjasimti; warminacampi sarnakañawa reyinacarojj tucji. 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuel, janiraquiw walïquiti reyinacasa, jilïrinacasa machjasiña vinonacampi machañapajja," 
Proverbs31:5 uqham machasin ewjja arunacjja armasipjjaspa, ucatsti llaquitanacaru chekapar uñjañäqui ucsti janiw chekapar uñjcjjapjjaspati." 
Proverbs31:6 “Machañanacjja apanucum, aynacht'atanacataqui, llaquitanacataqui." 
Proverbs31:7 Jupanacasti machasinjja armasipjjaniwa pobres cancañapata, uqhamarac t'akhesiñanacapatsa." 
Proverbs31:8 Arjjatam qhitinacatejj jan arsusirjamäpqui ucanacata; ¡arjjatam jan jarc'akasirinacaru! 
Proverbs31:9 Arjjatam, ucatsti chekapar uñjam; ¡pobre jakenacaru arjjatam, uqhamarac llamp'u chuymaninacarusa!" 
Proverbs31:10 “Suma warmejj janiw jicjjatañjamäquiti; ¡jupajj suma c'ajquir kalanacat sipansa juc'amp valoranïtap laycu! 
Proverbs31:11 Chachapajj juparojj takpach chuymaw catuyasi; jupasti janipuniw cunapachas pist'añanacan sarnakquiti. 
Proverbs31:12 Jupasti chachaparojj yanapiwa suma asquinac lurasa, take jacäwipa urunacana." 
Proverbs31:13 Jupajj t'awra, lino ucanac thakeriw sari, ucatsti cusisiñampiwa amparamp lurañanacjja luri." 
Proverbs31:14 Jupajj mank'anac apanir barcor uñtatawa; mank'añanacjja wali jayata utapar apani. 
Proverbs31:15 Ucatsti wali alwata sartasisinaracwa wawanacaparojj mank'a churi, uqhamarac uywatanacaparusa." 
Proverbs31:16 Oraksti suma uñjasinwa alasi, ucatsti jicjjatatanacapampiwa uvas alinacjja ayrusi." 
Proverbs31:17 Jupajj ch'amañchasiwa, ucatsti take chuymampiwa irnakañatac waquichasi." 
Proverbs31:18 Jupajj aljasiñanacapjja sumaruwa sarayi, arumcamawa irnake, janiw ch'am jiwt'ayasquiti." 
Proverbs31:19 Amparapampiwa t'awra kapu, sawuraqui." 
Proverbs31:20 Pobrenacarusa, uqhamarac pist'ayasiñan jicjjatasqui ucanacarusa qhuyapt'ayasipuniraquiwa." 
Proverbs31:21 Janiw familiapatjja llaquiscaraquiti, cunapachatï qhununti ucqhajja, familiapan suma thuru isinacampi isthapita sarnakapjjatap laycu." 
Proverbs31:22 Jupa pachpawa iquïñanacjja sawusiraqui, ucatsti suma telat lurat isinacampiw isisiraqui." 
Proverbs31:23 Chachapasti marcanjja suma uñt'atawa, marcana wali aytata jilïri chachanac taypinquirïtap laycu." 
Proverbs31:24 Jupajj isinaca, wac'anaca lurasinjja, alirinacaruwa alji." 
Proverbs31:25 Jupajj ch'amañchasiwa, asquin sarnakañampi, ucatsti janiw ajjsarquiti jutir jan walt'añ urunacarojja." 
Proverbs31:26 Jupajj yatiñampiwa parli, ucatsti munasiñampiw yaticharaqui." 
Proverbs31:27 Ucatsti jupajj sumwa uñjasiraqui utapajj cunjamäsquisa ucjja, janipuniw ina ch'usata jicjjatata mank'jja mank'quiti." 
Proverbs31:28 Wawanacapasa, chachapasa juparojj jach'añchapjjewa, aqham sasa:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Walja suma warminacaw utjapjje, ucampis jumajj take uca warminacat sipansa juc'amp sumätawa” sasa." 
Proverbs31:30 C'ariquiwa suma uñnakani warmejja, jiwaquïñasa inamayaquiwa, ucampis Tatitur ajjsariri warmiwa jach'ar aptatajja." 
Proverbs31:31 ¡Take jakenac nayrakatana juparojj jach'añchapjjam! ¡Take luratanacaparu jach'añchapjjaraquim! 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Acanacawa Davidan yokapa yatiyirina arsutanacapajja, jupasti Jerusalenan reyipänwa: “¡Inamayaquiwa, inamayaquiwa! ¡Take cunas inamayaquiwa!”" 
Ecclesiastes1:2  
Ecclesiastes1:3 Aca oraken wali irnakasinjja, ¿cuna ascsa jakesti jicjjati?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mayninacajj nacipjjewa, mayninacasti jiwapjjaraquiwa, ucampis orakejj janipuniw mayjt'quiti." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Intejj jalsuniwa, jalantjjaraquiwa, janc'aquiw cawqhanccäntejj ucqharu cutt'jjaraqui ¡wastata jalsuniñataqui!" 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Thayajj aynach tokeruw thayt'ani, ucatsti amsta tokeruw muyjtaraqui. ¡Thayajj muytas muytasaw sari! ¡Thayajj muytaniwa, ucatsti wastata muyjtascaquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Take jawiranacaw jach'a lamar kotarcama sarapjje, ucampis lamar kotajj janipuniw phokharquiti; jawiranacasti kallta sartäwiparuwa cutt'ani, wastatampi uca pachpa jawiranac jalañataqui." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Take acanacampi wali amjasjjatapatjja janiw qhitis ch'amanjamäquiti arsusiñataqui; janiw qhitis sisthapquiti uñjañanjja, janiraquiw ist'añansa, uqhamata phokt'ata cusisiñapataqui." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Cunatejj nayrajj utjcänjja ucaquipunïniwa, cunatejj nayrajj lurascänjja ucaquiw lurasini. ¡Aca orakenjja janiw cunas machakatjj utjquiti!" 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Utjapuniwa qhitisa aqham siri: “¡Acapï jan uñjatäqui ucajja!” sasa. Ucampisa ucajj utjapunïnwa patac maranaca jiwasatsa nayra. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Pasjje uca yänacajja armatäjjewa, uqhamaraquiw jutiri yänacasa armatäjjani, cunanacatejj jutir urunacana ucjjar jutcani ucanac taypina." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Naya yatiyiristi, Israelanjja reyiyätwa Jerusalén marcana," 
Ecclesiastes1:13 ucatsti nayajj catuyastwa yatjjatañaru, uqhamarac take cunanacatejj aca oraken lurasqui ucanacjjata. ¡Cunja ch'ama lurañanacsa Diosajj jakenacar churi, uca lurañanacampi jisc'achatäpjjañapataqui!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ucatsti nayajj amuytwa cunanacatejj aca oraken lurasqui ucanacajja inamayaquiwa, thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhamaquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 ¡C'umüqui ucasa janiw chekaptayañjamäquiti, jan phokhatäqui ucasa janiw jacthapiñjamäquiti!" 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ucatsti nayajj chuymajjanjja sistwa: “Acajj nayajj jach'aruw tucta, uqhamarac qhitinacatejj Jerusalén marcana nayat nayra reyïpcäna ucanacat sipansa, juc'amp yatiñaniraquïtwa; ucatsti takew catuyasiracta juc'amp yatiñanïñataqui, uñt'irïñataquisa, uqhamarac pisi amuyt'anïñataqui, ucatsti pisi amuyt'anjama parlañataqui, take ucanacasti amuyatajjatjja thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhamaquiwa” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes1:17  
Ecclesiastes1:18 Chekpachansa sinti yatiñanïñanjja, janiw samarañajj utjquiti; juc'ampi yatiñanïñanjja juc'ampi t'akhesiñaquiw utjaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ucatjja chuymajjanjja saractwa: “Jichhasti nayajj yant'äwa cusisiñana; suma jacañanwa jicjjatasï” sasa. ¡Ucampis ucajja inamayaruquiwa tucuwayi! 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ucatjja nayajj sistwa: “larusiñajja lokhe cancañawa, cusisiñanacasa janiw cuna asquïcaraquisa.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Yatiñampi apnakata amuyojjanjja, munäyätwa yant'aña vinompi cusisiña, ucatsti uca machañaru catuyasirista ucati jaketaquejj asquïspajja aca oraken jact'at urunacapana uc yatiñataqui." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Jach'a luräwinacwa lurta; palacionacwa sayt'ayta; uvas yapunacajjas utjaraquituwa. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ucjjarusti yapunaca, pankar yapunacaraqui lurasta, ucanacaru achu alinaca ayrusiracta." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Estanquenaca luraracta, ayrut achu alinacaru umampi irpjjatañataqui;" 
Ecclesiastes2:7 alasiractwa sirvirinaca chachatsa warmitsa, utjaraquituwa utajjan nacit sirvirinacajjasa; uqhamaraquiw utjitu walja vacanacasa, ovejanacasa, nayat juc'amp nayra Jerusalenan utjapcäna ucanacat sipansa." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Montonanacwa apthapta kori, kollke, suma imasitanacajjasa, ucanacasti nayra reyinacancänwa yakha provincianacana. Utjaraquitänwa k'ochurinacasa chachatsa warmitsa, jakenacan cusisiñanacapäquis ucanacasa, uñt'atanacajjasa waljaw utjitäna." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nayajj jach'apuniw tucjjäyäta, uqhamarac qhitinacatejj nayat nayra Jerusalenan jacapcäna ucanacat sipansa, juc'amp yänacanïyätwa. Ucjjarusti take yatiñjja janiw chhaktaycäyätti." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Cuntï muncäyäta ucjja luräyätwa; cunampitejj cusisiñ muncäyäta ucampejj cusisïyätwa. Chuymajjanjja take luratanacajjatwa cusisïyäta, ucatsti uca cusisiñawa nayan pagojjäna." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ucat nayajj lup'ista take luratanacajjata, uqhamarac kawkha ch'amatejj apsutäqui ucanacatsa, ucatsti amuyasiractwa take ucanacajj inamayaquiwa, thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhamaquiwa, ucatjja janiw cuna asquis aca orakenjja utjquiti." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ucatsti amthapisiractwa yatiñata, pisi amuyt'anïñata, uqhamarac pisi amuyt'anjam parlañatsa. ¿Cunat juc'ampsa luraspa nayjjaru reyïcani ucajja, janiti nayra cunatejj luratäcäna ucaquïcanejja?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ucatjja nayajj uñjtwa yatiñajj juc'amp asquïtapa, pisi amuyt'anïñat sipansa, cunjämatejj khanajj juc'amp asquïqui ch'amacata sipansa uqhama." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Yatiñanejja sumwa nayrapampi uñatati, ucampis pisi amuyt'anejja ch'amacanjamwa sarnake. Ucampis amuyaractwa paninpacharusa pachpaquiraquiw suyt'asqui," 
Ecclesiastes2:15 ucatwa sista: “Cunatejj pisi amuyt'aniru suyt'asquejja ucaraquiw nayarojj suyt'araquitu, uqhamasti wali yatiñanïñajjajja janiw nayataquejj cuna asquïquisa.” ¡Ucasa inamayaquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Yatiñan jaketsa, pisi amuyt'anitsa janipuniw qhitis amtascjjapjjaniti; urunac pasjjatatsti takew armatäjje, uqhamarac yatiñanisa, pisi amuyt'anisa pachpaquiw jiwapjje." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nayajj jacañarojj uñisïyätwa, take cunatejj aca oraken lurasqui ucan naya toke sayt'asitap laycu. Take cunasa chekpachanjja inamayaquiwa, ¡thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhamaquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Uñisiraquïyätwa take cunanactejja aca oraken lurascäyäta ucanacaru, take ucanacjja nayjjaru jutañapäqui ucar jaytañajjataqui." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ucatsti, ¿qhitirac yatispa nayjjaru jutcani ucajj ch'iqhïchini, jan ucajj pisi amuyt'anïchini ucjja? Ucampis catuntasispawa take cunanactejj wali ch'amampi, yatiñampi aca orakena lurcta ucanacjja, ¡ucasti inamayaraquiquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Aca orakena luratanacajja uñjasinjja, llaquisïyätwa uca take luratajjata." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Maynejj yatiñampi, uñt'añampi, suma luraña yatitampi luratapajja jaytjjañataquiquiwa, qhititejj jan lurcäna take ucanaca jupan catuntasiñapataqui. ¡Acasti inamayaquiwa, uqhamarac jach'a jan cheka luräwiraquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Uqhamasti, ¿cuna ascsa jakejj apsu aca orakena take ucanac lurasinjja, uqhamarac uca take llaquisisinjja?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Take jacañapanjja t'akhesiñaquiw utji, uqhamarac llaquisiñanacaquiwa; janiw arumasa amuyupanjja samarquiti, lup'iscaquiwa. ¡Ucasti inamayaquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Jakejj mank'asispa, umasispa, uqhamarac luratapampisa cusisiraquispa uqhamanwa asqui luraspa. Amuyt'aractwa acajj Diosataraqui jutatapa." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Jan jupäspa ucasti, ¿qhitirac mank'aspa, cusisiraquispasti?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Chekpachansa Diosaw churi yatiña, uñt'aña, uqhamarac cusisiña qhititejj jupatacjamäqui ucaru; ucampis jucharar jakerojja lurañwa churi apthapiñataqui, uqhamarac imasitanaca montonañapataqui, ucatsti qhititejj jupatacjamäqui ucar churjjañataqui. ¡Acasti inamayaquiraquiwa, thayarus catthapï siscsna uqhamaquiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Aca orakenjja take cunas horasaniquiwa; take luräwinacataquisa mä horasaw utji: 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Naciña horasa, jiwjjaña horasa. Ayrunac ayruñ horasa, uca ayrutanac jiq'iraña horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Jiwayañ horasa, kollañ horasa. Tucjañ horasa, utachañ horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Jachañ horasa, laruñ horasa. Llaquisiñ horasa, cusisincaña horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kalanac willtañ horasa, kalanac apthapiñ horasa. Khomantasiñ horasa, jaljtañ horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Thakañ horasa, chhakayañ horasa. Imañ horasa, jaktañ horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Ch'iyanokañ horasa, ch'ucthapiñ horasa. Amuct'añ horasa, parlañ horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Munasiña horasa, uñisiñ horasa. Nuwasiña horasa, sumancañ horasa." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Jakejj, ¿cuna ascsa apsojja uca take luratapatjja?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nayajj amuytwa Diosaw uca ch'ama tucuñanaca jakenacar churi, uca lurañanacan sarnakapjjañapataqui." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Diosasti horasaparuwa take cunsa suma luri; uqhamaraquiw jupajj jaken chuymaparu amuyt'ayi cunatï wiñayäqui uca, janisay jakejj takpacha amuyt'cpan Diosan luratanacapa, uqhamaraqui cuntï lurcani ucanacata." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nayajj amuytwa, jaketaquejj asquiwa jacañapana cusisiñapajja, uqhamarac suma sarnakañapajja." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Diosaw churistojja ucatwa jiwasajj mank'tansa, umastansa, uqhamarac luratanacasatsa cusistanjja." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Amuyaractwa take cuntï Diosajj lurqui ucajja wiñayäniwa. Ucarojja janiw yapjjatatäcaniti, janiw apakatäcaraquinisa; Diosaw uqham luri, ucarojj ajjsart'añampi uñjatäñapataqui." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Janiw cunas utjquiti cunatejj nayrajj jan utjcäna ucatjja, janiraquiw utjcaniti cunatejj jan utjqui ucatjja. Diosaw wastat utjayascaqui cunatejj nayrajj utjcäna ucanacjja." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Uñjaractwa aca orakenjja ñankha luräwinaca, jan wali sarnakañanacampi cawqhantï asqui cheka sarnakañajj utjañapäqui, uqhamarac suma sarnakaña." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ucatsti nayajj sistwa: “Diosaquiw chekapar uñj-jjani, asqui jakerusa ñankha jakerusa, mä horasa utjatapata take cuna lurasïwitaquisa, uqhamarac take cuna lurañataquisa.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ucjjarusti saractwa: “Jaken sarnakäwipata, Diosaw jakenacarojj yant'asqui, amuyasipjjañapataqui jupanacan animalanacjamäpjjatapata.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Chekpachansa jakenacasa animalanacasa pachpa tucuyaniquïpjjewa: maynis maynisa pachpaw jiwapjjani, takenitaquisa pachpa samsuñaquiw utji. Jakesti animalatjja janiw cunans jilancquiti; take cunas inamayaquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Takenis mä tucuyäwiruquiw sarapjje; takenis lak'ata luratäpjjewa, uqhamaraquiw takenis lak'aru tucjjapjjani." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 ¿Qhitis yati jaken ajayupan alajjpachar saratapjja, uqhamarac animalan ajayupas orake mankharu saratapjja?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nayajj amuytwa jaketaquejj janiw cuna asquis utjquiti, jan ucasti luratapampi cusisiñaquiw utji, ucaquiw juparojj wact'araqui, janiw qhitis juparojj uñacht'aycaniti cunatejj lurascani ucjja, jupan jiwjjatapatjja." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ucatsti uñjaractwa aca oraken maynir t'akhesiyapqui ucanacsa. Ucatjja uñjaractwa t'akhesiyatanacan jachapjjatapa, ucampis janiw qhiti chuymachiris utjquiti; t'akhesiyirinacapajj ch'amampiw apnakapjje, ucampis janiw t'akhesiyatanacar qhiti chuymachiris utjquiti." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ucatwa jiwjjerinacarojj waliqui jiwjje sista, qhitinacatejj jacasipqui ucanacat sipansa." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Uqhäcchisa aca panpachanit sipanjja juc'ampi asquincapjjewa qhitinacatejj janïra nacipqui ucanacajja, jupanacasti janïraw uñjapquiti aca orakena ñankha lurañanacjja." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Uñjaractwa irnakañanacansa, uqhamarac suma lurañanacansa envidiasiñaquiw utji mayninac toke, ucasti inamayawa, thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhama." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Jakenacajj sapjjewa: “Pisi amuyt'anejja amparapwa khomjjarusi, ucatsti jupa pachpaw tucjasi” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ucampis nayajj sistwa: “Mä juc'a samart'añajja asquiwa, pä ch'ama karitat sipansa, thayaru catthapiñ munasa” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Maysar uñtasinjja, uñjaractwa aca orakenjja yakha inamaya:" 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mä sapa chacha, jan amigoni, jan wawanacani, jan jilanacani, janirac cunapachas mä juc'sa samart'quiti, kamir cancañapa uñjañsa karjascaraquiti, jisct'ascaraquisa: “¿Qhititaquis take acanac lurtjja? ¿Cunataquis cusisiñajjsa imt'astjja?” sasajja. Ucampis take acanacajj inamayaquiwa, mä jathi k'epïcaspas uqhama." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Mayni sapat sipansa paniniw juc'amp asquejja, uqhamatwa juc'amp luratas utjaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Maynitejj jupanacat liwischi ucajja, mayniwa wayti. ¡Ucampis llaquisiñawa qhititejj sapäcasina liwisqui ucajja, janiw qhiti waytiripas utjcaniti!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Uqhamaraqui, paninitejj chekpacha iquintjjapjje ucajja, maynit mayniwa junt'thapisipjje; ucampis mayni sapajja, ¿cunjämarac junt'thapispasti?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mayni sapajj atipjatäspawa, ucampis paninejj atipapjjaspawa, uqhamaraqui quimsat c'anat wisqhajj janiw mäqui t'akascaspati." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Maya toketjja, asquiwa mä pobre waynajja yatiñanïchi ucqhajja, pisi amuyt'ani awqui reyit sipansa, jupasti jichhajj janiw cuna ewjja arsa catokcaspati uca laycu." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Uca waynajj carcelat mistusinsa tronona reyïcchispa uca rey lanti, jan ucajj pobresana jaquiritsa reyïñaru purcchispa ucajja, nayajj uñjtwa, jakenacajj jupar munapjjatapa aca orakena." 
Ecclesiastes4:15  
Ecclesiastes4:16 Jupajj walja jan jact'caya jakenacarusa apnakcchini ucasa, janiw uca jakenacasa, wawanacapasa jupampejj cusisitäpcaniti khepürunjja. Ucasti inamayaraquiquiwa, thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhama." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Cunapachatï Diosan temploparu saräta ucqhajja, sarnakañanjja sum amuyasim, juc'amp jac'achasim ist'añataqui, pisi amuyt'an jakenacjama mäqui jan arscamti sacrificio churañataqui, jupanacasti janiw amuyasipquiti jan wali luratanacapsa." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Lacamampejj jan mäqui arsumti, janirac lup'imsa Diosatac mä cuna lurañataquisa, Diosajj alajjpachanquiwa, jumasti aca orakenctawa. Ucatwa juc'aqui parlañamajj waquisi." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Walja lup'iñansti iquiquiw purisjje, uqhamarac walja parlañanjja lokhe arunacaquiw tucjje." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Cunapachatï cun lurañataquis Diosar arsüta ucajja, janc'aquiw phokhäta, jupataquejj janiw chuymar purt'cayäquiti pisi amuyt'aninacajja. Phokham cuntï lurañatac arscta ucjja," 
Ecclesiastes5:5 ucampis asquiwa jan cuna arsuñasa, phokhäwa sas jan phokhañajja." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Jan munamti lacama jumar juch lurayañapjja, ucatsti Diosan qhitanitaparu jan sañamataqui: “Pantjastwa” sasa. ¿Cunatsa Diosarojj parlatamampisa colerayäta, lurctas ucanacsa tucjayaraquïtajja?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Uca laycu, wali lup'iñanacanjja utjiwa cunayman arunaca, uqhamarac jan wali amtañanaca, ucampis jumajj Diosar ajjsaram." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Mä marcantï uñjsta pobreru t'akhesiyiri, uqhamarac cheka asqui lurañaru mayjt'ayirsa, jan muspharamti ucatjja, jilïrjjarusti imt'asquiwa mayni juc'amp jupat jilïri, ucatsti uca paninjjarusti mayni jupanacat juc'ampi jilïriraquiw imt'ascaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 ¡Ucanacarupï marcajj nayrakataruw sarti sapjjejja, cunatejj achqui ucajj takenitaquejj ucatarac reyis mank'araqui!" 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Qhititejj kollke munqui ucajja juc'ampwa muni; qhititejj kamirïqui ucajj, jan utjirinjamaquiwa amuyasi. Ucasti inamayaraquiquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ucampis juc'ampi kamirïñanjja, juc'ampiraquiw mank'erinacajj uñsti. Utjirinejja, ¿cuna asquiraqui apsusti nayra mayampi uñjasasti?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Qhititejj irnakqui, juc'sa waljsa mank'chi ucajja, sumaw ict'asi; ucampis kamirirojja janiw iquiyquiti kamir yänacapajja." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Aca orakenjja chekpachansa uñjtwa wali llaquiscaya, kamirejj yänacapjja jupan jan walt'añapataquiquiw imasi;" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 mä jan wali alaquip lurirejja tucjaspawa uca kamir yänacapjja, ucatsti mä wawanïchini ucasa, janiw jupar cuna jaytañas utjcjjaniti." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Cunjämatï aca oraker jutcäna uqhamaquiraquiw sarjjani: K'alalaquiw naci, irnakatapatsti janiw cunsa apascaniti." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ucasti wali llaquiscayawa, cunjämatejj aca orakeru jutcäna, uqhamaquiraquiw sarjjani. Ucatjja, ¿cuna ascsa apsuwayi uca take inamaya irnakatapatjja?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ucjjarusti, take jacañapanjja ch'amacanwa sarnakawayi, jan walt'añana, t'akhesiñana, llaquisiñana." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nayajj mä suma ascwa jicjjatta, ucasti mank'aña, umaña, uqhamarac take irnakatampi cusisiña, aca oraken mä juc'a jacaña Diosajj churistu ucana, ucaraquiw jiwasar wact'araquistu." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Maysa toketjja, Diosajj qhitirutejj wali kamirïña churqui ucarojja, ch'amwa churaraqui cunatejj jupar wact'qui ucata mank'añapataqui, uqhama uca take irnakatata cusisiñajja Diosataracwa juti." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Jacañapatsti janiw llaquiscaniti, Diosaw cusisiñampi chuymapar phokt'i uca laycu." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Aca orakenjja mä jan waliw utji, take jakenacaw ucjja yati, cuntejj uñjcta:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Yakheparojj Diosajj walja jilarquiri suma yänaca churi, ucatsti cunanactejj munapqui ucanacajja janiw jupanacar pist'quiti; ucampis Diosajj janiw take ucanacatjja cusisiyquiti, jan ucasti yakhanacaw ucatjja cusisipjje. Acasti chekpachana wali llaquiscaña inamayaquiraquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mä chachajj patac wawanïscaspawa, ucatsti walja maranacas jacascaraquispawa; ucampis walja jaccasinsa, janitejj yänacapampi cusiscani, ucatsti janiraqui sepulturarus sum imt'atäcaspa ucajja, nayajj sistwa uca chachat sipansa mä sullunucuta wawaw juc'amp asquïsquejja." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Uca wawajj ina ch'usarus chhaktcchini ch'amacaru, cawquintejj sutipas armatäjjani," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 uqhamarac janis intsa uñjcchini, cunsa yatcchiniti, ucampis uca chachat sipansa juc'amp samarañanïniwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Jupajj pä waranka marasa jacchisapäna yänacapata jan cusisisa ucajja, ¡panpachanis pachpa chekaruw sarapjjejja!" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Jakejj mank'añataquejj irnakapuniwa, ucampis janiw sisthapquiti." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 ¿Cunansa mä yatiñan jakejj jilanquejja mä pisi amuyt'anit sipansa? Yatiñanacwa jilanquejja jacañapana sarnakañapataqui. 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Asquiwa nayrampi uñjañajja, uñjaña munañata sipansa. Ucampis ucajja inamayaraquiquiwa, thayarusa catthapï siscsna uqhamawa." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Cunatejj jichhajj utjqui ucajja, uqhampunïnwa, ucasti yatisiwa cunäquitejj uca. Janiw qhitis nuwascaspati jupat sipana jila ch'amanimpejja." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Chekpachansa walja parlañanacanjja, jan wali arunacaquiwa utji; ucampisti janiw cuna asqui jicjjatañas utjquiti." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Uqhamasti, janiw qhitis yatquiti cunatejj jaketaqui asquïqui uca inamaya sallkjjata jact'ata jacañapa urunacapana ucjja. Urunacapasti mä ch'iwjamaquiw pasjjani, ucatjja, ¿qhitiraqui yatiyaspasti cunatejj aca oraken pascani, jiwjjani uca khepatsti?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Suma k'aphinacat sipansa, asquita uñt'atäñaw asquejja. Yuriña uruta sipansa, jiwaña uruwa juc'amp asquejja." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Cusisiñaru sarañata sipansa, jiwirin utaparu sarañawa asquejja. Jiwañajj take jakenacan tucuyäwipawa, ucatsti jaquirinacajj amuyt'asipjjañapawa." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Laruñata sipana jachañaw juc'amp asquejja, ajanurojj janis wal lurcchini, ucampis chuymarojj ascwa luri." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Yatiñan jakejj jiwañatwa lup'isqui, ucampis pisi amuyt'anejj cusisir sarañatwa lup'iscaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Pisi amuyt'animpi aytatäñat sipansa, yatiñan jaken arunacapar jaysañaw asquejja." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pisi amuyt'anin larusitapajj cunjämatejj ch'aphinacajj ninan naqhantasajj t'akarquejja uqhamawa, ucasti inamayaquiraquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Jan wali lurañanacajj yatiñan jakerojj pisi amuyt'aniruw puriyi, churäwinaca chilltañasti jan waliruw chuymap tucuyaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mä cuna luräwi kalltañat sipansa tucuyañawa juc'amp asquejja. Jach'a jach'a tucuñat sipansa, llamp'u chuymanïñawa juc'amp asquejja." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Jan colerasiñampi atipayasimti, colerasiñajj pisi amuyt'an jakenquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Janipun jisct'asimti, “¿Cunatsa nayra maranacajj ancha sumäna?” sasa. Uca jisct'asti janiw ch'iqhin jisct'apäquiti." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Aca oraken jaquirinacataquisti yatiñanïñajja ancha asquiwa, uqhamarac mä herenciäcaspas uqhamawa." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Yatiñajja jakerojj arjjatiwa, cunjämatï kollkejj arjjatqui uqhama, ucampis yatiñ cancañajj jilanquiwa yatiñaniru jacaña churatapata." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Sum uñjam cuntï Diosajj lurqui ucjja, ¿qhitis asquichaspa cuntï jupajj lurqui ucjja?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Sumancaña jutipanjja cusisim; jan walt'aña jutipansti amuyt'asiraquim, mayasa, mayasa Diosanquiwa, ucatsti jakejj janipuniw yatquiti cunatï jutir urunacana jutcani ucatjja." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Take acanacwa uñjawayta aca juc'a inamaya jacañajjanjja, suma jakenacaw jiwapjje, jupanacajj suma jakëpcchi ucasa, ucatsti ñankha jakenacajj jan walsa lurapcchi ucasa, walja maranacawa jacapjjaraqui." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Jan sinti suma jake tucumti, janirac sinti yatiñanis tucumti. ¿Cunatsa juma pachpajj aynacht'ascätajja?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Jan sinti khoru jake tucumti, janiraqui sinti pisi amuyt'anis tucumti. ¿Cunatsa janïra horasäquipana jiwätajja?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Jan sinti inampst'añampi atipjayasimti, jan ucasti wali amuyt'asisa sarnakam. Qhititejj Diosar ajjsarqui ucajja, take acanacampejja asquiruw mistsuni." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Mä marcan tunca jilïrinacat sipansa, yatiñ cancañaw ch'am churi yatiñanirojja." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ucampisa aca orakenjja janiw qhitis asqui jakejj utjquiti, janipun juch lurasa asqui lurirejja." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Jan ist'amti take cuntejj parlapqui ucanacjja, uqhamatwa jan ist'cätati sirviriman jumjjat jan wali parlatapjja." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Walja cutiwa jumajj mayninacjjata jan wali parltajja, ucsti juma pachpawa sum yatistajja." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Take acanacwa yatiñ cancañampi thakta: “Yatiñanëjjawa” sasa, ucampis yatiñ cancaña jicjjatañataquejj janiw ch'amanïcäyätti." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 ¡Take cunatejj utjqui ucjja janiw jicjjatcäyätti! ¡Wali ch'amawa, janiw qhitis amuyt'caspati!" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nayajj yatjjatañaruw uchasta, ucanacsti suma yatjjatañaruraqui, uqhamat cuna asquïcataynatï uca jicjjatañataqui. Ucatsti amuyastwa pisi amuyt'anïñajja jan walïtapa, uqhamarac jan wali sarnakañajja lokhe cancañätapa." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Jiwañat sipansa juc'amp jan wali jicjjataracta, ucasti cawquïri warmitejj chuymapampejj mä sipitampjama sallkjqui, amparanacapampisa catuntcaraqui ucawa. Qhititejj Diosataqui asquïqui ucajja, uca warmitjja jaltaniwa, ucampis jucharar jakejj uca sipitaruw jalantani." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Naya, yatiyirejj, cunäcataynatejj ucanac thakasaw ucanac jicjjatta:" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ¡cuntï chekpachana thakcta ucjja janiw jicjjatcti! Waranka chachanacatjja maynicwa asqui jakjja jicjjatta, ucampis janiw mä asqui warmsa jicjjatcti." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Acacwa nayajj jicjjatta: Diosajj jakerojj asqui luräna, ucampis jakew jacañapanjja jan walt'añanaca thakasiwayi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 ¿Qhitis yatiñanimpi chicachasispajja? ¿Qhitis take jacañjjata khanañchaspajja? Yatiñ cancañajj jaken ajanupjja khantayiwa, khoru ajanupsa koñaptayaraquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Reyin arsutapjja phokhätawa, uqham phokhañataquiw juramentompi arstajja Diosan nayrakatapana." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Jupan nayrakatapatjja jan mäqui sarjjamti. Jan walinacarusti jan mantamti, jupasti cuntï muncani ucwa lurani." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Reyin arupajj jach'a cancaña aruwa, ucatsti, ¿qhitis saspa: “Cuns lurta” sasajja?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Qhititejj mä arsuta phokhasqui ucarojja janiw cuna jan walis pascaniti, ucatsti qhititejj yatiñanïqui ucajja yatiwa cunapacha, cunjäma phokhañsa." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Chekpachansa, take cuna lurañataquisa utjiwa mä horasa, uqhamarac cunjäma lurañataquisa, ucampis jaken mä jan walt'añapaw utji;" 
Ecclesiastes8:7 jakejj janiw yatisquiti cunatejj jupar pascani uca, janiraquiw qhitis utjquiti jupar nayrakata yatiyirejja." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Jacaña catjjäsiñataquejja janiw qhiti ch'amanis utjquiti, jiwañjjarus janiw qhiti ch'amanis utjcaraquiti. Janiw qhitis jaltcaspati uca nuwasïwitjja. Ñankha jakerusti janiraquiw jan wali luratapasa khespiycaspati." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Take acanacwa uñjta aca orakena cunanacatejj lurasqui ucanac uñt'añaru uchasta ucqhajja, uqhamarac jaken ch'amanïtapsa masinacaparu jan walinac lurañataquisa." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Uñjaractwa, ñankha jakeru qhititejj kollan chekata jithektasa sarnakqui ucaru, jakenacajj wali jach'añchäwimpiw imapjje jiwäwipana; ucatsti cawqui marcantejj jan walinaca lurcäna ucanacjja, janiw qhitis ucatjja amtcjjeti. Acasti inamayaquiwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Jan wali luratanacapata jan jucha uñt'ayatajja, jakenacarojj jan walinaca luraña juc'amp yatichi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Uqhamasti jucharar jakejj walja cuti juchanaca lurcasasa, walja maranacawa jacascaraqui. (Nayajj yatiraquïyätwa, qhitinacatejj Diosar jach'añchapqui, uqhamarac ajjsarapqui ucanacajj sumaqui jacasipjjatapa." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Ucampis jucharar jakenacataquejj jan waliw jupanacatac utji, uqhamarac jacañanacapas mä ch'iwjamaw mäqui pasawayi Diosar jan ajjsartapjjatap laycu.)" 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Uqhamaw aca orakenjja inamayaqui asqui jakenacajja t'akhesipjje jucharar jan wali jakenacäcaspas uqhama, ucatsti jucharar jakenacasti cusisipjjaraquiwa asqui jakenacäcaspasa uqhama. Nayajj sistwa: —¡Acajj inamayaquiwa! —sasa." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ucatwa nayajj sista: —Cusisiñajj utjpan —sasa. Aca orakenjja jaketaquejj asquiwa mank'añanaca, umañanaca, uqhamarac cusisiñanaca. Ucaquiw jaketaquejj utji irnakatapatjja, Diosajj aca oraken jacañ churqui uca urunacapana." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Aca orakena take cunatejj lurasqui ucanaca yatekañaru, yatiñaru, uñjañaru uchasta ucqhajja juc'ampiwa amuyasta, jakejj janiw amuyt'caspati Diosajj lurqui ucatjja, aca oraken cunanacatejj lurasqui ucatsa, maynejja uruy arumasa jan icthapisa thakascpan. Jakejj wali ch'amanacsa tucchini ucasa, janiw yatjjatcaspati; yatiñan jakejj “Yattwa” sischinisa, chekpachansa janiw jicjjatañataqui ch'amanïcänti." 
Ecclesiastes8:17  
Ecclesiastes9:1 Take chuymaw take acanac yatjjatañar uchasta, asqui jakenacana, uqhamarac yatiñan jakenacan luratanacapajj Diosan amparapancatapa. Jupanacan nayrakatapancchi munasiñasa, uñisisiñasa ucajja, jakejj janiw yatquiti ucanacatjja." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Uqhamasti uca pachpawa takenirusa suyt'asqui asqui jakerusa, jucharar jakerusa, suma jakerusa jan wali jakeru, k'omaru jan k'omaru, sacrificio churirirusa jan churirirusa; uca pachparaquiw suyt'asqui suma jakerusa, jucharar jakerusa, juramento luririrusa, jan luririrusa." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Aca orakena take cunatejj lurasqui ucanacatjja acawa jan walïquiti, takenirusa uca pachpawa suyt'asqui. Maya toketjja, jaken amuyupajj ñankha lurañampi phokt'atawa; lokhe cancañaw amuyupana atipji take jacañapana; ucatsti tucuyarojj jiwañaruquiw purjje." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ucampis qhitirutejj jacañajj churatäqui ucataquejj juc'amp suyt'añapaw utjasqui. Jiwat leonat sipana jacasquir anuwa asquejja. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ucjjarusti, qhitinacatejj jacasipqui ucanacajja yatisipjjewa jiwjjañanacapa, ucampis jiwatanacajj janiw cunsa yatipquiti, janiraquiw cunsa jicjjatapcaraquiti, jupanacajj armatäjjatap laycu." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ucanwa jupanacan munasiñapajj tucusjje, uñisiñapasa, envidiasiñapasa, janipuniw aca orakena cuna lurañanacatejj utjqui ucanacjja lurcjjapjjaniti." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Uqhamasti jichhajj cusisiñampi t'ant'am mank'asim, uqhamarac vinomsa umasim, juman luratanacamajj Diosataquejj asquïtap laycu." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Jank'o isimpipuni isthapisim; p'ekemarusa k'apquir kollanacampi uchasipunim. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Jacañamanjja munata warmimampi cusisim sapa horasana, Diosajj aca oraken juc'a jacaña churctam ucana; aca oraken ucatac irnakatanacamatjja ucacwa apsütajja." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Cuna lurañatejj jumataqui utjcani ucjja ch'amamarjam luram, jumajj sepulcror sarcätas ucanjja janiw cuna lurañas utjquiti, cuna lup'iñasa, uñt'añasa, janiraquiw yatiñanïñasa utjquiti." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Aca orakenjja yakhampwa uñjta, t'ijuñanjja janiw wali t'ijurinacapuniti atipt'apquejja, jan ajjsaririnacapunisa nuwasïwina atipjapquejja; janiw yatiñanïpqui ucanacapuniti t'ant'anïpquejja, ch'iqhinacapuniti kamirïpquejja, suma yatichatanacapunisa suma catokatäpquejja; jan ucasti horasajj jan walt'añajj takeniruw puri." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Maya toketjja, janipuniw qhitis yatisquiti cuna horasas jupar wact'ani ucjja; cunjämatejj chawllanacajj känan catuntatäpjjejja, jamach'inacas sipitaru jalt'apjjejja, uqhamaraquiw jakejj jan amuycay horasaw mä jan walt'añan catuntat uñjasi." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Aca orakenjja uqhamaraquiw uñjaracta, ucasti amuyatajjatjja jach'a yatichäwiniwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Juc'a jaken mä jisc'a marcajja, mä wali ch'aman reyin nuwantataw uñjasi, uca marcarusti nuwasiñataquiw muyunti." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ucampis uca marcanjja yatiñan mä pobre jakew utjäna, yatiñapampejj uca marcarojj khespiyasapänwa, ucampis janiw qhitis jupatjja amtascänti."
